Friends,

**It’s time for an honest conversation.**

The Democrats are outraising me, I’ll state the obvious.

**[BUT - we don’t have to outraise them to flip the Senate red. I just have to close the gap and get more and more patriots like YOU involved in this grassroots movement.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d42b80113b1f4df8bb1a14744e3ae97f&_e=FeJ_iKDECsHFoY5QGwcVHYTPh4D7W3F1LVCGMfs-edBfeEgmG1OEyGwt9T1BYZvwZYkn5QA0GqOfXnhv9IYO1Pj_yGU6eGA1W8PDlBr459EEnKaVOJJu5YSAQG8iZzqCXdzBfCfAKTSG1e0tvy9TzdBhK2TouyJk4xt3o0GnXQDKMB912NbSBzs5NXMZt9illD_aagyk2Sv7d44cmxjZVXvsy_G2UQKdGCvAk4G4Y0lLeSRPGyh_lhiPixjHVbHli7vjHNj0ethq1YzfcPd2v2eAJgrPQN17IiH9nrgZyQMRUg6dGrsGUuQdZJIBtfR5uoIRo255CelEeGEqzBxKA4RfnPrGNQ4LJ85mYNCQ-JhV8rPCJBH8T4MaSFMjENCDSKpFALBC9PQFftHvQCDk83iFoEUldsUBHWYXZvYtCD8%3D)**

Let me be clear: this is still anyone’s election despite the Democrats outraising me and other Republicans across the country last Quarter.

**[I am 400% impact matching every donation before the end of the day to gain major ground on the Radical Left!](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d42b80113b1f4df8bb1a14744e3ae97f&_e=FeJ_iKDECsHFoY5QGwcVHYTPh4D7W3F1LVCGMfs-edBfeEgmG1OEyGwt9T1BYZvwZYkn5QA0GqOfXnhv9IYO1Pj_yGU6eGA1W8PDlBr459EEnKaVOJJu5YSAQG8iZzqCXdzBfCfAKTSG1e0tvy9TzdBhK2TouyJk4xt3o0GnXQDKMB912NbSBzs5NXMZt9illD_aagyk2Sv7d44cmxjZVXvsy_G2UQKdGCvAk4G4Y0lLeSRPGyh_lhiPixjHVbHli7vjHNj0ethq1YzfcPd2v57Z5sfaFGAU-eDOEDNaV05ISCd6ssxbmLkzf9qZUqW8zxMZO2e7Xk5h79ZU6tyW7vzKZU81TBvPhVwvjFemCvctsDdXkLGcUpmEE6B9Io8aUGBxvDOK2c6nxY2-8Na4kyTQoeJSyUbhW5lqkRwPNDg%3D)**

If there’s one thing that I (a hillbilly) know how to do best, it’s getting scrappy. I’m not going down without a MAJOR fight. I hope you aren’t either. The Radical Left might be outraising us, but I KNOW that they have nothing to celebrate - and I’m determined to keep it that way this November.

**[One last shot to impact your donation 400%! I’m not going to offer this again for a while, so I really hope you choose to take me up on it!](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d42b80113b1f4df8bb1a14744e3ae97f&_e=FeJ_iKDECsHFoY5QGwcVHYTPh4D7W3F1LVCGMfs-edBfeEgmG1OEyGwt9T1BYZvwZYkn5QA0GqOfXnhv9IYO1Pj_yGU6eGA1W8PDlBr459EEnKaVOJJu5YSAQG8iZzqCXdzBfCfAKTSG1e0tvy9TzdBhK2TouyJk4xt3o0GnXQDKMB912NbSBzs5NXMZt9illD_aagyk2Sv7d44cmxjZVXvsy_G2UQKdGCvAk4G4Y0lLeSRPGyh_lhiPixjHVbHli7vjHNj0ethq1YzfcPd2v45yoPtB_U5fE6PqKHYiuNXKIEZc2cdzSyFxy_0zvKwTUutOPgTvZM9vfN8cf_e9L1BtvYfcUsvfZtAXTNuLPlZiQmGJ1-Hj4m5A3FaQ9gDH-4zjc5iIciVvdta0IF9vVcLjR3ZIb9drlwp-Ngl4hEw%3D)**

JD

Let me be clear: this is still anyone’s election despite the Democrats outraising me and other Republicans across the country last Quarter. If there’s one thing that I (a hillbilly) know how to do best, it’s getting scrappy. I’m not going down without a MAJOR fight. I hope you aren’t either. The Radical Left might be outraising us, but I KNOW that they have nothing to celebrate - and I’m determined to keep it that way this November. Best, JD Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
why I’m reaching out...
| | |
---
Friend,
My name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. You might know me as a former Congresswoman from Florida, as a gun safety advocate, or as the Democrat running to defeat GOP Sen. Rick Scott and flip the Sunshine State blue.
I’m in this race because the fate of our democracy is on the line. I believe we deserve better than Rick Scott and the many other extremists in Washington.
Families like yours are at the heart of my campaign. That’s why I’m reaching out: **I want to know what’s on your mind, what keeps you up at night, and what you want Democratic leaders to focus on most.****[_So please, will you take my exclusive Democratic strategy survey before midnight tonight? Your feedback is incredibly important to me and will help shape our election year strategy._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79328270/456142798/303833451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk823-su-nd&refcode=jtk823-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwNjkzYWYtODNjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UsyXLLmTdWVm5o_eB-mWMhdiYXnrO7FHs5niyw0Dl6E=&emci=2ee4fd34-54cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=380693af-83cf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Take the Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79328271/456142800/303833451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk823-su-nd&refcode=jtk823-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwNjkzYWYtODNjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UsyXLLmTdWVm5o_eB-mWMhdiYXnrO7FHs5niyw0Dl6E=&emci=2ee4fd34-54cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=380693af-83cf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3969733)
---
For the past few years, I’ve watched a minority of extremists push my state down a path of right-wing extremism and divisiveness, all while attacking our cherished democratic institutions.
The far-right leadership in my state has banned books, created an elections police unit to scare voters, attacked LGBTQ+ youth, and left families defenseless against gun violence. In Washington, Rick Scott has pushed for a nationwide ban on abortions, an end to Social Security, and higher taxes on working families.
Unfortunately, this is a trend that’s happening across the country. **It keeps me up at night — wondering what kind of country we’ll leave behind for our children. And I know I’m not the only one.**
But if Democrats like you and me all stand together, we can defeat this dangerous extremism and leave behind a better, kinder country for our children. That’s why your input is so important as we iron out our campaign strategy. **[_So please, will you respond to my new survey before midnight tonight to help me build a winning strategy and flip Florida blue this year?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79328272/456142801/303833451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk823-su-nd&refcode=jtk823-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwNjkzYWYtODNjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UsyXLLmTdWVm5o_eB-mWMhdiYXnrO7FHs5niyw0Dl6E=&emci=2ee4fd34-54cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=380693af-83cf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Take the Survey Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79328273/456142802/303833451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk823-su-nd&refcode=jtk823-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgwNjkzYWYtODNjZi1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UsyXLLmTdWVm5o_eB-mWMhdiYXnrO7FHs5niyw0Dl6E=&emci=2ee4fd34-54cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=380693af-83cf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=3969733)

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

One year has passed since I wrote this urgent email to patriots across the country.

Please take a moment to read it ... then take action.

**Crooked Joe Biden just released a top 9-11 terrorist from prison in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.**

Majid Khan worked directly for Al Qaeda senior leader Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, who planned the deadly September 11th terrorist attacks.

Khan has been moved to Central America.

**Meanwhile in Washington, D.C., innocent Americans are abused and tortured as political prisoners and domestic terrorists in the Washington, D.C. jail.**

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

**Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):**

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either won’t flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for YEARS...in AMERICA.

**They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on Fox News, One America News, Newsmax and other cable news outlets.

I’m proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. (I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime)

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

As you recall, I emailed you a few months ago about the heartbreaking letter signed by 34 of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters jailed there. Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for YEARS...in AMERICA. They end their desperate letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment! This can’t go on. That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP. I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years. You’ve seen me on Fox News, One America News, Newsmax and other cable news outlets. I’m proud to say I won a court ruling that President Bill Clinton committed a crime when he illegally the White House files of Kathleen Willey. clean_body: We’ve spent this year building the strongest analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that will lead Democrats to victory – as a member, you can help fuel this vital work. | | | | | ---|--- Here are three reasons why you should become an Official 2024 DLCC Member → 1\. Grassroots support has carried Democrats to victory, helping us win over 30 special elections last year, defend our majorities in Pennsylvania and Virginia, and close in on Republicans’ majority in the New Hampshire House. If we want to expand on these wins in 2024 and beyond, we need you on our team. 2\. Over 98% of our donations come from grassroots donors like you. Donations of $10 and $25 add up to make a huge impact in electing state Democrats. 3\. By becoming a member, you’re powering the DLCC’s groundbreaking strategy. We’ve spent this year building the strongest analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that will lead Democrats to victory – as a member, you can help fuel this vital work and help protect President Biden’s electoral path to victory this year. name: Eve Schiff
subject: Today is my wedding anniversary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek, this
is Eve Schiff, Adam’s wife.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=feb2024_abs_em.sAcFHC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]Today is our wedding anniversary, and while Adam is hard at work
reaching voters and preparing for tomorrow night’s Senate debate, I’m
hoping you can pitch in a few dollars to his campaign.

When we were first introduced, it was a match made in heaven... and quite
literally a match.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]Adam and Eve Schiff dancing at their wedding

We first met on a tennis court in Los Angeles, where we played a mixed
doubles game set up by a mutual friend.

Rest assured, I whooped him. But he didn’t care. He called me up at work
the next week and asked me out to dinner.

Since then, we’ve played plenty of tennis matches (he’s improved his form
since then but I still beat him 💪 ).

And I’ve been by Adam’s side through some incredibly serious moments.

Did you know Adam lost his first two campaigns and didn’t win until we got
married? That was surely a coincidence...

In fact, during one of his campaigns, while we were recently engaged, a
voter called to give us advice — not on the campaign, but on our getting
married. He advised us to think hard about it, and said of his own
marriage: “It’s no picnic.”

Well, every year as we celebrate our anniversary (this is number 29), we
take stock of what a good year it has been, then look at each other and
remember “no picnic.” Never fails to make us crack up.

But in all seriousness, from his first campaigns to writing legislation to
make a difference in Californians’ lives, to serving as lead impeachment
manager, Adam has been diligent and fiercely committed to the values we
share.

Truth and honesty. Helping those in need. Defending the Constitution.

That’s why he’s running for the United States Senate — to carry on this
work.

I believe that our country is filled with promise and that our democracy
is precious. And fragile. Adam has been on the frontlines, protecting it.
He always will be. And you have always been by his side. I am so grateful
for that.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=feb2024_abs_em.sAcFHC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]So today, with just over two weeks to go until his primary election,
will you show your support for Adam by making a small contribution to his
campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1008&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1009&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1010&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1011&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for being a part of this journey with Adam and me. It means so
much to us to know you believe in Adam’s work and vision for our country.

— Eve

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3734?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240219_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]DONATE WEEKLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=5512%2E5257348%2E4g8iDN ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: America First Messaging Alerts
subject: America First = First Priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
We can no longer play global caretaker

| [ ](http://links.davisforin.com/u/click?_t=3e9e6097e33749f890adf7e8c9b24a4e&_m=e06bda8051ff4e828dadb65b4a3864cb&_e=9EePbFsI48PB8vLNyXdYKs_VfsbqVvvbRgkpbtbn13gn5sxjY3ANKMFSCdfPDWEBXVur8b2nI8jflYZq-eBIW3RhbEujjCZc_iZihA7arlW8e2Lyq4S6a_HpwHnys03B2F1FNFt7-LWQilwWmq8Zdx6iCZ8Q8Iokcl_5pSHJFDJM4qrbj1XMo6ylVzWhQ9AsYiLUIqZufW2uX94uJlAhHH-zZDN2lbyHovgGrNcUIrD5cfNvdBKKIcQlGeYItF0TbviPGknE3Z9jHc0mLjURoJxpXRqyHFZyRoI3f95H-pDYR33R7Wnxvvmd1cANimFbTJUXgtxxXWop6QDxJxAKhA%3D%3D)
---
****AMERICA LAST?****
**The route our country is on is unsustainable.**

Our borders are nonexistent, communities have become more dangerous, family savings are depleted, and household debt is skyrocketing.

There are so many issues facing Americans in these trying times, yet our leaders in the nation's capitol are refusing to address the issues facing our citizens here at home.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Mosaics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one.
#
Sometimes people will ask me, “There is so much happening in the world and in the country, and it all feels so big and overwhelming - what can I even do as one person?” What I try to convey every time is that no action is too small, and if you feel so moved, you can and should start with whatever is within arm’s reach or in your backyard. You can even start with yourself.
We live in a culture of grand gestures and big ambitions, but that also means we should be wary of how much “get-rich-quick” thinking can perpetuate beyond money schemes and into the idea that any/all major, impactful shifts happen suddenly and in dramatic fashion with a handful of major figures. The fact is, that couldn’t be further from the truth. Revolutionary and transformative changes, from the inside out, happen more like mosaics.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240219.TR1MVO&refcode=em20240219-5843-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5843%2E2526796%2EOLJ-rd)
Think of it like this: no matter who we are, how visible or invisible or big or small, each one of us is just one tile. Whether you see that as liberating or disempowering is a matter of perspective. When you have your eye pressed all the way up to the single tile of a mosaic, it can look quite meaningless. A single piece of shattered glass could look worthless. Or perhaps a piece of small painted porcelain could seem beautiful, but too small to “be” anything. Or maybe a stunning rare slab of stone may think itself as the biggest piece when it is really a corner tile. The secret is, it’s all significant.
**The two secrets of mosaics are:**
1. Each piece (us + our small actions) is far more powerful and meaningful than we know, and
2. Each piece (we) need each other far more than we realize.

When we are able to step back from thinking our own broken, unfinished pieces are not enough, and start to see how all the other little pieces glistening alongside us start to form eyes and ears and abstract beauty and landscapes and symbols and more, we realize that just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one. So just do the small thing - for yourself and others. Choose your actions with humility, love, and enthusiasm. It means more than you know, and the world thanks you for it.
Take heart,
Alexandria
Alexandria is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality, and address the climate crisis.
Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. [If you can, please consider making a donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240219.TR1MVO&refcode=em20240219-5843-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5843%2E2526796%2EOLJ-rd)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240219.TR1MVO&refcode=em20240219-5843-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5843%2E2526796%2EOLJ-rd)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240219?refcode=em20240219-5843-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&refcode2=5843_2526796_OLJ-rd&akid=5843%2E2526796%2EOLJ-rd)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240219-5843-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&akid=5843%2E2526796%2EOLJ-rd)**
---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: We're passionate about this fundraising model because it means the campaign is powered by you. | | | 🇺🇸 To all Joe Biden supporters: If everyone getting this message made a $10 monthly recurring contribution to the President's reelection, we'd have the resources we need to defeat Trump and we’d never have to send another email asking for donations. But the truth is, this campaign is funded by a small percentage of grassroots supporters who make a big impact. Without those donations, big or small, we'd have no chance to win. Our average recurring donation is around $15. Some give more, some give less. All that matters is that you are choosing to stand up for the President's reelection and the future of this country today. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly recurring donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Here's a message from the President himself: If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly recurring donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | With high hopes for the success of our campaign, 🇺🇸 Team Joe 🇺🇸

clean_body: = Peter, it’s James Carville, and I’m raging at the newest development out of Nevada: A shady MAGA billionaire just poured $2 MILLION into this race to try and flip Nevada red. I’m not going to mince words – national Republicans think they can BUY this seat. Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies are going to spend every cent they can to take back the Senate. If you want to defend the Senate, this race should be at the very top of your priorities list – and Jacky Rosen needs our immediate help to fight back against her opponent’s new multi-million dollar warchest. She is counting on a surge of grassroots support to counteract the deluge of money flooding into this race. name: Katie Britt
subject: I have something exciting to share with you, Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
My whole life, I’ve defied the political establishment | Fellow American,

I have something special for you.

My new memoir [**“God Calls Us to Do Hard Things”**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a277c902167452eb66c533a64d30672&_e=bJrgjaNMBX3kMYC27Mwwrrp-8i4HoIK75rfUye4tAe1djHHrTMgJM-K5CBxXj-WD1GJX63higWjky7RvTW7iZ5jjG1HDdC4eUBtyBjO5LbiKmsA29lsLx7wpVfoF_TGhxmZXTIqUvRYg4keRSemEh_yhB1Y7vr75dRpoPaeh5pULx-h-whnOyeLOcziBFQ6Vkf4wf1nvyewViMjygq8YE1dPilm9FuJW_lxxWNOTgh00RA_lKsM9sPHTpTDgNIhh8j3EWhKTodDgZtMbwNPL5DpGfqCkAAMYUL7LUXCrL8hEeEn2s0C9u7uMOgKqv59dPwAiCWFofyISl0fAcgvz_CoWW9tzrSqHEZ85hBLiAUnNXU0BBPkmbwo3cRDtKE5mZ6Olrz4Sdt8fz5KV-ahMYfo-h-cHb_uusFgQ15GIyrgoNHWXoq9iQaNihmz3i_hV) was recently released, and I want to send you a limited edition, hand-signed copy.

During my career, I’ve overcome setbacks, defied expectations, and shocked the political establishment by becoming [**the youngest Republican woman to ever serve in the United States Senate.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a277c902167452eb66c533a64d30672&_e=bJrgjaNMBX3kMYC27Mwwrrp-8i4HoIK75rfUye4tAe1djHHrTMgJM-K5CBxXj-WD1GJX63higWjky7RvTW7iZ5jjG1HDdC4eUBtyBjO5LbiKmsA29lsLx7wpVfoF_TGhxmZXTIqUvRYg4keRSemEh_yhB1Y7vr75dRpoPaeh5pULx-h-whnOyeLOcziBFQ6Vkf4wf1nvyewViMjygq8YE1dPilm9FuJW_lxxWNOTgh00RA_lKsM9sPHTpTDgNIhh8j3EWhKTodDgZtMbwNPL5DpGfqCkAAMYUL7LUXCrL8jqs7j_itKMAepuzvC33n1URuAuoyrcN78I8R8r2-ruL1-eE5pLr-Y0MDpWSAz0N8SAHjnja985dwHF-5OLNv0fb1GfKJuzeSVaunatoJ0_bfQW92a5B3A-KW8qTl3kfQ1FO4dP9M4bUIQcyVMgtV57) Now, I want to share some of my stories with patriots like you.

[**Follow this link to confirm your shipping address, and I’ll send you a special edition copy of my brand-new book right away. >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a277c902167452eb66c533a64d30672&_e=bJrgjaNMBX3kMYC27Mwwrrp-8i4HoIK75rfUye4tAe1djHHrTMgJM-K5CBxXj-WD1GJX63higWjky7RvTW7iZ5jjG1HDdC4eUBtyBjO5LbiKmsA29lsLx7wpVfoF_TGhxmZXTIqUvRYg4keRSemEh_yhB1Y7vr75dRpoPaeh5pULx-h-whnOyeLOcziBFQ6Vkf4wf1nvyewViMjygq8YE1dPilm9FuJW_lxxWNOTgh00RA_lKsM9sPHTpTDgNIhh8j3EWhKTodDgZtMbwNPL5DpGfqCkAAMYUL7LUXCrL8hzfbVe3cZOl1NyQV2DfI6jVTBx1d-eiIMo2UE8MCYWbDQoroSg8kmKQXzik-UTRtqviOcaqjaihM_WN4JaoB12B65-Igfu2aDgMQKNEmnS7jLQsgghcI7oUoCh9KtuNRcMx5BfGquaKOw7iqaQL6Mn)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6a277c902167452eb66c533a64d30672&_e=bJrgjaNMBX3kMYC27Mwwrrp-8i4HoIK75rfUye4tAe1djHHrTMgJM-K5CBxXj-WD1GJX63higWjky7RvTW7iZ5jjG1HDdC4eUBtyBjO5LbiKmsA29lsLx7wpVfoF_TGhxmZXTIqUvRYg4keRSemEh_yhB1Y7vr75dRpoPaeh5pULx-h-whnOyeLOcziBFQ6Vkf4wf1nvyewViMjygq8YE1dPilm9FuJW_lxxWNOTgh00RA_lKsM9sPHTpTDgNIhh8j3EWhKTodDgZtMbwNPL5DpGfqCkAAMYUL7LUXCrL8h-WUoEEQaRo9E9ipZHHI4UTT9x36iH7wSNRT6qA8UinMgRUCiYEQbOky3XrSpWK0PvWHHVpJPb0ZsV9pz9kBlQuBO8zh147o19FhZys6kX8X9esujyXHau6OpHLVQWT997pXq64D255wCENcNQViPZ)

subject: 🇺🇸 Welcome to the Forward Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Good to have you.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=8bN0s8S48ukOuMaWzZXwkQhKlv5I-M7NyCRBIqr07WA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_one&n=1)
---
Tuesday, February 20, 2024 | Peter, welcome to the movement. We’re not sure if you already recognize this, but you’ve just done something very significant... **you’ve taken the first step to moving this country FORWARD.** There are more than 30,000 volunteers across all 50 states who are part of this movement and committed to changing the way we do politics. You are now part of a community of over 60% of voters who believe a new political party is needed. **What happens next...** In the coming days, you are going to receive a handful of communications to help you become better acquainted with the Forward Party. **To make sure you receive every email, please add info@forwardparty.com to your contacts.** If you use Gmail, simply drag this email from your inbox to your "Primary" tab. More to come soon! In the meantime, keep up with us on social media. **You can help spread the word and engage in thoughtful dialogue with fellow Forwardists:**[**LinkedIn**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=NeYFSHY3wLA-A6ZQ4K_eCvyPLw9XUBWykYMXk8oA7_JR4y_Ea5eRBMxhn_bF8MSU&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_one&n=2)**,**[**Twitter**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tl56VdKwRtzOMov_fFSgVZ0&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_one&n=3)**,**[**Facebook**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6i5PvN90auMLBUZcrsOIFE9U7FrC1iKCEQJNoE2Nf0VR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_one&n=4)**,**[**Instagram**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73yykDVHBy9R7_37SfsWquiKcPpl4Exm_p1rhAI9Pc7NA6&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_one&n=5)**,**[**YouTube**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNxuXNwbqz_G4Mz33GgyYdDwLBac0zK-Y4qjy8_Fupjjv&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_one&n=6)**.** Thank you for joining. Not Left. Not Right. Forward.

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Want to win a new rifle?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Dear Supporter,
Our chance to retire anti-gun Tony Gonzales is almost here, and I need your help to expose his voting record. If you donate by the end of the month, you will be entered to win the 21st Tec .300 Norma Mag Bolt Action Package - as seen on Demolition Ranch!
For every $5 donation, you get one entry into the contest. You can donate here: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/8EfAbUr763QdPV3bVoZll1gg/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg).
I've already notified the winners of our last contests, and I'm looking forward to calling another supporter. Texans are searching for real leadership, and they are tired of representatives like Tony Gonzales who compromise on our Constitutional rights.
Tony voted for Biden's gun control, and he refused to stand with Governor Abbott to secure our border. I need your help to show Republican primary voters the truth about Tony.
Please help me defeat Tony Gonzales by donating at: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/8EfAbUr763QdPV3bVoZll1gg/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg).
Tony failed to stand up for Texans, but I will always fight for the interests of our district. In less than a month, we can retire Tony Gonzales and restore pro-liberty leadership.
Please help my campaign at:[ ](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/VxGrR1IJEhKTsq9CZj1VTQ/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg)[https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/8EfAbUr763QdPV3bVoZll1gg/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg).
If you donate by February 29th, you will be entered to WIN a brand-new rifle. Every $5 donation gets you one entry into the contest. More importantly, you'll be helping me defeat a "Republican" who supports gun control and refuses to secure our border.
Thanks for all your help.
Respectfully,
Brandon Herrera
PS: Donate to be entered to WIN a 21st Tec .300 Norma Mag Bolt Action Package at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/8EfAbUr763QdPV3bVoZll1gg/mpQlXnxG9hqtZkMVaIV0wg).
Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee

name: Team Williams
subject: …Ready for it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Running for office was _never_ in the cards for Brian. Throughout his life, he was always proud to serve behind the scenes in whichever way he could — both as a service member and as a trauma surgeon. But as he saw crises around him, he realized that passing legislation to bring solutions was the ultimate way he could serve his community and make a difference.

The end goal of running for TX-32 isn't to advance his career, boost his ego, or add "Congressman" to his resume — **he’s running to pass legislation and build a better future for the community he calls home.**

Texans start voting tomorrow, and _we need your support more than ever._ Our team is going door-to-door, mailing out flyers, texting, calling people – doing everything we can to reach as many voters as possible before polls close on March 5.

[**The best way you can help us is by making a donation to ensure we have all the resources necessary to help Brian surge ahead. name: Mario Fratto
subject: Your chance to help elect an America First conservative.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mario Fratto Victory Fund
body:
Dear Friends and Supporters of Mario,
As we count down to petition time, we need your help to get Mario on the ballot for Congress in NY-24!
Would you be a part of our _24 for 24 Campaign_? We are looking for volunteers to commit to collecting at least 24 signatures each in District 24!
What does this entail? For a candidate to be on the ballot for Congress, they need hundreds of signatures from registered Republican voters in our district. You can help by gathering signatures - either going door to door or simply asking your friends and family. We will have several weeks to fill our petitions, starting February 27th. It's not hard!
If you would like to help our _24 for 24 Campaign,_ simply reply to this email or sign up to volunteer at [https://MarioforCongress.com/](https://contact.marioforcongress.com/l/LgysJ4ZD4KqBFOfJ3D0t8A/GPoodKn7JENfe9HpIXh95A/XiOmFSwU2VR5NEMKEfLwSQ).
We will provide additional information and answer any questions you may have. A big THANK YOU to those who have reached out to help already! We couldn't do this without you.
Join us in this exciting next step to sending Mario Fratto to Congress for District 24 in 2024!
Sincerely,
Christa Kinsley
Mario for Congress
Paid for by the Mario Fratto Victory Fund
---
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.marioforcongress.com/unsubscribe/DcYTMztrxrjVeDKNJbAwaHQ763ToeaEN2nSSvy2Hdc763HA/nxG7l763IKA5cTSSe6OMO58g/XiOmFSwU2VR5NEMKEfLwSQ)

body:
Join a legendary lineup of artists and activists in support of Cornel West for President!

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_2_22&n=1)

This is your chance to be part of a historic evening filled with inspiring conversations and performances.

* **Time:** 7:00pm - 9:30pm
* **Location:** The Center at West Park, 165 W 86th Street, New York, NY 10024, United States. [View on Google Maps](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=A4oYUob8aNzHSss-CXKe7s4o58By7jbFosbSSCE5AMh0maIV45fRwMhc1ih17ncjnRTteQHDikq0LnZHagnfu4uHMA_YDUVA2yMl3OxFIDYHN6L3hP7q1cbd_7P3sR4HnfZmSPDDekOJrp7HBNFx6FBdqXiO3M8Iz2-oLjNrbaE1pmCU_bA7nzaOEFZy5B83O2l7PbLkN6YtdK_cNhc7y4Zkl8LNAyLE3xHzYRwwvVVwucHwHcfld-HNgRCgOGDtlKCPXkMcl3nVJX60B3ZDT0jxO4FEAT4f4blyQisLxWzKkyd1pHokKqyTkp7ej2TUbPQYJ0qH4dMrVpRaBRfIbA&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_2_22&n=3)

| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/nyc?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_2_22&n=5 "CLICK HERE TO RSVP") [CLICK HERE TO RSVP](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/nyc?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nyc_2_22&n=5)

body:
Inside is a voter guide that shows you the issues of this week's debates and why Dan Cox won "hands down." | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/breaking-cd6-debates-results-dan-cox-won-hands-down?e=5bb5efcda7)

| |

| [Contribute $100 to Reach 367 Voters with Dan Cox>>](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=89c8ecc1c5&e=5bb5efcda7 "Contribute $100 to Reach 367 Voters with Dan Cox>>")

George Washington in prayer during the bleak December 1777 at Valley Forge.
| |
# "DAN COX...YOU WON THE DEBATE HANDS DOWN, AND YOU HAVE MY VOTE." - GOP Elected Official in Western Md. District Six
Friend,

HAPPY PRESIDENT’S DAY! I just got off the stage from three full debates this week. **I won!** **I am the ONLY candidate who has ENDORSED PRESIDENT TRUMP and his America First agenda**.

I am writing with **_an urgent request for support_** to ensure the DC RINOs and slimy politicians do not buy this open seat in Congress. We need an America First leader with experience, and that is why I am running. **_BUT I NEED YOUR IMMEDIATE HELP AND COMMITMENT TO VOTE FOR ME._**

**_CONSIDER_ : my GOP opponent (and friend) Neil Parrott just trashed President Trump THREE TIMES in our debates this week – blaming him for the debt caused by DEMOCRATS IN CONGRESS at a time when Neil himself voted with Dems to increase COVID state benefits.***

Here are some of the highlights of the issues in our debates so you can judge for yourself:

***2021, HB 922. **

All my life and career as a husband, father, educator, constitutional attorney and legislator I have fought for our freedom and have never backed down. I’ve never taken a knee to the woke mob. I’ve never surrendered our freedom to international big money. I’ve stood up to tyranny.

While I passed my bills to fight human trafficking and fix our broken criminal code each passed UNANIMOUSLY in our Democrat-controlled Legislature, proving I know how to get things done. And I have proven I stand up for We the People.

I stood up and fought for you at the expense of my own popularity because I serve you, not the Swamp. And I pledge I will never sell you out as your Congressman.

**_My 17 years of constitutional litigation experience and over six years as an elected official, I am ready, experienced and proven to fight and work as a problem solver for you as your next Member of Congress_**.

Among all the America First agenda, I will fight to:
* BRING BACK JOBS to District Six and LOWER HOUSING COSTS AND PROPERTY TAXES,
* SECURE THE BORDER, STOP SENDING OUR MONEY TO FOREIGN WARS,
* REDUCE THE DEBT, PROTECT OUR DOLLAR, HEALTH AND EDUCATION FREEDOM,
* REDUCE CRIME and FIGHT FOR OUR SECOND AMENDMENT RIGHTS.

I humbly ask for your vote this **_May 14_**. And I urgently ask for your support NOW to reach our fundraising deadline to ensure that the RINOs and LIBERAL SWAMP do not steal this election.

Will you please make your generous contribution of $25, $50, $100, $350 today? Or some of you can join our Freedom Team, with $1776. **Every contribution counts; with just $100 I can reach 367 voters by mail, text, e-mail or social media.**** **

As a Christian, husband, father of 10 children and grandfather to three beautiful grandchildren, I am committed to the historic values and morality that has made this nation great.

Please stand with me now as I run and win this seat. Your immediate contribution is the fuel to get this done. Thank you and God bless you and God bless America.

Freedom and Victory,

Fmr. Delegate Dan Cox, Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives (Republican, CD6)

P.S. I am the only candidate who has won elections in the Blue areas of Frederick County where I won _the highest vote_ of any candidate as State Delegate. Help me do it again here!
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Bring The Federalist Papers to your home
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkvef3kp6fosidt18dhnehqijeptsbrgsv5bull8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o76cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqk97vcnoa7fe5ejeu3421e2gba5dlvlmk46ldc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o76cjh2bs)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp1rhdr45f0462cib4bcr5d7per7c8h4al4eu3ng_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o76cjh2bs)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5s45h8k6gevhu0affnkktukbp2lleolrkjmovpg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o76cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu39vob3ar4hp71hpum313agkdkn77a2nceur9i8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj1c9i61oj246h22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o76cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfpcpcb45luahnf4q1bhs00ed9iknsrh0vmic1eo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o76cjh2bs)_

name: Trump Train News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrvhoe9eqh03q9eg2v4d5nad1f8enm48adq9m5lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o74c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zal6gm42o7llcrh41l1pucgj00h0gm0fno1n0uto_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o74c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi0mehf78e94d1q07tp2d82caeric57fcobc1k20_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o74c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zodgataoclvfeenv30ld2hrl9tvtistt4knjchn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o74c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Your America
subject: Get “The Federalist Papers” on DVD
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39430%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sJ8GZd1b0EotQVtCGuApUg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39431%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qJOkzh4ZxbqalkpB0NneWA&sysid=1)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39432%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rji%2bvklRr4CprBDq76RhuQ&sysid=1)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39433%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7qgi7i3Yip8qpvcV4X8gkQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

---

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zako59futtm96ika9et1qdo6v0nlaai2bu6cvbb8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5h66o76c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Endorsement Alert: Mattress Mack
body:
| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
One week after receiving **Michael Berry's endorsement** to fire Dan Crenshaw, I'm _humbled_ and _honored_ to announce that I have also received the **endorsement** of **Mattress Mack**.

name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6lg7td3k9kdpri6cf8ovmmr2hdu1gb02tv3jmpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5j60ob4cjh2bs)
---
Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjm4kv2d8a7nks1c0pufqfs5is3e8a03gaivtkg8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5j60ob4cjh2bs)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6taf8o56td1tg5o4uuipid541qd366grv34i89g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5j60ob4cjh2bs)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _
|

We at America First Legal have just filed an absolutely momentous lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible! strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:#1 - Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race#2 - Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter. The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all#3 - Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.Make no mistake: Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring.Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here! Stephen Miller President, America First Legal | | America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | America First Legal Foundation611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE | #231Washington, DC 20003 Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://email.update.truedaily.news/c/eJyUkc2K3DAQhJ9Gvtm0WvLPHHwY0DgEMpNAAnsUWqnHFsiykWSWvH3wMvsAuXY1VfVRb3d9Nz74OD_MSmNxUaes97RlHY1efAh1okylTvRMGgFlDVgjaF65kV-M5F1FI-9hkCg5QLWMQohL93znKHh7IQd9K9oWgRt6vg_UYuXH0wcQAQbZyq7pehqkvfQgyDwHR0zCsTtTqCnpIGd8-NtE-shVGJdS9szEleHEcAp7c1bMzgRqyB0Mp7JQPScy5dXbWnP-iilbJhQAR_EAlPgDOvVT3W6_GXZHWXXejmSJCXWy72SLj_NLWsn5Y2VC0Wp8eB2tWXfj58iEKgt9Jn4GfslbLBQLE-rtNn2_X7_d9K9r_Uc96i_2Ko1u__Ah-Nz1TMJ8mjd2W6vyPzP8CwAA___QM47e)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Don Huffines
subject: Are you sick and tired of sellout “Republican” politicians? I am.
body:
The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, but expecting different results.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-tr/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-r/) FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Noah Betz; 281-928-2089
[noah@bluestonecreatives.com](mailto:noah@bluestonecreatives.com) Hello fellow patriot!Are you sick and tired of sellout "Republican" politicians? I am. Early voting in the TX primary elections starts on Tuesday! You must get out and vote. The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, but expecting different results. Let's stop voting for the same career politicians who have repeatedly failed to pass GOP priorities. It's time for change. It's time for actual Republican leadership.In this email, I will share my endorsements in the Texas House primaries. [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-y/) Before we get to the endorsements, I want to share my latest op-ed in The Telegraph._" There is no constitutional crisis unless the Governor moves on the powers he invoked. Without action, the events of the last few weeks have been pure political theatre. And what action looks like in the eyes of Texans is simple: first, make clear what is forthcoming. No vague allusions, no pulling punches. Next, solicit, if necessary, support from other states to work alongside state and national guards."_[_Click HERE to read my op-ed in The Telegraph._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-j/) **Texas House District 2** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-t/) "I am pleased to join Senators Ted Cruz and Bob Hall in endorsing _actual _Republican Brent Money for State Representative of Texas House District 2.""A devoted husband and proud father of five children, Brent understands the importance of strong family values, strong borders, and strong leadership. Brent will defend our Texas culture.""Brent Money will be a courageous leader, with no excuses, fighting for the Republican Party of Texas platform and legislative priorities."[_Share my endorsement with your friends and family in the district._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-i/) **Texas House District 15** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-h/) _" Representative Steve Toth has always been at the forefront of the fight for liberty in the Texas House. He is a true patriot who understands the importance of defending our God-given liberty. I am confident he will defeat his opponent and continue to be a real asset in Austin."_[_Share my endorsement with your friends and family in the district._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-k/) **Texas House District 17** _" I endorse Tom Glass for Texas House in District 17. No one understands better than Tom Glass the threat to Texas from the globalists and corrupt federal government. No one knows better than Tom how Texas can enforce the Constitution to defeat those assaults. We need Tom in the Texas House!"_ **Texas House District 53** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-u/) _" Wes has been working on gun-related legislation in Austin for over a decade, most recently as state director for Gun Owners of America. Wes has my full support and will fight for Texans' God-given right to self-defense."_[_Share my endorsement with your friends and family in the district._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-o/) **Texas House District 60** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-b/) _" Mike Olcott is a fighter who has been in the trenches of the liberty movement for decades. Mike is a courageous leader, with no excuses, fighting for the Republican Party of Texas platform and legislative priorities."__" Mike Olcott is the best candidate in HD 60 to take on the chaos on our southern border. No one else has the personal experience, the knowledge, and the commitment to solve this border crisis like Mike Olcott. He has my complete and total support, and I urge everyone to vote for Mike Olcott for HD 60."_[_Share my endorsement with your friends and family in the district._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-n/) **Texas House District 62** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-p/) _" Shelley Luther is a proven conservative fighter who stood up to government tyranny when so few would. Shelley has my full endorsement, and I have no doubt that she will stand up for you against the tyrants in Austin!"_[_Share my endorsement with your friends and family in the district._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-x/) **Texas House District 64** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-c/) _" Our state, our citizens, and our culture are under attack. We need leaders who recognize this and have the courage to fight. With Andy Hopper in the Texas House, we can rest assured that our voices will be heard and our rights will be protected."__" I am proud to endorse Andy Hopper for State Representative of Texas House District 64. Andy is a true patriot who embodies the spirit of Texas and the values that we hold dear. He's a fighter for our rights, a defender of our borders, and a champion for our future."_[_Share my endorsement with your friends and family in the district._](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-q/) **Texas House District 65** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-emjhkd-yuddtktydi-a/) _" Mitch Little understands that our state, our citizens, and our culture are under attack. We need leaders who recognize this and have the courage to fight. Little will be a courageous leader, with no excuses, fighting for the Republican Party of Texas Platform and Legislative Priorities. name: Stephen Miller
subject: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
I have breaking news to share with you...

| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qhzhdxTY9d45IrHmkkL5-g~~/AARclAA~/RgRntwLeP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMjAmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9TUNBWi1Qb3BBJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEdXA3NwY0IKZc7BdNRlk2ovbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Friend, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**_DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS_ >>** _](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qhzhdxTY9d45IrHmkkL5-g~~/AARclAA~/RgRntwLeP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMjAmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9TUNBWi1Qb3BBJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEdXA3NwY0IKZc7BdNRlk2ovbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>_**_](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qhzhdxTY9d45IrHmkkL5-g~~/AARclAA~/RgRntwLeP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9hbWVyaWNhLWZpcnN0LWxlZ2FsLWZvdW5kYXRpb24vbWFyaWNvcGEtY291bnR5LWxhd3N1aXQtcG9wLWE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1SZXZTaGFyZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249QUZMX01DQVotUG9wQV8yMDI0MDIxMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAyMjAmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9TUNBWi1Qb3BBJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEdXA3NwY0IKZc7BdNRlk2ovbFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _
|

body:

Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osWQCa7i4N

Friend,
I have breaking news to share
with you...
We at America First Legal have
just filed an absolutely momentous lawsuit in Maricopa County,
Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and
egregiously violating the State of Arizona's election
administration laws.
The election interference and
systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are
appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences
for every American. We all know what's going on.
That's why we are taking action
to expose and punish those responsible!
DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS
>>
We strongly allege numerous
serious violations and criminal activity, including:
#1 - Maricopa County refuses to
maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots. In 2022,
these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes -
larger than the margin of victory in the state governor's race
#2 - Maricopa County ignores
mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed
or issued to a voter. The law requires tracking and reconciling
ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the
Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all
#3 - Arizona law requires ballot
drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials
positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots
into it. Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However,
Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop
boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting
For many years now, the Maricopa
County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have
consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe
these individuals are fully aware of their election law
violations.
Make no mistake: Our lawsuit has
been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being
tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that
occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent
election interference from occurring.
Thank you for your support of our
mission and historic legal actions here!
PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>
Stephen Miller
President, America First Legal

DONATE >>

an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation
to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent
allowed by law.

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJS2a1ALchB9DDAiGp-pvQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRntx-yP0StaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PT1XRUZJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMjBXA3NwY0IKZc4kg9RlkqGqI1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJS2a1ALchB9DDAiGp-pvQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRntx-yP0StaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PT1XRUZJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMjBXA3NwY0IKZc4kg9RlkqGqI1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yJS2a1ALchB9DDAiGp-pvQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRntx-yP0StaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PT1XRUZJTUFHRV9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAyMjBXA3NwY0IKZc4kg9RlkqGqI1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | ~ | | ~ Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. ~ Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_
