## Storms Strike California Again
[A second atmospheric river](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL9upzAQhJ_GdIvM4vCnoLgUdEl7JVrwAhsZ-yd7E3Rvf-Lqa7_RjEbf74_lgyRIPD7p4kn3tNCm8sMLAlpAt7jKTzszclvx1PR2cO3YN211Tm-W1sa3DdI4sndD1_bMw7h1w8qOfV_JhBadRbSNfesc1tZug_c44NC127pb4yx70ZTrryRRT97Dn_TDud7SVYXpVH0V0_4yOBuc7_uurxKfzODMEb7LQ5n05Gxw1vQqmrLwgzcKsqcchYAOkghrpo0L7CnDHlLyEg-gAhTTU4ebFW6JyhmekQtO0QJ6MhQlZYMzZXh_b-T7k76qPPnXLSFI6Xrj7HGRhH-f9b8G_wYAAP__0UV1PQ) made its way through central and southern California, producing heavy rains, hail, strong winds, and tornadoes. The powerful winter storm is expected to produce up to 10 inches of rain along the central coast and in the Santa Lucia and Santa Ynez mountain ranges before moving south. Officials in Los Angeles issued a flash flood warning for the nearly 1 million residents in the area. Numerous incidents of flooded roads, downed trees and powerlines, and mudslides were reported. [Photos and videos can be seen here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn-NvWHBQWxnYOiSLV07Whc44qswRIBC---rNmvH79Mbnt7HdbsiR073dzzItpA3dI2ftIEAKcBsZvQ2EAHpkaxa5Gr0eVF63O0ZlZKnmzb6FhaYlYGVzkr7hRCCAjeyBQlGAkglT7OBSUq3eg8rrLN2tyAHI8lzy2X6zJzaTiF-5yeVyeVjjHZv7VEH_TbAZYBL730K-asTtv2F_J6vJRL1OsDFYeSQS2IU2I5cHzsVdqLwk4oIMWfP6S4iJl8je6qiICdRU-5jsf7ROUau8zIYeT-Q459H-7fKTwAAAP__s7ZmOg). The last atmospheric river to hit California produced an [estimated $11 billion in damages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOpCAUhZ8GO831gqAFxTZ0s-2WhsHreDcIE2TG-PYbt_6r03w55-T785gfniOn12-_k61rnn2o_KUZW4QW1ayaxa5ESLIh2xsYlZxML5vNQhifg4ehpzAYaUhPND61GdQgvZYyNGwRUAEi9DBohR1AGJcFRxy1DM8VhAJauObS_c2c6kZrvPKXShfy3kS71fo-hPwl0Al053l2n8PXvPjrBgS6o-ZyCXSJzuMOXzknge6eFegABbp-usH8qRuV1AYfec0lsW9PTpVKe3fs7Ub-e7XFc1p9jAKdQT3oaZQARqBril3eJ8fIhzZCwWv3HP-_rD86-xcAAP__R8prHg), but officials said the new storm is not quite as severe.
## Pesticide Found in Oat-Based Foods
Researchers believe [80% of Americans have been exposed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSmzAQxvGnEd16xCJjXFDkCprMpU3pWUsrszmBHGkxw9tnnPra76t-_9-ft0-SJOvjFy08asw38iovviGgBXQ314QxMiN3DY_txQ6uu17arpnHob8OjK3z0XXxHO_D2fWe6Wypb6_BciMjWnQW0bb23Ds8WeuHEHDAoe_8PVrjLAfRXE5_sqw6c0xHfnE5-bw0aZxVn9V0PwxOBqd9309LXd-fwYlX2KrBaWZKOhucss5cDE6DhRyBFi7iaa2gXBWeucpbBTEX8DMv4ilBzNsaQNb3wkVyhb8bfXGBTFpBZ1JY6ABPW2WQNXJRSaIHBE50cIDndueiB1TdwmFwogIfH618PX76pozhuUtKUvuLcfaxkKT_Lv228r8AAAD___IbgjM) to the plant pesticide chlormequat, a toxic agricultural chemical linked to fertility and birth issues in animals. The pesticide was found in popular oat-based breakfast cereals like Cheerios and Quaker Oats. Individuals from three geographic regions were tested [between 2017 and 2023](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSmzAQgOGnEd16xCIDLihymaG7tFd6FrFYmxPoTlqZ8dtnkjr1X_3fx_v9nSTK8fhFO0-6pTt5lSffEdACurtr1mljRu4antrBjq67DW3XhKkd6br0g8O29TQMDpdhubULud5d-_VGjUxo0VlE29pr7_BirR_XFUcc-84vmzXO8iqa8uV3kkMDb_GVnpwvPu1NnILqVzHdD4Ozwfk8z8tejr_N4MwH1GJwDkxRg8E5aeBscPaBd_EUYUv1WEEO8IE5SyrwXemTMyTSAju9wFMtDBtnlSj6AimlcoGidX1BqY8HFy1wBlLQBJ9HOoGWVBV8iCnv_F1JDc6U4e2tlfQx_mzytH6dEqOUfjDOPnaS-O9G_2v7JwAA__-1sH58), and 80% of those tested had traces of chlormequat in their urine. Chlormequat is usually expelled by the body within 24 hours, but the high rate of positive tests indicated there was regular exposure. General Mills, the maker of Cheerios, and PepsiCo, the maker of Quaker Oats, [didn't comment on the report](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1yszAQAJ8GumPEIfNTUHwNnb82JSOkk3WxQA46TPz2mSRtui222Nm363w1HHm7_TcrjeLTbKzwk2YEVIB61qUbPRFSU9JYd6rXzdDVTRnGoVuGoTXK-sHapusvuh662tnGDZ2r0ZQ8okKtEFWtLq3GSinbO4c99m1jF68KrcixpL16T7xJIB9f6Ul7ZdNaxjGIPHLR_CtwKnA6z7Py6XM5Mm-U87dT4BTZU5ZXpAInG2hlayL4dGwOeAMbiHZOGT4Oc6cdkpEMScIvwmIyOfApuQyRtzs5eCShTdhECGSiBOCcD8qQ5XCvch_d4-QYObddodVtNRx_YuXPdV8BAAD__xN0dG8).
## President Biden Upset with Media Coverage
According to the publisher of the New York Times, the Biden administration is ["extremely upset"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1jLQmxcUPyNu_ztlRaBJd4TMVZMgvL2J1993Wg00jf6vq7L1XPm7f7fP8jVVBYfKr9pQYkg0Symiy4RIemOnBrBGj2NSnerM2lQSeNIFxyUilbHqG4JvcdJW7hgxw4BDSCCgstgsAcINka0aAcdbgmEAYpcy7P_LrzVlVL-lDc9-1AeXXZrrfsh9D-Bs8C5tdbvJXPlUM6BwHmjdgicT4rAGVDgrKaz_1TZVq4k1_I6SL72g6q8caRN-jvJcELOAKAMwmS7p4t745z5GEZh4P7wnH9f1D-d_AQAAP__CFtf_g) with the NYT's coverage of the President's advanced age. "_He is a historically unpopular incumbent and the oldest man to ever hold this office. We 've reported on both of those realities extensively, and the White House has been extremely upset about it,_" said A.G. Sulzberger. Questions surrounding Biden's age intensified after Special Counsel Robert Hur released his report earlier this month. Hur described Biden as an ["elderly man with a poor memory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL_u4yAQhJ8Gd1jrhfhPQXGNu1x7pYVhifeEsQUkvrz9Kal_5UjfaEbfn_tytxw5PX7bnUwNx2Jd5RctKBEk6kU33gQiJNWQ6QYYtZqGTjWbCQAQwNtb33nterJBTcM6BTd5NdzGoWGDgBoQoYNbr7EFcKP3OOLYK7cGEBrIcz1y-_fgVDcK8X28KLfu2JtotlrPItQvgbPA-bquNtnKR7Ix04vp-mAC50RXETiv7ClJ63dOXGr-kpL-1Uw7xbd8noWqTO8q3WfCPkiemcqnVIv8xucauWyUBc5NNv68OEYu_SA0PHbL8Xur_ijpfwAAAP__ukJsfQ)." The report received pushback from the Biden team, including a letter to the White House Correspondents Association.

Travel in your 80s? We can't reverse aging, but we can age better. Scientists have discovered a longevity molecule, Urolithin A, that restores and renews mitochondria--aka your cellular powerhouses. Meet [Mitopure](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskU-L20AMxT-NfNsga8aOe_ChYHzbLbSFHs3sjJKonT9mrKzpty8OaU89Pumnx0Pvx-vy6iRKvr65xKNeyuK8ygcv9EL4QnaxTRgvzMSm4bE942DNp3NrmtvonbN2sNRS6y22Ngydw9a53mE_YB8aGQnJIhG22PWWToh-CIEGGnrj3y8IFjmIlnr6WSTrjS_xd_ngevIlNXG8qa4bmM9AM9C87_tJJXGUzPmuVVRKPkigea0llUNvQPPTBMx817Rs5V49g5m-cuYdqCOcnwD1B5A4yD2BmTg5icfEu7Q6uWagzkyrq5oPuCPMvG-RVf_dSgAzzfz-lMr1MPr2S_KDf_sb87n3JStnBTN9_zID9W7bWJfA6iSCmZo6hnWXGGXrz2DxegR6_EL_28yfAAAA__-fCZJF)® by Timeline Nutrition, the only clinically validated, highly pure Urolithin A supplement. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74c00f16989e45fab30b73eeac8063bf&_e=DkfiP8XOeqNxHWiYl80nUE_krkJwtnwNV3cV3P6OqlEmWJ1b7-SuqMR95tueiLje6OtAo7JoWDOIp8dQdkTyW-5WsBC2d2jEVLggsZtLL23arm3qlbwTZQsJgUbIFUjf1Xt_km4SbpYyTWKTGKiz5JminRo8BG9NcYn-t1vGQjc7AqMVY0zcziV_h4xey6Dpi0Bg-dSGZElE8d2dahhw1ZUg6Ei2VacAHXv1Xzu9jvjiOmAAtjIEkxX5NW-sycgMtg_96aqmxsiV0YmI-URsDM7nUvRt4VqDnfRJMfEEebyiMvYiIfu3qaX9clp-8AI-Oky2p1lJLT1bYmrW_2oQHmi78B5EvfJGYop7QzAHCuN31tOhXDOeIZjt6JxwS1q1dh12bhVYnY-SntOJleEvaWhTh0EMrMCDvzdYYW4AFhw%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74c00f16989e45fab30b73eeac8063bf&_e=DkfiP8XOeqNxHWiYl80nUE_krkJwtnwNV3cV3P6OqlEmWJ1b7-SuqMR95tueiLje6OtAo7JoWDOIp8dQdkTyW-5WsBC2d2jEVLggsZtLL23arm3qlbwTZQsJgUbIFUjf1Xt_km4SbpYyTWKTGKiz5JminRo8BG9NcYn-t1vGQjc7AqMVY0zcziV_h4xey6Dpi0Bg-dSGZElE8d2dahhw1ZUg6Ei2VacAHXv1Xzu9jvjiOmAAtjIEkxX5NW-sycgMtg_96aqmxsiV0YmI-URsDJfc1W8OLsnlJszhoc6edF_3auTt__K0STSaQXxROmRAFzkvP-YiiqhLskvCIA4LKdwYGlEjPrNxjU_b5Je2-3e0GKDbZqmmfR2ANpX3T0sbaSYvX70fG8vZbrUvKYkLC6IBPC3l7RFFoPiAmfZ3um0%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74c00f16989e45fab30b73eeac8063bf&_e=DkfiP8XOeqNxHWiYl80nUE_krkJwtnwNV3cV3P6OqlEmWJ1b7-SuqMR95tueiLje6OtAo7JoWDOIp8dQdkTyW-5WsBC2d2jEVLggsZtLL23arm3qlbwTZQsJgUbIFUjf1Xt_km4SbpYyTWKTGKiz5JminRo8BG9NcYn-t1vGQjc7AqMVY0zcziV_h4xey6Dpi0Bg-dSGZElE8d2dahhw1ZUg6Ei2VacAHXv1Xzu9jvjiOmAAtjIEkxX5NW-sycgMtg_96aqmxsiV0YmI-URsDPDvzsYyw7JX56mgK4Uw4rRQoIBVhUCGJyT1YBU46dZAXMKxYWu8WwX-d8mXrt5MEaD9u3gjLH5vqzp7U_YtX6sir_7bbNtInnPfc6ld-fSU9x0yY315y3bs2fOfMpfMfGPBEbSJa55lbW1LuKr4SV8%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=74c00f16989e45fab30b73eeac8063bf&_e=DkfiP8XOeqNxHWiYl80nUE_krkJwtnwNV3cV3P6OqlEmWJ1b7-SuqMR95tueiLje6OtAo7JoWDOIp8dQdkTyW-5WsBC2d2jEVLggsZtLL23arm3qlbwTZQsJgUbIFUjf1Xt_km4SbpYyTWKTGKiz5JminRo8BG9NcYn-t1vGQjc7AqMVY0zcziV_h4xey6Dpi0Bg-dSGZElE8d2dahhw1ZUg6Ei2VacAHXv1Xzu9jvjiOmAAtjIEkxX5NW-sycgMtg_96aqmxsiV0YmI-URsDAKS-WZMhR3cvCas2qQyy0BcYU1KbdYBAj2tNiNRgsLb4LwU9d6IsD9oe45phdMXQ5UoPS1kGipUKZp8DIHbVEV93hSzQoVu5H-4Xssho6dLcTA7KuiMoh-JwncTr2b2fnVI8yPEVURuV13HtuUxlvI%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is flawed , outdated , and incapable of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist Papers. | | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of “The Federalist Papers” right now: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=529b77682ca048c9a784e7ea14efd329&_e=cGrINO4Co0TGL9aoSK0TthomHgvl4GtFy-XH7uJSmfe63EwMPzH5OG4C-AxTesN2a_qEvwTSrBLjEE648gFD8B8ZEuCM0nia-bXLialpiohekqsM6_cQ2qZMR9zxCtu2ByYHHj0HRKFRjXWqZCdz6icRWxKzoMPy2eVqupxeH3bHUIHlgbwx2MFuPSwLg0YR0DVmb8hrMUJIBGejlkkmk-fz0OjKS84CwsQVAcocp3Y_9fq_hromgQ4ALicimxYCMUhqWeplCBBAgsb3tSZbpDXpqTDeoyQtmicuTUh_av2e8alDudneeAsJjm6FNknVWUyTYhwXnjvZq7N7ydpAVxM8BubUJ7xnY7D84scrP66NpgpHA9230FFn7EpyWMhmS8qFW77ghqu-lXrwlPD7-CGyGloj_QfnQoEp5hfhwFKz9uZqEQADdtWAJ8aXHD63)

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=529b77682ca048c9a784e7ea14efd329&_e=cGrINO4Co0TGL9aoSK0TthomHgvl4GtFy-XH7uJSmfe63EwMPzH5OG4C-AxTesN2a_qEvwTSrBLjEE648gFD8B8ZEuCM0nia-bXLialpiohekqsM6_cQ2qZMR9zxCtu2ByYHHj0HRKFRjXWqZCdz6icRWxKzoMPy2eVqupxeH3bHUIHlgbwx2MFuPSwLg0YR0DVmb8hrMUJIBGejlkkmk-fz0OjKS84CwsQVAcocp3Y_9fq_hromgQ4ALicimxYCMUhqWeplCBBAgsb3tSZbpDXpqTDeoyQtmicuTUh_av3SD-fnFblmmePaicp6h-r2EVw7UU456F8rFfKz-gPqfoUX4VzSxjoo9K1tmCjnS3tNEwR-G_AQRN1C7OMBw7wiGxfWKgfb49urVmNxRvM3oyNz7R6iv2MTGG1erAU2DdCixsc4lGypY6K8oOa4nwLh)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=529b77682ca048c9a784e7ea14efd329&_e=cGrINO4Co0TGL9aoSK0TthomHgvl4GtFy-XH7uJSmfe63EwMPzH5OG4C-AxTesN2a_qEvwTSrBLjEE648gFD8B8ZEuCM0nia-bXLialpiohekqsM6_cQ2qZMR9zxCtu2ByYHHj0HRKFRjXWqZCdz6icRWxKzoMPy2eVqupxeH3bHUIHlgbwx2MFuPSwLg0YR0DVmb8hrMUJIBGejlkkmk-fz0OjKS84CwsQVAcocp3Y_9fq_hromgQ4ALicimxYCMUhqWeplCBBAgsb3tSZbpDXpqTDeoyQtmicuTUh_av1sqy6Izw8p1eFx3Vsw7262vyGHhtiJtfLpE9LW5SlsdkRw3UR8-CmcNoLbY5gRQTOKmcX7i2hrFjQifVmHsO49AHAVVgmaE6aGhuW_9w0LOhGxdToK2fQ2J2QYhMIGlzKkvEbUoDooj5ealLqGudFJ)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=529b77682ca048c9a784e7ea14efd329&_e=cGrINO4Co0TGL9aoSK0TthomHgvl4GtFy-XH7uJSmfe63EwMPzH5OG4C-AxTesN2a_qEvwTSrBLjEE648gFD8B8ZEuCM0nia-bXLialpiohekqsM6_cQ2qZMR9zxCtu2ByYHHj0HRKFRjXWqZCdz6icRWxKzoMPy2eVqupxeH3bHUIHlgbwx2MFuPSwLg0YR0DVmb8hrMUJIBGejlkkmk-fz0OjKS84CwsQVAcocp3Y_9fq_hromgQ4ALicimxYCMUhqWeplCBBAgsb3tSZbpDXpqTDeoyQtmicuTUh_av2OlXDJVXpGr1Bd6KO4EEPgxm0WSg2BwJusHL73TcVKiEHUhQxCy7Unnn4Mw9lnvON6WkYN--NnOn3boXwQqzam9aS8SXmYxPI9OEl_fR2LxqXa0JSXNBwK680qSL0XuFkgEJFlI4L0Szmiwjkl70U7).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0d250f9b50c4f8fa22d14b8ca4eaa75&_e=v9VMhi8_MlWFjdpQDf9c-fduqvO-GF2dDRspwOjrHBwQvmIDTa-fw-68a_92QKXjnbsgeyMWO3FfM0RH0G0vbnojFkdCqrsm8YflfTBIZv4PElwE0Vg3XAjXNxpjovrygAXxq3QdCDrEXWhkkSFqA8HitvlHK0YVpBTtOi4iYQnL9XLQghMh4K5kaGrvsXGmm_OvRClPy5Ar6wXKOGd03qO3-YC4InEzYlva_CsYlM6TUie4rW6Mj6EJ4YrxB6wYxdzDyKeZsgCEmofOG4dbyiGl7UPIkM-8cQtcLgqExtzwYtDDJKU7pelt8LCd1uQ_D9q44sqhnyaIMDjgWkP1BVFFi7Sbz_SQ6rbxalwDrIUSJt1Ep2WjWlnvfbSd1tHhWEdoLV86RdpfpPmLRATos2f3GIl8VaYMOCS9FKNcdMU%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0d250f9b50c4f8fa22d14b8ca4eaa75&_e=v9VMhi8_MlWFjdpQDf9c-fduqvO-GF2dDRspwOjrHBwQvmIDTa-fw-68a_92QKXjnbsgeyMWO3FfM0RH0G0vbnojFkdCqrsm8YflfTBIZv4PElwE0Vg3XAjXNxpjovrygAXxq3QdCDrEXWhkkSFqA8HitvlHK0YVpBTtOi4iYQnL9XLQghMh4K5kaGrvsXGmm_OvRClPy5Ar6wXKOGd03qO3-YC4InEzYlva_CsYlM6TUie4rW6Mj6EJ4YrxB6wYxdzDyKeZsgCEmofOG4dbyoT0QukqJLZQYBmiL98hd57SmQXdJ7q-r-T7vqB3bHys1yiM7kyWNFCx-g95RkZ_rv_Np39mQtAqEDHkipclu7Xa7Xms2TK7R6zof-Szk_Crc4ilNlkGhxT1rXEud5ND19NuVLjg564t99AIK97R7Os%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0d250f9b50c4f8fa22d14b8ca4eaa75&_e=v9VMhi8_MlWFjdpQDf9c-fduqvO-GF2dDRspwOjrHBwQvmIDTa-fw-68a_92QKXjnbsgeyMWO3FfM0RH0G0vbnojFkdCqrsm8YflfTBIZv4PElwE0Vg3XAjXNxpjovrygAXxq3QdCDrEXWhkkSFqA8HitvlHK0YVpBTtOi4iYQnL9XLQghMh4K5kaGrvsXGmm_OvRClPy5Ar6wXKOGd03qO3-YC4InEzYlva_CsYlM6TUie4rW6Mj6EJ4YrxB6wYxdzDyKeZsgCEmofOG4dbyrfodPPvG78LdEvVVBq_b5P6mzvnCyGMNvYds7E66eisrNPvZtOVlHSMXJrId-e6Kz-0ns8BzCkBUFKuQrDvVyfm14Kw6LIJg3Xrj2y2tR9TQlwEE39RtmEGa4wFbOJizTcfx3dK5uYeYIFBP7LAWdw%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d0d250f9b50c4f8fa22d14b8ca4eaa75&_e=v9VMhi8_MlWFjdpQDf9c-fduqvO-GF2dDRspwOjrHBwQvmIDTa-fw-68a_92QKXjnbsgeyMWO3FfM0RH0G0vbnojFkdCqrsm8YflfTBIZv4PElwE0Vg3XAjXNxpjovrygAXxq3QdCDrEXWhkkSFqA8HitvlHK0YVpBTtOi4iYQnL9XLQghMh4K5kaGrvsXGmm_OvRClPy5Ar6wXKOGd03qO3-YC4InEzYlva_CsYlM6TUie4rW6Mj6EJ4YrxB6wYxdzDyKeZsgCEmofOG4dbyqXoi73KnAy_4G9_a0yOcbEaBuyzxun67DFc3qvCAu8tfLS-073dSZf6-IYkIHH_DMVjIfvy1nxPqGOekksSQloRLkq1xOMrZ1GMDhvA1z-dTYYhxLhRCeVAMgXWDqceOZk2IhsEizmEKN272-JtTco%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Young
subject: They won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I couldn’t believe it...

| |
---
| | | _**- A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - **_
Dear, Friend,

You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story.

I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant.

When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy.

__In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election.__

But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. **Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. **

Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans.

_I 'm nothing special._ Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone.

But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. _The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. _

---
| | [SUPPORT YOUNG KIM TODAY](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7b9c7f5b348b4e2d8be7390ab7f1a3ae&_e=e88_XL9Y21F6qhpLpiwqSgZLNvGzGcYrHPlK36k-BUB-ZiGkcwbobumrnaf__kii8juUf0vLNlxohOSXpn2zzaRLL3Y45tno8ciAly5CJhzbPN8umGo9-Cq466Zw7_WAMIOdAQrVKXCoMPVunzlVz060R-Qn5QAmM9Xa5hygXESeoQHC-v2pAYc8tehO1mVB1YRtkwakKoK5dCOyfqFw4EpNQEFz7xXaWAfQ-zMtAI-GlHsYer8QryujQE_gMbwupJlOGQ7FgJHDaiXzWOIFki5lnzF1HUkZpl1dpohCsojq3mRXuWOtx5x8XT8-Gjl43vFYopqMcCiPZ7A9L-GX3Glkeu9hEr3xDgYFTeeY5soLqEZfq96wiEWsXskjJRtJP0IaUvhiArYrEj1SqbInfLlICsxQYkpSSGfankeozmAWhUQhszF1DKEgr3UTUkrraRWqNgvbeZ7e0dbxoNbZCw%3D%3D)

They've recruited progressive Liberals to run against me, pledged MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads & smear campaigns, and the White House even named me one of their TOP 18 targets.

I don't normally ask for help like this, but my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters just like you, and I urgently need your help to win my fight, Friend.

clean_body: I couldn’t believe it... | | | | | - A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - Dear, Friend, You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story. I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant. When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy. In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election. But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans. I 'm nothing special. Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone. But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. | | | | They've recruited progressive Liberals to run against me, pledged MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads & smear campaigns, and the White House even named me one of their TOP 18 targets. I don't normally ask for help like this, but my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters just like you, and I urgently need your help to win my fight, Friend. "I’m coming to you personally today to ask if you could chip in just a few bucks to help fuel my campaign against these attacks from the woke Left and help me DEFEND the GOP Majority. " | | | | Thank you in advance for your support, | Young Kim | | | Friend, the desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target. They will once again result in desperate, disgusting attacks like calling me a token candidate. Their attacks only make me work harder. I won't be deterred by desperate Democrats who will say and do anything to score some cheap political points. They've already committed MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me. As an immigrant and Conservative woman, this isn't the first time I have been subjected to the Democrats' attacks. That's why I need your help. This is not the first and certainly won't be the last time the Left comes after us. "I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just $5 today to help protect the American Dream: "** | | | Paid for by Young Kim for Congress P.O. body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg9kno1cepb7bc008u4lb82r9mtbjsnsbjhpkfqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5gm6or4s1h2bs "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don't get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That's why I'm asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zed82e8dsuoh9ek9a6rhjlkhcsd16onac8m4dtv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5gm6or4s1h2bs "If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. George Washington in prayer during the bleak December 1777 at Valley Forge.
| |
# "DAN COX...YOU WON THE DEBATE HANDS DOWN, AND YOU HAVE MY VOTE." - GOP Elected Official in Western Md. District Six
Patriot,

Did you get a chance to read this important report? Dan Cox proved once again he is the only candidate who has not sold out to the Swamp.

Please donate today to help him reach his urgent goal.

Team Cox!

\-------------------------------

Friend,

HAPPY PRESIDENT’S DAY! I just got off the stage from three full debates this week. **I won!** **I am the ONLY candidate who has ENDORSED PRESIDENT TRUMP and his America First agenda**.

I am writing with **_an urgent request for support_** to ensure the DC RINOs and slimy politicians do not buy this open seat in Congress. We need an America First leader with experience, and that is why I am running. **_BUT I NEED YOUR IMMEDIATE HELP AND COMMITMENT TO VOTE FOR ME._**

**_CONSIDER_ : my GOP opponent (and friend) Neil Parrott just trashed President Trump THREE TIMES in our debates this week – blaming him for the debt caused by DEMOCRATS IN CONGRESS at a time when Neil himself voted with Dems to increase COVID state benefits.***

Here are some of the highlights of the issues in our debates so you can judge for yourself:

***2021, HB 922. **

All my life and career as a husband, father, educator, constitutional attorney and legislator I have fought for our freedom and have never backed down. I’ve never taken a knee to the woke mob. I’ve never surrendered our freedom to international big money. I’ve stood up to tyranny.

While I passed my bills to fight human trafficking and fix our broken criminal code each passed UNANIMOUSLY in our Democrat-controlled Legislature, proving I know how to get things done. And I have proven I stand up for We the People.

I stood up and fought for you at the expense of my own popularity because I serve you, not the Swamp. And I pledge I will never sell you out as your Congressman.

**_My 17 years of constitutional litigation experience and over six years as an elected official, I am ready, experienced and proven to fight and work as a problem solver for you as your next Member of Congress_**.

Among all the America First agenda, I will fight to:
* BRING BACK JOBS to District Six and LOWER HOUSING COSTS AND PROPERTY TAXES,
* SECURE THE BORDER, STOP SENDING OUR MONEY TO FOREIGN WARS,
* REDUCE THE DEBT, PROTECT OUR DOLLAR, HEALTH AND EDUCATION FREEDOM,
* REDUCE CRIME and FIGHT FOR OUR SECOND AMENDMENT RIGHTS.

I humbly ask for your vote this **_May 14_**. And I urgently ask for your support NOW to reach our fundraising deadline to ensure that the RINOs and LIBERAL SWAMP do not steal this election.

Will you please make your generous contribution of $25, $50, $100, $350 today? Or some of you can join our Freedom Team, with $1776. **Every contribution counts; with just $100 I can reach 367 voters by mail, text, e-mail or social media.**** **

As a Christian, husband, father of 10 children and grandfather to three beautiful grandchildren, I am committed to the historic values and morality that has made this nation great.

Please stand with me now as I run and win this seat. Your immediate contribution is the fuel to get this done. Thank you and God bless you and God bless America.

Freedom and Victory,

Fmr. Delegate Dan Cox, Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives (Republican, CD6)

P.S. I am the only candidate who has won elections in the Blue areas of Frederick County where I won _the highest vote_ of any candidate as State Delegate. Help me do it again here!

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57623044d9f3487bbfc1987ffe862d09&_e=Zu_C77bN-t8_CgQcoGP4z8CVZTimLkvG7v_Iptl9jKh1VjVohxXCARU8-GEwMJ6YWa4BOoYUH85JGziqwy-WR1ZYJxqSDmN4CfA_s8OQz8DviNLtkzif-v-aNCvcC7_y4tyeljQN5jbyGlW2Dn6r5s1-eWWuJwtX5O5hmHSRP9e58yCkXGh3BV4hanJI-elzU4wVTUz0E3bVCNn7XyTm31M1F-x9GLTn8X0WXv0LRAnBqMem6vcW72fDhISVunXtvUW9MSLDXzyCNn8QQJdSXCEzkNGYjED7ArCLZKCWm0Mcxvx1skrar6UGJsuGqdyOQY_oqrQvH4HcxFeIC_r3GuZWSNXBk7HbgnHuNLH9T32YheOpYtxjlzuLYuvurY4bFSaHb5iPSY36irfr93KfW4XoSo113i3yTcEWtm8NE6s%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, ["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57623044d9f3487bbfc1987ffe862d09&_e=Zu_C77bN-t8_CgQcoGP4z8CVZTimLkvG7v_Iptl9jKh1VjVohxXCARU8-GEwMJ6YWa4BOoYUH85JGziqwy-WR1ZYJxqSDmN4CfA_s8OQz8DviNLtkzif-v-aNCvcC7_y4tyeljQN5jbyGlW2Dn6r5s1-eWWuJwtX5O5hmHSRP9e58yCkXGh3BV4hanJI-elzU4wVTUz0E3bVCNn7XyTm31M1F-x9GLTn8X0WXv0LRAnBqMem6vcW72fDhISVunXtvUW9MSLDXzyCNn8QQJdSXMD_hk12sHZ1xL0lSITtTRsv03fEQQcjkyOeT2aY8v5mbRwLuPltdTLBFTtZawb1IVAfjFWsUiF7UeKd-aTSogqH6ydUAneC5tiI6VZ8aHCqPSzHiJiL-aElyqxMc3d90WOLSwnwi99eIAcq1jOx76o%3D)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57623044d9f3487bbfc1987ffe862d09&_e=Zu_C77bN-t8_CgQcoGP4z8CVZTimLkvG7v_Iptl9jKh1VjVohxXCARU8-GEwMJ6YWa4BOoYUH85JGziqwy-WR1ZYJxqSDmN4CfA_s8OQz8DviNLtkzif-v-aNCvcC7_y4tyeljQN5jbyGlW2Dn6r5s1-eWWuJwtX5O5hmHSRP9e58yCkXGh3BV4hanJI-elzU4wVTUz0E3bVCNn7XyTm31M1F-x9GLTn8X0WXv0LRAnBqMem6vcW72fDhISVunXtvUW9MSLDXzyCNn8QQJdSXHzdmLl_Kf8n1szeqHSdT7UE_UNWzoh-U1TOU8KmTMsKaB0cwkVSVCUiTQ92jlbuXkKz4lf3HXvUGc8JvJ0fGf8refRZjP48Gm7CSxuCznS2AvYZM-vIqnOx_JAm9a1A1A7_FXd_Mdk9l6Tz34yhSjI%3D)
---
| | _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57623044d9f3487bbfc1987ffe862d09&_e=Zu_C77bN-t8_CgQcoGP4z8CVZTimLkvG7v_Iptl9jKh1VjVohxXCARU8-GEwMJ6YWa4BOoYUH85JGziqwy-WR1ZYJxqSDmN4CfA_s8OQz8DviNLtkzif-v-aNCvcC7_y4tyeljQN5jbyGlW2Dn6r5s1-eWWuJwtX5O5hmHSRP9e58yCkXGh3BV4hanJI-elzU4wVTUz0E3bVCNn7XyTm31M1F-x9GLTn8X0WXv0LRAnBqMem6vcW72fDhISVunXtvUW9MSLDXzyCNn8QQJdSXGn-VtdnGl0pf_GLe6kHARo91aDQphTsC_lRQrXUhn-VUeOdUAUIyRQibg7mNPZY88h66Uqies6AG3YJhU5YlxQ84w9J3e12pdULKKC7kDGCfQjLPCLej-qObrzDkgHQ0b9ymb6yuOA6Ut7Gntka8Jc%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2850ad465bce46509c8dbebf1e8cacc7&_e=dtij5BAFp3-IWKN3pBscCaEH_ZzpJl5AI4KQo7n1pfE1kukQn1URA-6ygptCA2_QSGEG6pcUxh54MOpL4xu_6p7NPI2Y9bIaBjfezy9PlyazlCX-I8tOW7lph8Fpy-FsmXy8Rg_saSfjn6gQffDwC8wXBMnDF-ym7XaP4X20DJmgiAa3o6O2Yc1GNyb3_n1VdjdBAqFD5wwC_wDDRUNjL8rUmgzsa9cpC9ExmwdgVy5LcLV0nu9WvxMs8zytvQkjGPAwb4xiVa72R3edgvhNS552UtvxQmlDnnTICh59Xyq15tsfxE4IVIhVJsWosnrknjTm8uN75PQwXC75UAKjcMZI49G9NdKD6RDUOwZ0pEay5F6vbJJsJVUl4buPGB7pIwfXtoj23BCKAafM-NIqVEFHnDmQT4PLvDJOdMeALHIZoRLfOaJO8OOHeZhILAZt)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2850ad465bce46509c8dbebf1e8cacc7&_e=dtij5BAFp3-IWKN3pBscCaEH_ZzpJl5AI4KQo7n1pfE1kukQn1URA-6ygptCA2_QSGEG6pcUxh54MOpL4xu_6p7NPI2Y9bIaBjfezy9PlyazlCX-I8tOW7lph8Fpy-FsmXy8Rg_saSfjn6gQffDwC8wXBMnDF-ym7XaP4X20DJmgiAa3o6O2Yc1GNyb3_n1VdjdBAqFD5wwC_wDDRUNjL8rUmgzsa9cpC9ExmwdgVy5LcLV0nu9WvxMs8zytvQkjGPAwb4xiVa72R3edgvhNS552UtvxQmlDnnTICh59XyquTke2Bfi5R8htq_TDkF8BbfSDQnI94If19ZJkFIa6oynD2f-Ng22Ib-xmuFEWvAp5UejOqkPHeX2xNUB-b7wCmzF0mc5XTygGfuYT_anIJIAWDHH0Pxzc1_gdMGSY9NJwrz2G8elUz_ZTsf1dzyIl)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2850ad465bce46509c8dbebf1e8cacc7&_e=dtij5BAFp3-IWKN3pBscCaEH_ZzpJl5AI4KQo7n1pfE1kukQn1URA-6ygptCA2_QSGEG6pcUxh54MOpL4xu_6p7NPI2Y9bIaBjfezy9PlyazlCX-I8tOW7lph8Fpy-FsmXy8Rg_saSfjn6gQffDwC8wXBMnDF-ym7XaP4X20DJmgiAa3o6O2Yc1GNyb3_n1VdjdBAqFD5wwC_wDDRUNjL8rUmgzsa9cpC9ExmwdgVy5LcLV0nu9WvxMs8zytvQkjGPAwb4xiVa72R3edgvhNS552UtvxQmlDnnTICh59XyoNKUgF4zKzUOnT8LDBuFsd2M_fP8pvUXBgB6CEQK4hSfDsFjSU7pz_VhunKeieVC08ej8jqmBuGk5JdAiZS1RrnIxoTmiR4RElcrF6zNykEaPzPoeXvUB6LwWd2S9-5EcDaekdAozzXAMdB4si7sg-)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2850ad465bce46509c8dbebf1e8cacc7&_e=dtij5BAFp3-IWKN3pBscCaEH_ZzpJl5AI4KQo7n1pfE1kukQn1URA-6ygptCA2_QSGEG6pcUxh54MOpL4xu_6p7NPI2Y9bIaBjfezy9PlyazlCX-I8tOW7lph8Fpy-FsmXy8Rg_saSfjn6gQffDwC8wXBMnDF-ym7XaP4X20DJmgiAa3o6O2Yc1GNyb3_n1VdjdBAqFD5wwC_wDDRUNjL8rUmgzsa9cpC9ExmwdgVy5LcLV0nu9WvxMs8zytvQkjGPAwb4xiVa72R3edgvhNS552UtvxQmlDnnTICh59XyoUnPHhX5Opx5ZJC12U5sgQz9wQHFe6elfrkJnKf8VpeZ-EXBoV762KsVGMbXie5qr0N2G40pL27yxqjg8Yv6gSVUlSiBUg8A8rFWJKL1lIGassrJbPFWRZDSogyc30T_e9MEckSeeRHkFXA3i5dNtg).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: Suzanne Crouch Wins Sixth District Gubernatorial Straw Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
Crouch’s victorious showing reinforces the substantial grassroots strength and strong messaging of her historic campaign.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/former-evansville-mayor-russell-lloyd-jr-endorses-suzanne-crouch-for-governor-12681484?e=8f9fef7158)
https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-suzanne-crouch/web?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=9166420be5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_15_06_25_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f6dd421ad-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Feb. 20, 2024

MEDIA CONTACT
Robert Vane
robert@veteranstrategies.com
Suzanne Crouch Wins Sixth District Gubernatorial Straw Poll
Crouch’s victorious showing reinforces the substantial grassroots strength and strong messaging of her historic campaign.
Indianapolis, IND — Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch won the Sixth District Gubernatorial Straw poll held this past Saturday in Knightstown with yet another impressive display of grassroots support.

With five of the Republican candidates for governor on hand, Crouch emerged as the District’s favorite with 40 percent of the vote.

“We are very grateful for the victory and vote of confidence given to us by the participants of Saturday’s straw poll,” said Crouch. “Our support at the local level is both energizing and unsurpassed.”

Since its launch in December 2022, the Crouch for Governor campaign has received public pledges of support from more than 100 grassroots leaders—including more than 20 past or present county sheriffs.

Lt. Gov. Crouch’s unparalleled support—both in the Sixth Congressional District and statewide—is a direct result of the heartfelt conservative positions she holds on the most important issues to Hoosiers and their families.

She is the only candidate in the race for governor who has committed to eliminating Indiana’s individual income tax. As a result of Suzanne’s plan, the average Hoosier would save $2,000 in state taxes.

You can learn more about “Axe the Tax” here (https://crouchforindiana.com/axe-the-tax/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=9166420be5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_15_06_25_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f6dd421ad-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Crouch also pledged to keep China from buying up our farmland (https://vimeo.com/899679899/fffe98b3c2?share=copy&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=f3a393a89f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_12_06_56_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-65daf18f47-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=9166420be5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_15_06_25_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f6dd421ad-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , prevent criminals from poisoning Hoosiers with illegal drugs like fentanyl, and treat drug dealers like the murderers they are.

She has pledged to protect (https://mentalhealthroundtable.org/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=9166420be5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_15_06_25_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-4f6dd421ad-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) our society’s most vulnerable Hoosiers—the unborn, people struggling from mental health issues, and those suffering with addiction. "Indiana’s economy and our communities cannot prosper while so many are suffering," said Crouch.

###

To learn more about how Suzanne is the only conservative Republican fighting China, proposing an elimination of Indiana’s individual income tax, and casting the key votes to protect our most vulnerable Hoosiers, please visit her web site at www.crouchforindiana.com.

============================================================
Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3002e82015d54b1889498e097874d171&_e=gtTuYBrFJvmxIdWnHQGxHL21UslB4o6kBH3HOoE5puFCPbVVMuBMdvt6BvII4VFJIKd0enYkkx_LNfv2-dkO2Qo9WmmdUEm0uUwMUTBoiJMlVPOAp9oYFzMfD-oE2yqi2eP5mFy2uYxxUQIeZCmHn5ebkE05tDylJ5Fcwm6nOp8kXgttOoCp6m1f373fQmYz2vvjlet9jA2IE9Z-peJXKTJ4BaEcGCFuQoHgxbtesX7dXWCcrD-7hOjNoiUnw48BmYdoskWFmuZxKMZ67V8JN3ASiPE8TRTiAFDBnYufbUYOmFxNU0GK5zveTRvAtYxEwEjHep0V4mMlTrGSIxtpEP3sD9vXlkgDvubGOzWCA1TQHtbcr32lYXDDc7laDcV2afost-4Ozmnm3UDQL4vBufWTl8qqWV5r-Rsw9HWMGIo%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. **That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course,["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3002e82015d54b1889498e097874d171&_e=gtTuYBrFJvmxIdWnHQGxHL21UslB4o6kBH3HOoE5puFCPbVVMuBMdvt6BvII4VFJIKd0enYkkx_LNfv2-dkO2Qo9WmmdUEm0uUwMUTBoiJMlVPOAp9oYFzMfD-oE2yqi2eP5mFy2uYxxUQIeZCmHn5ebkE05tDylJ5Fcwm6nOp8kXgttOoCp6m1f373fQmYz2vvjlet9jA2IE9Z-peJXKTJ4BaEcGCFuQoHgxbtesX7dXWCcrD-7hOjNoiUnw48BmYdoskWFmuZxKMZ67V8JN7w79Qdxng-x1wW4OznAw5PvnUP4-zoPK068FxZVrSamymtLK-H2HVs-smZwmhHBgoB9CLqykbL1rgapLREIecvELt52mgb6IHW7oMIv6FN6IvzENol9_Ygm5kJv0vPMvJojZqxgmO8lZfILew_8fiU%3D)****on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3002e82015d54b1889498e097874d171&_e=gtTuYBrFJvmxIdWnHQGxHL21UslB4o6kBH3HOoE5puFCPbVVMuBMdvt6BvII4VFJIKd0enYkkx_LNfv2-dkO2Qo9WmmdUEm0uUwMUTBoiJMlVPOAp9oYFzMfD-oE2yqi2eP5mFy2uYxxUQIeZCmHn5ebkE05tDylJ5Fcwm6nOp8kXgttOoCp6m1f373fQmYz2vvjlet9jA2IE9Z-peJXKTJ4BaEcGCFuQoHgxbtesX7dXWCcrD-7hOjNoiUnw48BmYdoskWFmuZxKMZ67V8JNzdDPnv_088Qq32xjlQdAckm_eP1V6M0I9lCd6SdjiUdNc2WV7zRoVpgHN6QCv0n08vEBCorjeWgz6rYZTxufZ-6BJqSyy_aggcEB7RWo28M8RA8iXy3mVNgq8oiyl44pAcxLDsKnAW8GrCaShVzoNk%3D)
---
| | _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3002e82015d54b1889498e097874d171&_e=gtTuYBrFJvmxIdWnHQGxHL21UslB4o6kBH3HOoE5puFCPbVVMuBMdvt6BvII4VFJIKd0enYkkx_LNfv2-dkO2Qo9WmmdUEm0uUwMUTBoiJMlVPOAp9oYFzMfD-oE2yqi2eP5mFy2uYxxUQIeZCmHn5ebkE05tDylJ5Fcwm6nOp8kXgttOoCp6m1f373fQmYz2vvjlet9jA2IE9Z-peJXKTJ4BaEcGCFuQoHgxbtesX7dXWCcrD-7hOjNoiUnw48BmYdoskWFmuZxKMZ67V8JNy9qmNhQ2UIYPcpXQ0j5hc3gdE25iniQl0y-ZUGvg1qe74J_DuD4Ni8b5C_UtPukPBH_vL5t4Vq5qirQyvQ0KoEB0YMBr2ggRZV4srx7UXSOQOqURurcPNrEMA0w9f9Ug7qcWzuxqozm6x1V5Hb8PVY%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, “The Constitution is kind of trash.” That’s what a guest—with an Ivy League degree—said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You’ve likely seen how “progressives” in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation’s principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like “The Constitution is kind of trash.” And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is flawed , outdated , and incapable of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist Papers. | | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we’re serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn’t run from them. We should embrace them. That’s why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale’s faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles—maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won’t last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of “The Federalist Papers” right now: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Washington state promotes a map on its health department’s website directing minors to locations that offer free condoms.

The map, linked on the Washington State Department of Health’s Teen Health Hub, directs viewers to places that provide free condoms in the state. The condom map highlights locations like vape shops, Planned Parenthood chapters, taverns and tattoo parlors as offering free protection.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invest in Pastors
body:
A spiritual battle is raging in our culture - its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39440%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vAWr8UMlszpVT2bb5G510Q&sysid=1)
---
Friend, A spiritual battle is raging in our culture - its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us. TPUSA Faith is on the frontlines trying to make a difference in this spiritual battle. **Jeremiah 29:7 says, “But seek the welfare of the city where I have sent you ... for in its welfare you will find your welfare.”** This verse embodies our mission at TPUSA Faith, and we believe it's a _call for Christians to actively engage with America_. I founded TPUSA Faith - a branch of TPUSA - to EMPOWER believers to live out their faith boldly... CHALLENGE the secular culture... and UPHOLD the inerrancy of scripture. One way we do this is through our **Pastor Summits** , where we gather pastors from across all FIFTY states to inspire, encourage, and equip them to stand firmly for biblical truth and the Kingdom. We are excited to co-host the **Strong Church Dream Conference 2024** at the end of this month. This conference aims to bring pastors and ministry leaders from all FIFTY states to engage in nation-shaping conversations. But we need your help to make this happen. **[Your gift today of $25, $50, or any amount, will help provide scholarships to pastors and ministry leaders, making their trip to the conference affordable, if not completely FREE.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39441%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RQO7g%2blWWsqlpYdvd2kS6Q&sysid=1) **
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39442%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Ur0EVHQWREBtnSqcckQYQ&sysid=1)
---
Your support also enables us to host nation-shaping events like the **Strong Church Dream Conference** and other events such as **Freedom Night in America** and our **grassroots Pastor Roundtable discussions**. These initiatives are critical in our mission to engage, equip, and empower the American Church with the essential tools to COUNTER falsehoods and DEFEND the _link between Faith and God-given Liberty_. Your donation will help us uphold the **three non-negotiables** every church must stand for: the Church can never be labeled nonessential again, life begins at conception, and God created male and female - we don't choose. **[**Your gift of $25, $50, or any amount, will empower pastors to stand up against secular culture and spotlight those who have stood up for what is right.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39443%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E3L44WTe1sMkTnb1dX0E1g&sysid=1)**
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39442%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Ur0EVHQWREBtnSqcckQYQ&sysid=1)
---
We are determined to inspire faith, help bring about a REVIVAL in America, and continue to **fight for the welfare of our nation**. Your support is instrumental in achieving these goals. **We are at the forefront of a spiritual battle and your support is critical**. Your generosity will help us continue to equip and empower pastors, reach the next generation, and stand for righteousness in our nation. I want to thank you in advance for considering this request. Your commitment to furthering the Kingdom of God is truly inspiring. Together, we can inspire FAITH, ignite REVIVAL, and change the course of America.
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39442%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Ur0EVHQWREBtnSqcckQYQ&sysid=1)
---
God bless you, Charlie Kirk TPUSA Faith
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39440%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vAWr8UMlszpVT2bb5G510Q&sysid=1)
---
[Support Turning Point USA Faith](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39444%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BySidak%2fTQpYl1dG26Mm2g&sysid=1)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Team Kennedy
subject: A Clear Sign of Our Strength
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
We are resolved more than ever to fight for what we believe in.

|
---
| | | **[We are resolved more than ever to fight for what we believe in.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_20_24_nd3r&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_20_24_nd3r&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
It's a clear sign we are a threat when the Democratic National Committee (DNC) launches a vicious attack against our campaign for President.
The DNC sponsored Billboards in Michigan, accusing the Kennedy for President campaign of being “powered” by a Trump donor, signals that their candidate, Joe Biden, is in deep trouble.
They understand RFK, Jr. is a real force against the Establishment and the status quo. That's why they're doubling down on their attacks, using lies and misrepresentations to discredit our campaign.
But we won't back down or be intimidated by their attempts to silence us. [Please give now to show the DNC that every time they come after us, our support and donations will only surge in response.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_20_24_nd3r&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_20_24_nd3r&n=4)
The billboards in Michigan are yet another testament to the corruption within the Democratic Party. Their willingness to resort to attacks, deceit, and false accusations, labeling RFK, Jr. as a "spoiler candidate," reflects their desperation and lack of integrity.
_They are in full-blown panic mode._
The DNC has resorted to more than just billboards. They fired the first shot by filing a complaint with the FEC, concocting false allegations of illegal coordination between our campaign and a PAC.
Their attempts to smear this campaign show that the two-party system is corrupt and rigged against independent candidates like RFK, Jr.
But we won't let them — _you_ won’t let them — get in the way of achieving our goals and fighting for a better America.
We need your help to show the DNC that their attacks only fuel our confidence, and we are resolved more than ever to fight for what we believe in. [Every dollar you donate and every message you share helps us amplify our message and push back against their lies.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_20_24_nd3r&n=5)

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_20_24_nd3r&n=9)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_panic_attack_2_20_24_nd3r&n=11)
Thank you for your unwavering support. We're counting on you now more than ever.

name: 15X MATCH
subject: NO NO NO NO NO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
EMERGENCY PATRIOT ALERT

|
---
| | |
**HELP!

EMERGENCY ALERT**

Friend, our deadline is just **HOURS** out, and we are in **DIRE STRAITS!**

**[15X MATCH ACTIVE>>> HELP US BEAT THE DEMS](https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/sept-q3-15/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20240219_PA-AU2.113561_t1450953-573&ex_tid=20240219_PA-AU2.113561_t1450953-573&utm_content=tv-au-20240220&xunv=tv-au-20240220 "15X MATCH ACTVIE >>> HELP
US BEAT THE DEMS")**

subject: I need to ask you something
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td91a076d-9f82-465f-a9d4-bb315966d22b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Blue Amp Action._ [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb49dbf9b-944a-48d4-a865-2411bf705a11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, this race is personal to me. It's personal to me because I know what's at stake. I know because I saw it firsthand. I witness the terror and damage that Donald Trump and his loyalists' can inflict. Our democracy is incredibly fragile. And I'm ready to step into a new role as a Congressman with the care it deserves. [**My team set a goal to raise $100,000 by my mid-month deadline and I need your help to get there. Will you rush $15 or more to my campaign and Blue Amp Action so we can hit this fundraising goal and protect our democracy?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddedbb4f-1a4d-47b6-b338-7b6b3a9fe5d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [RUSH A DONATION NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bb3e094-9a8a-4823-a93e-7953c5fc1282/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Listen, there's _**MANY**_ differences between me and Donald Trump, but let me point out a few: Firstly, I give a damn about protecting our democracy. Plain and simple. Secondly, I'm running for office to protect our freedoms – voting rights, reproductive rights, everything that he tried to gut. **Thirdly, On November 5th, I'm going to win my election. And on November 5th, Donald Trump is going to lose his – again.** [**I need all the grassroots support I can get to win this race, Peter. Can you rush $15 to my campaign and Blue Amp Action ahead of my mid-month deadline? Congress needs a loud voice who's going to fight for Americans, and I'm ready to be that voice.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6feb3043-331f-4ff5-9029-fc69ff7eac21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39e85a97-5617-41ad-bf57-859a76ecb12f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | -Harry
---
|

|

| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

body:
Something major happened on Friday, February 9th. Did you get the email/text I sent to your inbox? | [Unsubscribe](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_t=AvKWGrHOC6CQyDxSCnND5EOvEkcfteU7qhqG6B5VRsnCfLQt5w4NhThsnl63pwBaVMdKlvPOCaPuQ6QY7-blnmKEd1z3KkhpyPYeivdPjYw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.justandfreegop.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_s=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_t=AvKWGrHOC6CQyDxSCnND5EOvEkcfteU7qhqG6B5VRsnCfLQt5w4NhThsnl63pwBaVMdKlvPOCaPuQ6QY7-blnmKEd1z3KkhpyPYeivdPjYw%3D)
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_e=oskdCCeMy1vqRDmrcd6sxqZlBGLK-5TvXDm9YfAxBp6eyK_yqMXVeEbIe1vLSL7qZj4lv5mfPZGmdMxOnKBjoVNvlgGaYUVdZzCwJiFIKsy5-W4Wp5nguOql0l4GGeKzc2bPzj06wgI5aPgMoea3bgmoupJAWTEqcJ5_A2QPkwl9-VbeXjTfnc9W_EfnI35WGEzMZIUpHKUBcxxemaFVw9lSFCajIKhRGuS7E4ykdP60CoR0Ie79CdSCKaH77WSKyyvyaSMetbLfvhoYfJ2cs5JlDVceuOw9RpA9c9OTaCujFIzXKmo2U4wsQpyMiul89nPVAfpXvItJgCVHJPlFXLMjSIpby09bFqoJhdTfrONXAp8mvZnyyA3YKQQPbLbu3vxOkZ8sL7L8KsWVHToJ9r9v41DGkipW4OR9nC_yd54%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_e=oskdCCeMy1vqRDmrcd6sxqZlBGLK-5TvXDm9YfAxBp6eyK_yqMXVeEbIe1vLSL7qZj4lv5mfPZGmdMxOnKBjoVNvlgGaYUVdZzCwJiFIKsy5-W4Wp5nguOql0l4GGeKzc2bPzj06wgI5aPgMoea3bgmoupJAWTEqcJ5_A2QPkwl9-VbeXjTfnc9W_EfnI35WGEzMZIUpHKUBcxxemaFVw9lSFCajIKhRGuS7E4ykdP60CoR0Ie79CdSCKaH77WSKNUgsdtQWCtp-36e8UNGmZsPMHG3MEjDKq0HGGtqMXIX96dXxdqaDcRXjeGUM6T6zdv-78R9t1Th86x9_zzXPYY7ZIOQ6Wq2hcCfvKkwV57cpoqRVK2LR7ogOm7n_Jzi1f7zABQMp2l8PM1ZJ4enj6BUvfuESEQVijkE1OY7qtmY%3D)**.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_e=oskdCCeMy1vqRDmrcd6sxqZlBGLK-5TvXDm9YfAxBp6eyK_yqMXVeEbIe1vLSL7qZj4lv5mfPZGmdMxOnKBjoVNvlgGaYUVdZzCwJiFIKsy5-W4Wp5nguOql0l4GGeKzc2bPzj06wgI5aPgMoea3bgmoupJAWTEqcJ5_A2QPkwl9-VbeXjTfnc9W_EfnI35WGEzMZIUpHKUBcxxemaFVw9lSFCajIKhRGuS7E4ykdP60CoR0Ie79CdSCKaH77WSKKY6BNBevIay-S4-NfQXzHP3qbjUjHe0q4-i4sk7BOXQDpatFfSuT6opXvhsXljlhadEZO9XCIgBPlsYgAB9OYKQx-C4oVkrjXNLAcZZaOJrMMXb6o0dn8GR0SEKmlRJpSEm5zdXUiS7x6mqS_k0IjXdAmtPvggtvAKdRBK0bx2E%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_e=oskdCCeMy1vqRDmrcd6sxqZlBGLK-5TvXDm9YfAxBp6eyK_yqMXVeEbIe1vLSL7qZj4lv5mfPZGmdMxOnKBjoVNvlgGaYUVdZzCwJiFIKsy5-W4Wp5nguOql0l4GGeKzc2bPzj06wgI5aPgMoea3bgmoupJAWTEqcJ5_A2QPkwl9-VbeXjTfnc9W_EfnI35WGEzMZIUpHKUBcxxemaFVw9lSFCajIKhRGuS7E4ykdP60CoR0Ie79CdSCKaH77WSK3YTAblht2sigrTeQ6jOlHbXbvy8MOnTFmg8sE5IMuqFmQHrA_1MElNYPHzPImKOkbKVJV9_1emJtvzncwpsJnTkBCXxTnsq-LfUZZIJc40yX3nCnafTzzEY9ncK99FohOsuM8sMf6PtJuxg5a7AgzoC5jZD28Jy4MqDg0b9HxBY%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_e=oskdCCeMy1vqRDmrcd6sxqZlBGLK-5TvXDm9YfAxBp6eyK_yqMXVeEbIe1vLSL7qZj4lv5mfPZGmdMxOnKBjoVNvlgGaYUVdZzCwJiFIKsy5-W4Wp5nguOql0l4GGeKzc2bPzj06wgI5aPgMoea3bgmoupJAWTEqcJ5_A2QPkwl9-VbeXjTfnc9W_EfnI35WGEzMZIUpHKUBcxxemaFVw9lSFCajIKhRGuS7E4ykdP60CoR0Ie79CdSCKaH77WSKylNN0kCauKVd-bWlxBtYHiaWHr4dDcZQ4VWFxdg5MIXVPtE9DGVzZ3Vkh2w6uMgxiQxugzF4QUb_4ibZH0_v30HPu92Y5HvRmm-QhkhRowOJjJrf7xbeNTNL1iO7RDHYFDwEIojF5UgDL5MdhXdZ4penIgNhlZKcXEVQFyxXg2w%3D)

SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_e=oskdCCeMy1vqRDmrcd6sxqZlBGLK-5TvXDm9YfAxBp6eyK_yqMXVeEbIe1vLSL7qZj4lv5mfPZGmdMxOnKBjoVNvlgGaYUVdZzCwJiFIKsy5-W4Wp5nguOql0l4GGeKzc2bPzj06wgI5aPgMoea3bgmoupJAWTEqcJ5_A2QPkwl9-VbeXjTfnc9W_EfnI35WGEzMZIUpHKUBcxxemaFVw9lSFCajIKhRGuS7E4ykdP60CoR0Ie79CdSCKaH77WSKfajxSyLGFPv5U9roWLdKQsETahNOhv19YCtUnxkFpvgbHyKCmY9d7xoztDCAj9A7g0toGMMcre1i_l3mI0DKubzLlX9POGiIw0cKqTiHxTXB6N6rCu-oXOZdBL5tDQtU8zyPqnN6qI0XHycTg1MyWDKpIeQ2YGPCK7zP__F5rv0%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=99b5bf446d4c4a88845fee4ebcb0ed81&_e=oskdCCeMy1vqRDmrcd6sxqZlBGLK-5TvXDm9YfAxBp6eyK_yqMXVeEbIe1vLSL7qZj4lv5mfPZGmdMxOnKBjoVNvlgGaYUVdZzCwJiFIKsy5-W4Wp5nguOql0l4GGeKzc2bPzj06wgI5aPgMoea3bgmoupJAWTEqcJ5_A2QPkwl9-VbeXjTfnc9W_EfnI35WGEzMZIUpHKUBcxxemaFVw9lSFCajIKhRGuS7E4ykdP60CoR0Ie79CdSCKaH77WSKBv8aCjEAY3G9daMPxatgcnBgVVc6dK0-VxbhKvoJ0Cj2TMBm8wSDIJbK1W5khqQTR3mH8r_QORgK_dgYD4Jcot3Guq61fSlzhiufNNRcMuOkbB4jFKcd7RmW6LOvSJ4merpC6o5fP9tfsCUO54D6mA1fr9aR_UOE4XEhPuBTjEo%3D)

clean_body: Something major happened on Friday, February 9th. Did you get the email/text I sent to your inbox? | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL.
