name: Byron Donalds
subject: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I’m Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here’s the gist:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30550%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fdYFTMuPleiizbeoREEV1Q&sysid=1 "I have a plan for a
CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let’s make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There’s just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It’s not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30551%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wHHzCiAJDCxp8SHz5aKVFQ&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m coming to
you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart
these efforts?")**_ I know it’s a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it’ll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn’t convince you to want to help, I don’t know what will! Are you in?_
---
| | | [PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30552%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iMR4cZgfsQqPMevf7JWNww&sysid=1 "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30553%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u2Xe7ZBqm5TVsR%2fXm3wxDg&sysid=1 "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30554%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YW3ZRCsNfHGBcURH75NDuw&sysid=1 "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30565%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2f8CtJu7kxvF%2f%2bgnn9MupQ&sysid=1 "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don’t do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of “Bank Your Vote”

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30566%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0He%2foPVNIarud%2fCBgmZs%2bg&sysid=1 "Byron Donalds")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30567%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XiOGhULfsavgAlFs%2bXhG%2bQ&sysid=1 "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I’m respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30568%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qrkvKtLELslWfSmBReoG3g&sysid=1 "MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY ](https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/majority-leader-survey-footer/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20240219_PA-YAN1.113738_t1450820-1756&ex_tid=20240219_PA-YAN1.113738_t1450820-1756&utm_content=tv-yan-20240220&xunv=tv-yan-20240220 "START MY MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY ")
---

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Voter Confirmation #4403-02
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You have been identified as someone in a key voter group for the 2024 election.

|
---
| | |
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvi88m8nahi8q9ds0032bjm72mocml8cchlt5hf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5imaor6c3h2bs)
---

Hi there, Friend.

You have been identified as someone in a **KEY** voter group for the 2024 election.

Which is why House Republicans have tasked me with reaching out to you and asking you to fill out your Voter Confirmation Card.

**[It's also why it's SO important that you fill this out at once.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp11h8vmrbu4lt6n4bkk2504jttl82evrroacdjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5imaor6c3h2bs "It’s also why it’s SO important that you fill this out at once.")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE VOTER CONFIRMATION CARD](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1d0drd5hqpsc3d7smcd1q5qbodq71692sm7flt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5imaor6c3h2bs "Generic Button")
---

This is part of the Republican Party's efforts to identify voters in your area who want to push back against the Biden-Democrat agenda that is currently wreaking havoc on our country.

**Make no mistake about it, Friend. This effort is CRITICAL to mobilizing GOP voters to turn out in RECORD NUMBERS come November.[Do your part to beat the Democrats now](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhi9cd8defioeq8eiathgfls3qjubdrcjine8kko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5imaor6c3h2bs "Do your part to beat the Democrats now")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE VOTER CONFIRMATION CARD](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ej9crbdpro8dfbordgjfrje14jpes73j22r4f0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5imaor6c3h2bs "Generic Button")
---

The Democrat Party is doing all it can to try to flip whatever seats it need to steal our House Majority out from under us, which means we can't leave anything to chance.

**We need to be at the top of our game**. But in order to get the job done, we're going to have to make sure EVERY Republican voter is locked in and primed for victory.

**[And that starts with completing your Voter Confirmation Card today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb2fp28e1te7mtc9ffjj4ae1k9so9lsk50k6a218_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5imaor6c3h2bs "And that starts with completing your Voter Confirmation Card today.")**

---
| | | [COMPLETE VOTER CONFIRMATION CARD](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9b1lu5ouo4m20lo1sp0q3p995ges1fr5k6e67tg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5imaor6c3h2bs "Generic Button")
---

Thank you for all you've done to keep our country great.

Yours truly,

Don Jr.

---
| |

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Biden Called "COWARD" by Border Patrol Union
body:
Peter, I'm reaching out today as someone deeply concerned about the unprecedented challenges we're facing at our southern bor
|
---
| Peter, The situation at our southern border is beyond a crisis; it's a catastrophe that demands immediate attention. **That's why I'm heading to the border this March, to witness firsthand the chaos that's been brewing, unchecked and worsened, under the current administration.**
Yesterday, the National Border Patrol Council didn't mince words when they blasted President Biden for owning this disaster, calling him out as a coward for encouraging and facilitating this chaos, only to abandon our Border Patrol agents when they needed support the most.
**The reality is that Border Patrol agents, our first line of defense, feel abandoned.** Despite promises to the contrary, the crisis persists, with solutions seemingly as distant as ever. Amidst this turmoil, our communities, our security, and our very sovereignty are at stake. **I stand with our Border Patrol agents and against the mishandling of our border security.** My upcoming border visit isn't just about observation; it's about action. It's about showing the real stories of those on the front lines and the impact of failed policies on our communities and national security. **As we brace for what lies ahead, I invite you to stand with me. The Common Sense Club is more than just a group of individuals; we're a force for change, a voice for the voiceless, and a beacon of hope in times of uncertainty. Our mission extends beyond borders, tackling issues that matter most to you and our nation.**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY ()
body:
Endorsements are a spicy🌶️ conversation

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/70b030385781/n41kepo7ku-12681762?e=25844e23a8)
https://ne.gop/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365

** Good Morning Republicans,
------------------------------------------------------------

I flew out to Las Vegas in early February for the Turning Point Action convention and the RNC Winter Meeting. One of my true joys is providing resources and context to Nebraska politics and helping more passionate leaders thrive across the Republican party spectrum. Understanding and supporting leaders is what fulfills me immensely. The political context I have gained over the last several years is, in my opinion, we used to live in what I call the "Nebraska Political Bubble" for the last 20-30 years. Nebraska has stayed archaic in building relationships at the door. We've attempted to rebuild those relationships 6-8 months prior to each November election and then cut off ties with voters until the next election cycle.

Do you know that it's been over a decade since the last meaningful Voter Registration drive by the Republican Party? A coordinated, organized, PURPOSEFUL attempt to gain MORE Republican voters through engagement. More voters you say...gosh, what could we do with MORE voters?!? Signing up NEW voters, flipping Independent voters to Republican, flipping Conservative Democrat voters to Republican. The avenues for engagement are limitless, except for the time, talent, energy, and donations (https://secure.anedot.com/negop/negopplus?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365) it DOES take to plan events and programs.

>From the RNC's "Grow Program" ran by State Party Strategies, to Turning Point Action, to Tea Party Patriots, to a handful of other nationwide coalitions, they ALL have adapted to Relationship Campaigns versus Transactional Campaigns. Building up month after month, year after year a RELATIONSHIP with Republican voters versus the distant and disconnected TRANSACTIONAL activity of palm cards with Republican voters. Seemingly in Nebraska, we are told that the previous election cycle informed us of exactly the results we will get THIS election cycle, unless we have a better or worse candidate. So, we send out 1000's of mailers costing millions of dollars, 100's of text and phone calls costing thousands of dollars, radio ads if you can afford it, t.v. ads definitely only if you can afford it, try to round up 10 volunteers to walk and knock with no training...and then we wonder why the Democrats have increased their local elected official representation from 500 to 900 over the last 5 years.

Organizations like the Tea Party Patriots (www.teapartypartriots.org (http://www.teapartypatriots.org?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365) ) for instance, have grassroots engagement "how-to guides" and hosting home "meet & greet" kits available and have been doing this for YEARS. Templates are available on their website to facilitate meetings and checklists so we can move ourselves into professional relational organizing. THINK what Nebraska would look like if Republicans built the business model of campaigns around people and NOT money. Yes, campaigns take donations to provide SOME of the opportunities to engage voters, but effective statewide GOP Party organizing is the MOST effective LONG TERM model for furthering our principles. This is why we seek donations (https://secure.anedot.com/negop/negopplus?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365) at the party level. We need to employ and DEPLOY an army of individuals from volunteers to paid staff, who will engage in relational organizing.

Here's the thing...The Democrats already know all this and have been doing this for over a decade in Nebraska. They have been creating the coalitions and the apparatus to effectively Harvest the Vote and we've let hubris and power cloud any vision for real, effective, MODERNIZED campaign operations.

What is relational organizing? At its core, relational organizing is building relationships with the people you KNOW and engaging with them in the political and electoral process. In years past, campaigns have called this a "friends and family program." Repeated studies have shown increased voter turnout and INFLUENCE where relational organizing was used. Which is easier...having conversations about politics, candidates, donation requests, sign location requests, with total STRANGERS or using your ESTABLISHED connections/relationships to discuss values, solutions, and the GOP ENDORSED candidate YOU are supporting?

Yikes, there's that spicy word...endorsed. Endorse - to declare one's public approval or support of. Our State and county constitutions give the authority and opportunity to the elected GOP Central Committees to interview and consider endorsing candidates. Here are the key sub sections to the NEGOP Endorsement policy...
Article IX - Section 14. ENDORSEMENT. (https://www.ne.gop/constitution/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365)
1. The Party, including its officers and staff, may endorse a Republican candidate seeking a
federal, statewide, legislative, or multi-county political office in a contested election if a
request for endorsement is made by the candidate seeking endorsement and the endorsement is approved by a two-thirds vote of the State Central Committee. In the absence of a request for endorsement and a two-thirds vote of the State Central Committee, the Party including its officers and staff shall be prohibited from endorsing and financially supporting such candidate in a contested election.
2. County parties, including its officers and staff, may endorse a Republican candidate seeking a federal, statewide, legislative, multi-county, county, or local political office for political subdivisions geographically connected to the county in a contested election if a request for endorsement is made by the candidate seeking endorsement and the endorsement is approved by a two-thirds vote of the county’s central committee. In the absence of a request for endorsement and a two-thirds vote of the county’s central committee, the county party including its officers and staff shall be prohibited from endorsing and financially supporting said candidate in a contested election.
4. Contested Election shall mean an election in which two or more Republicans are seeking the same political office in either a primary, special, or general election.
5. Endorsement shall mean: (1) a public display or statement of support either by print, electronic media, or a written statement; or (2) a reported campaign contribution. Materials created and distributed for the purpose of increasing voter turnout including but not limited to door-to-door distribution of Republican candidate literature, shall not be a prohibited endorsement.

So here are the facts...
1. The State GOP will only consider endorsements of Multi-county (Board of Education, UNL Regents, NRD's, Community Colleges, Power Boards, etc.), Statewide (Governor, Lt. Gov., Constitutional officers of Secretary of State, Auditor, Treasurer, Attorney General), Legislative, & Federal.
2. County GOP's can endorse EVERY race the State GOP does and ALL local races within their county. Our endorsement language was changed in 2022 to give AUTONOMY to the counties on whom they endorse. I believe the people of the County know best the candidates who are qualified to represent them. This change in language also means that the County GOP's can endorse DIFFERENTLY than the State GOP, whereas in 2022 there was a strongly worded letter informing all County's to cease-and-desist their endorsements UNLESS the State had approved them. [For even greater context...the California GOP...has two ways to be endorsed with one way being if a majority of the counties in your district endorse you, then you are subsequently endorsed by the State GOP. In North Dakota GOP elections, EVERY candidate has to get signatures FIRST to even be put on the ballot and THEN they can earn an endorsement from the State Party].
3. A candidate must request the endorsement and receive 2/3 vote of the State Central Committee. Several incumbents and candidates chose not to ask for the endorsement. And that's okay. That's their right and should be devoid of political rumors or media fodder or retribution or vitriol. Ideally, an endorsement opportunity is a time of growing relationships BETWEEN candidates and Central Committee leaders at the State and County level. This is a GOOD thing and brings healthy stability to our organization.
4. The SCC can/could endorse MULTIPLE candidates in a contested race and can/could endorse more candidates who have filed subsequently. SCC members are/were informed several times on the ability to endorse multiple candidates and the prospect of future endorsement opportunities.
5. Upon ANY candidate winning the Nebraska Primary election held in May, said candidate has received the PUBLIC support endorsement by again, winning the Primary. Our Primaries are a closed Republican ONLY Primary and thus a candidate has earned an endorsement of Republican voters through this process.
6. The longer candidates and campaigns delay building relationships with voters, the longer it takes to earn the voters trust and ultimately their VOTE. Voters can be habitual in nature just as much as they can be deeply immersed in the political realm. Our candidates should be seeking EVERY early opportunity to be endorsed, supported, promoted, and connected to VOTERS.

Lastly, please consider the past several years of Republican politics...and how the party's image has been tarnished by political games, and huge financial discretionary support to one candidate over another. One of the main areas of division in our party centers around...control. Control is seemingly manipulated by money. Money that selects candidates versus letting the election process play out. A State and County early endorsement IS a part of the election process and viewed by most other States as inherent to the election cycle . Simply put, there should be a message and narrative from all CANDIDATES and the ENDORSEMENT process surrounding our Platform...our principles and values.

So, who determines when and where to promote the VALUES of the party THROUGH candidates being endorsed? Just me...I should decide? Or, maybe 10 people decide which candidate/campaign gets promoted on Facebook, or uses the bulk mailing permit, or has the state party logo attached, etc? We have a SCC that consists of 152 people and 144 of those members (or personal substitute) attended the January 2024 SCC meeting and participated in the endorsement process. Almost 95% attendance because we have a stable, CONSTITUTIONAL, value-based, organization that believes in People First, Nebraska First, and America First. The Nebraska Democratic Party can't even reach a quorum number to have their meetings and we have 95% engagement...we have the stability to GROW and BUILD.

This means that the current endorsed candidates received 2/3 vote of 144 members and I am proud and honored to have built relationships with many of these candidates. The State Party does not manage these candidates campaigns, but where and how we can promote and support their campaign efforts, NOW, with a a Principle-based endorsement we can highlight our endorsed Board of Education candidates, our Metro Community College candidate, our Legislative Candidates, even new Federal candidates can feel welcomed to earn the trust of the voters in their Congressional Districts or statewide races. The influence on Republican politics has returned back to it's roots...the grassroots...and everyone who wants to promote the Republican values by being a Republican candidate, can do so freely and without concern of weaponizing of the State Party.

AND again, this is why 2024 is different. The county parties are vastly stronger than they've EVER been, volunteers are learning more and more in county governance and how meetings operate. They've been given the resources to be successful for campaigns and we have even more resources on the way. We have seen 8-10x increased engagement at the County level.

March 1st is the filing deadline for becoming a county delegate (https://sos.nebraska.gov/sites/sos.nebraska.gov/files/doc/elections/2024/County%20Convention%20Delegate%20Form%202024.pdf?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365) . See the form below and connect with your county party so your voice can make a difference. Next week's Coffee w/ the Chairman will outline the County Conventions process leading up to the State Convention in Lincoln and onto the National Convention in Milwaukee where we will cast our support to the next America First President of the United States 🙏.

https://sos.nebraska.gov/sites/sos.nebraska.gov/files/doc/elections/2024/County%20Convention%20Delegate%20Form%202024.pdf?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365

The truth shall set us free.

Blessings,
–Chairman Underwood
Donate (https://ne.gop/donate/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=3f8d182636-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-3f8d182636-21732365)

| | Peter, there are loads of reasons to support Angela Alsobrooks’ campaign for the U.S. Senate. It’s tough to narrow down the list, but we’re about to give you 5 big reasons why you should pitch in $5 right away — **[but if you’re already sold, feel free to donate $5 right now!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10593?t=11&amount=5&akid=1042%2E52803%2EYla8Gd)** | | | [Donate $5](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10593?t=12&amount=5&akid=1042%2E52803%2EYla8Gd)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10593?t=13&amount=35&akid=1042%2E52803%2EYla8Gd)
---
Ok, Peter, here we go!
1) **Angela has experience and a proven track record.** _She’s spent her career working to improve safety, equity, and opportunity for Marylanders and their families._
2) **She’s a champion for reproductive justice.** _She’ll fight every single day on the Senate floor to expand and protect abortion access._
3) **She’s endorsed by key Maryland officials.** _Governor Wes Moore, Congressman Steny Hoyer, Comptroller Brooke Lierman, and Senator Chris Van Hollen are all supporting Angela!_
4) **This campaign is made up of grassroots donors.** _Angela isn’t a multi-millionaire like her opponent — she needs our help competing with his outrageous spending!_
5) **Election Day is only 3 months away!** _We’re running out of time to reach the voters we need to win, and your support will boost our outreach efforts._
**[So what do you say, Peter? Can Angela count on you to chip in $5 (or more!) to help elect her to the United States Senate?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10593?t=14&amount=5&akid=1042%2E52803%2EYla8Gd)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

Hey friend, I wanted to touch base after the holiday weekend. Did you see my message about how we can power this reelection campaign to victory?
I know we have what it takes to protect this battleground seat and defend the Senate for Democrats – but only if we have the resources we need to defeat the GOP.
That's why we need to build the strongest grassroots team possible as soon as possible. **But I'm still looking for another 25 people from 37087 to step up, including you. So please, will you chip in $5 or more before midnight to become an Election Year Founding Donor and keep Nevada blue?**
**Here's the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_email_february_2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79346869/456215432/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDlkMDVlYy1mZGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNNB7EtpOL-4P0gaq3eAprPh95y92ZR5n8cSMZsZZVM=)**
Thank you,

Jacky Rosen
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jacky Rosen**
Date: Tue, Jan 02, 2024
Subject: I have a personal request, friend
| | |
---
Friend, we're officially in the full swing of the election year. And I'm _all in_ to protect my battleground seat in Nevada so I can keep up the fight for affordable health care, reproductive freedom, and the issues that matter most to working families. **But I need people like _you_ by my side to win.**
Here's why: _CNN_ ranks me as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, which is why Mitch McConnell has personally recruited a far-right Republican to defeat me. And polling has already shown me 2 points down – in the race that will likely decide Senate control.
**If I'm going to fight back and defeat the GOP here in Nevada, it's critical that we show the full strength of this grassroots team right from the start. That's why I have a personal request for you, friend:**
**[I'm looking for 100,000 people to step up and become Election Year Founding Donors by midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to be one of them. Please, will you chip in $5 or more now to help me keep Nevada and the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79346870/456215433/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDlkMDVlYy1mZGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNNB7EtpOL-4P0gaq3eAprPh95y92ZR5n8cSMZsZZVM=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79346871/456215434/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDlkMDVlYy1mZGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNNB7EtpOL-4P0gaq3eAprPh95y92ZR5n8cSMZsZZVM=)
In Nevada's last Senate race, the GOP spent MILLIONS and came within _less than a percentage point_. Now, they know that the path to Senate control once again goes right through Nevada, so they're doing whatever it takes to finally flip this battleground red.
**Already, a shady MAGA billionaire dumped $2 MILLION into this race to prop up McConnell's handpicked candidate, and we know this is just the beginning. That's why we're on a mission to build the strongest grassroots team possible – as early as possible – to fight back and defend this seat.**
**[So please, I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support: Will you give $5 or more now to become an Election Year Founding Donor, power this reelection campaign to victory in Nevada, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79346872/456215435/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3438-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDlkMDVlYy1mZGNmLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LNNB7EtpOL-4P0gaq3eAprPh95y92ZR5n8cSMZsZZVM=)**

Here's the truth: | | |

In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: February is an FEC fundraising deadline month. This means that at the end of the month we will be required to report how much money we've raised and how many donations we've received. Everyone will be watching -- the press, our opponents, and even supporters will be waiting to see the strength of our campaign. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand the millions and millions of dollars Republicans are spending on attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because this is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election yet. [Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? name: Lt Col Oliver North USMC (Ret)
subject: A True American Hero
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | Peter, When Hung Cao says, “Joe Biden is unfit to be our Commander-in-Chief,” I agree.

In 2021, the Biden White House perpetrated a horrific, humiliating withdrawal from Afghanistan resulting in the death of eleven U.S. Marines, a Navy Medical Corpsmen and a U.S. Army soldier. Though Hung Cao never sought any credit, he devoted months of his recent retirement from the U.S. Navy, in a quiet, uncompensated, 24/7 effort to help rescue American citizens, allies and brave interpreters who were abandoned by Mr. Biden’s catastrophic capitulation in Afghanistan.

Hung Cao won’t run from a fight. He never has. He never will. Though possessed of true humility, he won’t “play it safe” or deliver meaningless speeches or strive to be “politically correct.”

What Hung Cao will do is boldly employ his God-given gifts of faith, courage, experience and wisdom to become a leader in the U.S. Senate.

We, our children and grand-children deserve to have Hung Cao, an American Hero, a man of faith, integrity, and proven courage in mortal combat, representing us and our values in the U.S. Senate. **[That’s why I am officially endorsing Hung for the Senate and asking you to join me in endorsing him today>>](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ae58563439a64c7ca3b4ad27cc25c9db&_e=BEb5uWOPqwkYKDotMTN0PkfonSUjVfwDTNolkC06Yg2CetRoPAMyYr63b9daY0q6A_-cVCQkwIx7-YHwI3ZlPWjfmsP1hhjxLY-lgQN3V1e-1SevW4q_LrLgb4qDkt0NVKpRfLOQkBQM1aSuQuVHCrWPUHY_Gw5pNfld_wxpUoKZSvlkyNoMqFGnb3HIazDn--YrScP5cTRPCtM1qBOtEvrdZSb2AK6carN9Wf-WezFCd3HZxuXIG56ijMPIRNEo5whNFAiFgHtTzHXg-4qON9pAyk7Kk7LCQOpPW9G0jhOVk9x8vMGJBq62waSPpSv0hYKJTWvGkfQlMNNq9Zb1fnl3bzoK4Ahm8_leXBUOtH9jwR4RrhP9-c_Iqo58G_4Z)
**
---
[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ae58563439a64c7ca3b4ad27cc25c9db&_e=BEb5uWOPqwkYKDotMTN0PkfonSUjVfwDTNolkC06Yg2CetRoPAMyYr63b9daY0q6A_-cVCQkwIx7-YHwI3ZlPWjfmsP1hhjxLY-lgQN3V1e-1SevW4q_LrLgb4qDkt0NVKpRfLOQkBQM1aSuQuVHCrWPUHY_Gw5pNfld_wxpUoKZSvlkyNoMqFGnb3HIazDn--YrScP5cTRPCtM1qBOtEhCABRc2nCpkLGl1oiC6Sf5V1vlrqm_5M-qUJo-ll_KHht88CGqASBdUVdUYtmzuwJ8-SjKi1RJcxDnSjdQXQLygsbzVR1gCxyxDR93MLTMOeB-Hujsa-58ZuegTr9veYqDh0kcwZmLRmYlx1mJGbH5F1He96eRApshl4hPPBz0o)
---
When Hillary Clinton ran for President her hand-picked Vice Presidential candidate, a professional politician and liberal activist, is now Hung Cao’s opponent here in Virginia. Like all of Mr. Biden’s far-left, self-serving comrades, he pays lip-service to the American Dream and “Life, Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness.”

Hung Cao is the most relevant person to address our present national crises. I know of no one more qualified to speak out against the socialist propaganda plaguing our military, education system, and culture. We are at a tipping point and Hung reminds us that our power doesn’t derive from bureaucrats in Washington; it’s cultivated in our communities, our homes, and around our kitchen tables.
---
[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ae58563439a64c7ca3b4ad27cc25c9db&_e=BEb5uWOPqwkYKDotMTN0PkfonSUjVfwDTNolkC06Yg2CetRoPAMyYr63b9daY0q6A_-cVCQkwIx7-YHwI3ZlPWjfmsP1hhjxLY-lgQN3V1e-1SevW4q_LrLgb4qDkt0NVKpRfLOQkBQM1aSuQuVHCrWPUHY_Gw5pNfld_wxpUoKZSvlkyNoMqFGnb3HIazDn--YrScP5cTRPCtM1qBOtEug-9NphfDcIxHeeMO-vM4_I3u1-kc6AfDm0qho2XmXKqwpD56MyrgDiGbu274uyzSMgiM7wbwtW7QhKul0eGhLgXejSNVyfsgWol5-Su9eCEZI9hCVm1km4bkFb9y8ZedXzX7jb96wCdXkUncUxm6lwZJSccnz-HnYxPeXkvi_o)
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ae58563439a64c7ca3b4ad27cc25c9db&_e=BEb5uWOPqwkYKDotMTN0PkfonSUjVfwDTNolkC06Yg2CetRoPAMyYr63b9daY0q6sdLb23efaH8HloU_V1U4ygqMWHMGrDi7-XgYB2QAhsVpParCr8ntUdlHN6zeE4LMW0Q1wAowMJ85eSjrocnYw-qtwhxCN-Nyp97EU-VbNVNUaRsd5ZtpqBknXuptG_sysrMKTmW13lrLfq6cnzw3iYAt88seHrX8xb08_gFFPH2Nol75dBkegDpTPTPLIixFSWgELJVMq88QPkDc69rvfl988izxnOqY6xFAgg54T2LUOkq-Lcln1ijie1lEYsb0RWmlhqH-coIvBhFzYZA9jydcZfMXv7wUWO6fkcSkCBgBOkl2k82X4LUGoQA80b_4)
---
Virginia is where our entire family lives and works. On behalf of our 18 grand-children, my wife Betsy and I pray every day we Virginians will show our countrymen how to preserve America’s future by electing a conservative champion, our dear friend, Hung Cao, to a seat in a Republican-majority, U.S. Senate.
---
For America,
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=ae58563439a64c7ca3b4ad27cc25c9db&_e=BEb5uWOPqwkYKDotMTN0PkfonSUjVfwDTNolkC06Yg2CetRoPAMyYr63b9daY0q6A_-cVCQkwIx7-YHwI3ZlPWjfmsP1hhjxLY-lgQN3V1e-1SevW4q_LrLgb4qDkt0NVKpRfLOQkBQM1aSuQuVHCrWPUHY_Gw5pNfld_wxpUoKZSvlkyNoMqFGnb3HIazDn--YrScP5cTRPCtM1qBOtEnAdG0Wy4R8r-uJ4S0T3zQu8X2sKuG3JB1c3M1Al5uzTwRq-vzjAw6XVL2JjJptqDy6jkkRHqL7KVOAIS3KsXZk61Cmxd8QTIcmDjlEHoCJ6yM5KqeIFbFk__0PVRhn2I11QXgmbxWms2lWzwhv4_ocpuJWDzWNuZ5kn_QO_KV0N)
---
Lt Col Oliver North USMC (Ret)

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Will you help me strike out this liberal lineup?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9acc9gdtbtfbu69t1un762ubc2v2pi2phomnd78_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zivfrfeg8lh53hhpn00olql0i1t56r3djd9s5dvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zig0uchljido2vu7mkkq3cnp8jpn9r25t3pvf0sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqdvknq0iokg6o7mocrmbdo4e7e469kgs55ifamo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm30jqk7km45068dvp6m769g661acog1v6dn1d38_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4fu3519naccu4oajkkak1tf0vpnkpm6e0asv55o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

name: Texans for Vaccine Choice
subject: Have we met?
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlflow.com/link/c/YT0yNDE5MDAzNTc4NTEwMjIwMjEzJmM9ZjRnMSZlPTAmYj0xMTI2Mzg3NjY4JmQ9ZDB0NXQwcQ==.BSrFOQAlIbQ8yjDTB9UU986nnDrmDQ2nT9Wx8_BC8lo)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Peter, Welcome to the largest vaccine choice and medical liberty movement in Texas! Texans for Vaccine Choice (TFVC) started when a Dallas-based state representative decided Texans need vaccine mandates. _A few moms caught wind of his plans, and we sounded the alarm._ Before we knew it, dozens of Texans joined us, rallying at the capitol to stand up **against** vaccine mandates. Thankfully this horrible bill failed to pass - but it woke the sleeping giant. The government has NO right to force vaccines on Texans or our kids. YOU are the best person to make decisions about your own health care! We know you believe this. Some of you have been fighting with us from the beginning. For others, the COVID vaccine mandates introduced you to this movement. **No matter how you first got involved, we are proud to fight alongside thousands of you.**

---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| TFVC is dedicated to protecting medical freedom and vaccine choice. We do this in several ways:

* Ensure the issue remains at the forefront of political discourse
* Draft legislation to further solidify these rights
* Promote incumbents and candidates who strongly support our values

Since 2015, our army has grown to more than 100,00 proud citizens fighting for medical privacy and informed consent.
**We’re just getting started!** Thank you for your commitment to vaccine choice and medical freedom. With you, Team TFVC
---
---

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zotgh0mh5v5dteh442as6v6q21av41uosu1g9kk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z95527ultmsdiavic5aoam9ilkpqr1c9hsjthmeg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z36eveg0r5kcrsci2ntr78dbkl5cc4qll11tepr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4umlmrb0hd0nhfq3naslim4r4mtk2rlds691lmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9kjh1dp1iimq4g5keqi6ot50e8i32scfbjulcpg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs9pj0npaql38ufll512rsab1hb14pp7eadkoo40_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj2ojm7u491mhmo8jvhm2lnok2trci20emdv1pi8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6amvgnp2oi0gcls5do8rf5n3ecikmv9a5k11s60_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zimdu1n3a4ho60gufklqchgprulgo2dg3bfdben8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5im9oj2c1h2bs)

subject: Washington assaults democracy from Pakistan to Middle America
body:
The disdain for democracy shared by Democrats and Republicans alike is visible from California and Ohio to Gaza and Pakistan.

| |
---|---|---

---
# [Washington assaults democracy from Pakistan to Middle America](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=141806943&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxODA2OTQzLCJpYXQiOjE3MDg0NDIxMjgsImV4cCI6MTcxMTAzNDEyOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CajD4PXMYjY42HBV0man-jHkBeQNz09esaVgJOecQV0)
### The disdain for democracy shared by Democrats and Republicans alike is visible from California and Ohio to Gaza and Pakistan.
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/937e422d-49f1-4b3b-81a4-07147fd553a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Feb 20| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/937e422d-49f1-4b3b-81a4-07147fd553a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=141806943&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxODA2OTQzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwODQ0MjEyOCwiZXhwIjoxNzExMDM0MTI4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7LgoMIWp6Nb8dgIC2iibHok0sQdYPG1atZ942ioKKPU&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=141806943&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxODA2OTQzLCJpYXQiOjE3MDg0NDIxMjgsImV4cCI6MTcxMTAzNDEyOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CajD4PXMYjY42HBV0man-jHkBeQNz09esaVgJOecQV0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=141806943&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxODA2OTQzLCJpYXQiOjE3MDg0NDIxMjgsImV4cCI6MTcxMTAzNDEyOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CajD4PXMYjY42HBV0man-jHkBeQNz09esaVgJOecQV0)
---
| | [](https://substack..1ndmL7PVlkHwlNmV8DHpeId5-DMINGxl2fNI--WOrqk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/washington-assaults-democracy-from?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Washington's claim to defend democracy has played an integral role in its justification of everything from "manifest destiny" and the [indigenous genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/8672ed2a-0ecf-4ced-b45b-d4d319df918c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it enabled, to Pax Americana and the [human rights abuses](https://substack.com/redirect/6c4cf1a7-2ae0-4214-84e0-14f5e26b0840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on which it has relied over the past 75 years.
America's bipartisan, self-congratulatory rhetoric has never matched the reality. But rarely has the disparity between rhetoric and reality grown more vast than over the past few weeks. Yet, even most Americans critical of U.S. foreign policy remain ignorant of where, beyond Gaza, Washington continues to assault democracy and human rights today.
_Stay informed with a free subscription! Paid subscriptions help expand my work documenting bipartisan corruption._
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..92OKwqV9qdbmcw3RKegWhbAu-TVxedAdF6v_Sx7o-PE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=141806943)
### Connecting some dots
I've written recently about the [hypocrisy](https://substack.com/redirect/55a6af28-ada7-44f5-b644-4286343be246?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Democrats who claim that democracy is on the ballot while backing a president [chosen by party elites](https://substack.com/redirect/7ebdb9ed-b226-4657-98ba-68550e533b89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), insulated from primary challengers, and allowed to duck debates and ignore mounting concerns about his mental fitness and advancing age. The pattern appears even worse when considering the policy records of [Biden's predecessors](https://substack.com/redirect/4f771c69-d538-4ce9-8df3-f121ece0e66a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I've also written recently about the [ongoing genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/7cf59bb2-5fb0-426e-9941-932c9b0dccb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Gaza, Biden's [complicity](https://substack.com/redirect/55a6af28-ada7-44f5-b644-4286343be246?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in international human rights violations, and the [crisis of democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/bd441022-7d77-4af7-9e13-94985eda6040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in America it indicates given the abject [refusal](https://substack.com/redirect/bf32b662-288a-4ff4-ba88-28dbdd3b7440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of anyone in Washington to heed the millions of voices from coast to coast and around the world clamoring for basic human rights in Gaza.
My [most recent post](https://substack.com/redirect/bf0e65f8-8e1c-46fa-8c2c-e271545fd72d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) addressed another theater, where Washington's hypocrisy when claiming to stand for democracy has grown inescapably apparent: the country from which my parents immigrated in order for me to be born in England, and raised in the United States. I observed how the Super Bowl distracted attention from a recent coup in a nuclear state encouraged and enabled by the Pentagon. In fact, that post was charitable to Washington: I intended at the time to dedicate an entire post to [Israel's "Super Bowl Massacre" in Rafah](https://substack.com/redirect/0b766d77-3ebe-44e0-81e4-d2c8d04ff633?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before current events overtook my intentions.
What happened in Pakistan over the past two weeks was nothing short of a bloodless coup.
This post aims to highlight Washington's attacks on democracy and human rights beyond Gaza. Joe Biden's [support for Israeli genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/1046d99b-4b44-443a-9601-c4f357baf0a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) there has destroyed his prosects of re-election. But even the genocide in Gaza is the tip of an iceberg.
### Democrazy in America
Political scientists have long accepted official statements about America's supposed support for democracy as gospel, despite [evidence](https://substack.com/redirect/6c4cf1a7-2ae0-4214-84e0-14f5e26b0840?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Laos and Cambodia, to Nicaragua and Chile, suggesting that it has never been more than a convenient canard to cover up imperial [brutality](https://substack.com/redirect/dd6ea369-8557-40b7-837b-ee51a520ba4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the [theft](https://substack.com/redirect/ee14d975-3c5a-4278-b2ca-4918f10c1f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of natural resources from countries lacking the wealth that the United States enjoyed in the wake of the Second World War.
First, the United States has forcefully intervened (i.e., invaded, staged a coup, or funded & supplied a military junta) in [dozens of countries](https://substack.com/redirect/4c82e2c7-cbfe-4e2e-8469-7d881a6e8a7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over the course of decades. This pattern has repeatedly reversed the results of democratic elections whenever convenient for Wall Street or the Pentagon. That pattern has destroyed democracies from Vietnam to Nicaragua.
Second, Washington has also overseen dramatic and vicious [attacks on the domestic dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/bd441022-7d77-4af7-9e13-94985eda6040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on which democracy actually relies. This was the pattern that defined the McCarthy era in Washington, the [decades](https://substack.com/redirect/fce636ad-84aa-41dc-a894-f4b16e961e8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when the FBI waged its relentless war on Americans pursuing their constitutionally protected rights, and also the new era of attacks on marginalized voices from [San Francisco](https://substack.com/redirect/de26f385-85d5-4b27-a0ed-7489bfb353f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) all the way to [Washington](https://substack.com/redirect/bd441022-7d77-4af7-9e13-94985eda6040?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
_Thank you for reading! Help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=141806943&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxODA2OTQzLCJpYXQiOjE3MDg0NDIxMjgsImV4cCI6MTcxMTAzNDEyOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CajD4PXMYjY42HBV0man-jHkBeQNz09esaVgJOecQV0)
I serve on the board of an organization called [Defending Rights and Dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/65ece02a-4ec8-4708-9592-739dd38109d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), after having led for six years one of the organizations whose merger created the organization. The reason why I've dedicated so many countless hours to that movement is because I understand democracy as more than a buzzword, more than a campaign slogan trotted out by hypocritical self-promoting liars, and ultimately, the standard by which Washington's institutional sincerity can be measured since it remains an object of (at least theoretical, if not real) bipartisan consensus.
### America's latest attack on democracy
Pakistan is the world's fifth most populous country. It is a nuclear power. It has played a crucial role in US foreign-policy over the past generation, particularly as a staging ground for the war in Afghanistan, and, ironically, the haven in which Osama bin Laden took refuge when America focused on bombing its next door neighbor.
Pakistan has a relationship to democracy not unlike that of the United States. Both countries bray about their supposed commitments to popular rule, while repeatedly undermining it in practice. In 2007, I visited Pakistan with a dozen other lawyers and law students from across the U.S. to document "[Pakistan's struggle for democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/3ddc92d4-67bc-4638-9a34-01df3b73fe8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" in the face of bipartisan U.S. foreign policy that overtly undermined it.
Our investigation was prompted by the military coup that made former army general Pervez Musharraf the head of state. Washington choosing Pakistan's leaders is not without precedent: Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto, a democratically elected Prime Minister, was [deposed in 1977](https://substack.com/redirect/449af682-7852-4abb-af63-9df8682b197a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by a military general backed by the Reagan administration. This was all just before the era when the CIA and foreign proxies (often [trained](https://substack.com/redirect/d37a648a-dbb5-4ece-9a94-4b83906ae861?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the U.S. military) began murdering [priests](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc29bf6-2578-48c5-865b-37ecf79ab6a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and labor organizers [across](https://substack.com/redirect/7cf0558d-2ef9-4088-8bd3-a6079d98399b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Latin America.
I wish this post were just about forgotten US and world history. Unfortunately, my concerns find reflection in current events, as well.
_Learning anything? Don 't stop!_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..92OKwqV9qdbmcw3RKegWhbAu-TVxedAdF6v_Sx7o-PE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=141806943)
Earlier this month, national elections in Pakistan appeared to be generating surprising electoral windfalls for the PTI, the party led by democratically elected Prime Minister, Imran Khan. Khan had been previously arrested by Pakistani authorities at Washington's behest.
Ironically, the basis for his detention was publicity surrounding the U.S. State Department message inviting his removal from office. Pakistani authorities claimed that he had violated Pakistan's national security by revealing to the public Washington's plot to depose him.
When the intelligence agencies of one country remove a democratically elected leader in retaliation for his exposing their complicity with foreign intelligence agencies to seize control over a government, there can be no plausible claim to advance democracy.
What happened in Pakistan over the past two weeks was nothing short of a bloodless coup opposed by millions of people disenfranchised, ultimately, by the United States.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/52257a6e-354f-480d-823c-d0cb1965bbfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A protest in Pakistan following the arrest of former Prime Minister Imran Khan
In that respect, the only deviation from Washington's decades-long pattern is the effective seizure of Pakistan's government without filling thousands of graves.
Most recently, an election commissioner [publicly admitted](https://substack.com/redirect/f04c8d94-af2a-4ff9-a31c-4b5be0480fdb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his role in tampering with election results. Rather than prompting widespread accountability, his admissions led to his arrest, while the beneficiaries of his fraud remain in power because they are favored by Washington and the legions of journalists who serve as its stenographers.
### The costs of empire
America claims to support democracy around the world. But the shoe unfortunately does not fit--even here in the United States.
Hundreds of millions of Americans have been [denied](https://substack.com/redirect/7ebdb9ed-b226-4657-98ba-68550e533b89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) any opportunity to influence the choice among presidential candidates for the general election. Meanwhile, Pakistanis [marched](https://substack.com/redirect/a4ef1188-15c5-4169-9e0c-16711d2dbad4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and voted by the millions despite [tremendous obstacles](https://substack.com/redirect/5a4d9674-3e13-425e-b384-73a4d1df00f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), only to fall prey to scheming and [subversion](https://substack.com/redirect/01e8d7e6-30ef-43d8-a412-502e39223b38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) emanating from Washington's vast international tentacles.
Those tentacles aren't just picking Prime Ministers in Pakistan. They are also [enabling an Israeli genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/bf32b662-288a-4ff4-ba88-28dbdd3b7440?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that has killed tens of thousands of Gazans, including children guilty of nothing more than being born to dispossessed and displaced families in an inconvenient place.
As the United States continues to collapse into a pit of its own making, one hopes that American voters can pin the tail on the proverbial donkey (and elephant) responsible.
Looking at international relations to the lens of promoting democracy reveals that there are very few good actors in the world today. In Putin's Russia, the leading critic of the prevailing regime just [died in prison](https://substack.com/redirect/3ce580ec-3bc1-4cbf-9d2a-5ccf39d1660e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) under mysterious circumstances suggesting that, after enduring [years of persecution](https://substack.com/redirect/4b5ee75d-2700-4adf-9553-c1809e5f5cab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), he was [effectively assassinated](https://substack.com/redirect/40a60d84-4cc4-4fe8-ac52-f00b579837f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). In the United States, the parties are discarding even the vestigial trappings of democracy, [disregarding elections](https://substack.com/redirect/7ebdb9ed-b226-4657-98ba-68550e533b89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while also embracing bipartisan attacks on the press, as well as [grassroots dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/de26f385-85d5-4b27-a0ed-7489bfb353f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Many voices share concerns about the seeming inexorability of the mounting global climate catastrophe, or the genocide in Gaza, or the crisis in state violence targeting innocent civilians elsewhere. The emergence and continuing acceleration of each of those problems have all been enabled--perhaps even ultimately driven--by the erosion of democracy.
_Have you learned anything from this post? Share it with friends who share your curiosity!_
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=141806943&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxODA2OTQzLCJpYXQiOjE3MDg0NDIxMjgsImV4cCI6MTcxMTAzNDEyOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CajD4PXMYjY42HBV0man-jHkBeQNz09esaVgJOecQV0)
The whole is sadly worse than the sum of its parts. And those parts resist "solutions" that aim to address one while ignoring the others.
If humanity has any hope of surviving an unstable future, we must first establish democratic control over our respective governments. Too many voices presume that struggle for democracy has been already won, not recognizing the authoritarianism that becomes all too apparent when reading between the lines published by co-opted newspaper editors.
_Paid subscribers can access an editorial recently published by a corporate newspaper to which I plan to respond in my next post. The editorial demonstrates everything wrong with journalism today, and conspicuously avoids any reference to the ongoing federal lawsuit that aims to hold the publisher & its co-opted editorial board accountable for their history of publishing election disinformation favoring the Democratic establishment..._

Share it with friends who share your curiosity! The whole is sadly worse than the sum of its parts. And those parts resist "solutions" that aim to address one while ignoring the others. If humanity has any hope of surviving an unstable future, we must first establish democratic control over our respective governments. Too many voices presume that struggle for democracy has been already won, not recognizing the authoritarianism that becomes all too apparent when reading between the lines published by co-opted newspaper editors. Paid subscribers can access an editorial recently published by a corporate newspaper to which I plan to respond in my next post. The editorial demonstrates everything wrong with journalism today, and conspicuously avoids any reference to the ongoing federal lawsuit that aims to hold the publisher & its co-opted editorial board accountable for their history of publishing election disinformation favoring the Democratic establishment... body:
Missouri’s three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth isn’t holding back about the actions of his former mentee
#
Peter — you won’t believe the latest quote from Josh Hawley’s former mentor:
**"I think what [Hawley]'s done is just _unforgivable_ as far as being the U.S. Senator is concerned... I said at the time that supporting him was the biggest mistake I have ever made in my life. And I still believe that."**
— Jack Danforth, Missouri’s three-term GOP U.S. Senator
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43913?refcode=em20240220-4877&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4877%2E614464%2EXW3dPq)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43913?refcode=em20240220-4877&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4877%2E614464%2EXW3dPq)
This isn’t the first time that Danforth has condemned Hawley’s actions on January 6th. **But let’s start at the beginning:**
**FIRST —** In 2018, former Missouri Senator Jack Danforth recruited Josh Hawley to run for U.S. Senate. Danforth even cleared the crowded field of Republican challengers in Hawley’s primary to help him win the seat.
**THEN —** On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW —** Danforth and a handful of Hawley’s other mentors + mega-donors are refusing to support his re-election campaign — and recent reports from _Morning Consult_ found Hawley’s approvals plummeting among Missouri voters.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43913?refcode=em20240220-4877&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4877%2E614464%2EXW3dPq)
**Republicans and Democrats across Missouri agree: We can’t afford another six years of Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43913?refcode=em20240220-4877&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4877%2E614464%2EXW3dPq)**
Now here’s why we urgently need your help, Peter:
Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to keep exposing Hawley as a fraud and a coward — and allows us to reach voters with Lucas’ election-winning message every day between now and November 5.
That’s what it’ll take to win this race. **So now we’re asking you:**
**[Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can get Lucas’ message in front of Missouri voters and continue to hold Josh Hawley accountable for embarrassing our state and betraying our country? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so your support today really will make a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43913?refcode=em20240220-4877&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4877%2E614464%2EXW3dPq)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Broadband Boondoggles |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b3287ba97c&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Susan Wild is talking about broadband again. This week, she called for $7 billion in new broadband spending on top of the $65 billion that’s already been allocated. Wild said, “too many are left without high-speed Internet because they lack the infrastructure or are inhibited by high costs.”

Two years ago, President Joe Biden and Susan Wild passed their broadband infrastructure bill to address the very problems that Wild describes today. But after spending about $387 per local taxpayer, they still haven’t laid any fiber, built any towers, or deployed any infrastructure in Pennsylvania.

Susan Wild assures us that $1.16 billion is earmarked for statewide broadband projects. But that’s only about $177 per local taxpayer, almost $210 less than we’ve already paid. What happened to balance?

The federal government has created new state and local broadband bureaucracies. They’ve enriched engineering firms and economic development agencies across the country. And they’ve held lots and lots of public meetings. Meanwhile, we’re all still waiting around for better broadband.

This is the epitome of “Bidenomics.” Progressives borrow trillions of dollars for big-government programs. Then they hand out cash to special interests and constituent voters. Finally, they demand more money when it doesn’t work out. And it never does.

I’ve done more to improve broadband infrastructure as a private citizen than Susan Wild has done in all her time in Congress. Since 2005, my company oversaw almost $300 million in broadband infrastructure projects, driving affordable Internet access to the most remote parts of Pennsylvania. And we did it without any federal tax dollars.

In Congress, I’ll oppose wasteful spending that increases inflation and drives interest rates higher. And I’ll support development projects that use private investment instead of taxpayer money to build critical infrastructure. I’ve been doing that successfully for almost 20 years. It’s about time we send someone to Washington with that type of experience.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=fd1afd1bc3&e=1090c5c412)._

Neither military information nor photographs of Kevin in uniform imply endorsement of Kevin Dellicker for Congress by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments.

---

**Learn more about Kevin's campaign at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b5aaeaa01f&e=1090c5c412). **
---
|
---
|
---
**Thank you to all my volunteers!**
| Last week the Dellicker for Congress campaign submitted 3,877 signatures from more than 150 circulators. That’s almost four times what we needed to get on the ballot and about 800 more than our closest primary opponent.

I want to sincerely thank all of you from across Pennsylvania's 7th District who circulated and signed petitions. Almost all my petitioners were volunteers, which makes the big numbers even more impressive.

Our grassroots support is stronger than ever, and we also leading in name recognition, fundraising, and endorsements. That’s a formula for victory.

The campaign will get harder as we approach the primary election, and we’re already planning for the next phase of the campaign. But for now, please take a moment and recognize a job well done. I have faith in my volunteers and supporters, and you delivered beyond my expectations. Thank you!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79352514/456235286/1237601583?refcode=WTEFEN40_20240220_IWatchedRS_ALL&sourceid=1052931&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTk4ZTYxYi0wNWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dt_g-FX6l8i56Z-iTBHBOJcIy7kDNJdJ0pQDKcO9vjk=) Peter, I mean every word I'm about to say:
* I watched the U.S. Supreme Court take a disastrous vote to decimate _Roe v. Wade_.

* I watched anti-choice Republicans launch an assault on reproductive rights like we've never seen.

* I watched them steal our right to choose and put millions of Americans in danger all across the country.

**Now, we're going to make them regret it — by kicking anti-choice Republicans out of office for what they've done.**

It's official

subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting

body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zci1qdiou4fc4qn9t2fhs6m9d3o9qnrpmia45ohg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5hm8o36c9h2bs "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhlu183r3dk5m1ggguug8td0gbs6h6uv5mhhi9rg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5hm8o36c9h2bs "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---
| | | [PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z218nmhpod97fno6bhtkhvhaiq661ioelk7bs540_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5hm8o36c9h2bs "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfd1bvb3r67sglp92d9r6ao3ladp5rgh1al2m1s0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5hm8o36c9h2bs "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0li7lgoa44offc1mt2t9c4b16p9j51th6cikmbo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5hm8o36c9h2bs "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9seoii4amsf4d7ed8879ctdn56dadvek64sgi48_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5hm8o36c9h2bs "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

---

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcr0govcgq5khn1sal1o0s712atm3b8iciqnil8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s5hm8o36c9h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience.
