"I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in? | | | "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT" This is a non-negotiable if we want to win. Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register. If we don 't do it too, we will lose. But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election. Will you do your part? I look forward to seeing your name. name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: How I won my first Emmy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, When I won my first Emmy award, I was absolutely shocked. _**I never imagined a little girl who was a first-generation American would ever be able to make it this far. **_ **But I know that it wasn’t my doing: it was all God’s.**
---
Before I’m a Congresswoman or a journalist or a Floridian, I am first and foremost a woman of faith. I know I would never have gotten anywhere near to where I am today with my faith in our Lord. **But today, our faith is under attack.** The radical Left wants to replace our Judeo-Christian nation with a Godless socialist woke hellscape. From using the Biden DOJ to throw peaceful pro-life protesters in jail to attacks on faith-based learning and school choice, the radical Left takes any opportunity to smack our faith in the face. **It’s time for us to fight back against their Godless shenanigans.** _**[_**Will you join me today to defend our freedom to worship?**_](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=888b559cc43f46eba2486bee7435cedd&_e=085M8Jzngc16UBXGKZ-HJbf90FTzbj65LVdUZKMRfKK4mtGLmOO-gxbQDHCvJiAMvcL2r8BUgPfZof7xtZw_YFVekjwh666hkAIy2K3MRnIxmYZgJ5hRZJTY7BbaDYt6llxX7_913Q_4OAQsg1b7Q3O78RdBnfn8DemK54LZDjKsZcvS-G99Hff6g5A5lFGz6uZ9iBbvsb4ZC9cT8fVzuVWT_cnr6barziSCczfz-myqPcUtUW91gPPsR-IZo1ZUjoFfIDlKoAkOfvROo2wxbymhzYGCc7SEP60B6IH9j03NU6KVsNJTpBRDujs58qaRur5L17ySt0fEw4foQnyt6A%3D%3D)**_
---

name: Colleen Davis
subject: “Who knows, maybe one day I’ll run against you.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
In case you haven’t already heard about this story... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79354330/456239907/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240220Allie_N_CD_NO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2MDkyNWZlLTA2ZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TRSorZjxFzKYigsJnPWmSfZuM5cz89CuY6SCEAxkdqA=)
---
Hi Peter,

We’ll begin this email with a powerful excerpt from a recent story in _NPR_ :

_The path to Tennessee politics for Allie Phillips began last year in her doctor's office. She was 19 weeks pregnant when she got the devastating news about her unborn daughter: only two of the four chambers in her heart were formed._

Following the diagnosis, Doctors warned that continuing the pregnancy would endanger Allie’s life. But, as you may know by now, the **Tennessee state legislature, which is 85% male, passed a near-total ban on abortion in 2022.** She left the state, devastated and heartbroken, to obtain the life-saving care she needed – but her story is far from over.

[**We are proud to endorse Allie’s candidacy for the Tennessee House of Representatives, District 75. Help us rush her support by donating $20.24 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79354332/456239912/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240220Allie_N_CD_NO_10_G_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2MDkyNWZlLTA2ZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TRSorZjxFzKYigsJnPWmSfZuM5cz89CuY6SCEAxkdqA=)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79354333/456239913/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240220Allie_N_CD_NO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2MDkyNWZlLTA2ZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TRSorZjxFzKYigsJnPWmSfZuM5cz89CuY6SCEAxkdqA=)
---
After her traumatic experience, Allie met with her legislator, Rep. Jeff Burkhart, to share her story and persuade him to sponsor a measure she named after the baby she lost but desperately wanted, **“Miley’s Law,”** which would add an exception for fetal anomalies to the state abortion ban. However, it was clear that Buckhart was not only disinterested in Allie’s story but was completely uninformed, stating that **“he thought miscarriages could only happen with first pregnancies”** and “if his own daughter had been in Phillips’s position, he’d have wanted her to continue the pregnancy.”

After the meeting, Phillips wrote to Buckhart and said, “Every chance I get to tell my story, I will... **Who knows, maybe one day I’ll run against you.”**

He never responded. Allie later told _The Washington Post_ that was when she decided she wasn’t going to rely on a man. She’d have to take matters into her own hands.

[**Allie’s district is one that Democrats have identified as flippable. This is our chance to replace her pro-life extremist opponent, and we are honored to be standing with her in this fight. Help us fund our support programs for Allie’s campaign by donating $20.24 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79354334/456239914/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240220Allie_N_CD_NO_10_G_N_L2&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2MDkyNWZlLTA2ZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TRSorZjxFzKYigsJnPWmSfZuM5cz89CuY6SCEAxkdqA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.24 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79354335/456239916/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240220Allie_N_CD_NO_10_G_N_EB20.24&express_lane=true&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2MDkyNWZlLTA2ZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TRSorZjxFzKYigsJnPWmSfZuM5cz89CuY6SCEAxkdqA=)

_Working and campaigning and parenting, it's a lot. But Phillips says it's for the sake of her daughter's reproductive rights that she's doing it. “It's my job as a mother to take care of my daughter and keep her safe."_

For Allie’s daughter and all of our daughters,

subject: I can hardly believe this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Will you give me a second to explain the truth?
| | |
---
Friend, I can hardly believe this. Rick Scott recently released a new video touting his so-called "accomplishments" from 2023.
**As per usual, Rick Scott is lying to voters. Will you give me a second to explain the truth about his record and mine? [(Polling data shows that this race is tied, so if you're already all in to retire Rick Scott, you can click here to rush a donation.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79354968/456241311/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk825-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZkMmNlYjMtMDdkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XluBsDjkvIp1XQMgdmZDVex8DpGCOwJmt_b_tCC-5BM=)**
Rick Scott can spend millions lying to voters (and he already has), but that will never change the truth: **Rick Scott is a total fraud.** He made his fortune as the CEO of a company that was charged with the largest Medicare fraud in our nation's history at that time. Then, as governor of Florida, he pushed an extreme agenda that hurt working families — _all while he saw his own net worth triple._
Apparently, the governor's mansion wasn't enough for Scott. So, when his term was up he bought his way into the United States Senate — and things only got worse from there. He pushed Trump's "Big Lie", refused to certify the 2020 results, and wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He's even advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions and raising taxes on working families.
**Rick Scott has spent his entire life serving one singular person:_himself_.**
My story is different. My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to achieve our American Dream. **That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much.**
After years of working in nonprofits, I ran for Congress to flip a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, I wrote the bill to **expand seniors’ Medicare coverage** , worked with Republicans to provide **economic relief** to families and small businesses, secured $200 million for **Everglades restoration** , and fought tirelessly for **commonsense gun safety** reforms as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force**. **
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. **I'll never hide from my record. But Rick Scott is already spending MILLIONS trying to run from his. Florida voters aren't buying his scam.**
**My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024, and his approval ratings are _tanking._ But I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support. [So please, if you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation to help me beat Rick Scott and win a better future for Florida? I'm counting on you to have my back tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79354969/456241312/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk825-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZkMmNlYjMtMDdkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XluBsDjkvIp1XQMgdmZDVex8DpGCOwJmt_b_tCC-5BM=)**

clean_body: Will you give me a second to explain the truth? | | | Friend, I can hardly believe this. Rick Scott recently released a new video touting his so-called "accomplishments" from 2023. As per usual, Rick Scott is lying to voters. Will you give me a second to explain the truth about his record and mine? = Rick Scott can spend millions lying to voters (and he already has), but that will never change the truth: Rick Scott is a total fraud. He made his fortune as the CEO of a company that was charged with the largest Medicare fraud in our nation's history at that time. Then, as governor of Florida, he pushed an extreme agenda that hurt working families — all while he saw his own net worth triple. Apparently, the governor's mansion wasn't enough for Scott. So, when his term was up he bought his way into the United States Senate — and things only got worse from there. He pushed Trump's "Big Lie", refused to certify the 2020 results, and wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He's even advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions and raising taxes on working families. Rick Scott has spent his entire life serving one singular person:himself. My story is different. My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to achieve our American Dream. That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much. After years of working in nonprofits, I ran for Congress to flip a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare coverage , worked with Republicans to provide economic relief to families and small businesses, secured $200 million for Everglades restoration , and fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But Rick Scott is already spending MILLIONS trying to run from his. Florida voters aren't buying his scam. My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024, and his approval ratings are tanking. But I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Jim Daly, Focus on the Family
subject: Saving mothers and babies from abortion
body:
Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3b385ad06cdd43a49c34cdc2b65dd1fd&_e=ZhLLUXt2aVoda29GKQIxWvYmtsyL70SLI716QTE4HcZANOpqG6_1mMG45FNvk4XmHX4lLUE90y4fTe7nFMJfTVR5xfHU88h6aiwnRsXklkcU2hTwdqhuMPC2CmSKoYkvinC_P7YipvcmSMNroPwmfUy1d13fbaBV2vYAOEwTxiASdmUtACv8kvR0sUmnnxOqVr8ETKDJ2H_Vo-DkOy01OhlBASN-oD8VtRHFEVvVfJExT71Xy5RxKmLWEaMECn-hm6072dBRVHnVDBH2VWBSRQ%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, **Research shows that more than 54% of women considering an abortion will choose life after receiving counseling and an ultrasound. ** Thanks to the support of pro-life Americans just like you, Focus on the Family's _Option Ultrasound_ _Program_ has saved more than half a million babies in the past two decades. [**You can save a mother and her baby from abortion with your gift of $60 today. Please help us make ultrasounds possible for abortion-vulnerable women.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3b385ad06cdd43a49c34cdc2b65dd1fd&_e=ZhLLUXt2aVoda29GKQIxWvYmtsyL70SLI716QTE4HcZANOpqG6_1mMG45FNvk4XmHX4lLUE90y4fTe7nFMJfTVR5xfHU88h6aiwnRsXklkfPHsDIONZ2OHtrzI3mrj_rgmFMUIZAuXpENRGrIGndNCQcDuM8vzMPZJ8Mcl1YLDFH17bEsZb2ZmlFHychjDBrGS5DEnXfKVyM74iupbuq-RV_WJ2215lZySRnXCjI0iFCdldRJaDlHEwvfrym1T2U2EpIxwcw0vmqSCAyaZ0RCg%3D%3D)
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3b385ad06cdd43a49c34cdc2b65dd1fd&_e=ZhLLUXt2aVoda29GKQIxWvYmtsyL70SLI716QTE4HcZANOpqG6_1mMG45FNvk4XmHX4lLUE90y4fTe7nFMJfTVR5xfHU88h6aiwnRsXklkdhIZvet4jBA0IQT1F9GOVvYDIu7AmzaQ4IPH9XCUg8dWaVjelRssloSQ9MiyCVjLrq8fTWvoAz6Jyu8g6PIIlDcKiHKo8oxFYbo6CTDc0PZB2xSEFKYMb2vXH0hoDNqJnKsIiSs7euDf3KBvLfC9S4a8J91KsqoiTgbK3ejfNzuQ%3D%3D)
---
Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers. But with free ultrasounds made possible through _Option Ultrasound_ , mothers have the opportunity to hear the beat of their baby's heart. **When a mother sees her baby sucking its tiny thumb or wriggling on an ultrasound, she won 't be deceived by the abortionists' claims that babies are "blobs of tissue" in the womb.** [**Your support will equip life-affirming pregnancy centers across the country with ultrasound machines, resources, and nurses ' sonography training so abortion-vulnerable mothers can meet their babies... and be moved to choose life.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3b385ad06cdd43a49c34cdc2b65dd1fd&_e=ZhLLUXt2aVoda29GKQIxWvYmtsyL70SLI716QTE4HcZANOpqG6_1mMG45FNvk4XmHX4lLUE90y4fTe7nFMJfTVR5xfHU88h6aiwnRsXklkdRhkEQWoRa_rOydgnU-OGDYc-yZ1NtfP-SOPdCXcoz8h_h1fgf3jLdDf17Gc9pzpqn5EwUIzhNFvjWaAQiKrL5qpdtPImu447LA5GrPpBhP8WHr6Gcx5CJwDq6om6olreoEFuQ3IGbnETqpcZX2P-Y_tcGTqsxuFsw4At0ciA5GA%3D%3D) Studies show that women who have abortions are more likely to suffer from depression, anxiety, PTSD, and substance abuse, as compared to those who give birth. Carrie -- a young woman who chose abortion -- shared, "Legalized abortion has created a culture where you feel like abortion is the only choice. That's not empowerment for women. That's bondage." After ending the life of her baby, Carrie says she was "foundering in relationships and medicating (her) emotional pain with alcohol." She was tormented by the fact that she had paid someone to end her child's life. [**While nothing will bring Carrie 's baby back, you can prevent another mother from making the same heartbreaking decision with your gift of $60 today. Every $60 we raise will save an additional life thanks to the power of an ultrasound.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3b385ad06cdd43a49c34cdc2b65dd1fd&_e=ZhLLUXt2aVoda29GKQIxWvYmtsyL70SLI716QTE4HcZANOpqG6_1mMG45FNvk4XmHX4lLUE90y4fTe7nFMJfTVR5xfHU88h6aiwnRsXklkcomkQEjrzM58AwuzxM7xcjmcBMW7J5YddcdwMFN_DHWm0xUlrkDu5SNXpwc9Be2fbWVb0zhDUAsnrytIax727cMDy5YM80N4sQJN3kL8bs6WjiN_GjWRz9xQLDIqkBNsHTkGq3X9MojC3CIItgZyUMOFRKvimicQ8475UEu3i23w%3D%3D) Thanks to generous donors, we also run My Choice Network -- an online resource that connects expectant moms with pregnancy medical centers. Since the network launched in 2020, more than 250,000 appointments have been made at life-saving centers. You can also help us increase our presence in high-risk areas and train physicians and nurses in abortion pill reversal -- trainings that have saved more than 3,000 lives in less than four years. **[**Please help with your immediate gift of $60 or more today and save the life of a baby today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3b385ad06cdd43a49c34cdc2b65dd1fd&_e=ZhLLUXt2aVoda29GKQIxWvYmtsyL70SLI716QTE4HcZANOpqG6_1mMG45FNvk4XmHX4lLUE90y4fTe7nFMJfTVR5xfHU88h6aiwnRsXklkcxTcWChuXzkIj_E9q_eL-pccHSlBSvazJkBd9al6Vd0Ddz3hRRYDcyS4Mct17dqkttLfDgBExVQQXL6zAP_ett-uhsPNq6xNul0_BbkD9ZuByD1Hv2El-8Hb38z1bp1mwAqDHMRlwVgqqs1DtbYUsf_fQhE8Wmz64f3fHC7t7vtA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers. | | | | Dear Friend, Research shows that more than 54% of women considering an abortion will choose life after receiving counseling and an ultrasound. Thanks to the support of pro-life Americans just like you, Focus on the Family's Option Ultrasound Program has saved more than half a million babies in the past two decades. Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers. But with free ultrasounds made possible through Option Ultrasound , mothers have the opportunity to hear the beat of their baby's heart. When a mother sees her baby sucking its tiny thumb or wriggling on an ultrasound, she won 't be deceived by the abortionists' claims that babies are "blobs of tissue" in the womb. Studies show that women who have abortions are more likely to suffer from depression, anxiety, PTSD, and substance abuse, as compared to those who give birth. Carrie -- a young woman who chose abortion -- shared, "Legalized abortion has created a culture where you feel like abortion is the only choice. That's not empowerment for women. That's bondage." After ending the life of her baby, Carrie says she was "foundering in relationships and medicating (her) emotional pain with alcohol." She was tormented by the fact that she had paid someone to end her child's life. Thanks to generous donors, we also run My Choice Network -- an online resource that connects expectant moms with pregnancy medical centers. Since the network launched in 2020, more than 250,000 appointments have been made at life-saving centers. You can also help us increase our presence in high-risk areas and train physicians and nurses in abortion pill reversal -- trainings that have saved more than 3,000 lives in less than four years. Thank you for your support! Jim Daly President, Focus on the Family P.S. Focus on the Family 8605 Explorer Dr. Colorado Springs, CO 80920 1-800-A-FAMILY (232-6459) | | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Get “The Federalist Papers” on DVD
body:
“The Constitution is kind of trash.” | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=2092e649a31047dfa3b10b582eb49625&_t=GMwJA1ncNm_nuWHGwVbuADVUpS6GOAPnvwCyCuLUFvug_iEp6cFCu27itlEAVb0SCspXXjP00C7IOIwDOTIVpcttR7azYFrieuJ4f-b74Yw%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2092e649a31047dfa3b10b582eb49625&_e=7x8iowzHqsiH8-o5qHA3351ODWUyXsYOoYe3B062VTBrHJ4amCKtBe4E6lHUq1VgKw7jW7fSxm4UOVtXIUvX-gCQjnu6X9f4g_cUR0PZgYLX6hLLObCCbhBRn6H676FY2MT5ie8jQi65k9hilG_AIrh9SJ_9yFEhEzsvFxp44Zm8-4I3y9Gr_tjVGzLKX7kWpEJ02Dz14YDz37jOYA1hCKLvzUolphs7-oRreQaoe4jcwq3RmKGz9sWWQ5QXpYk3-ZTL-m2kMRmsORqW2sxk6m49_QfzKbNUXGZEhHDdkdE1QnRFCf55lM3Z4foTGK_SoppQCZfVUnlC3SiQG3bQVtzdXjjSNo-qUMSMmL5Cvp0DdELNMD7_3RDGJ2iXIzkvyl8X0ASHbbv6je7lT2uIlEYKQLN7wE4nxJW5A2VGZiVwkTJBTIvdAtgOVHA5Tw1I)
| | Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, ["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2092e649a31047dfa3b10b582eb49625&_e=7x8iowzHqsiH8-o5qHA3351ODWUyXsYOoYe3B062VTBrHJ4amCKtBe4E6lHUq1VgKw7jW7fSxm4UOVtXIUvX-gCQjnu6X9f4g_cUR0PZgYLX6hLLObCCbhBRn6H676FY2MT5ie8jQi65k9hilG_AIrh9SJ_9yFEhEzsvFxp44Zm8-4I3y9Gr_tjVGzLKX7kWpEJ02Dz14YDz37jOYA1hCKLvzUolphs7-oRreQaoe4jcwq3RmKGz9sWWQ5QXpYk3-ZTL-m2kMRmsORqW2sxk6m49_QfzKbNUXGZEhHDdkdGk13Yzdcj5GGUsicgaP8P0tZK5L_T4q3MGGYMOwVBVAaNJDqusGgcGoxUngMa-pT1ap2-9mRDXmIso_WEFj2S_Uzf--CJo403_kC6ZUuxYU6OTGiVi1-gpprHcQrGuOcEnT-DjJlGios6tbdKlnSXy)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2092e649a31047dfa3b10b582eb49625&_e=7x8iowzHqsiH8-o5qHA3351ODWUyXsYOoYe3B062VTBrHJ4amCKtBe4E6lHUq1VgKw7jW7fSxm4UOVtXIUvX-gCQjnu6X9f4g_cUR0PZgYLX6hLLObCCbhBRn6H676FY2MT5ie8jQi65k9hilG_AIrh9SJ_9yFEhEzsvFxp44Zm8-4I3y9Gr_tjVGzLKX7kWpEJ02Dz14YDz37jOYA1hCKLvzUolphs7-oRreQaoe4jcwq3RmKGz9sWWQ5QXpYk3-ZTL-m2kMRmsORqW2sxk6m49_QfzKbNUXGZEhHDdkdGS9Ezb8DwgBDyKu9iWEwbbQTn99LJKlGzpIVXt4nhaFbSBkWxOUqqMVmb9Mq4YNNmJ6lAp-hOK7PbJ6MTve49Jjeec0n2zPskKRI_k8NumJkD6yuNedAlLxYYDi5pUipzCthHzv8kqrySpfvOpGj4v)
---
| | _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2092e649a31047dfa3b10b582eb49625&_e=7x8iowzHqsiH8-o5qHA3351ODWUyXsYOoYe3B062VTBrHJ4amCKtBe4E6lHUq1VgKw7jW7fSxm4UOVtXIUvX-gCQjnu6X9f4g_cUR0PZgYLX6hLLObCCbhBRn6H676FY2MT5ie8jQi65k9hilG_AIrh9SJ_9yFEhEzsvFxp44Zm8-4I3y9Gr_tjVGzLKX7kWpEJ02Dz14YDz37jOYA1hCKLvzUolphs7-oRreQaoe4jcwq3RmKGz9sWWQ5QXpYk3-ZTL-m2kMRmsORqW2sxk6m49_QfzKbNUXGZEhHDdkdFkZAgZhzcDhKeYE0rl1wAwTz0ODc95t-VFkLG1OvusUMcImJ1KTm2b9BVwQedfxObTjegqVR1Wo3FoQLNYVuO9brDG65V1y56jYWkqw7b2X6VGVqdZwRI-DD1h8-Pnn4VmGdkTd7QaO98DkBI0csa8) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Lynn Peterson
subject: A difficult decision:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79359178/456244932/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWMyYjMzOS0wOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6nmCy-NCVsH-g5z1g09l2k3ZmeFgRrn1N4cWH2gX5is=&emci=89233013-92cf-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=bec2b339-09d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter — I have an important update, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **After careful consideration and consultation with my loved ones, advisors, and supporters, I've made the difficult decision to suspend my campaign for Congress.** I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to the thousands of Oregonians I've had the privilege to meet, and the more than 1500 individuals who supported our campaign and contributed to safeguarding our democracy. Your dedication is deeply appreciated. A special thanks to my dedicated staff and, most importantly, to my husband Mark for his unwavering love and support throughout this endeavor. **Together, this intrepid team traversed thousands of miles across the state, attended well over 100 events, and most importantly: connected with countless Oregonians who share our passion for improving our community.** ******While I'm pausing my journey to Congress, I'm not stepping back from the fight for our community's future.** I'm honored to continue serving as Metro President, leading the nation's only elected regional government: Metro's ongoing critical projects, especially the I-5 bridge replacement and affordable housing initiatives will help make a real, tangible impact for Oregonians. I know that my unique background in transportation engineering, urban planning, and public service, will help uplift Oregon. Despite this electoral setback, my commitment to making a positive impact on our community is stronger than ever. I entered this race as the first Democrat because I was alarmed by the MAGA extremism of Lori Chavez-DeRemer and the Republican House Majority. Oregon's 5th District is pivotal to restoring sensible leadership to Washington, DC. **We can still accomplish this goal together.** I'm proud of this movement and what we stand for and over the next few days, I'll introduce you to a few folks I met who deserve our attention and support. Suspending my congressional campaign wasn't an easy decision, but I know it's the right one today. And while I won't be taking this work to Washington, DC in 2025, I'm more excited than ever to make a difference right here in Oregon. Warmly, _Lynn Peterson_ |
---|---|---

| | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress
---

|

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is the last opportunity I have to show California that I am the right candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40768aaa-675a-48bc-aaf0-974049136195/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| |

| | | | | Peter, In just a few hours, I’ll be getting on the debate stage for the third and final time of this primary election cycle. This is one of the last opportunities I have to show California that I am the best candidate to represent our state in the U.S. Senate. As I get ready for the debate, I wanted to give you a few reasons why I decided to join this race: Throughout my time as an assistant U.S. attorney, California state Senator, and member of Congress, I’ve tried to do the most good for the most people. And during this time, I always focused on getting things done – whether that is increasing funding for public transportation and affordable housing or fighting to lower healthcare costs. California needs someone who will take on the big fights, knows how to get things done, and who reflects their values. So if you agree, I hope that I can count on your help to get me to the finish line so that I can continue to do the work I love the most — making a difference for Californians every single day. [Peter, pitch in a split donation of $10 now between Blue Amp Action and my campaign to help me reach the U.S. Senate. With just 2 weeks left in this primary election, we can’t slow down now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93404f0b-9a2a-472a-a1ff-bd0fe85abf66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64e50937-f868-4a10-8f41-982040a45fdf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Andy Kim
subject: Here’s the truth about 30-year registered Republican Tammy Murphy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Who do you trust to stand up to Donald Trump: the lifelong Democrat and career public servant, or a multi-millionaire who was a registered Republican for 30 years?
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79359127/456244882/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2E1MmExZC0wOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3TL244VdPETw67ip8mBRLZ4HM-Ez0hGMIVGK4QQ3HGw=&emci=3e43999c-05d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=aca52a1d-09d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Who do you trust to stand up to Donald Trump: the lifelong Democrat and career public servant or a multi-millionaire who was a registered Republican for 30 years?** That's the choice in this election with so much at stake. Andy Kim worked in the Obama White House, and when he saw that Donald Trump was about to take health care away from New Jersey families, he stood up to him and flipped a district Trump won in 2018. He voted twice to impeach him too. _That's leadership._ **Here's the truth about 30-year registered Republican Tammy Murphy** : She donated to George W. Bush. She voted in primaries to select a nominee to run against Barack Obama and Joe Biden. She was a registered Republican while her party nominated anti-abortion Supreme Court Justices, attacked the rights of LGBTQ Americans, and passed massive tax cuts for multi-millionaires like herself. **Andy Kim has been a Democrat his entire life. He's put public service first. He'll be a Democrat we can trust and be proud of. With so much at stake, we cannot afford anything less.** The people of New Jersey need to know about our opponent's Republican past. clean_body: Who do you trust to stand up to Donald Trump: the lifelong Democrat and career public servant, or a multi-millionaire who was a registered Republican for 30 years? | | | | Who do you trust to stand up to Donald Trump: the lifelong Democrat and career public servant or a multi-millionaire who was a registered Republican for 30 years? That's the choice in this election with so much at stake. Andy Kim worked in the Obama White House, and when he saw that Donald Trump was about to take health care away from New Jersey families, he stood up to him and flipped a district Trump won in 2018. He voted twice to impeach him too. That's leadership. Here's the truth about 30-year registered Republican Tammy Murphy : She donated to George W. Bush. She voted in primaries to select a nominee to run against Barack Obama and Joe Biden. She was a registered Republican while her party nominated anti-abortion Supreme Court Justices, attacked the rights of LGBTQ Americans, and passed massive tax cuts for multi-millionaires like herself. Andy Kim has been a Democrat his entire life. He's put public service first. He'll be a Democrat we can trust and be proud of. With so much at stake, we cannot afford anything less. The people of New Jersey need to know about our opponent's Republican past. With your help, we can make sure every Democratic voter knows who's been on our side, and who spent 30 years a member of a party that's putting our democracy at risk. = = More soon, Team Andy Kim | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Dr. Prasanth Reddy
subject: Reddy to Listen from day one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REDDY FOR KANSAS
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/60ea6632fc324a8ac3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
| | On Friday, we had another great Reddy to Listen event! Thank you to everyone who joined us in Overland Park. If you weren’t there, I hope to see you at another one of these events soon.
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/7ea5d3425cd9dca7c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/ce7257c175301ac2c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
|
---
As I’ve said many times before, I know the best first step is always to listen. I promised to do that when I announced my campaign, and that’s exactly what I’ve continued doing. **But here’s the hitch: Listening events, voter contacts, and the rest of our campaign cost money. *A lot of money.* ** _(And that’s before you even consider how much money Sharice Davids already has on hand to keep this seat.) _ **[**So, my ask of you is simple: Will you chip in *any amount* you can right now?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/b637a2490e970126c3d6b838967d376c/43823)**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/b7024131073f7b92c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
Securing the American Dream for future generations depends on sending new leadership to Congress. And this district deserves someone who listens, prioritizes results, and is an independent voice willing to call out extreme ideas on _**all sides.**_ That’s why I’m running, and I’m going to continue _**listening**_ , and working to earn support from the voters of Kansas’ 3rd District. [_**I hope you’ll help us.**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/53dfecd8ed0af72ac3d6b838967d376c/43823)__

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/040fbcd15e2206b3c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
Dr. Prasanth Reddy
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/228aa3b661dbc4adc3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/28f1309502b7c0fbc3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
**__Meet Dr. Prasanth Reddy:__** Dr. Reddy is a cancer physician and immigrant who's lived the American Dream. In the aftermath of 9/11, he answered his country's call. He became a citizen, joined the U.S. Air Force Reserve, and still serves as Lt. Colonel today. Dr. Reddy is running for Congress against a Democrat who votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time, in one of the most competitive House districts in the country. Dr. Reddy is a different kind of candidate. He's an outsider, a problem solver, and someone who's spent his career taking action. Let's flip Kansas' 3rd District and send an independent voice to Congress. **[Chip in here or below.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/a67df3b6d125b5883947229f28c3afba/a3e45ce4f532b978c3d6b838967d376c/43823)**

clean_body: | | | | | On Friday, we had another great Reddy to Listen event! Thank you to everyone who joined us in Overland Park. If you weren’t there, I hope to see you at another one of these events soon. | | As I’ve said many times before, I know the best first step is always to listen. I promised to do that when I announced my campaign, and that’s exactly what I’ve continued doing. But here’s the hitch: Listening events, voter contacts, and the rest of our campaign cost money. A lot of money. (And that’s before you even consider how much money Sharice Davids already has on hand to keep this seat.) Securing the American Dream for future generations depends on sending new leadership to Congress. And this district deserves someone who listens, prioritizes results, and is an independent voice willing to call out extreme ideas on all sides. That’s why I’m running, and I’m going to continue listening , and working to earn support from the voters of Kansas’ 3rd District. Dr. Prasanth Reddy | | Meet Dr. Prasanth Reddy:__ Dr. Reddy is a cancer physician and immigrant who's lived the American Dream. In the aftermath of 9/11, he answered his country's call. He became a citizen, joined the U.S. Air Force Reserve, and still serves as Lt. Colonel today. Dr. Reddy is running for Congress against a Democrat who votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time, in one of the most competitive House districts in the country. Dr. Reddy is a different kind of candidate. He's an outsider, a problem solver, and someone who's spent his career taking action. Let's flip Kansas' 3rd District and send an independent voice to Congress. Reddy for Kansas PO Box 15804 Lenexa, KS 66285 USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is the last opportunity I have to show California that I am the right candidate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5590%2E5257348%2EylOhtv)
Derek – In just a few hours, I’ll be getting on the debate stage for the third and final time of this primary election cycle.
This is one of the last opportunities I have to show California that I am the best candidate to represent our state in the U.S. Senate.
As I get ready for the debate, I wanted to give you a few reasons why I decided to join this race:
Throughout my time as an assistant U.S. attorney, California State Senator, and member of Congress, I’ve tried to do the _most good_ for the _most people_.
And during this time, I always focused on getting things done – whether that is increasing funding for public transportation and affordable housing or fighting to lower healthcare costs.
California needs someone who will take on the big fights, knows how to get things done, and reflects their values.
So if you agree, I hope that I can count on your help to get me to the finish line so that I can continue to do the work I love the most — making a difference for Californians every single day.
**[Derek, pitch in $10 now to help me reach the U.S. Senate. With just 2 weeks left in this primary election, we can’t slow down now.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em_debate.lRaDpg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=5590%2E5257348%2EylOhtv)**

Friend, a Democrat judge just ruled against me!
I’ve been spied on, indicted, arrested, _**AND HAD MY MUGSHOT TAKEN!**_
Democrats are terrified of us winning in November.
We’ll **REBUILD** the economy, **END** the invasion, and **STOP** our humiliation overseas.
The last thing they want is to SEE US WIN, and when we do, we’ll put _**AMERICA FIRST!**_

name: Young
subject: They won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I couldn’t believe it...

| |
---
| | | _**- A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - **_
Dear, Friend,

You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story.

I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant.

When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy.

__In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election.__

But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. **Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. **

Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans.

_I 'm nothing special._ Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone.

But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. _The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. _

clean_body: I couldn’t believe it... | | | | | - A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - Dear, Friend, You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story. I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant. When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy. In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election. But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans. I 'm nothing special. Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone. But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. | | | | They've recruited progressive Liberals to run against me, pledged MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads & smear campaigns, and the White House even named me one of their TOP 18 targets. I don't normally ask for help like this, but my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters just like you, and I urgently need your help to win my fight, Friend. "I’m coming to you personally today to ask if you could chip in just a few bucks to help fuel my campaign against these attacks from the woke Left and help me DEFEND the GOP Majority. " | | | | Thank you in advance for your support, | Young Kim | | | Friend, the desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target. They will once again result in desperate, disgusting attacks like calling me a token candidate. Their attacks only make me work harder. I won't be deterred by desperate Democrats who will say and do anything to score some cheap political points. They've already committed MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me. As an immigrant and Conservative woman, this isn't the first time I have been subjected to the Democrats' attacks. That's why I need your help. This is not the first and certainly won't be the last time the Left comes after us. name: Jim Daly, Focus on the Family
subject: Saving mothers and babies from abortion
body:
Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ4lR42FEOzgsUHpvIAsyTnGy6Pia78niQyafN_8A5EmxMdeK93F4IJqABkPlD2bDr4Rt6gXTV4xZjCNxgblAxfKk96gF_N2Qxvh6DT7Zuv84V3ArhFSYIflp1X9SMdbj4d5BtdXu6jKa9JIj1zZh_bQ2lTYP4lJED4Jkj0LcahcAA%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, **Research shows that more than 54% of women considering an abortion will choose life after receiving counseling and an ultrasound. ** Thanks to the support of pro-life Americans just like you, Focus on the Family’s _Option Ultrasound_ _Program_ has saved more than half a million babies in the past two decades. [**You can save a mother and her baby from abortion with your gift of $60 today. Please help us make ultrasounds possible for abortion-vulnerable women.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ666RFc1z9T100x6sjRyeTI75Q-PkEF23_gAbGjjTEUe3Wcl8r4_FYM2zBxJbn6i4jFKjVFjAoB2rgZS3sdLVsblBs3Ao-aLq9U8i2zbZdm5VewiH0q9hW2yssUIQc-kGnhnu9EzElyrDGFeGlrTGliDQcrkdkt84T9dzMySMLDEA%3D%3D)
---
[DONATE NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ6f6sFnjAtrx-0DsB2FfeBgBt8j3NCMDqwNhy_fKKTaBOdhH11udgCQCQ_ZsVIo1P3RNvXp1J1UubBEeXHZvhoBpi19VlPyFo2FuqM5JfW6NRyaaativvsIsDZB3TfEvPdBXGY9xq6f-j7oAlOQ8tQtZnNIGChtaJ1GM--P9KyI6g%3D%3D)
---
Abortion is taking the lives of babies and ruining the lives of mothers and fathers. But with free ultrasounds made possible through _Option Ultrasound_ , mothers have the opportunity to hear the beat of their baby’s heart. **When a mother sees her baby sucking its tiny thumb or wriggling on an ultrasound, she won’t be deceived by the abortionists’ claims that babies are “blobs of tissue” in the womb.** [**Your support will equip life-affirming pregnancy centers across the country with ultrasound machines, resources, and nurses’ sonography training so abortion-vulnerable mothers can meet their babies... and be moved to choose life.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ6SYx9xdr47oErasl13jKP1gaS8mk4fD6zdKdI8wTdXvFgAKFS0WRGWMI1Sg6vkc_YqpM9IvnLlCrNiQa14iIras8c9iUB90ykzWWw0itqxBQ-5tBeXyLI2miMcwh2_k3f4v4OETALvcYhk7Rkd8i73mwFDIP5wE_wJzgYRq504yQ%3D%3D) Studies show that women who have abortions are more likely to suffer from depression, anxiety, PTSD, and substance abuse, as compared to those who give birth. Carrie — a young woman who chose abortion — shared, “Legalized abortion has created a culture where you feel like abortion is the only choice. That’s not empowerment for women. That’s bondage.” After ending the life of her baby, Carrie says she was “foundering in relationships and medicating (her) emotional pain with alcohol.” She was tormented by the fact that she had paid someone to end her child’s life. [**While nothing will bring Carrie’s baby back, you can prevent another mother from making the same heartbreaking decision with your gift of $60 today. Every $60 we raise will save an additional life thanks to the power of an ultrasound.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ4VrvnTAhSqR3WCZZ04m2DkMC6qkyZQZ8VlDnNsKb9UqMv70SB4cybH57AUvyZ7A2WHPk5objs69BROuGSY1J3zocGlJdPLSDiZr0puByRMvRHNAQKeZBVY_ZkC278a_HbxAh5-gHoEm8M7Zc5uvwqJvmM8sdMaSnB1gqtgsaOGrQ%3D%3D) Thanks to generous donors, we also run My Choice Network — an online resource that connects expectant moms with pregnancy medical centers. Since the network launched in 2020, more than 250,000 appointments have been made at life-saving centers. You can also help us increase our presence in high-risk areas and train physicians and nurses in abortion pill reversal — trainings that have saved more than 3,000 lives in less than four years. **[**Please help with your immediate gift of $60 or more today and save the life of a baby today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ6Ouu3ZG4OlogD3ZL2UcXDdmyg4RPU-l5KBSzbydYl-OfVaGthyNWZW3zsNbO3a98kiSvaP0QoicQj0OTjLUAnln2ZluJLKqz0CWua_R4CVPvvep57vhrUpUzig4omJAcVjQBfvY6i-1QE_uyIn3G23vPoiePXsZSfpkzfMvVqrBg%3D%3D)**
---
[DONATE NOW](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ5AWEKpB-bN685EVMAbmKi3TrSoxKMv0wrjScUEE8qKK3cMxI63Hbmx7G0M0m7to9nIRoNWvJOeDue4Ikt8SjNbEle6OErQhYK0vP95StavfY3wq4AaFVGzYKBRcun6tcjOpTQC-eND4eFbs-LLn14HbO-26tiy1GPcyULjR9RtwA%3D%3D)
---
Thank you for your support!
---

Jim Daly President, Focus on the Family P.S. **[Give now to join our campaign this month and save mothers and babies from the tragedy of abortion!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5565e67d63094dbc9aaeda197ec724ec&_e=v4k75sV1rgJ5-7CgOOPEVhxaNvgDeOfo3XwynlMR3e-N0TPAO07E4b2KK5z6UYK45jw9lHOczy-T1JHtwqgzio1uPHEHXTYDU1ckg4KtwQ405FywJzrE6RH-_0L1Wt1cYB1U5DlGE6YosnYOA3Y55ThFN4S51GKBkEfO8p3hai9v2n2dRnWR3LonVm3n_nsK3YQAOOywj6_-XOdzT-up0w-LGRW7FcBoc-sjkds257ROUcydWsT-1YofyX5Dvek9xrgp1tvku09BVo13-FfviQ%3D%3D)** Focus on the Family 8605 Explorer Dr. Colorado Springs, CO 80920 1-800-A-FAMILY (232-6459)

The MAGA mob will do whatever it takes to SILENCE him and seize his vulnerable seat. _We can’t let that happen!_

| | **A message from the Fmr. Intel Chairman:**
---
| | _**Each week, Mike Rogers will share the latest under the radar intelligence on the actions of our foes and their efforts to undermine America, highlighting its implications for families in Michigan.**_
---
U.S. intelligence is [reporting ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=24c5a1f77b8a418ca1eef6bc68fd41ec&_e=-Cuf0QgdwuiwUsFGDFK03CPNs2gLuEoiA_jK8lfQ6f8q_TAC3OKXYkty_vKzNBHehdpswIUQhTc1ErwjGsgUihFu10TufPSFeSQkmJ-pIIsRfCHsJaUo6TeiXRiYYfSaOnVkH3DxBMZ76S0e7wa-OSbVvdQKgpE-9jYm9klfDigl7fSSI1yikVazsSPoX5qMaILe1d1SgGvcHbGXA9xGKban4MfUyaILK2JKhwF8dDBThMHtOsZUQYVIiNIftapQ34fWifMtPNSnOT-LF3d78Brlg3MdnO1hUGuIcj3dfPw_4e8PA35hzKc9Y6Xug_EKBznxy5SAXBG4TtQd9ssbqsz-IDsVeQI72t7RxQ_6Xbo%3D) that Russia is developing a nuclear-based or nuclear-related space capability. Why does this matter to Michiganders? America’s national and economic security relies on space more than any other country. From GPS navigation to weather, and from early-warning to satellite intelligence, every aspect of America’s way of life is related to space capabilities. While Russia (and China, and others) have anti-satellite capabilities, the nuclear part of this latest story raises serious concerns and highlights just what a threat Russia remains, even as its conventional forces are degraded on-the-ground in Ukraine.
---
|
---
The United States [carried ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=24c5a1f77b8a418ca1eef6bc68fd41ec&_e=-Cuf0QgdwuiwUsFGDFK03JhrdSGa3UleOKQqzWHdgeCEdDwzkWuYLLWF6a57Q1R6PZHvW8uBaH0ZH8Cnc0kKLcYAmVB4BWHyh_mV4t_urkgnqJ2ePGeqTCxRWjSPEZPOiKobzStFRRzcR7wftml8yhJ8FdZ8wlqGM4mXrwPnBO3VrPDDCU6RB5pRpl3X6gmaPHpSKqEPubRdZZcMx6uCGOpggHoSuQefPs_IBDW947hNnzg40418W6VbjvDaPRk13SLDeseKpiWmR_DeBq4F5x1b4Mjfl0C004t_-WBgj8r2IN-ASPPv-1asBqv9QBZv) out a cyber operation against an Iranian spy ship in the Red Sea. This vessel was providing intelligence and targeting information for Houthi rebels, which have been launching attacks against our Navy and commercial shipping in this vital waterway. Reestablishing deterrence here is vital to ensure the free flow of goods and services. With many shipping companies avoiding the Red Sea, prices here at home are going up as it takes far longer to go around Africa than through the Suez Canal.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | A message from the Fmr. Intel Chairman: | | Each week, Mike Rogers will share the latest under the radar intelligence on the actions of our foes and their efforts to undermine America, highlighting its implications for families in Michigan. U.S. intelligence is that Russia is developing a nuclear-based or nuclear-related space capability. Why does this matter to Michiganders? America’s national and economic security relies on space more than any other country. From GPS navigation to weather, and from early-warning to satellite intelligence, every aspect of America’s way of life is related to space capabilities. While Russia (and China, and others) have anti-satellite capabilities, the nuclear part of this latest story raises serious concerns and highlights just what a threat Russia remains, even as its conventional forces are degraded on-the-ground in Ukraine. | The United States out a cyber operation against an Iranian spy ship in the Red Sea. This vessel was providing intelligence and targeting information for Houthi rebels, which have been launching attacks against our Navy and commercial shipping in this vital waterway. Reestablishing deterrence here is vital to ensure the free flow of goods and services. With many shipping companies avoiding the Red Sea, prices here at home are going up as it takes far longer to go around Africa than through the Suez Canal. | | In the News | | | | Latest Posts | | | | | | | | Merch Store | | Show your support for Mike's campaign to bring some conservative leadership to Washington with a sweatshirt, mug, hat or bumper sticker! | | We Need You! | | In order to win in November, Mike will need to spread his message from Detroit to Marquette, Saginaw to Kalamazoo, and everywhere in between! We need YOUR help to make sure every Michigander knows who Mike Rogers is and what he stands for. That's why we're asking that you forward this email to your friends and family and let them know about Mike's plans to fix D.C. and serve the Great Lakes State. Please follow us on , , and to get the latest and most up to date information from the campaign. Thank you so much for your support! -Team Rogers | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---

Look, The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall... But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress. I know Mike Johnson reached out... I know Steve Scalise reached out... I know Kellyanne Conway reached out... I know Newt Gingrich reached out... I know Byron Donalds reached out... And I know James Comer reached out... But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us. "If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours." | | | "KICK IN TEN BUCKS" | | | "KICK IN TWENTY BUCKS" | | | "KICK IN ANOTHER AMOUNT" Let me put it plainly: WITH YOUR HELP: We have a direct path to sweeping the next elections. WITHOUT YOUR HELP: We might as well enjoy our House Majority while it lasts... because the Democrats will crush us in no time. "So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important. " - Senator John Kennedy | "John Kennedy" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | | "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY " | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: View From the Campaign Trail: 6th District Straw Poll Win + events across Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
>From winning the 6th District Straw Poll to events across Indiana, our campaign continues to gain momentum!

https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Friends and fellow Hoosiers,

It's been another eventful week on the campaign trail! I'm taking a quick pause on the trail to fill you in on last week's events—from winning the 6th District Straw Poll in Knightstown to touring the Indiana/Kentucky/Ohio Regional Council of Carpenters Training Facility.

Read on for the highlights and how I'm working to address crucial issues facing Hoosiers.

** IN THE NEWS: Suzanne Crouch Wins Sixth District Gubernatorial Straw Poll
------------------------------------------------------------

I'm honored to have been voted the winner of this past weekend's 6th District Gubernatorial Straw Poll!
https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/first-gubernatorial-straw-poll-win-goes-to-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

This win is a testament to the fact that Hoosiers want to #AxeTheTax, protect Indiana from China's foreign land investments, and invest in mental health.

As Governor, I'm ready to lead the fight on DAY ONE.

ARTICLE (https://indianacapitalchronicle.com/briefs/first-gubernatorial-straw-poll-win-goes-to-crouch/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** SEEN ON SOCIAL: National Caregivers Day
------------------------------------------------------------

Friday marked National Caregivers Day—a time to thank those who provide compassionate care every day; this includes the parents who work as full-time caregivers to their medically complex children. Today, they are facing looming program cuts by the FSSA. We cannot turn a blind eye when so much is at stake.
https://www.wthitv.com/news/its-going-to-be-so-much-harder-local-family-concerned-about-fssa-medicaid-changes/article_1b2a203e-c6cd-11ee-881c-0f8309ad457f.html?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
ARTICLE (https://www.wthitv.com/news/its-going-to-be-so-much-harder-local-family-concerned-about-fssa-medicaid-changes/article_1b2a203e-c6cd-11ee-881c-0f8309ad457f.html?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Tour of IKORCC Training Facility in Northwest Indiana
------------------------------------------------------------

https://www.facebook.com/reel/1055010348901326?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Last Thursday, I had the privilege of touring the Indiana/Kentucky/Ohio Regional Council of Carpenters Training Facility in Merrillville.

Joined by John Carr, the president of the Carpenters Local Union 1485 in LaPorte, Indiana, we explored the facility and discussed ways to support skilled trades and workforce development initiatives in our state.

** Cass County Lincoln Day Dinner
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wrtv.com/news/state-news/newborn-surrendered-in-southern-indiana-safe-haven-baby-box?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

On Saturday evening, I had the privilege of speaking before the Cass County Republican Party at their annual Lincoln Day Dinner.

Thank you to the Cass County Republican Party and Chair David Richey for organizing!

** Chin National Day Celebration
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.wrtv.com/news/state-news/newborn-surrendered-in-southern-indiana-safe-haven-baby-box?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

I had the privilege of speaking at the Chin National Day Celebration in Indianapolis, where over 1,500 people gathered to celebrate the rich culture and heritage of the Chin.

It was an honor to be a part of the celebration and to witness the vibrant spirit and unity within Indiana's Chin community!

** ICYMI: Endorsements (https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
------------------------------------------------------------
Suzanne Crouch is the only gubernatorial candidate who has been endorsed by more than 100 past and present elected officials in Indiana. A full list of those endorsements can be found here. (https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

https://crouchforindiana.com/endorsements/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

** Last but not least...
------------------------------------------------------------
Thank you for your unwavering support and commitment to our shared vision for Indiana. Together, we will build a brighter future for all Hoosiers.

Onward and upward,

Let's keep the conversation going! Follow me on social to keep up with the campaign. Have questions, comments or concerns? Send me an email!
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D Website (https://crouchforindiana.com?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com Email (mailto:info@crouchforindiana.com)

** Get Involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
Ready to make an impact? By joining my campaign, there are several ways that YOU can be a catalyst for change! Tap the "Get Involved" button below to get hands-on with the campaign, request yard signs, host an event and more.
GET INVOLVED (https://crouchforindiana.com/get-involved/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=91aacb0f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_02_14_03_44&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-91aacb0f6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Attend one of my upcoming fundraisers!
------------------------------------------------------------
Your support plays a pivotal role in our mission to connect with Hoosiers across the state and convey our vision for Indiana's future.

If you'd like to be a part of our journey and attend one of our upcoming fundraisers, here's the list of events:
For more information or to RSVP, contact Heather at:
heather@crouchforindiana.com (mailto:heather@crouchforindiana.com) or 615-438-3531 (tel:6154383531) .

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: I'm getting VERY worried

Fellow Conservative,

Jon Tester is already breaking records for ad spending in this Senate race. He is fundraising like the career D.C. politician he is and putting together a formidable campaign.

Winning this race is going to be quite a challenge. But a challenge I am up to. _**I can and will defeat Jon Tester by offering Montana a new brand of conservative leadership that stands up to the socialist left and fights for the principled solutions our state and country need.**_

But I need you on my team if we're going to get this done. Your support for my campaign will mean victory or defeat. **[I’m writing to ask you to please consider donating to my campaign today. This campaign is going to get even more expensive than it already is, which is to say **very, very expensive**. We’re already getting outspent by millions of dollars! And those millions are being spent on attack ads that smear my record of success and my conservative credentials.

That's why it's critical for me and my campaign to keep our own ads on air defending my record as a successful businessman and principled conservative. Every day we're not on air, _**Jon Tester will attempt to define me on his own terms.**_

Those ads will be costly.

**[Can I count on you to donate to my campaign today?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3a798324f5ca4d01980bd167b0600993&_e=7WhUEzT7hHnmobCXYv0b3xtrEz5L-ts38_V3sT7Zx0mLOJRTbMOigI4TCvCnD5kQh7MqLRzQOxtWL6JwPBI8Q2hGItttV8_q22ezWC4lLZ7ITEOVKcor4ldc_ZiOxgMPcqrIiWOqBuGxjkdqqjOx561yh_voY3TiUf0NxFDqiwtEE7QuNI1mwpMfC93M41DCMHEKNM_D_wsXrQHRoYi1V8Xf5vSr5QyhiRsffmZmRNwkAUzgvtM39SPC9gy1fUqTShmnEqbBcfM3gPQO8HNVxdKHP3_JBUIEhvW3h3r5KJ1Wx02k21fcRntVQ_W8rKG7YOfVgQc2SLk_w8pYZYx-4O3oFIvO5CSAgkPMe5Iu_FzTYj7m_OpLAVY6reSsMRi9khq1OYypwNKVqBfjcyZcyn96gLG8mj15SBN-YkcuzVo%3D)**

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action, CHC Bold PAC, New Dems Action Fund, Dems Serve, IBEW, Voter Protection Project, JStreet, and over 40 local elected officials.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. clean_body: | | | I’m about to meet with our field staff, but first, I have an urgent request. = I know paying field staff doesn’t seem like the most critical line item in our budget. So let me explain: This race came down to just 5,800 votes two years ago. That means every door knocked could be decisive this year. Criss-crossing the district and speaking directly to voters is critical to a historic victory. If our team misses even one day of knocking doors, my chances of flipping this seat will plummet. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your help, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action, CHC Bold PAC, New Dems Action Fund, Dems Serve, IBEW, Voter Protection Project, JStreet, and over 40 local elected officials. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . subject: John Oliver’s hilarious offer to Clarence Thomas is actually a great idea
body:

| | |
# [Sign: Tell Clarence Thomas to take John Oliver’s offer and RESIGN! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e72135a-3309-4b28-9ccc-2839703c8907/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Comedian John Oliver proposed a sweet deal to Clarence Thomas on his show, “Last Week Tonight” – he’ll pay the Supreme Court Justice $1 million a year and give him a luxury RV if he resigns from the Supreme Court. And he’s serious! What a great deal! We already know Thomas loves accepting lavish gifts from billionaires and Republican megadonors, and he clearly has no qualms about violating any code of ethics, so this should be a no-brainer. Clarence Thomas’ actions and his wife’s involvement in the Jan 6 insurrection have raised serious questions about his ability to serve on the Supreme Court. This seems like a great opportunity for Thomas to show himself out. [Add your name: Tell Clarence Thomas to accept John Oliver’s offer and RESIGN! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0598dc3-2195-4224-a902-10aa990d40e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Byron Donalds [Chairman]
subject: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkT2PnDAQhn-N6YzsAeyloDjpRLdRlCalNeBhz4ltkBm4u38fkY8qzbaj0fM-M-_3u7tjiCE_vmCioSRXdsen22eMYSc5eTlhjCs7UNBKBRKU05UfTA_2pisatFW3tgPT2-pt0NRowMXquW27uV-87QjayS8ww6IJqzBcHAWgtIUObG2n3ix-uk2AVvVEolWFtmOKYcac8MdaAn_WmbiKwxvztovmRcAoYNxpPgrV7yEX8vW8JgEjEyb5113A6NeM0e9ywvxTfq5HkefKJI_NI5O_MM1YLkwJ-SGaVy4HCTAHJzdj2jA8smhe_xjr3n19kd_uuta6MX3nWLeduoGS2nZGgKEPx8E_v_87Zc1Mma_oU5Yk_z1HgPk48vnfvCqD395DjGE3VrTqkTDE6_aKn-3uVwAAAP__OneZDQ "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkT2PnDAQhn-N6YzsAeyloDjpRLdRlCalNeBhz4ltkBm4u38fkY8qzbaj0fM-M-_3u7tjiCE_vmCioSRXdsen22eMYSc5eTlhjCs7UNBKBRKU05UfTA_2pisatFW3tgPT2-pt0NRowMXquW27uV-87QjayS8ww6IJqzBcHAWgtIUObG2n3ix-uk2AVvVEolWFtmOKYcac8MdaAn_WmbiKwxvztovmRcAoYNxpPgrV7yEX8vW8JgEjEyb5113A6NeM0e9ywvxTfq5HkefKJI_NI5O_MM1YLkwJ-SGaVy4HCTAHJzdj2jA8smhe_xjr3n19kd_uuta6MX3nWLeduoGS2nZGgKEPx8E_v_87Zc1Mma_oU5Yk_z1HgPk48vnfvCqD395DjGE3VrTqkTDE6_aKn-3uVwAAAP__OneZDQ "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---

This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
