clean_body: I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist: | | | | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds. The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?" I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have 1) a Conservative House Majority, 2) a Conservative Senate, and 3) a Conservative in the White House. If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in? | | | "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS" | | | "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT" This is a non-negotiable if we want to win. Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register. If we don 't do it too, we will lose. But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election. Will you do your part? I look forward to seeing your name. name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: BREAKING NEWS…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| It’s official: Right-wing megamillionaire Eric Hovde is running for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)
**🚨 BREAKING: Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Eric Hovde, just launched his Senate campaign to defeat Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin 🚨** It’s official: Right-wing megamillionaire and California bank owner, Eric Hovde, has launched his Senate campaign — and he’s pledged to spend at least $20 million 💰 of his own personal fortune to buy Tammy’s seat. Help us fight back now. **[Rush a donation to ensure Tammy Baldwin’s campaign has the resources to fight off the GOP’s self-funding recruit, defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat, and protect our Democratic majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)
---
After Republicans spent an eye-popping $77 million to buy their way to victory in Wisconsin’s last Senate race, Mitch McConnell’s sure that if they spend big, they can flip Tammy’s seat this time around. **That’s why he called megamillionaire Eric Hovde back from his $7 million ocean view mansion in California to self-fund a run for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin.**
It’s only a matter of time before our new opponent and national Republicans go up on the airwaves attacking Tammy. Wisconsinites will see right through Hovde, but only if we can break through the noise and make sure folks know who he really is: **an out-of-touch megamillionaire who’d rubber stamp McConnell’s far-right agenda in the U.S. Senate.**
It’s going to take a lot of resources to compete with Eric Hovde’s major cash advantage and set the record straight, which is why we’re asking for your urgent support right now:
**[Will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to ensure that we have what it takes to defeat Eric Hovde and protect Tammy’s seat? We can’t let an out-of-touch megamillionaire buy this U.S. Senate seat and cost us our Democratic majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-feb24.LnIHXA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-feb24.guAM0s&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-feb24.-EI-os&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-feb24.z45GJA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-feb24.VkgAaS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20240220_AM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)

This is the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far, Peter. And we’re counting on your support to protect this seat.
Thanks for your support on this.
— Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=2041%2E35263%2Eu4y1ub)**

And I'm not just talking about the value of our currency, I'm talking about our currency being used throughout the world." He went on to say that losing the U.S. dollar’s reserve currency status for the world is **"bigger than losing any war."**

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m nervous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Our final debate is tonight at 6 PM.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37971%2E3422442%2E1UnUkh)
Good morning! Our final debate is tonight at 6 PM, and I’ll be honest—I’m nervous.
If you’ve watched any of the past two debates, you’ve seen celebrity Republican Steve Garvey refuse to take any real policy position—he won’t even tell voters if he plans to support Donald Trump or not.
_But even after his poor performance_ , **polls show us narrowly trailing Garvey** for the second place spot in this race. Second place is a big deal, because the top two finishers, regardless of party, advance to the general election in November.
So how do we pull ahead? It’s a question I’m asking myself everyday.
The problem is that the leading candidate in this race, Adam Schiff, is outspending us every single day. **He’s running $10 million worth of ads that actually *boost* Republican Steve Garvey, in an attempt to box us out of the general.**
On top of that, Schiff’s super PAC and a separate crypto super PAC are placing new ad buys every few days, spending several million against us. The ads these super PACs are running are not just misleading voters, they’re straight up lying about my record.
**Billionaires, establishment politicians, and corporate special interests are trying to buy this race, and it looks like their plan might work.**
So while I’ll be giving it my all tonight and am spending the rest of today preparing, **[I have to ask—is there anything you can give to help us ramp up our TV and digital ads and reach the millions of undecided voters who will determine this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240220-1?refcode=em20240220-37971&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37971_3422442_1UnUkh&akid=37971%2E3422442%2E1UnUkh)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240220-1?refcode=em20240220-37971&refcode2=37971_3422442_1UnUkh&akid=37971%2E3422442%2E1UnUkh)
Our average donation is just $27, so every single supporter is making a real difference. This race is winnable, but I need you by my side.
Katie Porter
**[P.S. Click here to see how you can watch the debate.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19991?t=2&akid=37971%2E3422442%2E1UnUkh)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240220-37971&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=37971_3422442_1UnUkh&akid=37971%2E3422442%2E1UnUkh)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=37971%2E3422442%2E1UnUkh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=37971%2E3422442%2E1UnUkh)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: just not the news I hoped to share
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Our fundraising really tanked over the weekend. It might be because of the holiday yesterday, but we hope it’s not because folks think this race is locked up.
#

Peter, here’s the truth:
Our fundraising really tanked over the weekend. It might be because of the holiday yesterday, but we hope it’s not because folks think this race is locked up.
Whatever the reason, we’ve fallen behind on our fundraising goals. They’re not out of reach, but we’re behind enough that it’s going to be tough to make up that ground before the 29th.
That’s bad news, because we’re taking hits every day here. Kari Lake’s endorsement from the NRSC, a few bad polls showing us behind, and the prospect of millions in attack ads coming our way.
We’ve got to stay on track to our goals, because what we raise on emails like this is how we’ll fight back against all that. It’s how we’ll reach the voters we need, how we’ll run ads of our own, how we’ll take McConnell and Trump and Kari on.
The goals aren’t arbitrary. They are what we need to win.
All that to say this: The timing is really bad, and we need a big day to catch up. So how about it, Peter?
[**Can you make a donation — maybe $3, or whatever you can? Donations like these are our only shot in this race, and the amount isn’t as important as the donation itself. I hope you can chip in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240220-1-60&t=1&akid=1977%2E734936%2EQODf-0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

| | **Biden retiring the US dollar? Could be replaced with this...**
---
| | In one of the most despicable acts every committed by a sitting president, Blundering Joe Biden – without the approval of Congress or the American people – quietly signed **[Executive Order 14067.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kc2u0zAQhZ9msmtkj53EWWQBhKhCXIRY8LOKXHua-mLHluNyKU-PUsrdnvl09B2NDsm7822A7i0gXpzdABHEG0Bcvv56vn7BP0_l8JuiOrx_Dh_ZfsV3gFhuiV7RR0tNQTu_p91Y2eHUKNP2FQ28Y0o2TDVddRla3jFSSve2Z-ZsJLdWCupOhjfEJJOVG5ChZIiMd5JJWTeil7w5tS3x3toTgmThpgNlZ_SadMkuljrmpfLDpZS03Z0mwCnlWCedtXVLWOll81QK5W1nAacAOCH22KgexHQtYQ5k3TWAGB872j3c4jUbAjGuxs-PoY-T0SFpt6wgxl2Yy4NeYtazd-cyr7HQnCnon_Qfj2uhtfyrOhTaCkcB2M6rdxbE-Nk2T-p4PH9v7-H9GWJUn358OFL-pqs82PTivHdb24Fkyy5Zmxj-BgAA__-Rzo4S)**

What makes this so disturbing?

Well, buried inside this order is a sinister provision that could give the government _unprecedented_ control over your money and freedom.

In fact, this provision could set the stage for
* Legal government surveillance of all US citizens

* Total control over your bank accounts and purchases

* And the ability to silence all dissenting voices for good

It’s no wonder Fox News recently called this “a deeply troubling development.”

Still, most Americans have never even _heard_ of Executive Order 14067.

That’s why today, Jim Rickards – a world-renowned economist and former advisor to both the CIA and the Pentagon – has just sounded the alarm on this troubling new development.

In **[his critical presentation](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kc2O1DAQhJ-mc5vIaTt_hxyAbIQQcOAA4hT12D0ZL3Yc2R6W2adHGcJeqz-VvlKT35y93Ado3wPi1ZoEiCDfAeLy_ffz7Ru-fsmnPxy609Oz_yz2K34AxHzf-A09Wkr2ZN2etmNhhnPd6aYveKha0aladHVbXAduzZl6rY1puBOaG0J9ETWaTlZCKyrsgAKVQBRVq4RSZS17VdXnpuGqN-aMoIS_k-doNa0b5WhDLkNcCjdcc97Sw2kCnLYYyo0iGbv4lV-S45w5pp0FnDzghNhj3fUgp1v2s2djbx7keOxo9jCFW9QMcly1m4-hx0mT38guK8hxF67UiZYQaXb2kuc1ZJ4je_rF__GwZl7zv6pT5pQrlIDNvDprQI4mPuXXqVaUHuHjGXLsvv789JHjDyriYLYX65xNTQtKLLtkqYP_GwAA___edI-U)** , he reveals the shocking truth about Biden’s Executive Order...

**And why it’s a direct threat to the freedom of _every single American citizen._**

In fact, according to Mr. Rickards, this order could mean the _end_ of the U.S. dollar as we know it.

“We’re in for a major upheaval of the U.S. dollar,” he says.

“In fact, I predict the 3rd Great Dollar Earthquake has already started...

“The first was Roosevelt confiscating private gold in 1934...

“The second was Nixon abandoning the gold standard in 1971...

“Now,” he says, “Biden’s plan could pave the way for ‘retiring’ the U.S. dollar – and replacing it with **this disturbing new alternative.** ”

And this is NOT some far-off pipe dream.

This is happening right now.

“Executive Order 14067 already gives President Biden unprecedented power over the future of the U.S. dollar,” he says. “And sadly, most Americans will be completely caught off guard by it.”

That’s why Mr. Rickards released **[this must-see presentation](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kc2ylDAQhZ-m2Q0VOgHCgsVVRMu_hQstV1RDephcE0KFzL0zPr3FiG5Pf3XqO9XkV2fP9xbqN4B4sWYDRJBPgDh_f3m-fsPfX9LpxkGf3j37z2K_4ltATPeV_6NHS86erNvTustMO5Z6qpqM26IWWpVCl3V2aSWPYzVpfWajpVQS9URIesRybIqaTWZbFKgEoihqJZTKS9moohyriovGmBFBCX8nz9FOtKyUog0pD3HOXHtJad0eTj1gv8aQrxTJ2Nkv_Lo5TonjtrOAvQfsERssdQOyvyY_eDb26kF2x45qD7dwjROD7JbJDcfQ4zSRX8nOC8huFy7UieYQaXD2nIYlJB4ie_rF__CwJF7S36pT4i0VKAGrYXHWgOye9K0y9Gl8__IIH8-Qnf768-MHjj8oi61ZX61zdqtqUGLeJfMp-D8BAAD__ysKjt8)** , which explains – in detail – how you can prepare for this critical event NOW...

Including 4 simple steps you can take TODAY to actually _profit_ from the fallout.

**[Click here to watch this urgent presentation from Jim Rickards now.](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJw8kUGvlDAUhX_NZTek3BYKCxYqEmP0LTQ-44qU9g7TZ0ub0nEcf71hxLc998vJd3KVj86e7z3It4B4sWYDROBvAHF5_vVy_YJ_PufTbwrt6f2L_8T2K74DxHyP9IoeLSV5Zd2eyqEw_Vy3uukK6ivJWlGztpbFpZ9Vo2TdEheyFlzj-cznGbEzjGmOiIXtkaFgiKySgglR1rwTVT03DVWdMTOCYP6uPCWr1RpVTjbkMqSlcP0l57g9nEbAMaZQRpWUsYtf6bY5ypnStrOAowccETus2w74eM1-8mTs1QMfjh3NHm7hmjQBH1btpmPocdLKR2WXFfiwC1fipJaQ1OTsOU9ryDQl8uon_cfDmmnN_6pOmbZcIQdsptVZA3x4RoNP-ttXmR7h4xl8aJ9-fPxA6bsqUm_izTpnt0aCYMsuWerg_wYAAP__U3aOBA)**

Well, buried inside this order is a sinister provision that could give the government unprecedented control over your money and freedom. In fact, this provision could set the stage for Legal government surveillance of all US citizens Total control over your bank accounts and purchases And the ability to silence all dissenting voices for good It’s no wonder Fox News recently called this “a deeply troubling development.” Still, most Americans have never even heard of Executive Order 14067. That’s why today, Jim Rickards – a world-renowned economist and former advisor to both the CIA and the Pentagon – has just sounded the alarm on this troubling new development. In , he reveals the shocking truth about Biden’s Executive Order... And why it’s a direct threat to the freedom of every single American citizen. In fact, according to Mr. Rickards, this order could mean the end of the U.S. dollar as we know it. “We’re in for a major upheaval of the U.S. dollar,” he says. “In fact, I predict the 3rd Great Dollar Earthquake has already started... “The first was Roosevelt confiscating private gold in 1934... “The second was Nixon abandoning the gold standard in 1971... “Now,” he says, “Biden’s plan could pave the way for ‘retiring’ the U.S. dollar – and replacing it with this disturbing new alternative. ” And this is NOT some far-off pipe dream. This is happening right now. “Executive Order 14067 already gives President Biden unprecedented power over the future of the U.S. dollar,” he says. “And sadly, most Americans will be completely caught off guard by it.” That’s why Mr. Rickards released , which explains – in detail – how you can prepare for this critical event NOW... name: Jon Tester
subject: My dog Gus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey friend, it’s Jon Tester. If you have a minute, I'd like to tell you a story.

"Pets" are a little different on a farm. All the animals we’ve had served a purpose—they had to earn their keep. Chickens are for eggs. Cats keep the mice out. Dogs keep the foxes away. You get the gist.

But I did have one dog that grew on me. His name was Gus and he was a wily fox terrier. One of the poor pup’s ears got infected and he ended up losing it—maybe it was the traumatic loss of a body part that formed the odd bond between us._

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17397?ask=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&akid=13602%2E9716520%2Ezd4_D4)
Gus ended up inspiring a new campaign slogan of mine while I was in the Montana legislature. I snapped a picture of him and sent a survey to my constituents telling folks, **“Most politicians are like my one-eared dog—they only listen to half of what you say. I want to hear all of what you say.”**

And I’ll be damned—it worked! I got responses from all across my district on the issues people found most important. That helped me better serve the folks I represented, and I’m honored by the trust Montanans continue to place in me as their U.S. senator.

**Now I want to hear from you. My team just launched their 2024 Priorities Survey, and we want to hear what issues you think are most important in this election.[Please, will you take a moment to answer some questions and share your views?](https://go.dscc.org/go/17397?ask=5&t=15&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&akid=13602%2E9716520%2Ezd4_D4)**

| | [Take the Survey](https://go.dscc.org/go/17397?ask=5&t=16&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&akid=13602%2E9716520%2Ezd4_D4)
---

I’ll never stop listening to the folks on the ground about what’s important to them, and I’ll never stop working to do right by them. Thanks for your help—together, we’ll come out on top.

—Jon

Jon Tester
U.S. Senator, Montana

Jon Tester, the Senate’s only working dirt farmer, is running for reelection in Montana to continue fighting for working families, veterans, and rural America.

[Chip in now to help keep Jon in the Senate and defend our Democratic Senate majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&akid=13602%2E9716520%2Ezd4_D4)**

| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/12242?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-NM-20240220-JonTester-TesterTandemGusV2-Pros-sl1&akid=13602%2E9716520%2Ezd4_D4)

Dear Friend, **[Please rush me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. in the next 48 hours to help me win...](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3caa1e1f41b3468daa8f42e47d35fbbb&_e=-gtG-698iiRIC3qslXQ7dtgheu03I9rz8dhzjxfccE3Fv14DkM5xwRPFOJ5okvEz4uRTcbFt9uAo82UKoal3NuOFZ2rkiPBZCdy5m7nJSJd6GuVe1gDlQ30CTPw9TB6ErvWDoqgWd2eleu-FAD1GVArvaOQqMSiqDTj3TdTBlsdTk98Jc9lYh0uywm-vKwgi6qgwD41lPml90h7z_uS2CgzvcD63WD_Xc0A6auTKAY-EiHBejV5Al_9c1D49BDBpvclsVU8ZDjUD3r_YTjdybFd8ev3TiX0c8CQ5o8D2ActcjhmBtNri-iEndahwYKGKU62M_dkt6fgB3YNi71oBWl3Oz206kIpmGbP_Vis5tygJItK83x6wD0cEhnu5tcoyaRTVrFb9-4lcdPwFgokwHQ%3D%3D)** ...a California Senate seat that is open for the first time since 1992... ...a Senate seat in a blue state that is winnable for the first time in a long time, precisely because the people of this state are every day seeing their quality of life diminish as a direct result of the radical leftwing policies enacted by the Democrats during the last three decades... ...and a Senate seat that is pivotal to retaking the U.S. Senate and therefore pivotal to America's future. I won't sugarcoat it. This is the single most difficult race in America. I can't do it without you. **[That's why I am counting on you to rush in your GARVEY FOR SENATE campaign R.S.V.P. of $35 today.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3caa1e1f41b3468daa8f42e47d35fbbb&_e=-gtG-698iiRIC3qslXQ7dtgheu03I9rz8dhzjxfccE3Fv14DkM5xwRPFOJ5okvEz4uRTcbFt9uAo82UKoal3NuOFZ2rkiPBZCdy5m7nJSJd6GuVe1gDlQ30CTPw9TB6ErvWDoqgWd2eleu-FAD1GVArvaOQqMSiqDTj3TdTBlsdTk98Jc9lYh0uywm-vKwgi6qgwD41lPml90h7z_uS2CgzvcD63WD_Xc0A6auTKAY_s6efSMycStCMRme3nKw5DZPxzMgPUYOgiaWTijjSe5nOkzXh4d06NdpgCsfP9-04UVHiHp-pbEXuOOJ6pU6Y-NKexeAGRt501Jio4eXJNVz7snE0jDBQvSaJlCPBiTLmWyAgp9OPZAV9PzzIvMmJvVBPI0Eckadzds9m3v0IuAg%3D%3D)** Here's the thing. As it now stands, 100% of Californians are being forced to live with:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
That's what led me to enter this race. **[And that's why I'm urging you to join me by rushing me your GARVEY FOR SENATE Campaign R.S.V.P. without delay.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3caa1e1f41b3468daa8f42e47d35fbbb&_e=-gtG-698iiRIC3qslXQ7dtgheu03I9rz8dhzjxfccE3Fv14DkM5xwRPFOJ5okvEz4uRTcbFt9uAo82UKoal3NuOFZ2rkiPBZCdy5m7nJSJd6GuVe1gDlQ30CTPw9TB6ErvWDoqgWd2eleu-FAD1GVArvaOQqMSiqDTj3TdTBlsdTk98Jc9lYh0uywm-vKwgi6qgwD41lPml90h7z_uS2CgzvcD63WD_Xc0A6auTKAY9bNXht4RQwvQ1EykdkZkxw0njNvwEHjJiXOOrDnnTOtmDw7nAlYCfg4J5OH9bEQ33uSTIUQ18y9PTV8V5zlTHioUUMA-UkVKmoaTGrQq4Px67WKKfo0JCSXo1UYjdwcAWEeH954-QptiWDzv5GRD53B9wDYNnOXmbO8AEOsmNOEA%3D%3D)** I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives. This really gets to heart of why I'm running... You see, the same dream and the same opportunity I was given is fading. It's fading all across America. But it's fading at an even faster pace right here in California. I pray you'll stand with me today.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
|

| | P.S. If you agree we cannot afford to find out whether the American Dream is down to its _final inning_ , its _final out,_ or its _final strike_ and are ready to turn back the clock on the decline please rush your R.S.V.P. of $35 today.
---
[**DONATE $35**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=3caa1e1f41b3468daa8f42e47d35fbbb&_e=-gtG-698iiRIC3qslXQ7dtgheu03I9rz8dhzjxfccE3Fv14DkM5xwRPFOJ5okvEz4uRTcbFt9uAo82UKoal3NuOFZ2rkiPBZCdy5m7nJSJd6GuVe1gDlQ30CTPw9TB6ErvWDoqgWd2eleu-FAD1GVArvaOQqMSiqDTj3TdTBlsdTk98Jc9lYh0uywm-vKwgi6qgwD41lPml90h7z_uS2CgzvcD63WD_Xc0A6auTKAY87-mYPUKlgmXTrjBtTmZGDYlV7HeQUmg0R9RVZBGfB6bhcpQ8y4iNjY7siHRWr-yAHt0siKlOmX2FuMCKWNgR5taH6zkH5aCBhfY2UiV9OO3HPW_07BK9LHRad6at0lBFmSSbXOw1WUxlqe4D-tyQEV0a3vVvv0u5MWzZ-WdSLIA%3D%3D)

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---

Hi there, Friend.

You have been identified as someone in a **KEY** voter group for the 2024 election.

Which is why House Republicans have tasked me with reaching out to you and asking you to fill out your Voter Confirmation Card.

name: Harry Dunn
subject: hard email to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey there team,
I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally.
I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days.
But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7.
Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced.
But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy.
And friend, I've never looked back.
I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? It's going to be tough, but like I said, I'm no stranger to tough. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]With love,
Harry 🖤
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Breaking news, Peter: **Republican megamillionaire Eric Hovde just launched his Senate campaign to defeat me.**
With Mitch McConnell’s #1 recruit in the race now, our path toward winning Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat and defending our Democratic Senate majority just became much more difficult.
[**So if you’re able, please split an emergency donation between****Bob Casey****and my campaign to help us compete with Hovde’s virtually unlimited campaign war chest. I can’t win Wisconsin without your grassroots support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-1?refcode=em20240220-1&refcode2=2047_552475_nmreG3&akid=2047%2E552475%2EnmreG3)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-1?express_lane=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240220-1-el&refcode2=2047_552475_nmreG3&akid=2047%2E552475%2EnmreG3) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-1?express_lane=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240220-1-el&refcode2=2047_552475_nmreG3&akid=2047%2E552475%2EnmreG3) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-1?express_lane=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240220-1-el&refcode2=2047_552475_nmreG3&akid=2047%2E552475%2EnmreG3) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-1?express_lane=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240220-1-el&refcode2=2047_552475_nmreG3&akid=2047%2E552475%2EnmreG3) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-1?express_lane=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240220-1-el&refcode2=2047_552475_nmreG3&akid=2047%2E552475%2EnmreG3) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-1?express_lane=1&refcode=em20240220-1&refcode2=2047_552475_nmreG3&akid=2047%2E552475%2EnmreG3)
---
The GOP has spent months recruiting wealthy candidates to run against me, and they’ve finally found their man in California bank owner Eric Hovde.
_Senate Republicans have even pledged to throw their full support behind Hovde’s campaign to defeat me._
Money will be no issue for Hovde — the megamillionaire has pledged to spend up to **$20 million** of his own personal fortune to unseat me.
Our race will determine Senate control in 2024, so I need all hands on deck to fight back in the most pivotal moment of our campaign.

subject: Medicare For All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
Tammy is the only candidate in this race who's ready to shake up the status quo. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372160/456278347/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg4YzVhNzUtMThkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPvuhovqXaAA0KliFtO-RBzilde9PBu19Q5BCOHgEeo=)
---
Sunday night’s debate made it very clear. **In this race, only Tammy Murphy supports lifesaving, cost-cutting Medicare For All.** Her opponent, Andy Kim, is content nibbling around the edges of the broken status quo, but Tammy understands that every day that goes by without a public health care option costs lives and financial security and furthers the inequities in our society. **[If you agree we need big, bold solutions to improve our unjust health care system, please add your name to Tammy’s petition calling for Medicare For All.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372163/456278349/891565191?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg4YzVhNzUtMThkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPvuhovqXaAA0KliFtO-RBzilde9PBu19Q5BCOHgEeo=&emci=eb517301-17d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=e88c5a75-18d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451)** | **[I SUPPORT MEDICARE FOR ALL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372167/456278351/891565191?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg4YzVhNzUtMThkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPvuhovqXaAA0KliFtO-RBzilde9PBu19Q5BCOHgEeo=&emci=eb517301-17d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=e88c5a75-18d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451)**
---
Tammy has criss-crossed all of New Jersey speaking to voters, especially voters of color, who have lost access to health care or been denied the care they urgently need. She has been on the front lines combating injustice in maternal health care and has gotten lifesaving results, but she knows there’s a lot more to be done.
New Jerseyans are getting sick, going bankrupt, and dying because they can't access good health care, but Andy Kim and Washington’s old guard are focused on politics as usual. **This is a complete moral failure. The status quo isn't working, and health care is absolutely a right and not a privilege.**
**[Tammy's ready to fight for what’s right — not what’s politically convenient. Please stand with her by adding your name to endorse Medicare For All.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372168/456278352/891565191?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg4YzVhNzUtMThkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPvuhovqXaAA0KliFtO-RBzilde9PBu19Q5BCOHgEeo=&emci=eb517301-17d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=e88c5a75-18d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451)**
**[I SUPPORT MEDICARE FOR ALL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372171/456278353/891565191?refcode=AU_TMNJ_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg4YzVhNzUtMThkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPvuhovqXaAA0KliFtO-RBzilde9PBu19Q5BCOHgEeo=&emci=eb517301-17d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=e88c5a75-18d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=18002451)**

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Uphold inerrancy of scripture with TPUSA Faith
body:
A spiritual battle is raging in our culture – its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us.

| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bMQZzCTCDL68VDpXgQSoSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt4IEP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYV9mYWl0aC9kNzRiNDVkMS0wNDU4LTRiMWMtOWQzMS1mOTllNzc3MDFiOWQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9Uk9ONDY2ODNXA3NwY0IKZc5v59RlcxOLiVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Friend, A spiritual battle is raging in our culture – its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us. TPUSA Faith is on the frontlines trying to make a difference in this spiritual battle. **Jeremiah 29:7 says, “But seek the welfare of the city where I have sent you ... for in its welfare you will find your welfare.”** This verse embodies our mission at TPUSA Faith, and we believe it's a _call for Christians to actively engage with America_. I founded TPUSA Faith – a branch of TPUSA – to EMPOWER believers to live out their faith boldly... CHALLENGE the secular culture... and UPHOLD the inerrancy of scripture. One way we do this is through our **Pastor Summits** , where we gather pastors from across all FIFTY states to inspire, encourage, and equip them to stand firmly for biblical truth and the Kingdom. We are excited to co-host the **Strong Church Dream Conference 2024** at the end of this month. This conference aims to bring pastors and ministry leaders from all FIFTY states to engage in nation-shaping conversations. But we need your help to make this happen. **[Your gift today of $25, $50, or any amount, will help provide scholarships to pastors and ministry leaders, making their trip to the conference affordable, if not completely FREE.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bMQZzCTCDL68VDpXgQSoSg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt4IEP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHVzYV9mYWl0aC9kNzRiNDVkMS0wNDU4LTRiMWMtOWQzMS1mOTllNzc3MDFiOWQ_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9Uk9ONDY2ODNXA3NwY0IKZc5v59RlcxOLiVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) **

clean_body: A spiritual battle is raging in our culture – its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us. | | | ~ Friend, A spiritual battle is raging in our culture – its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us. TPUSA Faith is on the frontlines trying to make a difference in this spiritual battle. Jeremiah 29:7 says, “But seek the welfare of the city where I have sent you ... for in its welfare you will find your welfare.” This verse embodies our mission at TPUSA Faith, and we believe it's a call for Christians to actively engage with America. I founded TPUSA Faith – a branch of TPUSA – to EMPOWER believers to live out their faith boldly... CHALLENGE the secular culture... and UPHOLD the inerrancy of scripture. One way we do this is through our Pastor Summits , where we gather pastors from across all FIFTY states to inspire, encourage, and equip them to stand firmly for biblical truth and the Kingdom. We are excited to co-host the Strong Church Dream Conference 2024 at the end of this month. This conference aims to bring pastors and ministry leaders from all FIFTY states to engage in nation-shaping conversations. But we need your help to make this happen. ~ ~ Your support also enables us to host nation-shaping events like the Strong Church Dream Conference and other events such as Freedom Night in America and our grassroots Pastor Roundtable discussions. These initiatives are critical in our mission to engage, equip, and empower the American Church with the essential tools to COUNTER falsehoods and DEFEND the link between Faith and God-given Liberty. Your donation will help us uphold the three non-negotiables every church must stand for: the Church can never be labeled nonessential again, life begins at conception, and God created male and female – we don't choose. ~ ~ We are determined to inspire faith, help bring about a REVIVAL in America, and continue to fight for the welfare of our nation. Your support is instrumental in achieving these goals. We are at the forefront of a spiritual battle and your support is critical. Your generosity will help us continue to equip and empower pastors, reach the next generation, and stand for righteousness in our nation. I want to thank you in advance for considering this request. Your commitment to furthering the Kingdom of God is truly inspiring. Together, we can inspire FAITH, ignite REVIVAL, and change the course of America. ~ God bless you,Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith ~ ~ 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

| | Political pundits and initial polling data suggests that in the 2024 Election, margins will be thin and the stakes at an all-time high. Right now, our nation stands at a critical crossroads with a choice between productive, practical government and extremism hanging in the balance. [**These first few months of the year are our opportunity to build the momentum necessary for big Democratic wins in November, will you chip in $3 and help us hit our February goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372797/456279904/1596212816?refcode=2024-02-20-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=599da69d-19d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTY5ZC0xOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dq1X2jg7Qa2g1X3Dk1EvF99zH-6P0y19lvfMv8Ao1Zc=) From where I stand, complacency in treating our government as a political theater is simply not an option as we safeguard our democracy and support economic recovery. I want to see more headlines like this: **Democrats came together to pass our historic infrastructure law investing in new jobs, clean energy modernization, and critical community improvements**. This brought billions in investments for Washington infrastructure including:
* $3.6 billion in investments for major road and bridge projects, including extensive safety upgrades;
* $753 million to update our public transit and infrastructure systems;
* $366 million for clean drinking water investments;
* $255 million for airport modernization;
* $219 million for our lifeline ports and waterways, a big part of Washington State's economic engine; and more.

[**If you are as eager to get real, tangible things accomplished for our country as I am, can you pitch in $3 today to keep my campaign moving?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372798/456279905/1596212816?refcode=2024-02-20-eom&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=599da69d-19d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTY5ZC0xOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dq1X2jg7Qa2g1X3Dk1EvF99zH-6P0y19lvfMv8Ao1Zc=) We cannot rely on these historic investments alone; we need Democrats to take back this House this November. This will allow us to continue these investments in infrastructure, but also protect reproductive freedom, voting rights, our climate, and tackle critical issues like opioid addiction and affordability. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372799/456279906/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2024-02-20-eom&refcode2=599da69d-19d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTY5ZC0xOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dq1X2jg7Qa2g1X3Dk1EvF99zH-6P0y19lvfMv8Ao1Zc=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372800/456279907/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2024-02-20-eom&refcode2=599da69d-19d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTY5ZC0xOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dq1X2jg7Qa2g1X3Dk1EvF99zH-6P0y19lvfMv8Ao1Zc=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372801/456279908/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2024-02-20-eom&refcode2=599da69d-19d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTY5ZC0xOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dq1X2jg7Qa2g1X3Dk1EvF99zH-6P0y19lvfMv8Ao1Zc=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79372802/456279909/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2024-02-20-eom&refcode2=599da69d-19d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTY5ZC0xOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dq1X2jg7Qa2g1X3Dk1EvF99zH-6P0y19lvfMv8Ao1Zc=)

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: You have to work for it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, Governing is rewarding, but it is busy — trust me. From meeting Michiganders, to signing bills, to working with Michigan’s legislature, and so much more, there’s never a dull moment. But it’s important that we don’t lose sight of what matters most in this job — **and that’s you.** **[I’m going to explain more in a second — but before I do, will you continue to support this fight by making a donation to Fight Like Hell PAC today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79373446/456282007/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMzYTY0MDItMWFkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j9r5tfSUABop-k9DLzEo6rZxZ_RUXkvaJ0Q73C1rnh4=)** There’s a lot that goes into earning someone’s vote, and I’m not going to pretend that I have all the answers. But if there’s one thing I do know, it’s this — **you can’t just ask someone for their vote and expect them to give it to you.** You have to work for it. That’s why I’ll be organizing alongside Fight Like Hell PAC volunteers who’ll be calling voters, knocking on doors, sending texts, and speaking with their friends and family about what’s on the line and how important it is to vote. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79373447/456282009/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMzYTY0MDItMWFkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j9r5tfSUABop-k9DLzEo6rZxZ_RUXkvaJ0Q73C1rnh4=) I’ll continue to travel across Michigan to meet with voters in person to talk to them about why President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris **_must win_** in November. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79373448/456282010/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240220_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODMzYTY0MDItMWFkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j9r5tfSUABop-k9DLzEo6rZxZ_RUXkvaJ0Q73C1rnh4=) **There’s so much at stake in the upcoming election.** Our fundamental rights are under attack. | | Here's the latest, Peter. This is a big deal.

Last week, Fox invited the top four candidates for Congress in the 47th District - two Republicans and two Democrats - to a televised debate.

**My opponent Scott Baugh is REFUSING to show up!**

[_**> >> Watch my video response and then submit your OFFICIAL ENDORSEMENT of an America First Republican who isn't afraid to DEBATE and WIN in November!**_](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=39f38c44ca&e=86e91e802d)

---
| [ENDORSE MAX](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=009376076d&e=86e91e802d "ENDORSE MAX")
---
| **Here's the reality:** Baugh has already run for Congress twice and lost. He should be fighting for every vote and taking on the radical Democrats just like I am

_How can we expect Baugh to defeat the Democrats in November if he's too afraid to show up and debate them face-to-face?!_

**Orange County Republicans need a FIGHTER who isn't afraid to campaign hard, show up, and go toe-to-toe with the Democrats.**

Otherwise, we're going to lose the race for the 47th District to a radical Liberal.

**Again.**

[**Watch my video response and SUBMIT YOUR OFFICIAL ENDORSEMENT OF an America First Republican who is willing to DEBATE**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=035e02b61c&e=86e91e802d)[ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=1d913a9a63&e=86e91e802d)**[... ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=d50bbc5e84&e=86e91e802d)**[**Who isn't afraid to FIGHT ... And who is able to actually WIN!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=92526846e9&e=86e91e802d)

Thank you,

Max Ukropina

| [H.B. 1](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGrqtVhn2pps1-GwNctZq0ayEHMqNOYK3q2pwlJytCydZiSVh5dfRxBbFZkLtolPYv50shdr565FqQrA-WhBje7_lkrsgUy73jwxtpQ_RXGXI7DXg4acLMNuaaUPdTFaT-355k2C8tvaNmFm2ba485yA1ZyPZg-c-kdwW6kXIRO_ryJBbyNu2uCZ3MkIKYyzaE=&c=iKwZ0qea70Gf2MT0dOmmr2SI5-H5S-YgB0HvStJydQ5Jww99-UuowA==&ch=DO9F_TQlV6nEuG7DL6HHi48EyQ9sS71n7gqcFHqR1b4yDpQO7mNtyg==) Patron: Ward Minimum wage. Increases the minimum wage from the current rate of $12.00 per hour to $13.50 per hour effective January 1, 2025, and to $15.00 per hour effective January 1, 2026. The bill satisfies a reenactment clause included in Chapters 1204 and 1242 of the Acts of Assembly of 2020. Provides that the governing body of any eligible host city that holds a local referendum on the question of whether casino gaming should be permitted in such city that subsequently fails shall be prohibited from holding another referendum on the same question for a period of three years from the date of the last referendum. Authorizes all counties and cities to impose an additional local sales and use tax at a rate not to exceed one percent with the revenue used only for capital projects for the construction or renovation of schools if such levy is approved in a voter referendum. Under current law, only Charlotte, Gloucester, Halifax, Henry, Mecklenburg, Northampton, Patrick, and Pittsylvania Counties and the City of Danville are authorized to impose such a tax. This bill incorporates HB 60, HB 193, HB 458, HB 600, HB 616, HB 1159, and HB 1437. Requires health insurance carriers to provide coverage under any health insurance contract, policy, or plan that includes coverage for prescription drugs on an outpatient basis, for any prescribed contraceptive drug or contraceptive device. The bill prohibits a health insurance carrier from imposing upon any person receiving contraceptive benefits pursuant to the provisions of the bill any copayment, coinsurance payment, or fee. The provisions of the bill apply to health insurance contracts, policies, or plans delivered, issued for delivery, or renewed on and after January 1, 2025. Directs the Board of Medicine to require unconscious bias and cultural competency training as part of the continuing education requirements for renewal of licensure. The bill specifies requirements for the training and requires the Board of Medicine to report on the training to the Department of Health and the Virginia Neonatal Perinatal Collaborative. A BILL to direct the Board of Medicine to require certain licensees to complete training on unconscious bias and cultural competency as part of their continuing education and continuing competency requirements for licensure.24106251D

Patron: Martinez Gaming in the Commonwealth; prohibition on use of term "casino" by non-casino gaming operators; civil penalties. Prohibits any applicant for licensure or any person licensed or permitted to conduct charitable gaming, horse racing, or sports betting in the Commonwealth from using the term "casino" in its entity name, in any advertisement in association with its product or service, or in any manner prohibited by regulation. The bill provides for a civil penalty of up to $50,000 for each violation. [H.B. 333 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGrqtVhn2pps1-GwNctZq0ayEHMqNOYK3q2pwlJytCydWVz65LHnqKFSHUBKOd7Re_WBGPJsU1O_KzcoYlJ2AFKmW6PVRpL-2oZ0oRkJZP-zPC_hX6VxuDzDSIKn69fk9zk3MgWnXmFA0JZ5yS_QpY599fz8Ok45f2rQlBp5f4nax_KznXHF37IsKqIsSBF_bo=&c=iKwZ0qea70Gf2MT0dOmmr2SI5-H5S-YgB0HvStJydQ5Jww99-UuowA==&ch=DO9F_TQlV6nEuG7DL6HHi48EyQ9sS71n7gqcFHqR1b4yDpQO7mNtyg==)Environmental Justice, Virginia Council on; meetings and staffing, appointment of members. Patron: Jones Virginia Council on Environmental Justice; meetings and staffing; appointment of members. Allows the members of the Virginia Council on Environmental Justice to travel throughout the Commonwealth to view and record conditions related to human health and the environment within and in close proximity to environmental justice communities. The bill prohibits the Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources from delegating any requested staff support for the Council to any agency, regardless of whether such agency is an agency for which the Secretary is responsible to the Governor. The bill further directs any vacancy in the membership of the Council that is in existence on the date the bill's provisions take effect to be filled no later than August 31, 2024. [H.B. 590 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGrqtVhn2pps1-GwNctZq0ayEHMqNOYK3q2pwlJytCydWVz65LHnqKFLZeZ9omtmHsNyYiA4T8oGIzLoluU7KYnpZvzLT1IEnSMoneQknlxVBh0bPZwmaVnVVewYOKXIcJhXo5SSKyDZtu3WAyLItqznOk3q-tNIiJVQvXwjQhQqsdtlxQxrn17PHUsJeZHDJ0=&c=iKwZ0qea70Gf2MT0dOmmr2SI5-H5S-YgB0HvStJydQ5Jww99-UuowA==&ch=DO9F_TQlV6nEuG7DL6HHi48EyQ9sS71n7gqcFHqR1b4yDpQO7mNtyg==)Electronic gaming devices; regulation, penalties. Patron: Hayes Regulation of electronic gaming devices; penalties. Authorizes and specifies the licensing requirements for the manufacture, distribution, operation, hosting, and playing of electronic gaming devices, as defined in the bill, under the regulatory authority of the Virginia Lottery Board. The bill imposes a 30 percent tax on all gross profits from the play of such electronic gaming devices and provides for the use of such tax proceeds. The bill also imposes criminal and civil penalties for violations of the law and regulations related to electronic gaming devices. Patron: Rasoul Surveillance technology reporting by localities; report. Requires localities to provide to the Department of Criminal Justice Services (the Department) a list of surveillance technologies, defined in the bill, used by law-enforcement agencies of the locality and requires the Department to provide such information to the Joint Commission on Technology and Science (the Commission). The bill requires the Commission to conduct a study, in consultation with a representative from the Virginia State Crime Commission, on the use of each such surveillance technology and the implications of its use, susceptibility to misuse or cyberattack, and cost. | [H.B. 18](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGrqtVhn2pps1-GwNctZq0ayEHMqNOYK3q2pwlJytCydWVz65LHnqKFcszpSN2Qrvegfdi53J1bLdMfWfDQ4sJT3StyZM3SikmKE_hccIxtkPycyQSh5B3fHc3cZfjH5hw5hS-UF_aCJKn_kWjjqLc8_tGHbdF8bDi7cDpnvctXMpvaSReeKhEb85NqtVOW5lw=&c=iKwZ0qea70Gf2MT0dOmmr2SI5-H5S-YgB0HvStJydQ5Jww99-UuowA==&ch=DO9F_TQlV6nEuG7DL6HHi48EyQ9sS71n7gqcFHqR1b4yDpQO7mNtyg==) Patron: Helmer Hate crimes and discrimination; ethnic animosity; penalties. Provides that it is the policy of the Commonwealth to safeguard all individuals within the Commonwealth from unlawful discrimination in employment and in places of public accommodation because of such individual's ethnic origin and prohibits such discrimination. The bill also adds victims who are intentionally selected because of their ethnic origin to the categories of victims whose intentional selection for a hate crime involving assault, assault and battery, or trespass for the purpose of damaging another's property results in a higher criminal penalty for the offense. The bill also provides that no provider or user of an interactive computer service on the Internet shall be liable for any action voluntarily taken by it in good faith to restrict access to material that the provider or user considers to be intended to incite hatred on the basis of ethnic origin. | [H.B. 62](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGrqtVhn2pps1-GwNctZq0ayEHMqNOYK3q2pwlJytCydb7HYwF-6dkr5cf5c4ya5YQXNIZv0hKJKRpIvWxb3pV4tvLQ8Q2USJT6WT7-3PbuRpgT9Vcz3irDHeqHuWBhtrNyI5vYk4BXseEij_-XfyVlNaRsxqC2Vgh9sOKvC5yNh-gY3PIxIekO5ac0FxtkhAg=&c=iKwZ0qea70Gf2MT0dOmmr2SI5-H5S-YgB0HvStJydQ5Jww99-UuowA==&ch=DO9F_TQlV6nEuG7DL6HHi48EyQ9sS71n7gqcFHqR1b4yDpQO7mNtyg==) Patron: Campbell Animal Cruelty Conviction List established. Requires the Superintendent of State Police to establish no later than January 1, 2027, and to maintain the Animal Cruelty Conviction List and to make the List available to the public on the website of the Department of State Police. The bill specifies that the List include the names of persons convicted of certain felony animal cruelty offenses on or after July 1, 2024. The bill requires persons convicted of any such offense to pay a fee of $50 per conviction to fund the maintenance of the List. The bill also requires the Department to remove a person's name and information from the List 15 years after its listing if he has no additional felony conviction of any such offense. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Article 9 of Chapter 65 of Title 3.2 a section numbered [3.2-6573.1](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGrqtVhn2pps1-GwNctZq0ayEHMqNOYK3q2pwlJytCydb7HYwF-6dkr0EzqtVZlIsQ2BujYL3wN9EuizIs8nEMQ-y6SSh9EgSezMtigpciWa6xPP0fqG-co8Szn1REl_WMQTzNnjcpNVZoI1xsQWzWmTarsJBCBohM5ZP_LQpmHlg==&c=iKwZ0qea70Gf2MT0dOmmr2SI5-H5S-YgB0HvStJydQ5Jww99-UuowA==&ch=DO9F_TQlV6nEuG7DL6HHi48EyQ9sS71n7gqcFHqR1b4yDpQO7mNtyg==), relating to establishment of Animal Cruelty Conviction List.24102944D [H.B. 223](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eXmOned4vGrqtVhn2pps1-GwNctZq0ayEHMqNOYK3q2pwlJytCydWVz65LHnqKFHfkkr6sg4M7GLiRdnPOvKEV0jEXVZdvNrtdCs1hT_GJ17Z9evkdXWjNDQjjmMjGHvh30z1KC5o6PuajJZMVArSsCRylAciot3RD4ZX5X4lv_mN6gqHRO1llU6f7uHJPXaVmuqUxM-bs=&c=iKwZ0qea70Gf2MT0dOmmr2SI5-H5S-YgB0HvStJydQ5Jww99-UuowA==&ch=DO9F_TQlV6nEuG7DL6HHi48EyQ9sS71n7gqcFHqR1b4yDpQO7mNtyg==) Patron: Orrock Cruelty to animals; possession and ownership of animals. Provides that any person convicted of felony cruelty to animals may be prohibited by the court from possession or ownership of animals for life and that any person convicted of misdemeanor cruelty to animals may be prohibited by the court from possession or ownership of animals for a period of up to five years. The bill provides that any person who violates such prohibition shall be punished for contempt of court, and the court shall order that any animal possessed or owned by such person may be disposed of by a local governing body or delivered to another person with a right of property in the animal. Under current law, such prohibition is limited to companion animals and a period equal to the statutory maximum period of incarceration. The bill further provides that any person who has his rights to possession or ownership of companion or equine animals prohibited pursuant to a felony conviction may petition the court where such conviction occurred for a restoration of his rights after five years from the date of conviction. Friends, YOU can participate remotely with your legislators from the comfort of your home.
YOU can watch Senate Committees in action and at the right time, comment to the committee in real time.
This is YOUR opportunity to DO SOMETHING.
Above I have listed the dockets for THIS WEDNESDAY'S Senate Committee hearings. By clicking each link you can quickly look over which bills are coming up this Wednesday that are of interest to you.
Find a bill that interests you and want to comment remotely?
Then click on the link below to the streaming of the committee meeting and follow the directions to either view the committee in real time or comment remotely to the Senate committee members in real time to state your support or opposition to a particular bill.
It's that easy to express your support or opposition to a bill coming up on this Wednesday's docket.

| Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. Thank you.
Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly.
I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you.
If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars?
It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support. After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

clean_body: Participate online or in person here | | | | House Bills Up WEDNESDAY CALL IN REMOTELY OR SHOW UP | | Senate Committee Public Hearings for WEDNESDAY BILLS TO WATCH Wednesday's Dockets | | == | Not meeting | | == | == Patron: Ward Minimum wage. Increases the minimum wage from the current rate of $12.00 per hour to $13.50 per hour effective January 1, 2025, and to $15.00 per hour effective January 1, 2026. The bill satisfies a reenactment clause included in Chapters 1204 and 1242 of the Acts of Assembly of 2020. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to minimum wage.24100469D == Patron: Krizek Casino gaming; limits on required local referendums. Provides that the governing body of any eligible host city that holds a local referendum on the question of whether casino gaming should be permitted in such city that subsequently fails shall be prohibited from holding another referendum on the same question for a period of three years from the date of the last referendum. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to casino gaming; limits on required local referendums.24104581D == Patron: Rasoul Additional local sales and use tax to support schools; referendum. Authorizes all counties and cities to impose an additional local sales and use tax at a rate not to exceed one percent with the revenue used only for capital projects for the construction or renovation of schools if such levy is approved in a voter referendum. Under current law, only Charlotte, Gloucester, Halifax, Henry, Mecklenburg, Northampton, Patrick, and Pittsylvania Counties and the City of Danville are authorized to impose such a tax. This bill incorporates HB 60, HB 193, HB 458, HB 600, HB 616, HB 1159, and HB 1437. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ ==, ==, ==, and == of the Code of Virginia, relating to additional local sales and use tax to support schools; referendum.24107210D == Patron: Mundon King Health insurance; coverage for prescription contraceptives. Requires health insurance carriers to provide coverage under any health insurance contract, policy, or plan that includes coverage for prescription drugs on an outpatient basis, for any prescribed contraceptive drug or contraceptive device. The bill prohibits a health insurance carrier from imposing upon any person receiving contraceptive benefits pursuant to the provisions of the bill any copayment, coinsurance payment, or fee. The provisions of the bill apply to health insurance contracts, policies, or plans delivered, issued for delivery, or renewed on and after January 1, 2025. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to health insurance; coverage for prescription contraceptives.24107022D == Patron: Hayes Board of Medicine; continuing education; unconscious bias and cultural competency. Directs the Board of Medicine to require unconscious bias and cultural competency training as part of the continuing education requirements for renewal of licensure. The bill specifies requirements for the training and requires the Board of Medicine to report on the training to the Department of Health and the Virginia Neonatal Perinatal Collaborative. A BILL to direct the Board of Medicine to require certain licensees to complete training on unconscious bias and cultural competency as part of their continuing education and continuing competency requirements for licensure.24106251D | | == House Bills on Third Reading - Regular Calendar ... == == == == == == == == == == == == == == * == | | == | in the Commonwealth; prohibition on use of term "casino" by non-casino gaming operators. Patron: Martinez Gaming in the Commonwealth; prohibition on use of term "casino" by non-casino gaming operators; civil penalties. Prohibits any applicant for licensure or any person licensed or permitted to conduct charitable gaming, horse racing, or sports betting in the Commonwealth from using the term "casino" in its entity name, in any advertisement in association with its product or service, or in any manner prohibited by regulation. The bill provides for a civil penalty of up to $50,000 for each violation. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia and to amend the Code of Virginia by adding sections numbered == and ==, relating to gaming in the Commonwealth; prohibition on use of term "casino" by non-casino gaming operators; civil penalties.24105905D Justice, Virginia Council on; meetings and staffing, appointment of members. Patron: Jones Virginia Council on Environmental Justice; meetings and staffing; appointment of members. Allows the members of the Virginia Council on Environmental Justice to travel throughout the Commonwealth to view and record conditions related to human health and the environment within and in close proximity to environmental justice communities. The bill prohibits the Secretary of Natural and Historic Resources from delegating any requested staff support for the Council to any agency, regardless of whether such agency is an agency for which the Secretary is responsible to the Governor. The bill further directs any vacancy in the membership of the Council that is in existence on the date the bill's provisions take effect to be filled no later than August 31, 2024. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ == and == of the Code of Virginia, relating to Virginia Council on Environmental Justice; meetings and staffing; appointment of members.24107250D gaming devices; regulation, penalties. Patron: Hayes Regulation of electronic gaming devices; penalties. Authorizes and specifies the licensing requirements for the manufacture, distribution, operation, hosting, and playing of electronic gaming devices, as defined in the bill, under the regulatory authority of the Virginia Lottery Board. The bill imposes a 30 percent tax on all gross profits from the play of such electronic gaming devices and provides for the use of such tax proceeds. The bill also imposes criminal and civil penalties for violations of the law and regulations related to electronic gaming devices. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ ==, as it is currently effective and as it shall become effective, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, and == of the Code of Virginia and to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Chapter 3 of Title 11 a section numbered ==, by adding a section numbered ==, and by adding in Title 58.1 a chapter numbered 42, containing articles numbered 1 through 5, consisting of sections numbered == through ==, relating to regulation of electronic gaming devices; penalties.24106922D == Surveillance Technology; reporting by localities, report. Patron: Rasoul Surveillance technology reporting by localities; report. Requires localities to provide to the Department of Criminal Justice Services (the Department) a list of surveillance technologies, defined in the bill, used by law-enforcement agencies of the locality and requires the Department to provide such information to the Joint Commission on Technology and Science (the Commission). The bill requires the Commission to conduct a study, in consultation with a representative from the Virginia State Crime Commission, on the use of each such surveillance technology and the implications of its use, susceptibility to misuse or cyberattack, and cost. A BILL to amend and reenact the Code of Virginia by adding in Article 1 of Chapter 1 of Title 9.1 a section numbered ==, relating to Surveillance Technology Reporting by localities; report.24107305D | | == | == Patron: Helmer Hate crimes and discrimination; ethnic animosity; penalties. Provides that it is the policy of the Commonwealth to safeguard all individuals within the Commonwealth from unlawful discrimination in employment and in places of public accommodation because of such individual's ethnic origin and prohibits such discrimination. The bill also adds victims who are intentionally selected because of their ethnic origin to the categories of victims whose intentional selection for a hate crime involving assault, assault and battery, or trespass for the purpose of damaging another's property results in a higher criminal penalty for the offense. The bill also provides that no provider or user of an interactive computer service on the Internet shall be liable for any action voluntarily taken by it in good faith to restrict access to material that the provider or user considers to be intended to incite hatred on the basis of ethnic origin. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, ==, and == of the Code of Virginia, relating to hate crimes and discrimination; ethnic animosity; penalties.24106860D == Patron: Hayes Purchase of firearms; waiting period; penalty. Provides that no person shall sell a firearm unless at least five days have elapsed from the time the prospective purchaser completes the written consent form to have a licensed dealer obtain criminal history record information, with exceptions enumerated in relevant law. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ == and == of the Code of Virginia, relating to purchase of firearms; waiting period; penalty.24104388D | == | == Patron: Campbell Animal Cruelty Conviction List established. Requires the Superintendent of State Police to establish no later than January 1, 2027, and to maintain the Animal Cruelty Conviction List and to make the List available to the public on the website of the Department of State Police. The bill specifies that the List include the names of persons convicted of certain felony animal cruelty offenses on or after July 1, 2024. The bill requires persons convicted of any such offense to pay a fee of $50 per conviction to fund the maintenance of the List. The bill also requires the Department to remove a person's name and information from the List 15 years after its listing if he has no additional felony conviction of any such offense. A BILL to amend the Code of Virginia by adding in Article 9 of Chapter 65 of Title 3.2 a section numbered ==, relating to establishment of Animal Cruelty Conviction List.24102944D == Patron: Orrock Cruelty to animals; possession and ownership of animals. Provides that any person convicted of felony cruelty to animals may be prohibited by the court from possession or ownership of animals for life and that any person convicted of misdemeanor cruelty to animals may be prohibited by the court from possession or ownership of animals for a period of up to five years. The bill provides that any person who violates such prohibition shall be punished for contempt of court, and the court shall order that any animal possessed or owned by such person may be disposed of by a local governing body or delivered to another person with a right of property in the animal. Under current law, such prohibition is limited to companion animals and a period equal to the statutory maximum period of incarceration. The bill further provides that any person who has his rights to possession or ownership of companion or equine animals prohibited pursuant to a felony conviction may petition the court where such conviction occurred for a restoration of his rights after five years from the date of conviction. A BILL to amend and reenact § == of the Code of Virginia, relating to cruelty to animals; possession and ownership of companion or equine animals.24106189D == Patron: Rasoul Dangerous dog; extending the time for adjudication. Requires the court, unless good cause is determined by the court, to hold the evidentiary hearing pursuant to the dangerous dog summons within 30 days or as soon as practicable from the issuance of the summons. Under current law, the court is required to hold such hearing not more than 30 days from the issuance of the summons. A BILL to amend and reenact §§ == and == of the Code of Virginia, relating to dangerous dogs; extending the time for adjudication.24102883D == Patron: Martinez Declawing cats; prohibition. Makes unlawful the practice of declawing cats for any person engaged in the practice of veterinary medicine except as necessary for a therapeutic purpose, as defined in the bill. | | Peter: **In 2023, Georgia House Democrats delivered a major win for families by rejecting a GOP-sponsored school voucher scam,** which would have transferred millions of dollars of public school funding to private schools under the guise of improving public education. The bill offered no guarantee that the funding would continue, leaving low-income families high and dry if they chose to transfer their children to private schools. Georgia Democrats opposed it, and even some Republicans crossed the fence, knowing that **the bill was an example of obvious grift and is deeply unpopular with Georgia families.**
Sadly, the bill is still in play, and the radical GOP could bring back a new version at any moment. **But the logic will be the same: instead of using public dollars to improve public education, they’d like to transfer that money to private institutions - with no oversight, no accountability, and no transparency.**
Georgia House Democrats will fight this tooth and nail. It’s just another example of the work we do every day to save our democracy, ensure our citizens’ rights are upheld, and build a better Georgia.
We need your support to keep the fight going. [Donate today to help us stay ready for this next battle, and the battles beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79374741/456285844/1021071259?refcode=022024_SchoolVouchers_link&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmY3MzJkMS0xYmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jWiA5cV_p_oaIgXfvLLG20gw-pKC5hrRFXfydWo4Eos=) After all, every Georgia child deserves an education, and every Georgia resident deserves the rights that are granted in our state Constitution.

body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkUFv3CAQhX8NvmHBgLF98CFS5FuqqorUI2Jhdk2CWQvGu8m_r5xtT720NyTefG_em58v9sXFFPPlm1txokK2VEs3W71LsSJ_e-eY366fFgRoLoCDsLIJk-4hKNPgJHsx6M6Akc0ymcF0Bh2KUQ8nZ87D4McB_YDCn4MeoYnTwREAQg6yU7I9d-o0eqGMD8aP_Ylp4RIWqi0tWHDbTyl6lwnd2vrr2qRpIdoqU08MZgZzRb8XbO8xFwyHgsF8iPnvAAzmd8wZw-cjB4_E70tMeDySq1T5dpDUXA5SifnC1DOVHRmYnVbr3bq5eMlMPT9Wl6P9_sRff7zKVkrVA1iSuhP9qLnsO8PA4IelGP5j4MvnmgkzHeY3ToX4n6IYmI893_7-aMoUtntMKVbTMy0uq4vpqyT610P-CgAA__-pyJ3b "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

body:
She’s 100% right

---
**Elizabeth Warren stunned us:** []() We’re launching another URGENT ad campaign to abolish the Electoral College and protect our Democracy.

[**Listen, we need $3,941 by midnight tomorrow to make our first payment on the next round of ads. If we can’t keep our ads running, the Electoral College will hand the GOP another Trump presidency! Chip in $7 now »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/38094?t=7&akid=20849%2E4449941%2EyTSCuV) | [Please, chip in $7 to fund our ads »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/38094?t=8&akid=20849%2E4449941%2EyTSCuV)
---
* * *
Look, Elizabeth Warren is 100% right — _every vote does matter!_

The Electoral College has handed Republicans the presidency THREE times since 1988 despite the fact that they’ve only won the popular vote ONCE since then.

The Electoral College is a scam that makes YOUR vote worth less – _it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

That’s why we’re rushing to raise $3,941 to make our next ad payment by midnight tomorrow and keep our ads running!
[**Please, our proven effective ads are the best way to spread the word about the dangers of the Electoral College. Please, chip in $7 now to help fund our ads »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/38094?t=9&akid=20849%2E4449941%2EyTSCuV)
