name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: A Republican megamillionaire just launched his campaign to defeat me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Breaking news, Derek: **Republican megamillionaire Eric Hovde just launched his Senate campaign to defeat me.**
With Mitch McConnell’s #1 recruit in the race now, our path toward winning Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat and defending our Democratic Senate majority just became much more difficult.
**[So if you’re able, please split an emergency donation between John Fetterman and my campaign to help us compete with Hovde’s virtually unlimited campaign war chest. I can’t win Wisconsin without your grassroots support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240220-1?refcode=em20240220-1-8797&refcode2=8797_434096_e2ve7G&akid=8797%2E434096%2Ee2ve7G)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240220-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240220-8797&refcode2=8797_434096_e2ve7G&akid=8797%2E434096%2Ee2ve7G)**
The GOP has spent months recruiting wealthy candidates to run against me, and they’ve finally found their man in California bank owner Eric Hovde.
_Senate Republicans have even pledged to throw their full support behind Hovde’s campaign to defeat me._
Money will be no issue for Hovde -- the megamillionaire has pledged to spend up to **$20 million** of his own personal fortune to unseat me.
Our race will determine Senate control in 2024, so I need all hands on deck to fight back in the most pivotal moment of our campaign.
**[We only have one shot to make a statement, so I’m personally asking: Will you split a donation today to help me defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeat Eric Hovde?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240220-1?refcode=em20240220-1-8797&refcode2=8797_434096_e2ve7G&akid=8797%2E434096%2Ee2ve7G)**
Thanks for all your support.
-- Tammy
Tammy Baldwin
U.S. Senator, Wisconsin

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240220-8797-footer&t=1&refcode2=8797_434096_e2ve7G&akid=8797%2E434096%2Ee2ve7G)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8797%2E434096%2Ee2ve7G)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8797%2E434096%2Ee2ve7G)

body:

Hey, Peter, this is Kirby again — Michelle’s campaign manager.
Wow, I can’t believe it’s already the first day of early voting!

As we look beyond the primary to the general, we plan to MASSIVELY expand our presence both digitally and on the ground. This campaign has always been about the people of South Texas, so we are 100% prioritizing making sure we get in front of people across TX-15 to talk about Michelle and her vision.
Here’s the plan: We want to up the amount of phonebanks shifts we are hosting so we can talk to as many South Texans as possible about Michelle’s vision for progressive leadership. We’re going to be hosting more in-person blockwalks to knock on doors and get Michelle around the district to meet as many folks as possible. We plan to print handouts and literature to pass out to let people know about the issues we care about — quality, affordable healthcare for all, protecting reproductive rights, and building a thriving economy for working people in Texas and beyond.
$17,909 in the bank before the primary would get us the resources we need for the final push before going into the general election when we’re up against Monica De La Cruz and all of her extremist GOP funders. And since we’re not accepting a single dollar from corporations, we’re relying on grassroots donors like you to help us meet our goal.

Every little bit helps us reach out to Texans across the district and gets Michelle one step closer to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79375119/456287475/1814469394?refcode=em-20240220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWMwYzI5My0xY2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBtKaAl9k9jJlSZnIdAIATOUFYmKOJ5fpp84fNA7A_8=)**

name: Manuel Oliver
subject: THIS is how you mobilize young people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Dv3L81whaRe4LDXOhUkwYg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnt3PrP0TIaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIyMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vbGl2ZXJfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MmNkc250WWhPdjRIRDl1TXViUVRseTNFWkppJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJjZHNudFloT3Y0SEQ5dU11YlFUbHkzRVpKaSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yY2RzbnRZaE92NEhEOXVNdWJRVGx5M0VaSmlXA3NwY0IKZc7r7tRlnJHVK1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)
---
Peter, I’m Manuel Oliver. Six years ago, my son Joaquin was killed in the Parkland school shooting. Since then, I’ve dedicated my life to ending gun violence.

I’ve met countless politicians who’ve made empty promises or flat-out refused to take action.

But I’ve met even more young people – like my friend, Rep. Maxwell Frost – who’ve made bigger impacts on this fight than almost every long-serving elected official out there.

**Maxwell is changing the organizing game by finding new ways to mobilize his generation ahead of November’s election. But he needs your grassroots support to fund his youth engagement and year-round organizing work.**[Can you donate $27 to his campaign so he can keep building this youth-powered movement for change? >>](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Dv3L81whaRe4LDXOhUkwYg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnt3PrP0TIaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIyMF9lbV9mcl9iMV9vbGl2ZXJfZW4mYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MmNkc250WWhPdjRIRDl1TXViUVRseTNFWkppJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJjZHNudFloT3Y0SEQ5dU11YlFUbHkzRVpKaSZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yY2RzbnRZaE92NEhEOXVNdWJRVGx5M0VaSmlXA3NwY0IKZc7r7tRlnJHVK1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~)

As the March for our Lives Organizing Director and the first Gen Z’er in Congress, Maxwell mobilized a youth movement into a powerful force for change. He knows firsthand that you can’t engage a new generation of voters with the same old organizing.

So Maxwell is doing things differently with his new festival, MadSoul Fest. He’s engaging youth with music, food, and fun, all while registering thousands of new voters.

**I’m honored to headline MadSoul Fest, but I’m even more excited about all the young people who will show up to the polls because of this event and because of Maxwell’s youth organizing across Florida.**

But the far right is desperate to keep young people from voting, so Maxwell needs grassroots support to keep his youth engagement efforts stronger than ever.

[That’s why I'm helping Maxwell raise $15,000 today to fund his team’s organizing work so he can empower the next generation of voters. clean_body: | ~ Peter, I’m Manuel Oliver. Six years ago, my son Joaquin was killed in the Parkland school shooting. Since then, I’ve dedicated my life to ending gun violence. I’ve met countless politicians who’ve made empty promises or flat-out refused to take action. But I’ve met even more young people – like my friend, Rep. Maxwell Frost – who’ve made bigger impacts on this fight than almost every long-serving elected official out there. Maxwell is changing the organizing game by finding new ways to mobilize his generation ahead of November’s election. But he needs your grassroots support to fund his youth engagement and year-round organizing work.~ As the March for our Lives Organizing Director and the first Gen Z’er in Congress, Maxwell mobilized a youth movement into a powerful force for change. He knows firsthand that you can’t engage a new generation of voters with the same old organizing. So Maxwell is doing things differently with his new festival, MadSoul Fest. He’s engaging youth with music, food, and fun, all while registering thousands of new voters. I’m honored to headline MadSoul Fest, but I’m even more excited about all the young people who will show up to the polls because of this event and because of Maxwell’s youth organizing across Florida. But the far right is desperate to keep young people from voting, so Maxwell needs grassroots support to keep his youth engagement efforts stronger than ever. ~ | | | ~ ~ | ~ | Thank you, Manuel Oliver Father and best friend of Joaquin “Guac” Oliver ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. subject: SURVEY: Will you endorse me for re-election?

body:
Hey there - it's Jim Jordan. My primary is in 28 days on March 19th. Today I'm asking for your help. Will you offer me your personal endorsement? It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

Fellow Conservative,

Hey, it’s Jim Jordan with a very important request for you. My primary is in 28 days and I’m building as much support for our campaign as I can before Election Day. **I’m asking 28 of my top supporters to personally endorse my campaign by midnight tonight.**

Friend,

This email could not be more important.

**At 6 p.m., we 're making one of our final TV buys of this contested primary election in Ohio, and right now, we're still $8,500 short of what we need to make our TV ad.**

**Pulling back our efforts in this last push could be how we lose this election.**

[**Now, I 'm counting on Ohioans like you. I need you to give $10 (or whatever you can) to help us raise enough money to push our last TV ad.** ](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=4d0f9dcd386e431bb758d01202c28548&_e=-cTDNgUinboS0I5s4lnN2MWkzDK990MIc05AE9q5_xTqRyFkZmp083wrRL9DwaJM2LW--KB_ATMqAfYlqBNVH7-BKO-_ovosu1aKiIYmWyDjMRKgS6t1FWbXcrod3uaGI271LOR6Vn7yr_Z5DzdBGn85zOiW0zfaeW-1ELkjEn5CB4eszPABq-tHwVqKjIBA72BwMJFCwQzOdzVOTkKWgp4Wsh_usMCfH5eu05tOX08tv86oqSXXDEhS6YvjD2boMLlwUKqxXXP5UiZsivGoPLudabIML0-WCVSHQMz1AFY8ViMpuBxLwRCHnEHDOINIgyJUMG1G9J4f4-4zyW5myQ%3D%3D)

At 6 p.m., we 're making one of our final TV buys of this contested primary election in Ohio, and right now, we're still $8,500 short of what we need to make our TV ad. Pulling back our efforts in this last push could be how we lose this election. We can 't win without your donation or your support. We are almost to the primary, and our movement keeps growing, but I need your support to spread the word about this election in order to be successful in March. We're almost to the end, and I know you can help me cross the finish line. For Ohio, Matt Dolan | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Madison Horn
subject: Let’s Fight…for our students
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
Peter, It’s time we stand up to politicians using our kids as pawns in their games.
Take Stephanie Bice for example. She voted to cut $60 Million from public education in Oklahoma during her time in office. Now, our state is ranked 49th in education, which happens when you slash $60 million from the budget.
Our schools have been turned into a place where politicians like Ryan Walters and Stephanie Bice push their own agendas , fueled by fear-mongering and political attacks.
At what cost? Our kids' future ! We have some of the highest poverty rates in the country, and a school system that has been dismantled for the sake of sound bites. No one is focused on the real problems at hand to build our kids up.
Will you pitch in $20 today to secure our classrooms [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
from Politicians like Bice who are failing to prepare kids for the future? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
I am a 7th generation Oklahoman, who grew up in poverty yet had the opportunity to build a career working in the start-up space and global corporations. The opportunity for future generations to rise above their current situation - which is at the heart of the American Dream - is getting farther and farther out of reach...
We need elected officials who understand the value of education and the skills that our kids need for the future, not fueling the rhetoric that is destroying our classrooms and making our schools unsafe.
PITCH IN $10! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu] PITCH IN $25! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
PITCH IN $10! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu] PITCH IN $100! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
PITCH IN $25! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu] PITCH IN $1000! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
PITCH IN $50! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
PITCH IN $100! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
PITCH IN $50! >>
PITCH IN $500! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
PITCH IN A CUSTOM AMOUNT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
Our kids are being left behind by politicians like Bice. It’s time for leaders who put their future above politics - not politicians who focus on scoring political points.
Let’s get to work,
Madison Horn
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]
P.S. Did you know that 75% of Oklahoma 4th graders are not proficient in reading and math? If you think our elected officials should stop fighting and start finding solutions for this problem, you can donate HERE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/feb20-devedu]

PO Box 2601
Oklahoma City, OK 73101

body:
Tomorrow at 100 South | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f2926ab06802/conforti-for-congress-8396708?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Come out and support the Conforti for Congress campaign tomorrow at 100 South in Elmhurst!

Help us turn District 6 Red and put an end to the failed Democrat policies that have been hurting all Americans! We can do this!

Stay Safe! Stay Strong!

Can you help support the Conforti for Congress campaign's efforts to beat Casten? Your contribution will go a long way in helping us win! You can click the link below to make a donation today.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=a013dc33cb&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=e2496f35d6&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=b679a0e423&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=e1e4df20a9&e=25f4fa3311)!

subject: Justice Clarence Thomas must RESIGN!!

body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79377439/456293662/18334046?refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240219_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmNmQ0ZWRkLTIwZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vFZcAIXqgYZklQl4pkicTPMyg2QK5CwJPgy5vETWcoM=)
**The latest bombshell report reveals that Justice Thomas has been deeply entangled with the Koch network, a dominant force in conservative politics.** He's attended their donor summits, not once, but _at least twice_. Even more troubling, he's enjoyed numerous private jet rides and luxury trips funded by the Koch brothers, which he conveniently omitted from public disclosures.
The integrity of the Supreme Court is at stake, and we can't turn a blind eye.
We believe that faith in the highest court of our land cannot and will not be restored as long as Justice Thomas remains on the bench. It's time for him to resign.
_**[This is where you come in, Peter. We need your voice in this critical fight for justice and transparency. Will you add your name to the petition and call on Justice Thomas to resign now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79377440/456293663/-2023317061?contactdata=CTum4Ll28FxvOKJzhMVMX/4fBHVH/aHRrl5AciImyF3CUPoVEPUxbZE3oz7pC42xZ46UZDxk082+Bh8yHFkbofty92gBVatUJeVs7a7DYz/iNo/661331htWA+u3Jqs+G1C3Lrfid+9j1K26ZbvpllBwbJyPnX9KaShcbQkD+6Y=&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240219_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmNmQ0ZWRkLTIwZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vFZcAIXqgYZklQl4pkicTPMyg2QK5CwJPgy5vETWcoM=&emci=8449ead4-20d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=7f6d4edd-20d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24268976)**_
[Add Your Name »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79377441/456293664/-2023317061?contactdata=CTum4Ll28FxvOKJzhMVMX/4fBHVH/aHRrl5AciImyF3CUPoVEPUxbZE3oz7pC42xZ46UZDxk082+Bh8yHFkbofty92gBVatUJeVs7a7DYz/iNo/661331htWA+u3Jqs+G1C3Lrfid+9j1K26ZbvpllBwbJyPnX9KaShcbQkD+6Y=&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240219_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmNmQ0ZWRkLTIwZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vFZcAIXqgYZklQl4pkicTPMyg2QK5CwJPgy5vETWcoM=&emci=8449ead4-20d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=7f6d4edd-20d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24268976)
---
Time and time again — more headlines just roll out about the Justice's misconduct. Our justice system deserves better. It demands impartiality and honesty, qualities that seem to be in short supply with Justice Thomas. His continued presence on the Supreme Court bench is not just a stain on the court's integrity; it's a direct threat to our democracy.
**Clarence Thomas Secretly Participated in Koch Network Donor Events **_(ProPublica)_

**Clarence Thomas “corruption” almost “certainly unlawful and ethically reprehensible”** _(Salon)_

**Justice Thomas' disclosure includes Harlan Crow real estate deal and private plane flights** _(ABA Journal)_
_**[Will you take a stand with us? Your signature sends a powerful message: We demand accountability at the highest levels of our judiciary. name: Sean Feucht

body:
Watch the video for a BRAND NEW SONG| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=60b0ba5ae8374e9bbcfd2e00d58d8cf7&_e=iN2dvxPA2zbMNmGUXDPHOIEdLSRwm_CO-9lC7mSrfV0iy9zTCrMJOkzOeGRcJaccHAK-UNunpzxPm6ovZXBUHXQmlBqPvID-83SXFP6sInVkdMHxinHX_6a1bFfwwDgoRwbvhWxSaDuGsRTo9VdEmF6YAX8n5tFszyMFhVsqCeKYY_zJzcyQyGFQOjxFaL45jU-oxJdBvTaQrOBb2GhDjcIU_KK4g0M8Wn9kicFBkCbyPoxHjNzJVQf4Hcd1vSbYSacpFgPY2ZOlKf9UlPy77XNz_d-EHOXf3zQsX3Z7MZAJfdrCvq9_d8AEBbKcU8VN)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I'm so excited to release the first video from our new album, _Zeal for the House._ We recorded this album LIVE on New Year's Eve at our revival in Phoenix. If you were there, you felt the Holy Spirit move in POWER!!! I believe that _Zeal for the House_ is more than just another worship album—it's WORD for the church in 2024. God is breathing on this WORD and we are asking this week for a fresh zeal to consume our hearts! Check out the first video from the album— a new song titled, "Let God Arise."
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=60b0ba5ae8374e9bbcfd2e00d58d8cf7&_e=iN2dvxPA2zbMNmGUXDPHOIEdLSRwm_CO-9lC7mSrfV0iy9zTCrMJOkzOeGRcJaccHAK-UNunpzxPm6ovZXBUHXQmlBqPvID-83SXFP6sInVkdMHxinHX_6a1bFfwwDgoRwbvhWxSaDuGsRTo9VdEmF6YAX8n5tFszyMFhVsqCeJYbfi7ird3WMTqtC72hB4jkE4_XuP5gkuBwo2Vew6IfsaoZzsxdHdWnKKa5Ldf4DRb67EK7fL-gbijVwTb260FBhIlm3e50WTDWLPoBISHykD5u6-3UYq4glm_758Sq3R7WnEniap35KMSBgxpbf8N)
---

---
Till All Hear,
---
---
Sean

| Peter,
---
| | You may not have seen my recent video, but it’s caused quite the stir – and for good reason. It’s about something that affects us all deeply: the integrity of our elections. [**Sign my petition to Joe Lombardo to secure our elections.**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=5bbe60b2f0&e=54a81bd33c) After checking my voting history, I found a shocking discrepancy: it showed I voted by mail in Nevada’s presidential preference primary, a vote I never cast. When I revisited my voting history, it had been changed to show I had no record of voting at all ever. This only adds to my concerns. It’s clear – our system needs a serious overhaul, and the Nevada Secretary of State's office needs to address these issues immediately. This isn't just about me – many Nevadans are seeing similar discrepancies. Something's not right.
---

|

| It is time for Governor Lombardo to stand up, I urge him to call a special session or issue an executive order to make crucial changes to our voting process before ballots go out for our June primary. This includes stopping mass mail-in ballots and ensuring that every eligible voter in Nevada has to request a ballot. We must return to paper ballots and vote in person unless requesting to vote by mail for our primary and general elections this year. This is a crucial step to combat potential election fraud and restore trust in our electoral system.

It’s a clear sign that our campaign is gaining the strong momentum we need to flip CA-27 blue and take back control of the House majority. It’s also a sign that Garcia has never been more vulnerable. Despite his approval rating in the district plummeting by nearly 10% in recent months, he continues his extreme crusade – cosponsoring legislation for a national abortion ban, refusing to work across the aisle, and putting party above the people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

That’s why I have a favor to ask of you. **My friend and fellow conservative, Nick Begich, needs your help.**

subject: 🚨Rep. Barney Frank has joined theteam!🚨
body:
| |
---
Peter, We just received a major endorsement from Rep. Barney Frank! It's an absolute honor to have the endorsement and support of one of the most accomplished Congressional leaders of the modern era. It shows that we are the right choice to restore trustworthy leadership to Washington.
---
|
---
In his endorsement, Rep. Frank said that "I'm endorsing Matt Diemer in OH-7 because democracy is at stake in this election, and we need Democrats to take back the House and protect our institutions." It means the world to have Rep. Frank's endorsement. He's been a major leader on so many important issues, most notably campaign finance reform, which is one of the most important causes of our campaign. We came so close to beating former Trump aide Max Miller last cycle, but we were outspent 10 to 1. This cycle, we have a chance to deliver a major blow to Donald Trump and the GOP. We need your help taking down Trump ally Max Miller. name: Gloria Johnson
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79379666/456299368/-849459103?refcode=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg1MzQ1YS0yM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0VW30URZMGG8W4j2uKenxTvPVgJll1pM3oKOg5dSXU=&emci=3261633b-16d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
Hi there Peter, Amidst all the competing priorities of running a statewide campaign and my work in the Tennessee legislature, it’s important to me to remain clear-eyed about just why I’m in this race and what I hope to accomplish as your next Senator. I have some thoughts to share, and I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read. I’m running because when I was younger, I had the right to choose life- and health-saving abortion care. That right has been stripped away from Tennessee women — and it must be restored. I’m running because I spent nearly three decades as a special education teacher in public schools, so I know firsthand that our schools, teachers, and students need more support and greater funding to excel. I’m running because members of my own family were devastated when health problems led to the loss of their insurance — and left them bankrupt. We need to make health care more affordable and accessible for every American. I’m running because the right to cast a ballot and have a say in our democracy is a bedrock of our country, but that right is under attack. I’m running because my extreme opponent, Marsha Blackburn, is a threat to the values we share and to our fundamental rights. **_[Peter, this fight is too important to lose. I’m counting on you to stand with me. Please donate what you can to help me defeat Marsha >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79379667/456299369/209297649?refcode=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg1MzQ1YS0yM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0VW30URZMGG8W4j2uKenxTvPVgJll1pM3oKOg5dSXU=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79379668/456299370/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg1MzQ1YS0yM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0VW30URZMGG8W4j2uKenxTvPVgJll1pM3oKOg5dSXU=) | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79379669/456299371/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.8085345a-23d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDg1MzQ1YS0yM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0VW30URZMGG8W4j2uKenxTvPVgJll1pM3oKOg5dSXU=)

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read. | Hi there Peter, Amidst all the competing priorities of running a statewide campaign and my work in the Tennessee legislature, it’s important to me to remain clear-eyed about just why I’m in this race and what I hope to accomplish as your next Senator. I have some thoughts to share, and I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read. I’m running because when I was younger, I had the right to choose life- and health-saving abortion care. That right has been stripped away from Tennessee women — and it must be restored. I’m running because I spent nearly three decades as a special education teacher in public schools, so I know firsthand that our schools, teachers, and students need more support and greater funding to excel. I’m running because members of my own family were devastated when health problems led to the loss of their insurance — and left them bankrupt. We need to make health care more affordable and accessible for every American. I’m running because the right to cast a ballot and have a say in our democracy is a bedrock of our country, but that right is under attack. I’m running because my extreme opponent, Marsha Blackburn, is a threat to the values we share and to our fundamental rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you so much for being with me, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The MAGA Republican machine couldn’t find a single Republican in the state to run against me — so they brought in someone from Rhode Island.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1931%2E4032634%2EGJxN9O)
---
It’s official: John Deaton, a well-funded Republican, has launched a campaign to run against me for Senate in Massachusetts. Apparently, the MAGA Republican machine couldn’t find a single Republican in Massachusetts to run against me — so they brought in someone from Rhode Island who will have the backing of the GOP and special interest groups. This much is clear: We’re up against national Republicans who are desperate to take back the Senate and pass Trump’s agenda. We’re up against their rich buddies who are trying to stop us from taxing the wealthy, regulating big banks, and making our government work for working people. [**It’s going to take a strong grassroots movement to compete and win. Can you please pitch in $28 or anything you can to my re-election campaign? We need to respond to my opponent’s campaign launch with the strongest amount of grassroots donations to demonstrate what they’re up against.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1896?amount=28&t=8&akid=1931%2E4032634%2EGJxN9O)

| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1896?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1931%2E4032634%2EGJxN9O)

I’m proud of the progress we’ve accomplished for Massachusetts families so far — like lowering the cost of hearing aids, passing a new tax on massive corporations that were paying $0 in taxes, getting student loan debt canceled, securing billions in funding for projects like an electric bus fleet and infrastructure repairs, and so much more. But there’s plenty more to do for working people in Massachusetts and across the country. We’ve got to bring down the cost of housing. Put child care within reach for all working parents. Protect our Commonwealth from the climate crisis. Take power away from powerful interests like Big Pharma, Big Oil, and big banks and put it in the hands of working people — which means we need to root corruption out of Washington. And I’ve got the most sweeping set of anti-corruption plans since Watergate. This election is about who our government works for — and it’s about defending our democracy and our basic freedoms. I’m fighting to keep our Senate majority because if Republicans win any more power, they’ll restrict abortion access everywhere, even in blue states that have passed abortion protections — like Massachusetts. They’ll threaten voting rights, LGBTQIA+ rights, Social Security, Medicare, and the Affordable Care Act — they’ll reward the rich and powerful, and embolden an extremist base across the country. **So I’m staying in this fight to stop MAGA extremism, continue standing up to powerful special interests, and make real change for working people. Are you with me?** [**Please respond to my opponent’s announcement today with a donation of $28 or anything you can. Grassroots supporters like you have helped defeat the GOP and special interests in the past, and I need your support again as we take on this new fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1896?amount=28&t=14&akid=1931%2E4032634%2EGJxN9O) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: AIPAC threatens our full progressive agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’ve been talking a lot about AIPAC, the anti-Palestinian, pro-war, and
GOP-funded lobby group spending $100 million to attack and unseat the
Squad this election cycle.

There’s no doubt that AIPAC heavily influences our government’s foreign
policy decisions when it comes to Israel and Palestine; we’ve seen how
members of Congress on both sides of the aisle who take campaign
contributions from AIPAC continue to vote for unconditional military aid
to Israel, despite the Israeli government’s ongoing genocide and ethnic
cleansing of innocent Palestinians.

But the fight against AIPAC goes beyond Israel and Palestine: it’s about
the fate of our full progressive agenda. AIPAC is raking in tens of
millions of dollars from GOP donors and corporations, then using it to
bankroll moderate Democratic primary challengers and attack-ad campaigns
against progressive incumbents like Reps. Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, Ilhan
Omar, Summer Lee, and Rashida Tlaib.

If we let right-wing, corporate interest groups funded by the same
millionaire and billionaire Republican donors who support Donald Trump
influence our Democratic elections, we’ll never be in a position to pass
Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, a livable minimum wage, and other
long-overdue reforms that our communities desperately want and need.

We can’t let AIPAC get away with picking and choosing Republicans AND
Democrats in Congress. Our young, progressive, diverse, working-class
movement faces its biggest challenge this year, so we need to give it our
all to defend our Squad incumbents from being unseated by AIPAC
challengers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240220.8j_XNd&refcode=em20240220-33422&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=33422%2E1203867%2EKjgEGB ]Can you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford right now
to fuel Justice Democrats’ work to re-elect the Squad and defeat AIPAC
with people power?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240220.8j_XNd&refcode=em20240220-33422&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=33422%2E1203867%2EKjgEGB ]Contribute $3

Through grassroots support from everyday people like you, we’ve gone up
against AIPAC before and won — let’s do it again this year so we can not
only protect but grow our bloc of progressive leaders fighting for the
bold change we deserve in Congress.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=33422%2E1203867%2EKjgEGB ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=33422%2E1203867%2EKjgEGB ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240220-33422-footer&t=1023&refcode2=33422_1203867_KjgEGB&akid=33422%2E1203867%2EKjgEGB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=33422%2E1203867%2EKjgEGB

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Bennet
subject: Help us fight Boebert’s bad votes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_022024_CTC_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_022024_CTC_act]
Hi friend,
As you may know, one of Michael’s biggest priorities is permanently expanding the Child Tax Credit to reach the families that need it most.
The House just recently passed a bill that takes steps to make this a reality.
The Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act is a bipartisan bill that includes $33 million to expand the Child Tax Credit. It’s an easy win for Colorado’s kids, but not everyone in Congress supports it.
Lauren Boebert, who currently represents CO-03, voted against this bill. It will benefit 16 million children and 28,000 kids in her district alone — but she chose politics and posturing over her constituents.
We can’t let people like Lauren Boebert stop us from making progress.
Team, will you sign our petition to support this much-needed legislation? Every piece of grassroots support makes a difference in this bipartisan effort. [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101924_ctc_act]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101924_ctc_act]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101924_ctc_act]
The Child Tax Credit is designed to give working parents the breathing room they need to support their kids — whether it’s paying for rent, buying a new coat for the winter, or putting a healthy meal on the table.
Michael helped expand the Child Tax Credit in 2021. It was a huge success and cut child poverty nearly in half, but Congress let it expire.
He’s been fighting to restore it ever since.
This bipartisan bill is one of the best chances we have to make sure more families can receive the Child Tax Credit.
As the bill awaits a vote in the Senate, will you help us show how much support the Child Tax Credit has by signing our petition? [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101924_ctc_act]
Thank you,
Team Bennet

clean_body: [] Hi friend, As you may know, one of Michael’s biggest priorities is permanently expanding the Child Tax Credit to reach the families that need it most. The House just recently passed a bill that takes steps to make this a reality. The Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act is a bipartisan bill that includes $33 million to expand the Child Tax Credit. It’s an easy win for Colorado’s kids, but not everyone in Congress supports it. Lauren Boebert, who currently represents CO-03, voted against this bill. It will benefit 16 million children and 28,000 kids in her district alone — but she chose politics and posturing over her constituents. We can’t let people like Lauren Boebert stop us from making progress. Team, will you sign our petition to support this much-needed legislation? Every piece of grassroots support makes a difference in this bipartisan effort. [] SIGN ON NOW [] SIGN ON NOW [] The Child Tax Credit is designed to give working parents the breathing room they need to support their kids — whether it’s paying for rent, buying a new coat for the winter, or putting a healthy meal on the table. Michael helped expand the Child Tax Credit in 2021. It was a huge success and cut child poverty nearly in half, but Congress let it expire. He’s been fighting to restore it ever since. This bipartisan bill is one of the best chances we have to make sure more families can receive the Child Tax Credit. As the bill awaits a vote in the Senate, will you help us show how much support the Child Tax Credit has by signing our petition? [] Thank you, Team Bennet DONATE NOW [] DONATE MONTHLY [] DONATE NOW [] DONATE MONTHLY [] Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:
January layoffs show a troubling trend in news

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79381660/456305548/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM4ZTk1ODMtMjZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-kBbdIETqqzs7MpXrNJRUUgjvl6WQEG7ALTshxWiHWo=&emci=b18e9583-26d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=bc8e9583-26d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
After one of the worst years ever for news media job layoffs, 2024 is off to another bad start.
Last week, the _Wall Street Journal_ and _CBS_ both announced cuts to their news division. The latest layoffs come on the heels of depressing cuts/merger news from _Sports Illustrated_ , _Pitchfork_ , and, pillar of journalistic integrity, _The Baltimore Sun_ (which was bought up by right-wing Sinclair media).
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79381661/456305550/-593472309?refcode=20240220-EM-NewsLayoffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM4ZTk1ODMtMjZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-kBbdIETqqzs7MpXrNJRUUgjvl6WQEG7ALTshxWiHWo=)
**Last year was historically bad for the news industry, with more than 20,000 reporters losing their jobs. If layoffs continue at the same rate, that number could double in 2024.**
As outlets cut reporters or close their doors entirely, people around the country are left in ‘news deserts,’ without access to reliable local news. These folks are more likely to turn to social media for their news – where misinformation spreads like wildfire.
**COURIER can help bridge the gap in these communities.**
[_**If you support our mission to bring free, factual local news to the people who need it most, will you give $10 or whatever you can?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79381662/456305552/-593472309?refcode=20240220-EM-NewsLayoffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM4ZTk1ODMtMjZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-kBbdIETqqzs7MpXrNJRUUgjvl6WQEG7ALTshxWiHWo=)
COURIER’s research-backed model works to provide factual local news to those who need it most, while combating right-wing misinformation campaigns. Here’s how it works:
* We set up our newsrooms in battleground states across the country, focusing on ‘news deserts’ where quality local news is hard to come by.
* Our reporters work around the clock to provide factual, left-leaning news that matters.
* We put our news where people already are – on social media news feeds and in email inboxes – to fight back against the misinformation on those platforms.

And the best part, Peter? All our news is free. We’re not looking for a profit, so we’ll never compromise on the truth or our values to drive clicks or subscriptions.
[_**This type of work takes resources, and we count on donations from supporters like you to retain our talented reporters and continue the work. Can we count on you to give $10 to help us out?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79381663/456305553/-593472309?refcode=20240220-EM-NewsLayoffs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM4ZTk1ODMtMjZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-kBbdIETqqzs7MpXrNJRUUgjvl6WQEG7ALTshxWiHWo=)

The GOP has spent months recruiting wealthy candidates to run against me, and they’ve finally found their man in California bank owner Eric Hovde.
_Senate Republicans have even pledged to throw their full support behind Hovde’s campaign to defeat me._

clean_body: | Hi everyone, Senator Tammy Baldwin asked me if she could reach out to our list with some urgent news about her Senate race! — Tina Breaking news: Republican megamillionaire Eric Hovde just launched his Senate campaign to defeat me. With Mitch McConnell’s #1 recruit in the race now, our path toward winning Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat and defending our Democratic Senate majority just became much more difficult. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The GOP has spent months recruiting wealthy candidates to run against me, and they’ve finally found their man in California bank owner Eric Hovde. Senate Republicans have even pledged to throw their full support behind Hovde’s campaign to defeat me. Money will be no issue for Hovde — the megamillionaire has pledged to spend up to $20 million of his own personal fortune to unseat me. Our race will determine Senate control in 2024, so I need all hands on deck to fight back in the most pivotal moment of our campaign. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all your support. — Tammy Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Byron Donalds, Chairman
subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/U6I819T4DPTLwCJnaToQeQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt49-_FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DrX07c59oEjlSC6-esyKzA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt49- "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---
| | | [PITCH IN TEN BUCKS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-vLJfHQSmqvTf50g1yANhg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt49- "PITCH IN TEN BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/OItyE5hNdlyXqMYDR9TulQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt49- "PITCH IN TWENTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/U6I819T4DPTLwCJnaToQeQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt49-_FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "PITCH IN FIFTY BUCKS")
---
| | | [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/U6I819T4DPTLwCJnaToQeQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnt49-_FIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT")
---
This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

---

name: Zach Shrewsbury
subject: Meet Blue 🐾: More Than Just a Campaign Mascot!
body:
Today is Love Your Pet Day

| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYRMgjsXpHx32osoBB7eBco9-CLsud8hjLoJ1jwW-qbB&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=1)
---
Dear Friend, I hope this email finds you in high spirits! As we gear up for a transformative campaign, I want to introduce you to a very special team member - Blue, my Siamese kitten. Blue isn't just any campaign mascot; he's a loving, playful, and remarkably intelligent companion who's quickly become the heart and soul of our team.
---
[ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYRMgjsXpHx32osoBB7eBco9-CLsud8hjLoJ1jwW-qbB&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=2)
---
Blue's day starts with a gourmet selection of Fancy Feast wet kitten food, ensuring he gets all the high-protein nourishment a growing Siamese needs. And, like any smart candidate, Blue understands the importance of health supplements - taking his L-Lysine dose twice daily without a fuss. But life isn't all about diet and supplements for Blue. He finds joy in the simple pleasures of crinkly foil balls and a bouncy octopus on a string. And thanks to his new cat tree, he's scaling new heights - quite literally! We're on the road a lot, but Blue is a trooper, always ready to charm at events and cozy up in our pet-friendly accommodations. So, don't be surprised if you meet him in person at one of our rallies! Now, here's where our story takes a meaningful turn. Blue was adopted from a rescue, a choice that reflects our campaign's commitment to compassion and responsible pet ownership. Shelters and rescues are crucial in providing countless animals a second chance. While shelters are often funded by the government and may have to accept all animals, rescues operate primarily on donations, focusing on specific breeds or animals in dire need. Both are vital in the fight against pet homelessness, emphasizing why adoption is a powerful act of love. We're also passionate advocates for pet health and welfare. Regular vet visits, vaccinations, and timely spaying or neutering are non-negotiable for us. Blue is a shining example of this commitment, with all his vaccines up to date and plans for neutering at the appropriate time. It's about ensuring a healthy, happy life for our furry friends and contributing to the larger goal of responsible pet ownership. Pets like Blue enrich our lives immeasurably, offering unconditional love, companionship, and, yes, endless entertainment. They remind us of the joy in life's simple moments and the importance of care and empathy - values at the core of our campaign.
---
[ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYRMgjsXpHx32osoBB7eBco9-CLsud8hjLoJ1jwW-qbB&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=3)
---
Before I sign off, did you know that Siamese cats were once revered by royal families in Thailand for their elegance and intelligence? Blue certainly carries himself with a bit of that royal grace! **We're on a mission to bring positive change, and today, we ask you to visit a local pet shelter or a rescue. Support them with your contribution, or even better—adopt a pet.** Together, we can create a future that's kind, just, and full of hope. Warmest regards, Zach Shrewsbury (and Blue!) P.S. Look out for Blue at our next event - he's always ready for a meet-and-greet!
---
| [](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYRMgjsXpHx32osoBB7eBco9-CLsud8hjLoJ1jwW-qbB&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=4 "DONATE >>") [DONATE >>](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYRMgjsXpHx32osoBB7eBco9-CLsud8hjLoJ1jwW-qbB&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=4)
---
| [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYRMgjsXpHx32osoBB7eBco9-CLsud8hjLoJ1jwW-qbB&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=5)
---
| Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only electable Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. [**For Democrats to keep the Senate, Zach has to win. Support the campaign today.**](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQYRMgjsXpHx32osoBB7eBco9-CLsud8hjLoJ1jwW-qbB&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=6)
---
| [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6rbkmDOYI5NuQZ-HzmdwgCk4MjN2zZsbl6vgY21K1Bc_MPkg-CdKbV2oT7G6wbyRSA&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=7) | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tqbsxy1Qz5pw0jJ64A6B69Q&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=8) | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=6s7q0gdldD05tmHEdEfK0JmSdivGVArpG5xu0_dNF9dsMR78UncVjbzZ3epUAZlj&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=9)
---|---|---
---
Shrewsbury for Senate · PO Box 82, Fayetteville, WV 25840, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We're sad to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can unsubscribe using the link below: [Unsubscribe](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/unsubscribe?e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=022024_blue&n=10)
---

Fellow Conservative,

Do you feel like the American Dream is slipping away?

Do you sometimes feel like you don’t recognize your country anymore... or that we’re living in an episode of the Twilight Zone?

Me too. My name is Eric Hovde, and I’m excited to announce that I am officially launching my campaign for Senate in Wisconsin.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 2/20/2024
body:
Your daily rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
Heidi Ganahl introduces the Rocky Mountain Voice, a new conservative news media platform for Coloradans to be the VOICE of your VALUES.
| | [ ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
---
| [ ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| Happy Tuesday, Welcome to today's George Washington-themed edition of Rocky Mountain Voice! Take a walk through history with us [here ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)\-- The Truth Behind President's Day and an ode to the "Original American Badass". Also, make sure you don't miss the **RMV EXCLUSIVE** straw poll results of Sunday evening's CD4 and CD8 candidate forum (results below). This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, February 20th, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
# TODAY'S TOP STORIES
---
[**EXCLUSIVE: Boebert in 4th District, Evans in 8th win President’s Day Celebration straw poll in Windsor**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The winding path of the campaign trail in Colorado’s 4th and 8th Congressional District races turned Sunday evening to the President’s Day Celebration hosted by the Conservative Patriot Alliance here at American Legion Post No. 109.

* David Huntwork, chairman of the [Conservative Patriot Alliance](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), emphasized the importance of providing candidates with significant time in a meet and greet to share about themselves, considering the limited opportunities in typical debates and forums.

* Republicans vying for the Republican Party’s nomination in both districts participated, with a successive five-minute speech to the audience before a straw poll was conducted.

* **Rocky Mountain Voice was given the results exclusively to share:**
* In the 8th District, House District 48 Representative **Gabe Evans** maintained a strong lead with **63.2% support**.
* In the 4th District, **Lauren Boebert** emerged as the frontrunner with **26.4% support**.

* The event attracted an estimated 175 to 200 likely voters, showcasing the enthusiasm and engagement of attendees in the electoral process.

| [ READ MORE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
[**Ballots have been mailed for Presidential primary, Election Day is March 5**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado will vote for the U.S. President primary candidates next month, selecting from either a Republican or Democratic primary ballot.

* Ballots were mailed out starting**February 12** with **Election Day set for March 5**.

* The Republican ballot includes Donald Trump, Nikki Haley, and withdrawn candidates, with an option for write-in candidates. The Democratic ballot features Joe Biden and others, along with a "noncommitted delegate" option.

* Unaffiliated voters will receive both party's ballots but can only vote one; returning both renders them ineligible.

* **Key dates include February 26 for voter registration and March 5 for in-person voting, and March 13 for military and overseas ballot deadlines.**

| [ READ MORE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
[**Presidents getting in on bobblehead fever**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
BY PAUL BEDARD, [COLORADO SPRINGS GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The National Bobblehead Hall of Fame and Museum has announced a new series of presidential bobbleheads to celebrate Presidents' Day, featuring presidents at the Resolute Desk, the press room briefing podium, and even their first ladies.

* The first ladies collection includes figures such as Martha Washington, Eleanor Roosevelt, Jacqueline Kennedy, and Melania Trump. The Resolute Desk collection includes presidents like Harry Truman, Ronald Reagan, and Joe Biden. And another collection features presidents behind the podium, including Ronald Reagan, Barack Obama, and Joe Biden.

| [ READ MORE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
[**Demand for Colorado’s Ag in the Classroom creates increased funding need**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
BY RACHEL GABEL, [THE FENCE POST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado Agriculture in the Classroom program has seen a significant increase in demand from teachers, with 1,100 classrooms and over 23,000 students currently enrolled.

* Sisters Rachel Allnut and McCall Knecht, along with their cousin Sierra Linke, collaborated on the creation of "Seed, Sprout, Spice" for the project, which involves mailing packets filled with books, Pueblo chile seeds, soil discs, and frozen Pueblo chiles to classrooms across the state, along with curriculum-aligned activities.

* Colorado Foundation for Agriculture Executive Director Jennifer Scharpe highlights the positive impact of students experiencing Colorado agriculture products, with increased interest from both students and teachers.

| [ READ MORE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
[**First Amendment expert: Proposal from Democratic leaders ‘completely’ exempts lawmakers from open meeting laws**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
BY LUIGE DEL PUERTO, [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Democratic leaders are proposing sweeping exemptions for lawmakers from the state's open meetings law, which would **shield written communication between legislators from public scrutiny**.

* The proposal has been criticized by First Amendment attorney Steve Zansberg for essentially exempting the General Assembly from transparency requirements, allowing lawmakers to discuss pending legislation via electronic communications without public inspection.

* Critics argue that such exemptions would **leave the public "completely in the dark"** about legislative discussions and decisions, as it would allow for an "infinite number of serial meetings" without public notice or access to minutes.

| [ READ MORE ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---

Heidi Ganahl introduces the Rocky Mountain Voice, a new conservative news media platform for Coloradans to be the VOICE of your VALUES. | | | PRESENTED BY | Happy Tuesday, Welcome to today's George Washington-themed edition of Rocky Mountain Voice! Take a walk through history with us \-- The Truth Behind President's Day and an ode to the "Original American Badass". Also, make sure you don't miss the RMV EXCLUSIVE straw poll results of Sunday evening's CD4 and CD8 candidate forum (results below). This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, February 20th, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY BRIAN PORTER, The winding path of the campaign trail in Colorado’s 4th and 8th Congressional District races turned Sunday evening to the President’s Day Celebration hosted by the Conservative Patriot Alliance here at American Legion Post No. 109. David Huntwork, chairman of the , emphasized the importance of providing candidates with significant time in a meet and greet to share about themselves, considering the limited opportunities in typical debates and forums. Republicans vying for the Republican Party’s nomination in both districts participated, with a successive five-minute speech to the audience before a straw poll was conducted. Rocky Mountain Voice was given the results exclusively to share: In the 8th District, House District 48 Representative Gabe Evans maintained a strong lead with 63.2% support. In the 4th District, Lauren Boebert emerged as the frontrunner with 26.4% support. The event attracted an estimated 175 to 200 likely voters, showcasing the enthusiasm and engagement of attendees in the electoral process. | BY BRIAN PORTER, Colorado will vote for the U.S. President primary candidates next month, selecting from either a Republican or Democratic primary ballot. Ballots were mailed out startingFebruary 12 with Election Day set for March 5. The Republican ballot includes Donald Trump, Nikki Haley, and withdrawn candidates, with an option for write-in candidates. The Democratic ballot features Joe Biden and others, along with a "noncommitted delegate" option. Unaffiliated voters will receive both party's ballots but can only vote one; returning both renders them ineligible. Key dates include February 26 for voter registration and March 5 for in-person voting, and March 13 for military and overseas ballot deadlines. | BY PAUL BEDARD, The National Bobblehead Hall of Fame and Museum has announced a new series of presidential bobbleheads to celebrate Presidents' Day, featuring presidents at the Resolute Desk, the press room briefing podium, and even their first ladies. The first ladies collection includes figures such as Martha Washington, Eleanor Roosevelt, Jacqueline Kennedy, and Melania Trump. name: Professor Carol Anderson, Fair Fight Action
subject: re: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
An old formula that has been designed and refined over the course of more than a century to shrink and whiten the electorate. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79383688/456311345/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20240220_f_carolanderson_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGFhZWIxMC0yYmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=392jgeGWS30OKvGge7zczR96xopNynr85RqTMfPqdrs=&emci=32aaeb10-2bd0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=38aaeb10-2bd0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=1037277)

| | _Content warning: This email discusses anti-Black violence. If this is too much to read, we understand. Take care of yourself first and foremost._ This Black History Month, I want to tell you the story of Maceo Snipes. Snipes fought fascists during World War II. Upon returning, he was determined to vote as an American citizen, unintimidated by threats against the lives of African Americans in his native Georgia. So in 1946, he voted — and was the only Black person in Taylor County, Georgia, who dared to do so. A few days later, a firing squad arrived at his door and pumped his body full of bullets. **The message was really clear: You vote, you die.** That kind of physical violence is what may come to mind when thinking about voter suppression and disenfranchisement in the past. But it is the bureaucratic violence that now rains down in terms of policies and court cases that look legitimate in ways that the execution of Maceo Snipes could not. The voter suppression laws passed today are as subtle and as vicious as the Jim Crow laws that came up in the 1890s and the early 20th century. They aren’t haphazard, one-offs, or innocuous. Indeed, they’re following an old formula that has been designed and refined over the course of more than a century to shrink and whiten the electorate. **We're living through Jim Crow 2.0. ** Since the 2020 election, more than 1,300 restrictive voting bills have been introduced in state legislatures across the country. The forces that work to silence Black voices and undermine our democracy may be strong — but together, we are stronger. So, while we celebrate the stories of Black achievement, Black joy, and Black changemakers like Maceo Snipes this Black History Month, we must also recommit ourselves to the fight for a stronger and more inclusive democracy. I hope you’ll join me. In Solidarity, Professor Carol Anderson
Fair Fight Action Board Member

clean_body: An old formula that has been designed and refined over the course of more than a century to shrink and whiten the electorate. | | | Content warning: This email discusses anti-Black violence. If this is too much to read, we understand. Take care of yourself first and foremost. This Black History Month, I want to tell you the story of Maceo Snipes. Snipes fought fascists during World War II. Upon returning, he was determined to vote as an American citizen, unintimidated by threats against the lives of African Americans in his native Georgia. So in 1946, he voted — and was the only Black person in Taylor County, Georgia, who dared to do so. A few days later, a firing squad arrived at his door and pumped his body full of bullets. The message was really clear: You vote, you die. That kind of physical violence is what may come to mind when thinking about voter suppression and disenfranchisement in the past. But it is the bureaucratic violence that now rains down in terms of policies and court cases that look legitimate in ways that the execution of Maceo Snipes could not. The voter suppression laws passed today are as subtle and as vicious as the Jim Crow laws that came up in the 1890s and the early 20th century. They aren’t haphazard, one-offs, or innocuous. Indeed, they’re following an old formula that has been designed and refined over the course of more than a century to shrink and whiten the electorate. We're living through Jim Crow 2.0. Since the 2020 election, more than 1,300 restrictive voting bills have been introduced in state legislatures across the country. The forces that work to silence Black voices and undermine our democracy may be strong — but together, we are stronger. So, while we celebrate the stories of Black achievement, Black joy, and Black changemakers like Maceo Snipes this Black History Month, we must also recommit ourselves to the fight for a stronger and more inclusive democracy. I hope you’ll join me. In Solidarity, Professor Carol Anderson Fair Fight Action Board Member Author of One Person, No Vote | = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Our upcoming Attorney General race this year is one of the top races in our Commonwealth. We need to elect an Attorney General who knows how to deliver common sense solutions to communities big and small – _and Eugene DePasquale is the clear choice for Pennsylvania._
As Auditor General, Eugene saved taxpayers billions of dollars from waste, fraud, and corruption, defended our elections from far-right attacks, and took on politicians and powerful special interests who threatened our right to abortion and health care.
As our next Attorney General, Eugene will continue to fight for our shared priorities — like standing up for labor rights, supporting public education, and defending the right to choose in the face of never-ending MAGA attacks.
**Eugene is a committed, results-oriented leader working Pennsylvanians can count on** — and it’s why I know he’ll be an Attorney General who will never stop fighting for PA communities and families.
[_**Every donation will help elect an Attorney General who will put Pennsylvanians over politics. name: Young
subject: They won.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
I couldn’t believe it...

| |
---
| | | _**- A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - **_
Dear, Friend,

You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story.

I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant.

When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy.

__In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election.__

But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. **Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. **

Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans.

_I 'm nothing special._ Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone.

But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. _The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. _

clean_body: I couldn’t believe it... | | | | | - A Personal Note from Congresswoman Young Kim - Dear, Friend, You may not know me, but this is Congresswoman Young Kim, and I would really appreciate it if you would take a moment to read my story. I am a Christian, mother, wife, small business owner, and a first-generation immigrant. When I moved to America, I didn't speak a word of English. But I worked hard, put myself through school, and am now one of the first Korean-American women to serve in Congress. But my road hasn't been exactly easy. In 2018, I ran for Congress and I lost my election. But I wouldn't let myself give up no matter how hard the Democrats tried to make me. So I ran again in 2020, and despite MILLIONS in spending against me, we won. Together, we flipped a DEEP BLUE seat RED for the FIRST TIME in 26 years. Every year since then, we've continued to defy the odds to stop the woke Democrat machine and keep this seat for House Republicans. I 'm nothing special. Just an immigrant who came to this country - not knowing a word of English - who lived the American Dream. And I've made it my mission on Capitol Hill to help make that same Dream possible for everyone. But now, the Democrats are once again after my seat. They are angry that I flipped a deep Blue seat Red, and now they want it back. The far-Left knows that my seat could very well decide the House Majority and they are DESPERATE for revenge. | | | | They've recruited progressive Liberals to run against me, pledged MILLIONS of dollars in attack ads & smear campaigns, and the White House even named me one of their TOP 18 targets. I don't normally ask for help like this, but my campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters just like you, and I urgently need your help to win my fight, Friend. "I’m coming to you personally today to ask if you could chip in just a few bucks to help fuel my campaign against these attacks from the woke Left and help me DEFEND the GOP Majority. " | | | | Thank you in advance for your support, | Young Kim | | | Friend, the desperate Democrats have once again named me a Top Target. They will once again result in desperate, disgusting attacks like calling me a token candidate. Their attacks only make me work harder. I won't be deterred by desperate Democrats who will say and do anything to score some cheap political points. They've already committed MILLIONS of dollars to defeat me. As an immigrant and Conservative woman, this isn't the first time I have been subjected to the Democrats' attacks. That's why I need your help. This is not the first and certainly won't be the last time the Left comes after us. Our work fighting climate change is like climbing a mountain. It’s going to take time and a lot of hard work to reach the top, but there are also important points along the way. We have to continue making progress every year, step by step, to get to a just and equitable climate future. This session, that means passing **Right to Repair** , which will give Oregonians the ability to repair their electronic devices so they can use them longer and keep them out of the landfill, reducing e-waste and cutting pollution associated with manufacturing new devices. It also means passing a strong **Climate Budget** to continue funding the important climate programs we’ve passed over the last few years, including the Healthy Homes Program and the Charge Ahead Electric Vehicle Rebate program. We need your help to ensure that we pass these important priorities this session, and to ensure that we have the resources we need to continue climbing the mountain to a just and equitable climate future. clean_body: Join OLCV or renew your membership during our Winter Membership Drive and you will be entered to win a 4-Day Pass to ski or snowboard Mt. Bachelor! | Dear Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw my email— The membership drive will end this Thursday, February 22nd, at midnight. to be eligible to win! Right now we are working hard to pass important climate and environmental legislation before the end of the short session. We need your help to get these bills across the finish line, and to ensure that we have the resources we need to continue climbing the mountain to a just and equitable climate future. Thanks for all you do. Sincerely, April Christenson, OLCV Development Director | | Dear Peter, OLCV’s Winter Membership Drive starts today! . Our work fighting climate change is like climbing a mountain. It’s going to take time and a lot of hard work to reach the top, but there are also important points along the way. We have to continue making progress every year, step by step, to get to a just and equitable climate future. This session, that means passing Right to Repair , which will give Oregonians the ability to repair their electronic devices so they can use them longer and keep them out of the landfill, reducing e-waste and cutting pollution associated with manufacturing new devices. It also means passing a strong Climate Budget to continue funding the important climate programs we’ve passed over the last few years, including the Healthy Homes Program and the Charge Ahead Electric Vehicle Rebate program. We need your help to ensure that we pass these important priorities this session, and to ensure that we have the resources we need to continue climbing the mountain to a just and equitable climate future. Our work is only possible thanks to the generous support of thousands of grassroots members just like you. Thank you for being part of our community. Sincerely, April Christenson, OLCV Development Director | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.
