We have an important update: **Arizona lawmakers moved our primary election date up by one week.**

A week earlier may not seem like a big deal, but this requires a big shift in our campaign strategy. We have a week less to knock doors, a week less to meet undecided voters, and a week less to hold events across the district.

I’m not fazed by this update. If anything, I’m even more motivated than before to ramp up the work of meeting with voters across AZ-01.

body:
he's made a political career out of lying to voters

Look, Rick Scott is a fraud.
He proudly wears his Navy baseball cap at every opportunity: photo ops, interviews, and even in his attack ad. **But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for _millions_ of active duty service members, veterans, and their families.**
Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career.
And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes.
He _claims_ to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He _claims_ to be a proud American, but he's undermined our democracy by pushing Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election. **He _claims_ to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. **
**In 2024, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue and a poll shows that this race is already a tie![But Rick Scott is ready to shell out millions to retake the lead, so Debbie needs grassroots donors like you to stand with her. Please, rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help her defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79385328/456316066/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk824-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjYxNmRlY2YtMmVkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0hEMN3DCHcz2cXaP1kwCzXO-DDRPPDgeEacs1bEB26E=)**

clean_body: he's made a political career out of lying to voters | | | Look, Rick Scott is a fraud. He proudly wears his Navy baseball cap at every opportunity: photo ops, interviews, and even in his attack ad. But the truth is that Rick Scott made a FORTUNE while his company defrauded the health insurance provider for millions of active duty service members, veterans, and their families. Rick Scott resigned from his role, pled the Fifth, walked away with zero consequences, and used the massive fortune he made to jumpstart his political career. And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Rick Scott has made a political career out of lying to voters while getting richer and richer behind the scenes. He claims to support working families, but he wrote the plan to end Medicare and Social Security. He claims to be a proud American, but he's undermined our democracy by pushing Donald Trump's Big Lie about the 2020 election. He claims to be a public servant, but he's shown us time and time again that, in reality, he only serves himself. In 2024, we have the chance to defeat him: Democrat Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting to flip this seat blue and a poll shows that this race is already a tie If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. Folks - I’m hours away from the final U.S. Senate debate, and I'm really excited to take the stage and talk about the issues we face here in California and around the country. Since we launched this Senate campaign, I've had the privilege of connecting with so many of you and listening to your stories. body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79386280/456318030/992867983?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTY5NjVlNi0zMGQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYW7i5hjEmD00Z7A4yyfVCsqX35HhleQbXxia5jfPR4=&emci=3917fa69-05c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=1a6965e6-30d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6787172) Hey team, It’s no secret that the Supreme Court has made waves over the last few years — and not for good reasons. From overturning _Roe_ to gutting affirmative action, it’s clear that many of the justices on the Court don’t have Americans’ best interest in mind. **When we asked our network of young voters whether they trusted the Supreme Court, 95% said no.** Some said they’d lost faith in the Court after the _Dobbs_ decision. Others put their skepticism down to Republicans’ efforts to stack federal courts with right-wing extremists. One response summed it up like this:
> _**“The conservative justices and their allies have clearly stated their intention to reshape the US. I don’t agree with their vision and am alarmed by their overt disregard for judicial precedent and neutrality.”**_
Right now one of the biggest cases for abortion access is being heard by the Court. Young Americans are letting us know that they can’t blindly trust our rights to be upheld. We’re on a mission to empower young people to make a difference at the polls. **[If you’re with us, will you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to help us keep up the fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79386283/456318042/-1325048647?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTY5NjVlNi0zMGQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYW7i5hjEmD00Z7A4yyfVCsqX35HhleQbXxia5jfPR4=&emci=3917fa69-05c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=1a6965e6-30d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6787172)** | [**Chip in $5 →** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79386285/456318044/-1325048647?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTY5NjVlNi0zMGQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYW7i5hjEmD00Z7A4yyfVCsqX35HhleQbXxia5jfPR4=&emci=3917fa69-05c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=1a6965e6-30d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | | Hey team, It’s no secret that the Supreme Court has made waves over the last few years — and not for good reasons. From overturning Roe to gutting affirmative action, it’s clear that many of the justices on the Court don’t have Americans’ best interest in mind. When we asked our network of young voters whether they trusted the Supreme Court, 95% said no. Some said they’d lost faith in the Court after the Dobbs decision. Others put their skepticism down to Republicans’ efforts to stack federal courts with right-wing extremists. One response summed it up like this: “The conservative justices and their allies have clearly stated their intention to reshape the US. I don’t agree with their vision and am alarmed by their overt disregard for judicial precedent and neutrality.” Right now one of the biggest cases for abortion access is being heard by the Court. Young Americans are letting us know that they can’t blindly trust our rights to be upheld. We’re on a mission to empower young people to make a difference at the polls. | Thanks for all your support, team, NextGen PAC | NextGen America 548 Market Street #98097 San Francisco, CA 94104 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Kamala Harris
subject: How dare he
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Donald Trump’s cruel policy positions are already putting American lives in danger. | | |

Peter, I’m furious. As reported last week, Donald Trump is backing a federal abortion ban behind closed doors. Make no mistake: Donald Trump’s cruel policy positions are already putting American lives in danger. Donald Trump appointed three Supreme Court justices who voted to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. He bragged about the ruling. And now, he is the reason why women are being turned away from emergency rooms and forced to travel across state lines for health care -- and why doctors are being threatened with criminal charges for simply doing their jobs. **Trump is threatening to ban abortion nationwide if he wins reelection, and we need to take him at his word.[Please make a $25 contribution today if you’re with Joe and me in this fight to defend abortion rights nationwide. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiK2PiO8nieQBZutEPj5DYIJLC8DSOXpz5uPSXlj-2qnAR1MBWXBng343kwY86JGHEAAOA2iZyv2eJKwtcyB6yGRag8aObTwpjl8Bcr6Ykvn2QYE_-2jwMcci4T4O5L4hMv2kYFzVaBuI6K9zAxYSS1ME_txOJ0J_xghBVvb7bTb6Vk5hHJS6pfChTgerN9iK0tHGJRx23UFZbj6BhYHN8GD63e9OgvZUCz7UsfdffrMG0d3quGaI3zx1tBu4nLxETZ497rxm1O0DTqnfELtHl6awz2HPH-b0iy_zRMRC2EjHg/440/hOko3-xGSf22VzLqh-eVYw/h0/Ucipe2W4UM5SaVHXBOCqpmkZQNg52BAla70MN99pvio)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

When I heard the news of the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe_ , I was on my way to a maternal health event. Immediately, a number of words came to mind that I can’t mention in this email.
For nearly 50 years, Americans relied on the fundamental rights that _Roe_ protected. Now, we must speak of _Roe_ in the past tense. _It is outrageous._
The fact is that my daughter, goddaughters, and niece now have fewer rights than my generation or my mother’s generation. It is why we must fight. We cannot give up.
**Donald Trump is betting that we will get distracted. That we will get discouraged._We cannot afford to._ We must fight for our basic freedoms. For the right to make decisions about our own bodies.**
[**That is why today, I’m asking you to support Joe’s and my reelection campaign. Whatever you can afford will ensure that we can defeat Donald Trump and defend our fundamental freedoms >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZCmRjvHgikzZ_Ok_dYKuJpUIh2BEiW1VirfP4vpAhfiK2PiO8nieQBZutEPj5DYIJLC8DSOXpz5uPSXlj-2qnAR1MBWXBng343kwY86JGHEACI7cLAn63gsQHRwXUPwlhHkGXfhoclaV-WeFwqYKg3vNrBJHb5aq_o6K1kP3xeKALXVAFvYVbUEXx50-0YtJSeACcxAtMMKvrQippRDORsSQSB-7KxecP5aOj5yIqY9nknLicHoU8ngo4LqeZtCOVY4EdLS5EAVc6xU_cJ0zUgeju1pBTvSd0voVhDcyDOBsa_XOs8LfVqGP05r548CSlVOxjmEV6nu5vm9X7CtG6yg/440/hOko3-xGSf22VzLqh-eVYw/h7/AL5GypcINEZP3goFFctCbnB2spLctxnF8rKdendZ_VY)
Thank you for your support -- today and every day.
Kamala

name: Mike Johnson
subject: We need to defend this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
One of the races at the top of my list is Congressman Marc Molinaro's MUST-WIN fight in New York’s 19th Congressional District.
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f2a5eb89bbd14b2aa584f6529f312155&_e=SZxNxqB31w2-rFRkQa3TTBgg9QUUI9zrTbdh6pnPyhORF3eTLM55b2ZYPYaMrRRXLl9DHdzmmnHIh3ZYNCI9pOT6F3JXdIdvltbjgUJMKWHL6PS2r3Sy5IcRVlrxDpALhfOuM5K3q9CPriLgpHJcsQUMrzs3tKDiNYCug-_cAPy0Zku-qfWadX4pXmDiK5Lxsm7qmANgNsgDyUBUtinEOEEHCpwlYFQp0myUv4oNpChHaBRrfH40jul1eZFiaIMnty-cye0E8ACa_hjCSR6OTWna1wpm5-b-9z_TTfQFBMCanjT6cgtvFbguxX-m5lm302QMHG4ZIRB0OUfo-xg6K9EF44tf8u7IETFqowEmB8W-zNm3TWUsXvfqv2_AJdPE)

| Fellow Conservative,

I’m heading to New York’s 19th Congressional Seat to rally support behind Marc Molinaro.

**Marc’s 2022 victory in this battleground seat was instrumental in giving Republicans the House Majority.** Marc’s dedication has allowed Republicans to bring the Democrats’ radical agenda to a total halt.

Now, the Democrats are throwing everything they have against him, and I won’t stand for it.

Defending Marc’s seat is at the top of my priority list. [**That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in a few dollars to help Marc defend this critical battleground seat.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f2a5eb89bbd14b2aa584f6529f312155&_e=SZxNxqB31w2-rFRkQa3TTBgg9QUUI9zrTbdh6pnPyhORF3eTLM55b2ZYPYaMrRRXLl9DHdzmmnHIh3ZYNCI9pOT6F3JXdIdvltbjgUJMKWHL6PS2r3Sy5IcRVlrxDpALhfOuM5K3q9CPriLgpHJcsQUMrzs3tKDiNYCug-_cAPy0Zku-qfWadX4pXmDiK5Lxsm7qmANgNsgDyUBUtinEOEEHCpwlYFQp0myUv4oNpChTfFi2Vd0wabWEvPhw_H_EiJ5XhVsx18MsPAAuP2X94hrgLj1D886AucwmKq_UIaoXTAgCsQgunPv7AWk-RBN8tTJswzUpmHOkz5KVx_x9C5jXdjrMoLM61llRibHpcdDjWtjeSc7jAPKqwGerYIQU)

There’s ZERO margin for error in this race. Marc’s opponent has already outraised him 2:1 with individual donors. If we don’t take immediate action, it will only get worse. **Democrats are fired up over defeating Marc and retaking this seat.**

Defending this seat is a team effort, and we need grassroots Conservatives like you stepping up right now. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Not tomorrow, not five years from now. Right Now.

MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Unless Congress acts now, the consequences of the climate crisis will be irreversible.
Team—The climate crisis is here, and its impact on people in the Lower Hudson Valley is already severe.

Last year was officially the hottest year on record, and New York suffered the worst air quality since the 1960s after being engulfed in smoke from the raging wildfires in Canada.

Across the nation, one in four Americans breathe air considered unhealthy as a _direct_ result of the climate crisis. We’ve seen a five-fold increase since 2000 in the number of days unsafe for our children to play outside.

**Congress has a moral obligation to meet this moment and act now.** But, for decades, Republicans—backed by billions in lobbying from the fossil fuel industry—denied the climate crisis, calling it a hoax. In fact, many Republicans, including Mike Lawler, still do. Not surprising for someone who was an oil and gas lobbyist.

[**We cannot bury our heads in the sand any longer. Unless we act now, the consequences of the climate crisis will be irreversible. Add your name to join me in calling on Congress to meet this moment and prioritize urgent climate action—not in five years, not tomorrow—NOW.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79387220/456321051/-1946074301?ms=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=r3a071dkHL6tUYcL2IsJEEz25zFW0VtFqRWJRUOgmH6v/9Vl2Ga446btOh7AlNWyKtFxhANphNg6G6xAb07AgIV3D4yi/Hyb1EN5Kw9spTQ=&refcode2=4e555802-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1NTgwMi0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQ4S3tTy5l3EK-LZ7vbpaidNUre2ioaJNSiHuzZ339E=&emci=c9642daa-17d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=4e555802-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24719896)

**
This is personal to me. As a millennial, I share the burden of young people worried about whether we will have a habitable planet on which to live.

That’s why I fought for (and passed) the Inflation Reduction Act—**the largest climate action the United States has ever taken—to lower renewable energy costs and create millions of green jobs over the next decade.**

But this moment demands even bolder action.

When I return to Congress, I will be ready on day one to roll up my sleeves and tackle this existential crisis by making greater investments in green infrastructure, decarbonizing our economy, and more.

[**Add your name to join me in calling on Congress to take urgent climate action now and deliver a healthy, habitable future for generations to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79387234/456321086/-1946074301?ms=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&refcode=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&source=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240220_climat_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=r3a071dkHL6tUYcL2IsJEEz25zFW0VtFqRWJRUOgmH6v/9Vl2Ga446btOh7AlNWyKtFxhANphNg6G6xAb07AgIV3D4yi/Hyb1EN5Kw9spTQ=&refcode2=4e555802-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTU1NTgwMi0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQ4S3tTy5l3EK-LZ7vbpaidNUre2ioaJNSiHuzZ339E=&emci=c9642daa-17d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=4e555802-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24719896)

Yours in the fight,

Mondaire

**_"I hope Nancy gets the help she needs. I really do... She’s got a lot of challenges." -FORMER Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy_**

This aint my first rodeo, Fellow American.

I’m used to people underestimating me. _Truly!_

I didn’t become the first woman to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets by having a lot of people believe in me.

I didn’t pick myself up after dropping out of high school and go waitress at Waffle House to put food on the table because of handouts.

I didn’t become a strong conservative FIGHTER in Washington DC because I didn’t face challenges.

**_NOPE!_**

I got to where I am because I am a fighter. I’m not afraid to get dirt under my fingernails and sweat on my brow for the things that I believe in. _**And I believe in America.**_ I will fight until the day I die for what is RIGHT in this country – _and I’m not a sell-out to corporate greed like the former Speaker._

Which is why he is coming after me on his revenge tour. I can’t be bought. My vote is not for sale. I work for the American people and the American people ONLY. _Which frankly scares the HECK out of people here in Washington who aren’t used to people they cannot control._

**So, today, I’m taking the former Speaker’s advice:** [**I’m asking for help._Not from lobbyists or party leaders but from the people I work for._ Help from you, Fellow American.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=030d967445094ab685d4a4f3c78d39c5&_e=QvVmTSJQiY-7iXlORvW0iYha9jSYs8Y6bmFxFcHQ-gwVssR9XuynbXVOprjAIzOcaU_416nuZT1fWPs6esHD0jG--ZVH7MSaQv8ugOrjmEfo16d7x6qZ3xq_ep1HblYDcFFJK4AB0FgqBT7UNZDPrTy50JCqDThiu-go63V_kuqv8HqV24orwZ0IZ2gCZTTjscOIAkqtA4Tj6IkmjTKq_D3dPmdO94qNrA7JvjjI78UuQJdzMaIuvJYsWJ4mZeb7DZMEns9C9xVVxVvtXm0cG1Pew_QVQ_Xd8OJysePfl2D1EJaa9WP6Lqgcr1i4DvRJ_jmlOeCNfvzP_6tmCFGiZnQw-uQ-TIYUj_kVaykW8t8w0gSn9UEXF54cNiqDXnF0)

Everyone in Washington is after me. They are throwing MILLIONS of dollars against me, but I don’t care because I know I can rely on you to help me claw my way back to Washington and keep fighting the good fight. [**Any amount you can spare today, even if it’s just sharing my story, would mean the world to me.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=030d967445094ab685d4a4f3c78d39c5&_e=QvVmTSJQiY-7iXlORvW0iYha9jSYs8Y6bmFxFcHQ-gwVssR9XuynbXVOprjAIzOcaU_416nuZT1fWPs6esHD0jG--ZVH7MSaQv8ugOrjmEfo16d7x6qZ3xq_ep1HblYDcFFJK4AB0FgqBT7UNZDPrTy50JCqDThiu-go63V_kuqv8HqV24orwZ0IZ2gCZTTjscOIAkqtA4Tj6IkmjTKq_D3dPmdO94qNrA7JvjjI78WCvDhmfyLjAw4Fe2jCJnV_S7xMnOa91IlX0F1nn_m3G7E0qXZurcK8suwZyGetS4ZYMWaR1GevOpemWPUmeFh-6chvw3lWEzauvetW_EZ5o0SA3X2O9b_leaS5ysB0D88WhNiN1P5h9RQZWZWku85x)

[** ****SEND ME BACK TO WASHINGTON » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=030d967445094ab685d4a4f3c78d39c5&_e=QvVmTSJQiY-7iXlORvW0iYha9jSYs8Y6bmFxFcHQ-gwVssR9XuynbXVOprjAIzOcaU_416nuZT1fWPs6esHD0jG--ZVH7MSaQv8ugOrjmEfo16d7x6qZ3xq_ep1HblYDcFFJK4AB0FgqBT7UNZDPrTy50JCqDThiu-go63V_kuqv8HqV24orwZ0IZ2gCZTTjscOIAkqtA4Tj6IkmjTKq_D3dPmdO94qNrA7JvjjI78WAHwmjpuhV_-llBmFxjIBv_r72U0r3Y6zOrhG49WyYolc0AgGXf56Sy7gr4H8_ylDp90OQY8c5xM1QDoqpvReNhQavq0sPou3jshHnIHRLPFKgznkcywuySxgtMICcPWfj_4e7aFq4pFJgCK1ELYGG)

I’m not going to give up, Fellow American. If they’re coming after me, it means I’m doing something right. _It means I’ve disrupted the swamp._ **All I can count on is you.**

[**Please help me today before it’s too late.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=030d967445094ab685d4a4f3c78d39c5&_e=QvVmTSJQiY-7iXlORvW0iYha9jSYs8Y6bmFxFcHQ-gwVssR9XuynbXVOprjAIzOcaU_416nuZT1fWPs6esHD0jG--ZVH7MSaQv8ugOrjmEfo16d7x6qZ3xq_ep1HblYDcFFJK4AB0FgqBT7UNZDPrTy50JCqDThiu-go63V_kuqv8HqV24orwZ0IZ2gCZTTjscOIAkqtA4Tj6IkmjTKq_D3dPmdO94qNrA7JvjjI78WPY3L5gKMVQHhXVE-7fJjpH4lwSNDsSJmpRdvbUhXp321gDrjrZtiiSRt7VQOSN0JzdH-0wJRrj0zvRLU3om78Wmkuip3b5CGLsFR2V18TuzQXjlbhrB01ApuOMmvMlLIpRyUYixodFDDxUZF-gFtV)

---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Choice words are also free speech
body:
Let me quickly give you the details.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7793946945e34ec5923e5d8f3764dc41&_e=jAYbIYoIk194EYda5FPqJ3MoQGD6LY7T6GFjqWIgR9oVxzePqP0B_veoY3zSOT49-1GOHZlFAFhU5cq3-lB3ZCHpuExPrCzJL_qDUArNH4-ZEJTLQ5osZz9rOMm1lDs8vDodjiQlKeoXWJBMsRPq1oYeaFbYve-Vs9QPZvqng7DDQhBgVPiQSdj3h4aKWvth1GzplIoOZy7deDeeS4RodPfXqb3LDH1ok5ruVj1RKLjzCkhQvPVFROaSRHwfkBLu2bp93Q0Pjc3fifhRO7P6DeeFc06FtRShj9sJQ5r7Bq0RIxXtJFPCoNhVJzDHmFgnxPzKwFHq1J0rkXAAWnTplDR1yFNrlIYH7-kLzy0RgrbGW1rswBlg5LVmmeMqQVuc)
---
It’s incredibly important that you understand the overt overreach that’s happening in this small town in Pennsylvania.Because I’ve heard you’re a steadfast American Patriot.And a threat to liberty anywhere in the United States is a threat to liberty everywhere in the United States.Let me quickly give you the details.Dave Bliler, a Marine Corps veteran, believes we each have the freedom, and the duty, to criticize the government as we see fit.This is a core American value and how the Founding Fathers expected us to stop tyrants. Thousands have died to protect this freedom. But when Mr. Bliler put a sign on his front porch criticizing the government, within days he received a notice from Olyphant Borough officials threatening sky high fines if he didn’t take it down.
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7793946945e34ec5923e5d8f3764dc41&_e=jAYbIYoIk194EYda5FPqJ3MoQGD6LY7T6GFjqWIgR9oVxzePqP0B_veoY3zSOT49-1GOHZlFAFhU5cq3-lB3ZCHpuExPrCzJL_qDUArNH4-ZEJTLQ5osZz9rOMm1lDs8vDodjiQlKeoXWJBMsRPq1oYeaFbYve-Vs9QPZvqng7DDQhBgVPiQSdj3h4aKWvth1GzplIoOZy7deDeeS4RodPfXqb3LDH1ok5ruVj1RKLgrV8s4HeuBR-u5xy9exCY2naZy3q8I5zwGjKmGLjo_1oJJKB3BBZRqwZqQguiX6BaAlmbitRJF2BRSG1PBZzYp1sjKdxtknnOzb_7yQsTKvm1e1gf8qOZA4cdoMQRfP1OtoCP-666AxE1hzFd3I220)
---
| Here’s the sign. And whether you agree with his choice of words, I’m sure you can agree with his right to say it.And listen to this..._**Mr. Bliler is surrounded by neighbors who ALSO have signs in front of their homes. The government only targeted Mr. Bliler’s speech.**_
---
| | The Blilers are taking the Borough to court because the government cannot restrict speech just because it disagrees with it!We filed this case to stop local government officials from censoring, restricting, and shutting down speech they don’t like.This is a blatant form of viewpoint discrimination, and it is 100% unconstitutional.**[That’s why I’m asking you for your support today to help us beat this blatant censorship and protect 1st Amendment Rights for all of us.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7793946945e34ec5923e5d8f3764dc41&_e=jAYbIYoIk194EYda5FPqJ3MoQGD6LY7T6GFjqWIgR9oVxzePqP0B_veoY3zSOT49-1GOHZlFAFhU5cq3-lB3ZCHpuExPrCzJL_qDUArNH4-ZEJTLQ5osZz9rOMm1lDs8vDodjiQlKeoXWJBMsRPq1oYeaFbYve-Vs9QPZvqng7DDQhBgVPiQSdj3h4aKWvth1GzplIoOZy7deDeeS4RodPfXqb3LDH1ok5ruVj1RKLi7eS5AI7l6zxHBD9MoCvkNnIxtDrIeSGSU1_yTwAVNTSus-Ilg-9bH4n0d3rwC5llQ4JW5mEvAzgQEEj8G_DMW25Z1gH43IZe9UL5mT7PS0d6tmSBoJuHAuDkm7Ojig5MOVxAVCYg6TZ3hQbImdArT)**_And if you can send a gift of $50 or even $100 or more -- please do it._ To defeat the radical Left not just in this case, but all of our cases, we need your help.It’s patriots like you who give us strength and hope for the future of our country.
---
| |
---
| |
---

clean_body: Let me quickly give you the details. | | | | It’s incredibly important that you understand the overt overreach that’s happening in this small town in Pennsylvania.Because I’ve heard you’re a steadfast American Patriot.And a threat to liberty anywhere in the United States is a threat to liberty everywhere in the United States.Let me quickly give you the details.Dave Bliler, a Marine Corps veteran, believes we each have the freedom, and the duty, to criticize the government as we see fit.This is a core American value and how the Founding Fathers expected us to stop tyrants. Thousands have died to protect this freedom. But when Mr. Bliler put a sign on his front porch criticizing the government, within days he received a notice from Olyphant Borough officials threatening sky high fines if he didn’t take it down. | | | Here’s the sign. And whether you agree with his choice of words, I’m sure you can agree with his right to say it.And listen to this...Mr. Bliler is surrounded by neighbors who ALSO have signs in front of their homes. The government only targeted Mr. Bliler’s speech. | | The Blilers are taking the Borough to court because the government cannot restrict speech just because it disagrees with it!We filed this case to stop local government officials from censoring, restricting, and shutting down speech they don’t like.This is a blatant form of viewpoint discrimination, and it is 100% unconstitutional. if you can send a gift of $50 or even $100 or more -- please do it. To defeat the radical Left not just in this case, but all of our cases, we need your help.It’s patriots like you who give us strength and hope for the future of our country. | | | | | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO | | | P.S. With your support, we can win this critical lawsuit and stop the government from censoring critical speech -– but that’s not all we’re up against... We’re still fighting multiple cases to stop the government from silencing conservatives, stop schools from usurping parental rights, and stop employers for punishing employees who exercised their medical and religious freedom -- and I need your continued support. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | Peter,

The 118th Congress is seriously dysfunctional because of the House GOP: an unprecedented ousting of a House speaker, 15 votes to select a new speaker, the expulsion of a member, and countless failed floor votes.

It’s no surprise that even House Republicans themselves are abandoning ship and leaving Congress — so far _**23**_ members of the House GOP have decided not to seek reelection or resigned early.

_**That’s 23 opportunities to flip seats in 2024.**_

[Peter, this is our chance to take back the majority and replace House Republicans with Democrats ready to deliver for the American people. name: Anu Kumar, careinaction.us
subject: Hi, Care Voters 👋🏽
body:
Time to get organized
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79387788/456322274/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThhN2E5MS0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReDb5XTAmNa2n05UMb66q5XrB13X8kiBGDKy50wT-3M=&emci=54f9fd70-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=9e8a7a91-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
I’m Care in Action’s digital organizing manager, Anu, and I’m excited to work with you to build the power of women of color – particularly domestic workers – and make progress toward the future we deserve.
Care. Is. Essential. The coronavirus pandemic made it clear. At some point in our lives we all need care or give care, and we just elected a president who gets that. President Biden’s American Jobs Plan includes a $400 billion investment in care. [Can you join other care voters and let Congress know care is essential?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79387789/456322275/1993771944?contactdata=ZsBrJJZ3k6NVMzcueAscnpfW18K2LsyCWNm2Eb6aWCuzfVWQWyoZeLw49/mZlufc1nfbeDLg4IUXZdWrvDsI9yKiNPEafiFMCnhSprYSZsi3fOBN0ErW0vuPXSCjEK9B&quick=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThhN2E5MS0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReDb5XTAmNa2n05UMb66q5XrB13X8kiBGDKy50wT-3M=&emci=54f9fd70-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=9e8a7a91-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787)
Most domestic workers are Black, Brown, and immigrant women. They’ve been some of the first and hardest hit workers in the pandemic, and it’s past time for them to get the support that all workers deserve, including jobs and fair pay.
New, meaningful care policies that fund long-term care for our elders, make sure homecare workers are paid fairly, and support family caregivers will help the women hit hardest by this crisis. No one should have to make impossible choices like taking care of their families or paying the bills.
There are 53 million unpaid family caregivers and over two million domestic workers whose labor is undervalued. Care in Action is always working to build a better world for women of color and right now that means making sure Congress is doing what it promised: create homecare jobs that pay fairly and boost economic recovery for millions of American homecare workers and family caregivers. **We elected them, and now we hold them accountable.**
Good jobs. Better pay. Benefits. Workplace protections. Support for families who need help caring for loved ones. It can all happen because of us. [Sign the petition to make sure Congress supports care workers.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79387791/456322276/1993771944?contactdata=ZsBrJJZ3k6NVMzcueAscnpfW18K2LsyCWNm2Eb6aWCuzfVWQWyoZeLw49/mZlufc1nfbeDLg4IUXZdWrvDsI9yKiNPEafiFMCnhSprYSZsi3fOBN0ErW0vuPXSCjEK9B&quick=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThhN2E5MS0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReDb5XTAmNa2n05UMb66q5XrB13X8kiBGDKy50wT-3M=&emci=54f9fd70-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=9e8a7a91-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787)

[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79387793/456322282/1993771944?contactdata=ZsBrJJZ3k6NVMzcueAscnpfW18K2LsyCWNm2Eb6aWCuzfVWQWyoZeLw49/mZlufc1nfbeDLg4IUXZdWrvDsI9yKiNPEafiFMCnhSprYSZsi3fOBN0ErW0vuPXSCjEK9B&quick=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThhN2E5MS0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReDb5XTAmNa2n05UMb66q5XrB13X8kiBGDKy50wT-3M=&emci=54f9fd70-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=9e8a7a91-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787)
**We’ve seen the power that comes with organizing. We can create a caring future where everyone is treated with dignity and respect if we work together **
Let’s get it done!
Anu
Anubhuti Kumar
Digital Manager
Care in Action

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79387795/456322290/-1554439957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThhN2E5MS0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReDb5XTAmNa2n05UMb66q5XrB13X8kiBGDKy50wT-3M=&emci=54f9fd70-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=9e8a7a91-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79387797/456322297/326371895?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThhN2E5MS0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReDb5XTAmNa2n05UMb66q5XrB13X8kiBGDKy50wT-3M=&emci=54f9fd70-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=9e8a7a91-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79387799/456322305/955979663?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZThhN2E5MS0zM2QwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ReDb5XTAmNa2n05UMb66q5XrB13X8kiBGDKy50wT-3M=&emci=54f9fd70-00b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=9e8a7a91-33d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=864787)

clean_body: Time to get organized Hi Peter, I’m Care in Action’s digital organizing manager, Anu, and I’m excited to work with you to build the power of women of color – particularly domestic workers – and make progress toward the future we deserve. Care. Is. Essential. The coronavirus pandemic made it clear. At some point in our lives we all need care or give care, and we just elected a president who gets that. President Biden’s American Jobs Plan includes a $400 billion investment in care. Most domestic workers are Black, Brown, and immigrant women. They’ve been some of the first and hardest hit workers in the pandemic, and it’s past time for them to get the support that all workers deserve, including jobs and fair pay. New, meaningful care policies that fund long-term care for our elders, make sure homecare workers are paid fairly, and support family caregivers will help the women hit hardest by this crisis. No one should have to make impossible choices like taking care of their families or paying the bills. There are 53 million unpaid family caregivers and over two million domestic workers whose labor is undervalued. Care in Action is always working to build a better world for women of color and right now that means making sure Congress is doing what it promised: create homecare jobs that pay fairly and boost economic recovery for millions of American homecare workers and family caregivers. We elected them, and now we hold them accountable. Good jobs. Better pay. Benefits. Workplace protections. Support for families who need help caring for loved ones. It can all happen because of us. We’ve seen the power that comes with organizing. We can create a caring future where everyone is treated with dignity and respect if we work together Let’s get it done! Anu Anubhuti Kumar Digital Manager Care in Action

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Wisconsin’s new maps are a huge victory for democracy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friend -
Yesterday, Gov. Tony Evers signed into law a new set of legislative maps for Wisconsin. This is a huge win for democracy and our fight for free and fair elections.
Republicans have controlled our state legislature since 2011, thanks to their abuse of power and extreme gerrymandering. But after a decade of hard work, we have finally secured justice.
With these maps officially in place, we now have the chance to take back our legislature and end more than a decade of Republican rule. But we need your help:
[**Will you please rush a $3 donation to support our efforts to flip Wisconsin’s legislature? Every single dollar will go toward our effort to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Wisconsin — making sure we win everything from the state house to the White House in November.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=1&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
I want to be absolutely clear here: This is not a Democratic gerrymander. Governor Evers worked in good faith to deliver on our promise of fair maps.
Experts say the new maps have 45 Democratic-leaning, 46 Republican-leaning, and eight tossup seats. Even Republican Speaker Robin Vos was forced to acknowledge the slight Republican lean.
So these won’t be easy races that we can take for granted. We have to put in the true hard work to organize everywhere. For the first time in over a decade, competitive and fair elections are returning to Wisconsin, and that means there are a lot of voters who haven’t gotten a voice in who represents them that we need to reach.
So if we’re going to flip the legislature blue, then it will require all of us working together to organize and raise significant resources. We know Republicans' playbook. They will try to flood our state with dark money just like they did to me in 2022 to drown out our candidates with nasty, false attack ads. So we have to be ready.
[**Can you contribute $3 to our special fund dedicated to flip the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=2&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.I_T5QN&amount=3&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=21&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.iVDKI-&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=22&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.0ufIZo&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=23&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.SGdEqN&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=24&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.OE_EdI&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=25&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240220-1-tt&t=26&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
I’m committed to doing everything I can for our candidates, but I know I cannot do it alone. We saw last April just how powerful this team is when we flipped our state’s Supreme Court, and this November, we can bring change and new leadership to Wisconsin once again.
Let’s do this!
Mandela

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=5216_196590_eL9hdV&akid=5216%2E196590%2EeL9hdV)

name: Bob Casey
subject: Why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2051%2E552475%2EWuRXY4)
Hi Peter, I hope you enjoyed the long weekend.
I wanted to write to you about why I have devoted my career to service and why I’m running for re-election.
**Pennsylvania is my home, and I’m proud to serve in the U.S. Senate and fight for the people of our Commonwealth.** I’m running to continue making progress in the fight for workers’ rights, women’s rights, and voting rights. I’m fighting for our seniors, veterans, and working families. We’ve achieved important wins that will make a real difference, investing in Pennsylvania and putting money back into people’s pockets.
But there are fights we still must win.
**Right now, Mitch McConnell and out-of-state billionaires are preparing to spend millions of dollars in dark money to take back the Senate.** They’ve made flipping Pennsylvania and defeating us one of their top priorities — and to stop them, I’ll need all the help I can get.
Here in Pennsylvania, we strive to be a Commonwealth in life as well as in name. That means we face our biggest challenges head-on, and we face them together, as a community.
[**Will you make a donation today to power our campaign and help us hold the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-2?refcode=em20240220-2&refcode2=2051_552475_WuRXY4&akid=2051%2E552475%2EWuRXY4)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240220-2?refcode=em20240220-2&refcode2=2051_552475_WuRXY4&akid=2051%2E552475%2EWuRXY4)**
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2051%2E552475%2EWuRXY4)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2051%2E552475%2EWuRXY4)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

Fellow Conservative,

Do you feel like the American Dream is slipping away?

Do you sometimes feel like you don’t recognize your country anymore... or that we’re living in an episode of the Twilight Zone?

Me too. My name is Eric Hovde, and I’m excited to announce that I am officially launching my campaign for Senate in Wisconsin.

I’m running because I have had it with business as usual in Washington. Career politicians and their radical Left-wing agendas are changing our country for the worse and robbing future generations of the American Dream.

I’ll be upfront with you. I’m NOT a career politician. I’m a proud husband, father, business owner, and fourth-generation Wisconsinite. I’m running to _RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM_. [**Will you join our fight?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7324b9999d334f88bdf55892615d4977&_e=I5eSiSx3gI0wREjU--yzR8HxarjgVkXA45sbe1dNXLDEvH0R2dLwohy_-4iTUhUtFhs_6nWdZ44vA5ktUa8HhPD14z0xSHwvpGv2e1zuEw05qypt5HLA8x_UZNp3qz9ii7XuSE9Nuxs7QDYoPc7NNu8xTGmviTtCoHReIIxw3GEDlELJyEhjiyfW85y9ohg69pVvqxGGLiw_NbvQq9Oz_lAMHOq_4OWTNqtaXx21BfeKrjggkGLT4-auIDDKuujGYEpqTlFukZOJKuybWN-xyGlHXL3B96xE8vX5I6Uq8j_83L3Y_q7XsVe7XbJZQ-x7nzs9NlVdSkOqB4g5qnwpopqkwoVqYz8UbuGyfhtJ6X8kRiwWn9riJyoGN8Lo7cC4epGWAFlxeLhrGj5-3vZYlQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7324b9999d334f88bdf55892615d4977&_e=I5eSiSx3gI0wREjU--yzR8HxarjgVkXA45sbe1dNXLDEvH0R2dLwohy_-4iTUhUtFhs_6nWdZ44vA5ktUa8HhPD14z0xSHwvpGv2e1zuEw05qypt5HLA8x_UZNp3qz9ii7XuSE9Nuxs7QDYoPc7NNu8xTGmviTtCoHReIIxw3GEDlELJyEhjiyfW85y9ohg69pVvqxGGLiw_NbvQq9Oz_lAMHOq_4OWTNqtaXx21BfeKrjggkGLT4-auIDDKuujGjdqnjlxqt5_At_FcDfBIaHfjp3jUi6r_C4RCY8-dfd8mF4iCFMZqRZJy6eKh_6DrCi7-fwMhd3lkUzwBpHVNVPLDlIKOVNc4asXjuBlA3ZsBTNF-hKuAZlPp0AiuUUGPDGmThSlb4MDY2a4IHYJd2Q%3D%3D) | [**WATCH LAUNCH VIDEO
& JOIN ERIC**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7324b9999d334f88bdf55892615d4977&_e=I5eSiSx3gI0wREjU--yzR8HxarjgVkXA45sbe1dNXLDEvH0R2dLwohy_-4iTUhUtFhs_6nWdZ44vA5ktUa8HhPD14z0xSHwvpGv2e1zuEw05qypt5HLA8x_UZNp3qz9ii7XuSE9Nuxs7QDYoPc7NNu8xTGmviTtCoHReIIxw3GEDlELJyEhjiyfW85y9ohg69pVvqxGGLiw_NbvQq9Oz_lAMHOq_4OWTNqtaXx21BfeKrjggkGLT4-auIDDKuujGOV5rFqyBW7fs0-sBRu2oVv6Dgo2SZJplLh3T6WeAch88ksvXh75RftCWi32bnRGJXzJuvJf0yyTjUKBIEPwYqVioYGagoN8Mxbn93nBvDix0fMtDK6YPKZMYCmRl1wD2naQ_w-fz2CWI0MQY_hxtxA%3D%3D)

**My Democrat opponent, Tammy Baldwin, has been a career politician for 20 years and has voted with Biden over 95% of the time.** She’s supported Biden’s catastrophic open borders, letting drug cartels overwhelm our Southern Border and wreak havoc in communities across the country, and voted for Biden’s disastrous economic agenda that sent inflation skyrocketing.

**Control of the Senate and the Presidency will come down to Wisconsin.** This will be the #1 battleground state for Republicans and Democrats. My opponent already has over $8 MILLION in the bank, with millions more pledged by Leftist special interest groups.

I haven’t spent 20 years building up a network of D.C. special interest groups to bail me out of a tough fight. [**I’m relying on the grassroots support from Conservatives like you to fuel our campaign to take back Wisconsin’s Senate seat and end the Democrats’ Majority.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7324b9999d334f88bdf55892615d4977&_e=I5eSiSx3gI0wREjU--yzR8HxarjgVkXA45sbe1dNXLDEvH0R2dLwohy_-4iTUhUtFhs_6nWdZ44vA5ktUa8HhPD14z0xSHwvpGv2e1zuEw05qypt5HLA8x_UZNp3qz9ii7XuSE9Nuxs7QDYoPc7NNu8xTGmviTtCoHReIIxw3GEDlELJyEhjiyfW85y9ohg69pVvqxGGLiw_NbvQq9Oz_lAMHOq_4OWTNqtaXx21BfeKrjggkGLT4-auIDDKuujGpff4aEDnaxInZNO38cOhlWNxDKcYJWTIU4YelxS8wCTT1nPAt5LR-dikG38PQma3T-3XWkmDs43iRZEBz324l7LPvmCIz5lOljN5H8zMW9CpSFpjyu8iOAiEEhYZ-xohWDs3WlEY-CrtUuVkhga78w%3D%3D)

clean_body: I am not a career politician – and that's a good thing. | | Fellow Conservative, Do you feel like the American Dream is slipping away? Do you sometimes feel like you don’t recognize your country anymore... or that we’re living in an episode of the Twilight Zone? Me too. My name is Eric Hovde, and I’m excited to announce that I am officially launching my campaign for Senate in Wisconsin. I’m running because I have had it with business as usual in Washington. Career politicians and their radical Left-wing agendas are changing our country for the worse and robbing future generations of the American Dream. I’ll be upfront with you. I’m NOT a career politician. I’m a proud husband, father, business owner, and fourth-generation Wisconsinite. I’m running to RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM. | My Democrat opponent, Tammy Baldwin, has been a career politician for 20 years and has voted with Biden over 95% of the time. She’s supported Biden’s catastrophic open borders, letting drug cartels overwhelm our Southern Border and wreak havoc in communities across the country, and voted for Biden’s disastrous economic agenda that sent inflation skyrocketing. Control of the Senate and the Presidency will come down to Wisconsin. This will be the #1 battleground state for Republicans and Democrats. My opponent already has over $8 MILLION in the bank, with millions more pledged by Leftist special interest groups. I haven’t spent 20 years building up a network of D.C. special interest groups to bail me out of a tough fight. I can’t sit on the sidelines as Democrats and their radical Leftist agenda rob American families of the opportunity we’ve been so blessed with. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite. Hi, it’s Andrew Horne, candidate for Congress in AZ-01.

The other day I was asked why I’m running for Congress. There are a lot of reasons, but the biggest of them is my daughter. A little more than a year ago, I got this text from my daughter Eleanor while I was at work: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79389351/456326394/-505280504?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_AH_20240220_FR_0_3MA_AndrewHorne_na_na_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3MTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1MjU3NTYtMzdkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FfMpBUzK-j4Vf5uLVyrOraF3qVAMO4iBLdJezPdYQSk=) The fear I felt reading that text while my child hid in a closet was overwhelming... Once I could finally connect with her on a Facetime call, her end was totally dark. I immediately heard her crying. Thankfully, she was safe, but it’s that horrific feeling of helplessness that has driven me to run for Congress. Because no child should have to go through that kind of trauma. Period.

Unlike my opponent, Rep. Schweikert, I don’t believe the solution is more guns. More guns will not protect my 9-year-old daughter when there is a shooting at the mall, park, or her elementary school classroom.

Unlike Schweikert, my mission is to enact effective solutions through common sense gun reform and do everything I can so no family in our district has to feel helpless in the face of gun violence like mine did that day.

**But the simple fact of the matter is that Congressional races are built from the support and dedication of REAL people who care. People like you, your friends, and your family._[So if you can spare it, would you consider helping our campaign so we can make sure more families can feel safe in this community?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79389352/456326395/-505280504?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_AH_20240220_FR_0_3MA_AndrewHorne_na_na_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3MTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1MjU3NTYtMzdkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FfMpBUzK-j4Vf5uLVyrOraF3qVAMO4iBLdJezPdYQSk=)_**

Here’s the truth: Schweikert has never and will never support common sense gun legislation, despite the millions of people who have died in our lifetimes due to gun violence and the constant traumatic stress on all of us.

I am running to defeat him because it’s high time we have a leader who is going to advocate for our kids’ futures—free from gun violence.

**But I need your help: It will take a grassroots army to make sure we’re able to defeat Schweikert in this toss-up race. The time for action is now.**

While my opponents are focusing their attention on courting big donors out of state, I’m focused on meeting voters and building this campaign right here in Arizona, where I was born and raised.

**_[I need grassroots supporters like you to ensure we can organize district-wide and win. Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can before the week is out so we can kick start our work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79389353/456326396/-505280504?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_AH_20240220_FR_0_3MA_AndrewHorne_na_na_1.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3MTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1MjU3NTYtMzdkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FfMpBUzK-j4Vf5uLVyrOraF3qVAMO4iBLdJezPdYQSk=)_** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: | | Hi, it’s Andrew Horne, candidate for Congress in AZ-01. The other day I was asked why I’m running for Congress. There are a lot of reasons, but the biggest of them is my daughter. A little more than a year ago, I got this text from my daughter Eleanor while I was at work: = The fear I felt reading that text while my child hid in a closet was overwhelming... Once I could finally connect with her on a Facetime call, her end was totally dark. I immediately heard her crying. Thankfully, she was safe, but it’s that horrific feeling of helplessness that has driven me to run for Congress. Because no child should have to go through that kind of trauma. Period. Unlike my opponent, Rep. Schweikert, I don’t believe the solution is more guns. More guns will not protect my 9-year-old daughter when there is a shooting at the mall, park, or her elementary school classroom. Unlike Schweikert, my mission is to enact effective solutions through common sense gun reform and do everything I can so no family in our district has to feel helpless in the face of gun violence like mine did that day. But the simple fact of the matter is that Congressional races are built from the support and dedication of REAL people who care. People like you, your friends, and your family.= Here’s the truth: Schweikert has never and will never support common sense gun legislation, despite the millions of people who have died in our lifetimes due to gun violence and the constant traumatic stress on all of us. I am running to defeat him because it’s high time we have a leader who is going to advocate for our kids’ futures—free from gun violence. But I need your help: It will take a grassroots army to make sure we’re able to defeat Schweikert in this toss-up race. The time for action is now. While my opponents are focusing their attention on courting big donors out of state, I’m focused on meeting voters and building this campaign right here in Arizona, where I was born and raised. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = In solidarity, Andrew | = ** PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF ANDREW HORNE Friends of Andrew Horne 611 Pennsylvania Ave SE #192 Washington, DC, DC 20003 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: =?utf-8?Q?State=20Representative=20Ryan=20Chamberlin?=
subject: Weekly Update from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/official-newsletter-12681523?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **WEEKLY UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| My fellow Floridians,

Thank you for joining me for another legislative update! We are now over halfway through the 2024 Legislative Session. Even though we only have a few weeks left to go, my colleagues and I still have a lot to do before we head back to our districts. I appreciate your continued trust and support during this important process! I look forward to keeping you updated on my work in Tallahassee.

As always, please do not hesitate to contact me if there is an issue you would like me to address in the Florida Legislature. It would be an honor to be your voice!
---
| | **Around the Capitol**
---
|
---
| It was great to meet with representatives from the Ocala Center for the Blind to discuss the important services the center provides and appropriations requests for the upcoming year. This incredible organization comes alongside the visually impaired in our community to help them achieve independence and reach their fullest potential. I am honored to support and advocate for their needs in the Florida House.
---
|
---
| I had the opportunity to meet with the Alzheimer’s Association to discuss their legislative priorities and work in Marion County. It is a privilege to work alongside them in efforts to end Alzheimer’s and all other dementia in our state.
---
|
---
| I was also able to meet with FDOT District Five Secretary John Tyler to discuss road and infrastructure issues in our region, as well as important projects happening in Marion County. This is a critical area in the continued growth of our district! I greatly appreciate the secretary’s willingness to stop by my office.
---
| | **Week 6 Committee Meetings**
---
|
---
| Last week, I joined my colleagues in committee meetings to discuss important legislation for our state. We are making great progress!

**Week 6 Committee Meetings:**
* State Administration & Technology Appropriations Subcommittee
* Judiciary Committee

**I also had the privilege of presenting the following bills in committee:**
* I presented [HB 1313](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=29fea973e6&e=d1c1b9864f) in its second committee stop, the Health Care Appropriations Subcommittee. It passed favorably, and its next committee stop is the Health & Human Services Committee.

The laboratory industry in Florida is experiencing a critical shortage of personnel qualified under Florida’s licensure requirements to serve as laboratory technicians. The goal of [HB 1313](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=cc046a2093&e=d1c1b9864f) is to help relieve this shortage by amending state licensure requirements and conforming them to the federal Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments (CLIA) standards that most use.
* I presented [HB 1415](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=056c846e2c&e=d1c1b9864f) in the Judiciary Committee, its last committee stop before heading to the House Floor. I am proud to announce that it passed favorably!

[HB 1415](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b6907583af&e=d1c1b9864f) would extend peer support opportunities to correctional officers and correctional probation officers. Peer support means to aid in physical, moral, or emotional support to a first responder by a first responder peer for the purpose of addressing physical or emotional conditions associated with being a first responder.
---
| | **HB 1371 - Property Tax System Study**
---
| My bill, [HB 1371](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=32e14a7497&e=d1c1b9864f), is making waves across our state. This great legislation would start Florida down the road to eliminating property taxes. If you have any questions regarding my tax bill, please watch the video below!
---
| [ ](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=84a0e7c27b&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
|
---
| | I am working hard for House District 24 in Tallahassee! Thank you for electing me to serve you. I look forward to keeping you updated on my work during the final weeks of the 2024 Legislative Session. As always, if I may be of any assistance, please do not hesitate to contact my office by **[clicking here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=eaec21ec28&e=d1c1b9864f "https://www.myfloridahouse.gov/Sections/Representatives/contactmember.aspx?MemberId=4901&SessionId=103&utm_source=Ryan+Chamberlin+for+State+Representative&utm_campaign=ae0a433299-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_08_05_14_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ddd94a0de-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D")**.

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 State Representative Ryan Chamberlin, All rights reserved._
State Representative Ryan Chamberlin

**Our mailing address is:**
1101 The Capitol
402 South Monroe Street
Tallahassee, FL 32399-1300

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=99d45c258d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=99d45c258d).

---

body:
add your name before midnight tonight

---
Friend, did you miss our message? **Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a joint resolution to _officially_ add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution!**
This joint resolution would finally ensure that gender-based discrimination is unconstitutional — and give us the legal framework to restore reproductive rights across the country. With the GOP targeting reproductive freedoms and civil rights more and more each day, codifying the Equal Rights Amendment has never been more important.
So much is on the line for our nation. That's why thousands of activists all across the country have added their names to tell Kirsten that they support the ERA — _but we still need your signature!_
**Please, friend, Kirsten is counting on reliable Democrats like you to have her back.[_Will you add your name before midnight tonight to show your support for the ERA and help us hit our NEW 50,000 signature goal? Friend, activists have spent 100 years fighting to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution. This long-overdue amendment would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender.
Now that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , far-right legislators have unleashed a slew of attacks against our reproductive rights and our right to privacy. **Passing the ERA is our best bet to restore those crucial rights — and we can't wait a moment longer.**
Polling shows 85% of voters support the ERA — and 38 states have ratified it, clearing the way to add it to the Constitution. But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!
**Thankfully, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a resolution that would allow us to ignore this deadline and make the ERA the law of the land.** With bipartisan support, filibuster reform and strong grassroots backing, Kirsten can get the job done.

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Our Republican opponent is surging in the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Undecided voters are not breaking for Katie Porter at a high enough rate, and that means we’re at serious risk of losing
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37983%2E3422442%2EXuUU3r)
Derek, new polling just released today shows that if we don’t get a surge of support in the next two weeks, Katie is out of Congress for good. _**[Is there anything you can give right now to help us fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240220-2?refcode=em20240220-37983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37983_3422442_XuUU3r&akid=37983%2E3422442%2EXuUU3r)**_
_**[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240220-2?refcode=em20240220-37983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37983_3422442_XuUU3r&akid=37983%2E3422442%2EXuUU3r)**_
Katie just needs to make the top-two in order to advance from our March 5th primary to the November general election. **Polling shows that Katie has a strong chance of becoming California’s next U.S. Senator if she makes it past the primary** —but that’s at risk because of Republican Steve Garvey.
Garvey is surging in the polls because Adam Schiff and his super PAC are spending millions on ads that promote him to Republican and independent voters. Garvey himself hasn’t run a single TV ad, but his name and face are all over California’s TVs thanks to this cynical play.
Undecided voters are not breaking for Katie Porter at a high enough rate, and that means we’re at serious risk of losing. We *have* to up our ad spend if we want to win over these undecided voters. **[In a state as big as California, there’s just no other way. $15 can help us reach 500 voters. Can you please contribute $15 (or more!) today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240220-2?refcode=em20240220-37983&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37983_3422442_XuUU3r&akid=37983%2E3422442%2EXuUU3r)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240220-2?refcode=em20240220-37983&refcode2=37983_3422442_XuUU3r&akid=37983%2E3422442%2EXuUU3r)
Thanks, Derek. We can’t do this without you.
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240220-37983&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37983_3422442_XuUU3r&akid=37983%2E3422442%2EXuUU3r)**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Black History Month this February
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Black History Month is a time to uplift leaders like Booker T. Washington and also remember the stories of those who came before him.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79390134/456328425/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-02-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q4MTJkNGEtMzlkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3zq_7wFNS_TvP6TqqccoaZzDnaiGfxsEuOuzctE6uPU=)
---
| Peter,

As we celebrate Black History Month this February, I’m recognizing prominent Black Virginians who’ve made a mark on our country and moved our nation forward.

Born enslaved in Virginia, Booker T. Washington rose to become a prominent educator, thinker, and political leader. When he was just nine years old, Washington and his family in Virginia gained freedom under the Emancipation Proclamation. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79390137/456328428/957947579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q4MTJkNGEtMzlkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3zq_7wFNS_TvP6TqqccoaZzDnaiGfxsEuOuzctE6uPU=&emci=c6b95963-04d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=cd812d4a-39d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=8470899) He went on to become the founder and first leader of the Tuskegee Institute, a school devoted to the mission of Black higher education. Throughout his life, he advocated for increased educational opportunities and economic advancement for Black Americans at a time when much of society was pushing back against this goal. His perseverance and his belief in progress were influential in garnering support from politicians and philanthropists for increased funding for Black education here in America.

Black History Month is a time to uplift leaders like Booker T. Washington and also remember the stories of those who came before him. Throughout this month, I will continue to share more stories of those who are a part of our Commonwealth’s shared story and our country’s history.

Sincerely,
Abigail
---

body:
This is the biggest difference you can make for our campaign, friend →

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79390302/456328811/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240220_team_monthly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDViMDI5NS0zOWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r8O5oagWGjX--nQcR3W1DhWQ1xsmo6nix27gVeyJ66w=)
---
Friend, our election this November will be one of the most hotly contested races in the nation. With so much at stake, we can't leave anything to chance. But it takes resources to build a grassroots campaign that can win. We're reaching Ohioans where they are — online, in person, and over the phone. That means we need to hire more organizers, build out our voter registration and mobilization programs, and be ready for whatever comes our way. body:
One of the races at the top of my list is Congressman Marc Molinaro's MUST-WIN fight in New York’s 19th Congressional District.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09de2c5768fd42c092e8208944f0de56&_e=w7X1w0wiQQQ5sYBCBSzIAFc_CvH7Nq8q0NslREJmBuMWG7V1dLjihUKOppZ11-k5weZHO5gtcK32hF_kOFpCzqpLdCdgg8nMXKofUkMe349IsClMm1Vd6I7qzCO4zzD1PVRGIIG5gkYFzoVqx3Ic2TFMq3o3kcL--LEBbm8zFb_xqVabDtRDYxk8w8VuWNlb5bYxki34vWQj47EbCy-5hwKI7YQPQwkFnLzd1ByixwYlt9aJdXOzUy_ovE_SFRE2FWxm3tbGKPKm04gw7ZQ7kF4zkQRBn8O8P_Z6W84ikAcZZuuacZoDj5Qxz9WX3vT6C-sWfPbZ_xVWPojz9qqtRMBzSjSybM_2tFr32bOxDycMCBwxV-HCO0KwQx95pxDb)

| Fellow Conservative,

I’m heading to New York’s 19th Congressional Seat to rally support behind Marc Molinaro.

**Marc’s 2022 victory in this battleground seat was instrumental in giving Republicans the House Majority.** Marc’s dedication has allowed Republicans to bring the Democrats’ radical agenda to a total halt.

Now, the Democrats are throwing everything they have against him, and I won’t stand for it.

Defending Marc’s seat is at the top of my priority list. [**That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in a few dollars to help Marc defend this critical battleground seat.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09de2c5768fd42c092e8208944f0de56&_e=w7X1w0wiQQQ5sYBCBSzIAFc_CvH7Nq8q0NslREJmBuMWG7V1dLjihUKOppZ11-k5weZHO5gtcK32hF_kOFpCzqpLdCdgg8nMXKofUkMe349IsClMm1Vd6I7qzCO4zzD1PVRGIIG5gkYFzoVqx3Ic2TFMq3o3kcL--LEBbm8zFb_xqVabDtRDYxk8w8VuWNlb5bYxki34vWQj47EbCy-5hwKI7YQPQwkFnLzd1Byixwac_EFv3QJ1aHj6Wv8FBiYyjx1Nb8K-4SSbnNjBdAFew0kfQ64Yn1cyZza02vWNWQHY3fZyjvYUAlXI1wx_RSrOjjjyln8NTHRLd_sca_pcB5P7Rx6iaqD03dyRgT2XFsJ8qKBM4hj5rMXARlTqSoDm)

There’s ZERO margin for error in this race. Marc’s opponent has already outraised him 2:1 with individual donors. If we don’t take immediate action, it will only get worse. **Democrats are fired up over defeating Marc and retaking this seat.**

Defending this seat is a team effort, and we need grassroots Conservatives like you stepping up right now. **_Mike Johnson_**

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. We’re running in a toss-up district – again – and Republicans will be spending serious cash to try to defend their slim majority in the House, so we need to do everything we can to defend this toss-up district. | = = Republicans have shown us what their priorities are in Congress – attacking reproductive rights, Social Security, Medicare, and so much more. The only way to ensure our rights are being protected is to take back the House in 2024. The path to retaking the House runs through this district, which is why it’s so important for us to build a strong foundation now and lay the groundwork for a successful campaign. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Michigan Uncommitted Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Biden's policy on Gaza is unacceptable. That's why we're going UNCOMMITTED in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1011?refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Rashida Tlaib has joined the effort to send President Biden a wake-up call
in Michigan because of U.S. complicity in the death and devastation in
Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14955?t=1052&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ][IMG]

Our Revolution, Rashida, and other progressive allies are mounting a
massive push to get progressives to vote "UNCOMMITTED" as a protest vote
in the Michigan presidential primary on Feb. 27th — just one week away!

While President Biden sends weapons and continued support to fuel
Netanyahu’s relentless bombing campaigns that have killed over 29,000
people in Gaza, we must show him that we have a voice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]With just a week left, we urgently need grassroots donations so we can get
as many voters as possible to vote "Uncommitted." Donate right now so we
can ramp up our efforts and reach our 87,000 supporters in Michigan.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

"We’ve got to do something that packs a punch," said Our Revolution
Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese. "Something that would send a
wake-up call to the White House and get them to pay attention to voters on
the ground and what matters to them."

President Biden has made unilateral decisions to send over $250 billion in
weapons to Israel while Netanyahu’s bombing campaigns killed tens of
thousands of civilians. Biden and a bipartisan majority in Congress want
to send billions more in financial support to Netanyahu.

Despite the outcry of the public to stop supporting this immoral, horrific
war on Gaza, President Biden has kept on supporting Netanyahu. It’s time
for voters to show him that it’s unacceptable.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14897?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240220&akid=5356%2E5885482%2EghZBns ]We have a chance to show Biden that Democratic primary voters are fed up
with his policy on Gaza. Contribute what you can today and we can show him
that if he continues supporting the war, he’s risking losing the support
of voters in November.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------
