name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Add Your Name: Become a grassroots co-sponsor of the Youth Voting Rights act today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Let’s expand voter registration and polling locations. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWDFlqPLdtQYTJwzUWH5Piz8-WSFwgKUqgxuYGCfYhLN4BPLEISXg63rQUr_IV1mEFoxYlarbQtE7WWNpB6NrdHdBbNhr8XawzxHVnCbwhtUsQAG3jTYcfir5pS0Yb1srO4w5NG8IzN2EnCKDoI6b_iMv7HpnIfAU--Je01Y-lllkMdRxpDro9WXc8AeiRHlfsccEgvwOJoqoGqf8sB341RCiw_qVikOpAuLfAt5UiqwKzy1SwYCSx9Oy5EbyQcB7QV89nO3OdXRg1ySBgTrVRem3iwkntyPAMOXYymF9V7M4/440/Ntd73_-FTPi-6MUDK4Gr7w/h0/h001.RY-hAhcw4UQd2O2C5LSxwEmtmBJ16DN7Q4g1t3JxxIY)
---
Friend, Young people represent the most diverse generation in American history.1 And, in three straight elections, they have turned out in record numbers to vote for a multi-racial democracy that includes all of us2―not just greedy corporations, billionaires, and those intent on maintaining an unjust status quo that puts power and money over the rights of millions. No wonder MAGA Republicans in Congress and in state legislatures across the country are attacking youth voting rights―putting up barriers between young people and the ballot box. **Republicans want to silence****young people, people of color, low-income people, LGBTQ people, and other underrepresented voters.****** That’s why I support Rep. Nikema Williams’ and Sen. Elizabeth Warren’s _Youth Voting Rights Act_ , which would expand voter registration and polling locations at colleges and universities, allow students to vote with their student IDs, allow national voter pre-registration, and more. [**Add your name now to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _Youth Voting Rights Act_****to ensure everyone has equal access to their constitutional right to vote.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-fYoCOM0GhPtGWT4ibJudeUoPVA3-GKSvaWOPx5pQKwlk6CV7oO-VZcN3SS2Rk_pQmJm835Yvzgj1j6fjuZfQYQRzXqXD-ayo2JVk3JKs0_w3ZUOBpTL1YfmTkK1oDY9xXHRdfgsbcEtUZ-yxB4d9MrmsmNhomi8JwH_y0DrZCAViDM2HneaRDMwG1GWEfyCh3BaKKU71ULDddMSzD5pthwCYQfoW45MpJeCmR_x6yoOleWwJ0bTyQhnzg45EbTCHjrrcZKuWUrppP-7mIvfYiILySvnHlpkOck7F-LPSm77-1iHoYD_el4NW2d03guHDaIuHxK3RHjSbpGfwwCqnqxoN3syk_7jmqbhf8Rw2YzkUbw5owj-WZwNIBTIobnuIrlOXjCB6VatkXmKCiQYvb5HgNA7DVveXiTD8YTUWsBnAUSbCSCNHexzySvRIZAMdybQFvCX_3ICTL7mbcnWBGoYNXDDSpuQw6ji4D7piwFHyNmwJ4KtUSgYCVY9SPc7XBMk0_aKYWOgJiSCZVnAw1JWjqzLTxrdWH3x8LX6MqcocuzNgJ8v0kmVdXlGlrss8/440/Ntd73_-FTPi-6MUDK4Gr7w/h1/h001.CmYh8UuvgeRWPt7KCgAE0iO4Q6PCAUVj8NrxX09veuI) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-fYoCOM0GhPtGWT4ibJudeUoPVA3-GKSvaWOPx5pQKwlk6CV7oO-VZcN3SS2Rk_pQmJm835Yvzgj1j6fjuZfQYQRzXqXD-ayo2JVk3JKs0_w3ZUOBpTL1YfmTkK1oDY9xXHRdfgsbcEtUZ-yxB4d9MrmsmNhomi8JwH_y0DrZCAViDM2HneaRDMwG1GWEfyCh3BaKKU71ULDddMSzD5pthwCYQfoW45MpJeCmR_x6yoOleWwJ0bTyQhnzg45EbTCHjrrcZKuWUrppP-7mIvfYiILySvnHlpkOck7F-LPSm764RY8fKoN466TE7VF88QAdV5rgWTy6evwJly7PzoHTZxlDqxBPOmfaebRPNGlQLVMjpzdUX7zKpX63Z4BKbo5cCZAeAR8sNe2zu0K8tZSwRdObeSwVJw269eR5WiWAUMNHiONr-YE56HEmZo_Jx4kUnTio1QUnDXEIxmDlKdM3AmS5tIHOU6BPJg_xzVdP_khnom0bS_Fz4vxOmrgNRq98pzNICwCHkDETIU9nA--f1cr54NqY8dqMDB4JAHMVnfF784wY_Mhkm1ljkHjP1dGU/440/Ntd73_-FTPi-6MUDK4Gr7w/h2/h001._tW_9-klliRbUHfBmpv6aHiVLxJc3a9jmsrb9U8lxsw)
---
Republican lawmakers have pushed for even more restrictions on our right to vote since the 2020 and 2022 elections, including closing polling stations and removing hundreds of thousands of people in voter purges.
Even in the face of relentless attacks on our democracy, the good news is that young people today are active and engaged in our elections. And, studies show that when young people vote in three straight elections, they become lifelong voters.3
I ran for office so our government could better reflect the will of the people. And we can’t let the GOP continue to undermine this. Together, we can end voter suppression and expand voting rights for all, as part of building a multi-racial democracy that works for all of us.
[**Click here to become a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _Youth Voting Rights Act_****to remove barriers to young people participating in our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-fYoCOM0GhPtGWT4ibJudeUoPVA3-GKSvaWOPx5pQKwlk6CV7oO-VZcN3SS2Rk_pQmJm835Yvzgj1j6fjuZfQYQRzXqXD-ayo2JVk3JKs0_w3ZUOBpTL1YfmTkK1oDY9xXHRdfgsbcEtUZ-yxB4d9MrmsmNhomi8JwH_y0DrZCAViDM2HneaRDMwG1GWEfyCh3BaKKU71ULDddMSzD5pthwCYQfoW45MpJeCmR_x6yoOleWwJ0bTyQhnzg45EbTCHjrrcZKuWUrppP-7mIvfYiILySvnHlpkOck7F-LPSm7zGohw2HtwFuQ0QLLx0GPfDwCbPiYD7r0sL4qho9oqdDfj6qywAWvBqzW6E-V3iah_ZfwkDADbzBDkC74ssa_rLcfvowN8iC1rmeg0V4oAdJsBaV4ijADDX39taNbKSJ6qjapiPYWPG7bXbdHQ2MVVTmU83EnWC380EcyRRAlAbuJ0XE8CAxa9-j3BVnhX1xmT_o6on6CisKQg28kmxpFzoG_IvlLN1UcuJptVV6a63iXe8IYLQPebX1DJ_olrqsaBVKVZmKlo3LIHhDOEqboAw/440/Ntd73_-FTPi-6MUDK4Gr7w/h3/h001.g09GzqinvGoQIPjz7Ln5aGGjcxIHsyJQLOqHa9s2YqE)
In solidarity,
Rashida
1 [On the Cusp of Adulthood and Facing an Uncertain Future: What We Know About Gen Z So Far](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRia_QPGW74RV_gVnXTeHDBP32a6XH_9o4HJr9MBmqzZBZ3_AEj8QlHbqTbPV4Erggy3cvWgTpV1Ko5VQENF3hi9ZrBf3S9KflOh8hlNdz32D5ZAmqqVWJuXb9aUPM8J8fRdlrYkwJzYVXp057oKlwpkUCh8McwSiZOp3dPNRb5XS0npygGT3DIQZSGbkH1ln4Gxfxbv9ryv4goE1FewLrRA0SI4pGfue69fktkjw3-xrnElDyrXTW6kbWVMSSbXppNWqpacsBYafbo8j9yZNNrPHtpWUpxLJ-rVu1JwoZDuT5tG5VIhT3xRI2Ma5HFw26pLrEbYPHGxndM9be7M_faOKLiQgjszm8g59HoesJcOYKvWx4dmzOdMAByTvwPgwu5HVSwfq1gYC9Ztenm1mObAfCYVm3Kt4o_orud_MlWJBsO_wK1aX_RDdCNmKJfdtIPtzVpL06kSE8AtRwoqbf7Z7xPUB-QOzbhKaYP2dFfz0tHni1HYw9U5wM9_o0F_HkkEJKmYxTmLv3CvcFMuOl8pGIxL1_g9Q2dZbBmaFPNV/440/Ntd73_-FTPi-6MUDK4Gr7w/h4/h001.A2LSTV-MIziELvIM5iR5xvihcxJO_pIcNwru_xXqh9s)

clean_body: Let’s expand voter registration and polling locations. | | | Friend, Young people represent the most diverse generation in American history.1 And, in three straight elections, they have turned out in record numbers to vote for a multi-racial democracy that includes all of us2―not just greedy corporations, billionaires, and those intent on maintaining an unjust status quo that puts power and money over the rights of millions. No wonder MAGA Republicans in Congress and in state legislatures across the country are attacking youth voting rights―putting up barriers between young people and the ballot box. Republicans want to silenceyoung people, people of color, low-income people, LGBTQ people, and other underrepresented voters.** That’s why I support Rep. Nikema Williams’ and Sen. Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act , which would expand voter registration and polling locations at colleges and universities, allow students to vote with their student IDs, allow national voter pre-registration, and more. | Republican lawmakers have pushed for even more restrictions on our right to vote since the 2020 and 2022 elections, including closing polling stations and removing hundreds of thousands of people in voter purges. Even in the face of relentless attacks on our democracy, the good news is that young people today are active and engaged in our elections. And, studies show that when young people vote in three straight elections, they become lifelong voters.3 I ran for office so our government could better reflect the will of the people. And we can’t let the GOP continue to undermine this. Together, we can end voter suppression and expand voting rights for all, as part of building a multi-racial democracy that works for all of us. In solidarity, Rashida 1 2 3 “FutureVoter Initiative,” VoteAmerica, Sept. 2021 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Hi Peter,
I’ve had a lot of titles in my life — park ranger, lawyer, professor, Arizona State Senator — but none have been as important as “Mom.”
I first ran for office to build a brighter future for my daughter and every other student in Arizona. Now, I’m horrified to see her growing up with fewer rights than I had at her age.
I’m unapologetically pro-choice, and I will fight nonstop to protect abortion rights nationwide in Congress.
Last week, my team shared that Planned Parenthood officially endorsed my campaign. I wanted to pass along the email in case you missed it — see it below!
I’m proud to have Planned Parenthood’s support in the fight for our most fundamental rights.
To defeat my anti-choice Republican opponent, we’ll need all hands on deck. Will you help us hit our goal and flip AZ-06 blue by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_022024_PPEndorsement_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_022024_PPEndorsement_act]
Thank you.
Kirsten

Peter,
The path to protecting abortion rights nationwide goes through Congress — and the path to taking back control of Congress goes through Arizona’s Sixth Congressional District.
Kirsten has never wavered in her support for reproductive rights. When she flips AZ-06 blue in November, protecting abortion rights across the country will be her top priority.
That’s why the Planned Parenthood Action Fund just endorsed her.
You can help Kirsten win next November and fight for reproductive rights by chipping in here >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_022024_PPEndorsement_act]

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393232/456334117/1033648996?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRkOGZjMGEtM2ZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7VXG76XFxaoIr8tawsgrx74ICyoeCOrgS5Z44vNS6Q=)
Peter, can you believe it? **Today marks two weeks until our must-win primary election!**
**[With voting already underway across CA-47, we’re in the final key weeks ahead of Election Day. But that doesn’t mean our work stops now. Will you chip in $3 to power our campaign across the finish line first?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393234/456334118/1033648996?refcode=em-2.20.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRkOGZjMGEtM2ZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7VXG76XFxaoIr8tawsgrx74ICyoeCOrgS5Z44vNS6Q=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393235/456334119/1033648996?refcode=em-2.20.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRkOGZjMGEtM2ZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7VXG76XFxaoIr8tawsgrx74ICyoeCOrgS5Z44vNS6Q=)****
---

In fact, our work only increases from here – we’re on the ground knocking on doors, holding events, planting yard signs, and running ads to get the word out about our movement.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393236/456334120/1033648996?refcode=em-2.20.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRkOGZjMGEtM2ZkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7VXG76XFxaoIr8tawsgrx74ICyoeCOrgS5Z44vNS6Q=)
**We can’t stop now because polling shows that when undecided voters learn more about my vision for Orange County, they overwhelmingly support our campaign.**

That’s good news, and exactly why we can’t stop our voter outreach in these final days and weeks. CA-47 is a top target for the national GOP – if they flip this seat red, they could maintain their grip on the House majority.

There’s too much at stake to let that happen. From protecting abortion rights, to health care, to our environment, and so much more, we need all hands on deck to keep CA-47 blue and fight off hateful GOP extremism.

name: Greg Casar
subject: Did you see my bill to fix the Texas power grid?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s the anniversary of winter storm Uri. Let’s fix the grid.
I wanted to make sure you saw the news, Peter.
**Last week, I introduced the _Connect the Grid Act_ in the U.S. Congress**. This important legislation is the first of it’s kind, and we’re hitting the ground running.
**[I want to tell you more about the bill, but first, will you chip in $3 today to help us power the _Connect the Grid Act? _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393697/456335078/1790083683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FiNjNmMC0zZmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rh1OI3sy44jNq_xsF2jx2DEaQtIG5z0VGPG107tK8xw=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393698/456335079/1790083683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FiNjNmMC0zZmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rh1OI3sy44jNq_xsF2jx2DEaQtIG5z0VGPG107tK8xw=)
Let’s start from the beginning: **Three years ago, Texans experienced mass power outages during winter storm Uri, one of the largest blackout events in modern history. **
The storm left millions of Texans freezing in the dark, without heat, electricity, or running water. Ultimately, the storm caused billions in damages and killed more than 200 Texans.
**The failure of Texas’s power grid was a preventable, man-made disaster. **
For decades, politicians and the energy billionaires who fund their campaigns have kept Texas’s power grid disconnected from the nation’s major electric grids. That means when the grid failed, Texas had nowhere to turn.
Texas officials like Greg Abbott and Ted Cruz have not only failed to fix the grid, they’ve abandoned us in favor of the billionaires that line their pockets. Enough is enough.
**That’s why I’m proud that we’ve introduced the _Connect the Grid Act_ to connect Texas’s power grid to the nation’s major electric grids**.
**[We can move this bill forward with the right push from folks like you. Can you chip in $3, $10, or $20 to help us fix the Texas power grid and prevent future disasters like Uri?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393699/456335080/1790083683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FiNjNmMC0zZmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rh1OI3sy44jNq_xsF2jx2DEaQtIG5z0VGPG107tK8xw=)** Your support really helps us put pressure on politicians who are standing in the way.
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393700/456335081/1790083683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2FiNjNmMC0zZmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rh1OI3sy44jNq_xsF2jx2DEaQtIG5z0VGPG107tK8xw=)****
---

Thank you for helping us fix the Texas power grid,

-Greg
****
Greg Casar
Congressman

clean_body: It’s the anniversary of winter storm Uri. Let’s fix the grid. I wanted to make sure you saw the news, Peter. Last week, I introduced the Connect the Grid Act in the U.S. Congress. This important legislation is the first of it’s kind, and we’re hitting the ground running. = = Let’s start from the beginning: Three years ago, Texans experienced mass power outages during winter storm Uri, one of the largest blackout events in modern history. The storm left millions of Texans freezing in the dark, without heat, electricity, or running water. Ultimately, the storm caused billions in damages and killed more than 200 Texans. The failure of Texas’s power grid was a preventable, man-made disaster. For decades, politicians and the energy billionaires who fund their campaigns have kept Texas’s power grid disconnected from the nation’s major electric grids. That means when the grid failed, Texas had nowhere to turn. Texas officials like Greg Abbott and Ted Cruz have not only failed to fix the grid, they’ve abandoned us in favor of the billionaires that line their pockets. Enough is enough. That’s why I’m proud that we’ve introduced the Connect the Grid Act to connect Texas’s power grid to the nation’s major electric grids. = Your support really helps us put pressure on politicians who are standing in the way. **= Thank you for helping us fix the Texas power grid, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

Since we launched this Senate campaign, I've had the privilege of connecting with so many of you and listening to your stories. Your hopes, your needs, and your vision for a brighter future have guided me every step of the way on this campaign journey.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Envisioning a better future for our planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Let’s turn our visions into reality.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79393926/456335399/1328794144?refcode=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NGViMDM1LTQwZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lUwjdodZf7ulYhZXULNF-oUw0kg2jsgVQm3SEaxpOFI=&emci=d5768035-25d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Picture this: a world where the air is breathable, the water is drinkable, and our children and grandchildren get to grow up on a thriving planet. We can build that future, together. But getting there means we need to take on the industry that’s been putting its profits over our future for too long: the fossil fuel industry. It’s clearer than ever that, unless we act soon, this future may be in danger. And everyone has a role to play: you, me, and especially our elected leaders across the country. **The Jane Fonda Climate PAC was founded to help elect courageous climate champions who are willing to act on the science when it comes to climate.** We've rallied thousands to demand change, pushed the climate conversation to the forefront of political debate, and supported candidates who dare to challenge the status quo. Now, as we venture deeper into the 2024 election cycle, the stakes have never been higher. The fossil fuel giants are doubling down, using their vast resources to make sure their agenda overshadows our communities’ health and our planet's future. It's a classic David and Goliath tale, but luckily for us — history has shown us that when we stand united, _giants fall._ But if we’re going to take on Goliath, **we need your voice, your passion, and your support to amplify our message and strengthen our mission.** Whether you discovered Jane PAC because you're excited about our climate work or you discovered us through our Grace and Frankie Live Event last week, I’m so glad you're here. Let's make a difference together. **[Even just a $5 donation today will go a long way in the fight to save the planet. Because every contribution empowers us to champion the leaders bold enough to take on the fossil fuel industry and fight for our planet's future.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79393927/456335400/2105508926?refcode=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NGViMDM1LTQwZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lUwjdodZf7ulYhZXULNF-oUw0kg2jsgVQm3SEaxpOFI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79393928/456335401/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NGViMDM1LTQwZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lUwjdodZf7ulYhZXULNF-oUw0kg2jsgVQm3SEaxpOFI=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79393929/456335402/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.874eb035-40d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NGViMDM1LTQwZDAtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lUwjdodZf7ulYhZXULNF-oUw0kg2jsgVQm3SEaxpOFI=)

clean_body: Let’s turn our visions into reality. | Picture this: a world where the air is breathable, the water is drinkable, and our children and grandchildren get to grow up on a thriving planet. We can build that future, together. But getting there means we need to take on the industry that’s been putting its profits over our future for too long: the fossil fuel industry. It’s clearer than ever that, unless we act soon, this future may be in danger. And everyone has a role to play: you, me, and especially our elected leaders across the country. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC was founded to help elect courageous climate champions who are willing to act on the science when it comes to climate. We've rallied thousands to demand change, pushed the climate conversation to the forefront of political debate, and supported candidates who dare to challenge the status quo. Now, as we venture deeper into the 2024 election cycle, the stakes have never been higher. The fossil fuel giants are doubling down, using their vast resources to make sure their agenda overshadows our communities’ health and our planet's future. It's a classic David and Goliath tale, but luckily for us — history has shown us that when we stand united, giants fall. But if we’re going to take on Goliath, we need your voice, your passion, and your support to amplify our message and strengthen our mission. Whether you discovered Jane PAC because you're excited about our climate work or you discovered us through our Grace and Frankie Live Event last week, I’m so glad you're here. Let's make a difference together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for being with us. Jane Fonda = P.S. I know not every person reading this can donate. I want you to know — that’s okay. This crisis won’t be solved on dollars alone, so thank you for being involved in whatever way you can. | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Join me in reflecting on the remarkable contributions of Black Americans to our state and country.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79393949/456335480/1032217744?refcode=em_eng_2024.02.20_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE5MjM2Yi00MGQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bPxEiUB0gnYpYFxGft9yHx248qgmAAnSSGJJEowjO4E=)
---
Friend, This month, we celebrate Black History Month and take time to honor the vast contributions of Black Americans, reaffirming that Black History is American history. From trailblazing suffragette Hattie Redmond who led in the long struggle for Oregon woman suffrage, to Margaret Carter who became the first Black woman elected to Oregon’s state legislature – I’m grateful for the contributions of countless Black Oregonians who fought to make our state a fairer and more equal place. This Black History Month, I hope you’ll join me in reflecting on the remarkable contributions of Black Americans to our state and country. And while we celebrate, we must also continue to dedicate ourselves to building a truly just and equal nation for all. Thank you and happy Black History Month! _Andrea Salinas_ ** **

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I don't buy it.
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79394465/456336198/-1206785504?contactdata=7i1sx8Agy3XAWohkWOHIamOkmzEs0kvh/0jEkuLPzKIx4L4uVRa/IVtibcUyuocNMxF7h5T6uRDXqlRb+UbayzIK9T8+Zrxmc9Z74zb1anz57/7vWuaS0kM7ZDukgZpT1KnYyufDlf0GUoUaJduLyPYvQCkZukGHmq4HTLw1Zt4=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGVlNjNhZC00MWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pEpBU6D6T_K2Aei-ShQ29X9wutzodsfCKAKaqzxNX5k=&emci=43e6c5da-15cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c0ee63ad-41d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=23190490) Peter, Earlier this month, the American people witnessed one of the clearest examples of a conflict of interest on the Supreme Court. The Court was hearing arguments in a case that would determine whether Donald Trump could be disqualified from running for President because of his role in inciting the violent insurrection on our Capitol on January 6, 2021. **Here’s the problem: Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife, Ginni, was also an avowed insurrectionist.** She was a key figure in Donald Trump’s campaign to overturn the 2020 election results. Text messages shared with the House January 6th Committee revealed that she called the election _“the greatest heist of our history.”_ **And we’re supposed to simply trust that her husband will rule impartially?** _I don’t buy it. And neither do the American people._ How any American believes they can get a fair shake in front of this radical, ideologically-driven Supreme Court majority is beyond me. If the Supreme Court will not enforce its Code of Conduct, Congress must mandate one. **[Peter, if you agree, please add your name to my petition calling on Congress to create a mandatory Code of Ethics for Supreme Court justices. It’s long past time for the Court to get their act together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79394466/456336199/-1206785504?contactdata=7i1sx8Agy3XAWohkWOHIamOkmzEs0kvh/0jEkuLPzKIx4L4uVRa/IVtibcUyuocNMxF7h5T6uRDXqlRb+UbayzIK9T8+Zrxmc9Z74zb1anz57/7vWuaS0kM7ZDukgZpT1KnYyufDlf0GUoUaJduLyPYvQCkZukGHmq4HTLw1Zt4=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGVlNjNhZC00MWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pEpBU6D6T_K2Aei-ShQ29X9wutzodsfCKAKaqzxNX5k=&emci=43e6c5da-15cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c0ee63ad-41d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=23190490)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79394467/456336200/-1206785504?contactdata=7i1sx8Agy3XAWohkWOHIamOkmzEs0kvh/0jEkuLPzKIx4L4uVRa/IVtibcUyuocNMxF7h5T6uRDXqlRb+UbayzIK9T8+Zrxmc9Z74zb1anz57/7vWuaS0kM7ZDukgZpT1KnYyufDlf0GUoUaJduLyPYvQCkZukGHmq4HTLw1Zt4=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGVlNjNhZC00MWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pEpBU6D6T_K2Aei-ShQ29X9wutzodsfCKAKaqzxNX5k=&emci=43e6c5da-15cc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=c0ee63ad-41d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=23190490)
---
Thank you for signing on, Peter. We must continue to raise our voices loudly and clearly about the blatant corruption at the Court.
— Mazie

clean_body: | Peter, Earlier this month, the American people witnessed one of the clearest examples of a conflict of interest on the Supreme Court. The Court was hearing arguments in a case that would determine whether Donald Trump could be disqualified from running for President because of his role in inciting the violent insurrection on our Capitol on January 6, 2021. Here’s the problem: Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife, Ginni, was also an avowed insurrectionist. She was a key figure in Donald Trump’s campaign to overturn the 2020 election results. Text messages shared with the House January 6th Committee revealed that she called the election “the greatest heist of our history.” And we’re supposed to simply trust that her husband will rule impartially? I don’t buy it. And neither do the American people. How any American believes they can get a fair shake in front of this radical, ideologically-driven Supreme Court majority is beyond me. If the Supreme Court will not enforce its Code of Conduct, Congress must mandate one. | | Thank you for signing on, Peter. We must continue to raise our voices loudly and clearly about the blatant corruption at the Court. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

body:
It’s a very special birthday in a month that really matters to America’s story |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79394516/456336384/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRiOTVhM2EtNDJkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Bb_T96JQTUr2o-5DRiYD3oOAlz1Wd72Ax9cqjnMIm4k=)
---
Hi Peter, Black History Month is a moment to reflect on the endless journey of our country toward becoming a more perfect union. “All men are created equal” was, from the beginning, a promise to ourselves that we would get better and expand the circle of belonging. 2024 has to be about continuing that great American story of reaching toward fulfilling that promise. Not everyone shares that goal. Today, which also happens to be the 40th birthday of Trevor Noah, we wanted to share a meaningful quote from his book, _Born a Crime:_ **_“The genius of apartheid was convincing people who were the overwhelming majority to turn on each other. You separate people into groups and make them hate one another so you can run them all.”_** In America, we’re not dealing with apartheid, but we are all too familiar with politicians who seek to rule based on _dividing us._ People like Donald Trump and David Schweikert don’t offer solutions but prey on people’s anxieties and fears by pointing the finger of blame and playing politics. Andrei’s running a very different campaign — a campaign of ideas and hope. And a campaign that is literally meeting people where they are — engaging with voters one-on-one at their doors. As Andrei always says, _“Stay off the sidewalks and walk straight up to the doors.”_ That’s how we win this race. **[Andrei’s campaign has always been about meeting people where they are, and keeping this up will ensure we win. Peter, can we count on you to chip in to help us grow our volunteer efforts and have people walking straight up to the doors across AZ-01?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79394517/456336385/-106617006?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRiOTVhM2EtNDJkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Bb_T96JQTUr2o-5DRiYD3oOAlz1Wd72Ax9cqjnMIm4k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79394518/456336386/-106617006?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRiOTVhM2EtNDJkMC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Bb_T96JQTUr2o-5DRiYD3oOAlz1Wd72Ax9cqjnMIm4k=)

clean_body: It’s a very special birthday in a month that really matters to America’s story | = Hi Peter, Black History Month is a moment to reflect on the endless journey of our country toward becoming a more perfect union. “All men are created equal” was, from the beginning, a promise to ourselves that we would get better and expand the circle of belonging. 2024 has to be about continuing that great American story of reaching toward fulfilling that promise. Not everyone shares that goal. Today, which also happens to be the 40th birthday of Trevor Noah, we wanted to share a meaningful quote from his book, Born a Crime: “The genius of apartheid was convincing people who were the overwhelming majority to turn on each other. You separate people into groups and make them hate one another so you can run them all.” In America, we’re not dealing with apartheid, but we are all too familiar with politicians who seek to rule based on dividing us. People like Donald Trump and David Schweikert don’t offer solutions but prey on people’s anxieties and fears by pointing the finger of blame and playing politics. Andrei’s running a very different campaign — a campaign of ideas and hope. And a campaign that is literally meeting people where they are — engaging with voters one-on-one at their doors. As Andrei always says, “Stay off the sidewalks and walk straight up to the doors.” That’s how we win this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Team Andrei Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Navy Reserves, the Department of the Navy, or the Department of Defense. ---|---

name: Forever Organizing
subject: 14 Days Left: Call Voters in the Central Valley!

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/CADEM%20Logo%20%281%29.png]
https://act.cadem.org/a/adoptca22 [https://act.cadem.org/a/adoptca22]
Hi fellow Democrats!
We're reaching out because the March 5 Primary Election is exactly two weeks away, and Team Forever Organizing is working harder than ever in our targeted districts.
Ballots are already in the hands of voters across our state, and we're pulling out the stops to make sure they are submitted before the deadline.
Central Valley Congressional District 22 will be one of the most competitive and consequential primary elections across California.
Without winning CA-22, we'll lose our opportunity to win back the House in November.
With only 14 days left, we're counting on your help to get CADEM-endorsed Democrat Rudy Salas past the finish line.
CADEM-Endorsed Democrat Rudy Salas is running to represent his home district of Kern, Tulare, and Kings counties in the Central Valley.
Rudy is a champion for working families, and will make history as the first Latino to represent this district in Congress.
Team, one of the best ways you can take action right now is by reaching voters remotely on the phone.
Sign up to phonebank with us directly into Congressional District 22 for the final days before the primary election! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/603841/]
Making calls is an easy way to take action from home.
Whether it’s your first time making calls or you’re a veteran phone banker, we need your help to elect Rudy Salas in the Central Valley.
SIGN UP TO CALL VOTERS IN CA22 → [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/603841/]
Thank you Friend, and happy organizing!
- Team Forever Organizing

subject: Kevin McCarthy had some advice for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
Today, I’m taking the former Speaker’s advice: I’m asking for help. Not from lobbyists or party leaders but from the people I work for. Help from you, Peter. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_t=DAlf5TtlM2gCsFPoHsnDlLToNTWjAvKcTxRu7ISGW6Pk6qeBuOyQSXveL5tged7dZrmhVy_einVWaR_uCyosGWVIyKH3YDnuISmwF_mX_VU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_t=DAlf5TtlM2gCsFPoHsnDlLToNTWjAvKcTxRu7ISGW6Pk6qeBuOyQSXveL5tged7dZrmhVy_einVWaR_uCyosGWVIyKH3YDnuISmwF_mX_VU%3D)
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_e=wL_ffnE7B-PwcQ9YQ1ZTXsJZ84QPPYdOp7ZgGMkaokTdgnPSvBAVxCzGcMaXqsSgyHN5g-y6MIXNfKsUg3GNe2579VHNj11AGVEtomXK5D4KYR7lVLc2P0dolJ4g2XIJtvOlgk4vGg-Vb4ai96pq07N9r5kAbTjNYc7EZxfquqe9RbinvH23MRHCHhYPsC9nx_bBJfGXYI73AAgA4tnPrg_0LGTTztVvUELlZHObxNf099JzcxtCF9Z7nLhePQGE36y5anO2ywNC8ziz4i0YQFmI_WqTKHduvOV41Gf2qbj-zmtkQ3zoRFCfAWMPZT3BZMtyWf40zrqAabAe4CksnwxjZ0OdbXdEe4cIRTITtyulzyHyappNitrAhc4hvHCA)
---
**_"I hope Nancy gets the help she needs. I really do... She’s got a lot of challenges." -FORMER Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy_**

This aint my first rodeo, Peter.

I’m used to people underestimating me. _Truly!_

I didn’t become the first woman to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets by having a lot of people believe in me.

I didn’t pick myself up after dropping out of high school and go waitress at Waffle House to put food on the table because of handouts.

I didn’t become a strong conservative FIGHTER in Washington DC because I didn’t face challenges.

**_NOPE!_**

I got to where I am because I am a fighter. I’m not afraid to get dirt under my fingernails and sweat on my brow for the things that I believe in. _**And I believe in America.**_ I will fight until the day I die for what is RIGHT in this country – _and I’m not a sell-out to corporate greed like the former Speaker._

Which is why he is coming after me on his revenge tour. I can’t be bought. My vote is not for sale. I work for the American people and the American people ONLY. _Which frankly scares the HECK out of people here in Washington who aren’t used to people they cannot control._

**So, today, I’m taking the former Speaker’s advice:** [**I’m asking for help._Not from lobbyists or party leaders but from the people I work for._ Help from you, Peter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_e=wL_ffnE7B-PwcQ9YQ1ZTXsJZ84QPPYdOp7ZgGMkaokTdgnPSvBAVxCzGcMaXqsSgyHN5g-y6MIXNfKsUg3GNe2579VHNj11AGVEtomXK5D4KYR7lVLc2P0dolJ4g2XIJtvOlgk4vGg-Vb4ai96pq07N9r5kAbTjNYc7EZxfquqe9RbinvH23MRHCHhYPsC9nx_bBJfGXYI73AAgA4tnPrg_0LGTTztVvUELlZHObxNcr0qv0530t2MJjEGAcINziBD_r-ilAu2erRO5yzn_7kEToKT7sRv8zP7Vy__D8XboT_noWGUbUgf4CZYKecpDY-NAW2qADO09SvYZdU-lwU6WKAtNjWK3DkzIZ-xlYgnULelek9BGPh4hBjgjyIc6I)

Everyone in Washington is after me. They are throwing MILLIONS of dollars against me, but I don’t care because I know I can rely on you to help me claw my way back to Washington and keep fighting the good fight. [**Any amount you can spare today, even if it’s just sharing my story, would mean the world to me.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_e=wL_ffnE7B-PwcQ9YQ1ZTXsJZ84QPPYdOp7ZgGMkaokTdgnPSvBAVxCzGcMaXqsSgyHN5g-y6MIXNfKsUg3GNe2579VHNj11AGVEtomXK5D4KYR7lVLc2P0dolJ4g2XIJtvOlgk4vGg-Vb4ai96pq07N9r5kAbTjNYc7EZxfquqe9RbinvH23MRHCHhYPsC9nx_bBJfGXYI73AAgA4tnPrg_0LGTTztVvUELlZHObxNfxnlqMLcL6cbI1nbj3XlI3JIioxKeeedMNdeCmmib9F5zf2_KSkuDmu8mljKFRwlHtzmUDdiP-Z5JCQTGpz7C5fnKZeqnKNwhVRIGnNoBn0vQuOBIpDxIeREGRxyW7KImBHLCycIE4LfOV7uUmqnzr)

[** ****SEND ME BACK TO WASHINGTON » **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_e=wL_ffnE7B-PwcQ9YQ1ZTXsJZ84QPPYdOp7ZgGMkaokTdgnPSvBAVxCzGcMaXqsSgyHN5g-y6MIXNfKsUg3GNe2579VHNj11AGVEtomXK5D4KYR7lVLc2P0dolJ4g2XIJtvOlgk4vGg-Vb4ai96pq07N9r5kAbTjNYc7EZxfquqe9RbinvH23MRHCHhYPsC9nx_bBJfGXYI73AAgA4tnPrg_0LGTTztVvUELlZHObxNcoSw6wDgW88FRWGY03ooYWMhUdJ1KNAl6rjZrZmWHEhW0hsVWwM01nfUC-7DaIDVgiaWgQSBhjPTsdrPBn-7uEH8VcM7OmqOIpOB15i6aUY9EUI86dD4NFinLAg60ltJTj8664aN4W-T4fe--2OZ96)

I’m not going to give up, Peter. If they’re coming after me, it means I’m doing something right. _It means I’ve disrupted the swamp._ **All I can count on is you.**

[**Please help me today before it’s too late.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_e=wL_ffnE7B-PwcQ9YQ1ZTXsJZ84QPPYdOp7ZgGMkaokTdgnPSvBAVxCzGcMaXqsSgyHN5g-y6MIXNfKsUg3GNe2579VHNj11AGVEtomXK5D4KYR7lVLc2P0dolJ4g2XIJtvOlgk4vGg-Vb4ai96pq07N9r5kAbTjNYc7EZxfquqe9RbinvH23MRHCHhYPsC9nx_bBJfGXYI73AAgA4tnPrg_0LGTTztVvUELlZHObxNc1l77QMrAqiouGNn4qmd1l1whz2wjE6V9CZQ-eiin9USboPU4SsMVE8pHvMvCVL7VSGdPf1EtVsW5okuk69bgBlCfH4pZEdTkEj7sY5m4KmiKucnh07xCIyIRh3jwMklYG_5snkaNmzuvkwqyRKh89)

[** ****DONATE NOW » **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_e=wL_ffnE7B-PwcQ9YQ1ZTXsJZ84QPPYdOp7ZgGMkaokTdgnPSvBAVxCzGcMaXqsSgyHN5g-y6MIXNfKsUg3GNe2579VHNj11AGVEtomXK5D4KYR7lVLc2P0dolJ4g2XIJtvOlgk4vGg-Vb4ai96pq07N9r5kAbTjNYc7EZxfquqe9RbinvH23MRHCHhYPsC9nx_bBJfGXYI73AAgA4tnPrg_0LGTTztVvUELlZHObxNcXmKr2BSjX_qWehe4AX9F5T0gRDjY7YwTxbcaCrBB3bxrNYXY2v0tPuEYa8-JDfC0Q2iQ-J0yNOr_cYfCBXOAUROSS8sCwt68LreDxQbeRCAsH3xOPvBGb8tuA05ZO-EcdFDzxSOoelzQbQtRIxPVR)

For America,

Nancy Mace
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a8c46a465de9456ea52921fbc7eb5dc9&_e=wL_ffnE7B-PwcQ9YQ1ZTXsJZ84QPPYdOp7ZgGMkaokTdgnPSvBAVxCzGcMaXqsSgyHN5g-y6MIXNfKsUg3GNe2579VHNj11AGVEtomXK5D4KYR7lVLc2P0dolJ4g2XIJtvOlgk4vGg-Vb4ai96pq07N9r5kAbTjNYc7EZxfquqe9RbinvH23MRHCHhYPsC9nx_bBJfGXYI73AAgA4tnPrg_0LGTTztVvUELlZHObxNfcZR1XpZZwt6OBOXw48IjWgyXTw9itLgFWe-tPnoXVyPkCAKLqGR8HyOVckeM-yJS0AxMoYcOJT4vVi6F9HHXCprkyFQn4GpPGsOdKNuGJFVGQCdQu23I5YVqX_va3u5OGKq0lUGLU3hgBolS5luvw)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

I will fight until the day I die for what is RIGHT in this country – and I’m not a sell-out to corporate greed like the former Speaker. Which is why he is coming after me on his revenge tour. I can’t be bought. My vote is not for sale. I work for the American people and the American people ONLY. Which frankly scares the HECK out of people here in Washington who aren’t used to people they cannot control. So, today, I’m taking the former Speaker’s advice: Everyone in Washington is after me. They are throwing MILLIONS of dollars against me, but I don’t care because I know I can rely on you to help me claw my way back to Washington and keep fighting the good fight. I’m not going to give up, Peter. If they’re coming after me, it means I’m doing something right. It means I’ve disrupted the swamp. All I can count on is you. For America, Nancy Mace | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. go.txting.io/mEWDMy | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress Nancy Mace for Congress | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186, Charleston, SC 29492

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you -- no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you 'll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven't heard of me, I'm an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Families like mine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Want to know why I got into politics, friend? **It's because I wanted to shine a light on the issues that mattered most to working families like mine.**
I grew up as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. From an early age, my family ingrained in me the value of hard work, showed me how unions built the middle class, and instilled in me the belief that every worker deserves the right to bargain for better pay and benefits, a safe workplace, and a dignified retirement.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79397134/456340942/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3435-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmFhODNkZi00NWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6vr-VMz8hRdryfbIFA9BqMvk025dX8as3FfSylSx_BU=)
My grandmother worked the graveyard shift at the Nabisco cookie factory nearly her entire adult life – and she was able to retire with dignity because she was a member of the Bakery and Confectionery Workers' union (the sweetest union). My uncles were firefighters whose union made sure they had the security of decent pay and workplace protections. I worked myself as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace to help pay my way through college, and I was a proud card-carrying member of the Culinary Workers Union Local 226 in Las Vegas.
That's who I am and where I come from – and that’s why I've always fought for issues like strengthening workers’ rights to unionize, securing paid family leave, raising the minimum wage, and lowering everyday costs for families. **But to keep up my fight for working families, I need your urgent help.**
**Mitch McConnell personally recruited a far-right, anti-union candidate to defeat me, and then a MAGA billionaire and shady dark money groups started pouring millions into Nevada to prop up his campaign. Now, polling shows me locked in a dead heat — in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control.**
**[That's why I have to ask you directly, friend: Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me defend my seat in Nevada, keep the Senate blue, and continue making much-needed progress for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79397135/456340943/2128632416?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3435-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmFhODNkZi00NWQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6vr-VMz8hRdryfbIFA9BqMvk025dX8as3FfSylSx_BU=)**

Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. clean_body: | | | Want to know why I got into politics, friend? It's because I wanted to shine a light on the issues that mattered most to working families like mine. I grew up as the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran. From an early age, my family ingrained in me the value of hard work, showed me how unions built the middle class, and instilled in me the belief that every worker deserves the right to bargain for better pay and benefits, a safe workplace, and a dignified retirement. = My grandmother worked the graveyard shift at the Nabisco cookie factory nearly her entire adult life – and she was able to retire with dignity because she was a member of the Bakery and Confectionery Workers' union (the sweetest union). My uncles were firefighters whose union made sure they had the security of decent pay and workplace protections. I worked myself as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace to help pay my way through college, and I was a proud card-carrying member of the Culinary Workers Union Local 226 in Las Vegas. That's who I am and where I come from – and that’s why I've always fought for issues like strengthening workers’ rights to unionize, securing paid family leave, raising the minimum wage, and lowering everyday costs for families. But to keep up my fight for working families, I need your urgent help. Mitch McConnell personally recruited a far-right, anti-union candidate to defeat me, and then a MAGA billionaire and shady dark money groups started pouring millions into Nevada to prop up his campaign. Now, polling shows me locked in a dead heat — in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. Privacy Policy

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Essential priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
EVERYONE in our communities should have a viable path to family financial independence and homeownership! **EVERYONE!**

During our many Listening Sessions and at folk’s doors across PA-10, we frequently hear that “affordable” or “public” housing is just not good enough. I agree. EVERYONE in America should have the opportunity to live in the safety and generational wealth-building power of a home they own.

As your Congressperson, I will work tirelessly to help make it so. Scott Perry fails to do so. Last week, the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) announced nearly $130 million to Empower HUD-Assisted Families Towards Financial Stability and Savings. In addition to funding programs to support economic independence for vulnerable communities, these grants provide renewed federal funding for Public Housing Agencies in Cumberland, Dauphin, and York Counties. This funding will make a tangible difference in our communities.

However, If Scott Perry and his “Freedom Caucus” had their way with the 2024 Federal Budget, little to none of that federal funding would have arrived here in PA-10. Scott Perry does not care about us.

[If you agree that facilitating a path to family financial independence and homeownership should be top priorities for our elected representatives, add your name here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79397320/456341296/-1930217902?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240220_1_1&refcode2=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&contactdata=UbR/7MYDIOtkKo8Zi3S/SjK/rU4t2/+CZ/4x2l9M+G1bO9997nY/8G+rf1ItiaDk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTMzMDJiNS00NmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSLv2X_v5eQ4LE6xv7fyZz2R3N94zY2k6mou4tVORgE=&emci=f9709e31-41d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24669367) | | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79397321/456341297/-1930217902?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240220_1_1&refcode2=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&contactdata=UbR/7MYDIOtkKo8Zi3S/SjK/rU4t2/+CZ/4x2l9M+G1bO9997nY/8G+rf1ItiaDk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTMzMDJiNS00NmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSLv2X_v5eQ4LE6xv7fyZz2R3N94zY2k6mou4tVORgE=&emci=f9709e31-41d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24669367)**
---
When I’m in Congress I will help ensure that funding for all our Public Housing Agencies increases. I will fight for everyone in PA-10.

I will always support and empower historically disadvantaged communities, including helping implement the “7-point plan to increase Black homeownership by 3 million households by 2030” articulated by the Black Homeownership Collaborative:
1. Homeownership Counseling
2. Down Payment Assistance
3. Housing Production
4. Credit and Lending
5. Civil and Consumer Rights
6. Homeownership Sustainability
7. Marketing and Outreach

[In short: PA-10 deserves a representative who will prioritize family financial independence and homeownership for _ALL_. Add your name if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79397322/456341298/-1930217902?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240220_1_1&refcode2=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&contactdata=UbR/7MYDIOtkKo8Zi3S/SjK/rU4t2/+CZ/4x2l9M+G1bO9997nY/8G+rf1ItiaDk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTMzMDJiNS00NmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSLv2X_v5eQ4LE6xv7fyZz2R3N94zY2k6mou4tVORgE=&emci=f9709e31-41d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24669367) | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79397323/456341299/-1930217902?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_240220_1_1&refcode2=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&contactdata=UbR/7MYDIOtkKo8Zi3S/SjK/rU4t2/+CZ/4x2l9M+G1bO9997nY/8G+rf1ItiaDk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTMzMDJiNS00NmQwLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSLv2X_v5eQ4LE6xv7fyZz2R3N94zY2k6mou4tVORgE=&emci=f9709e31-41d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=793302b5-46d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24669367)**

body:
Join us in taking action on climate

[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/VBjpzopsZmUc7f9QIe2Zvg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF0ZWVmYWhzaW1vbi5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmXVkjTVZQ8hhsNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR)
| | Dear Friend, The climate crisis is the single biggest threat to our existence. We are already seeing dramatic weather phenomena and the impacts of rising sea levels right here in the East Bay. It’s easy to be discouraged by the lack of urgency and progress but I am inspired by this generation of environmental champions, led by young people, who are changing the conversation and leading innovative projects to expand what’s possible for our future. Now more than ever, we need leaders in Congress that will not sacrifice our people and planet for their own profit. We need representatives that understand that the health of our communities depends on the environment we grow up in, and climate change is an urgent economic, health and racial justice issue that our democracy must prioritize in this election. [](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/He8IwQ2H7O2P1gpKHL9rOw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0RDaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGVObXJvQm1pZD05NzE4Njg1MVcDc3BjQgpl1ZI01WUPIYbDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~) | | [Contribute today](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/mMWfGX-UsuTJn1laBlnGGg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0SRaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP2VtYWlsPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20mZmlyc3RuYW1lPUZyaWVuZCZsYXN0bmFtZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTQwZ21haWwuY29tJnJlZmNvZGVObXJvQm1pZD05NzE4Njg1MVcDc3BjQgpl1ZI01WUPIYbDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~)
---
I am grateful to have the support of organizations on the frontlines of the climate action movement, including the** _Sierra Club, League of Conservation Voters, California Environmental Voters, Center for Biological Diversity Action Fund, Climate Hawks Vote, Food & Water Action, Friends of the Earth Action, Oil Change U.S., and Zero Hour._**
Together, there is so much we can do to make an impact, including holding corporations and fossil fuel companies accountable, investing in renewable energy and public transportation, preserving public land and outdoor spaces, fighting for access to clean water and air, and building out climate-resilient infrastructure. [Let’s build power that protects our planet not just for today, but so our children and grandchildren can enjoy the fruits of our labor.](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/He8IwQ2H7O2P1gpKHL9rOw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0RDaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGVObXJvQm1pZD05NzE4Njg1MVcDc3BjQgpl1ZI01WUPIYbDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~)
Love and solidarity,
Lateefah

[Register to vote](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/BrX1zswqjmXCyJ1XLNUhDw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0QYaHR0cHM6Ly9jb3ZyLnNvcy5jYS5nb3YvVwNzcGNCCmXVkjTVZQ8hhsNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR) by February 20th. Not sure if you’re registered? You can check your[ registration status online.](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/sCjVN5p2uBRbhqJeSe8jvA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0QfaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlcnN0YXR1cy5zb3MuY2EuZ292L1cDc3BjQgpl1ZI01WUPIYbDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~) Missed the February 20th deadline? You can use the[ same-day registration process](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8CDZg3fRoVSwA66920CzVA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0RBaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc29zLmNhLmdvdi9lbGVjdGlvbnMvdm90ZXItcmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uL3NhbWUtZGF5LXJlZy9XA3NwY0IKZdWSNNVlDyGGw1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) in-person within 14 days of the election.
**MAIL IN/ DROP OFF**
If you’re a California active registered voter, you’ll receive a ballot by mail. Make sure your vote-by-mail ballot is postmarked on or before March 5th. Or you can drop-off your ballot at a[ secure drop box](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8GoXK1n1gyANuem1oU-cmQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0QhaHR0cHM6Ly9jYWVhcmx5dm90aW5nLnNvcy5jYS5nb3YvVwNzcGNCCmXVkjTVZQ8hhsNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR) by 8pm on March 5th. Once you’ve returned it, you can track[ your ballot online.](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Rfrc0qLTFOtXSh3wC2ICCw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0QoaHR0cHM6Ly9jYWxpZm9ybmlhLmJhbGxvdHRyYXgubmV0L3ZvdGVyL1cDc3BjQgpl1ZI01WUPIYbDUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAEQ~~)
**IN-PERSON**
[Find](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/8GoXK1n1gyANuem1oU-cmQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnt7l6P0QhaHR0cHM6Ly9jYWVhcmx5dm90aW5nLnNvcy5jYS5nb3YvVwNzcGNCCmXVkjTVZQ8hhsNSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR) a convenient voting center for you. Vote centers open for early in-person voting as early as February 24th and offer voter registration, replacement ballots, accessible voting machines, and language assistance.

subject: Celebrating National Cherry Month with a Vision for the Future
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Celebrating National Cherry Month with a Vision for the Future**
---

Dear Peter,
This February, as we celebrate National Cherry Month, we're reminded of the rich agricultural heritage of Washington's 8th District and the vital role that cherries—and all of agriculture—play in our economy and community. Our Ranier Cherries are not just a delicious treat; they're a symbol of the hard work and dedication of our local farmers and the bounty of our beautiful district.
In honor of National Cherry Month, our campaign is committed to supporting policies that promote agricultural prosperity and sustainability. We understand that our farmers face unique challenges, from market fluctuations to environmental concerns, and we pledge to advocate for solutions that ensure the continued growth and success of our agricultural sector.
---
| | | |
---
|
Your contribution today will help us advance this vision. By supporting our campaign, you're standing with our farmers and ensuring that we can continue to enjoy the fruits of their labor for generations to come.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/65d535f818293e8a9f034038/65d4f2845c6d7cd7d6d03d9a/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=36664bab6ea3fccd7fb229cfd426cf64d102bde29a3a5ae0d8a1ea6c8342e867)
---
| | | Let's come together to celebrate our district's agricultural roots and work towards a future where our community and economy flourish. Donate now to support a thriving and sustainable agricultural future.
Thank you for your support and for celebrating National Cherry Month with us.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

| [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=ac283e5b96934cce84e41537e6b986ba&_e=nPT4KNBkAgYBmkQ78snMzJfzsVIFMrN2Z4GyRXgb40yY6xEkuJozP0AmgDdk6IVGix2aVjE1lUFAOp3FKab31379tac67N1otsh8Urx9mA3H3NQtnFLKPJqB8PUMLaSNQh2Xp1Gsr4ykfIZ_SBQmmvyIWZHIuvXGxHbj3Te6wJ0Z91dcU2bDstTY95OcfbsHgfo9z5oFzVL4h3hw2F_ej52xoEwZqtLwlhGs7rKVxXupWXpjha8MTx0nrTTNThtspcCOkqdUqJ8YDBFgbwMlQBFFxs0BMe-YRGDG--y4iWQxh3QkcKOYMFrMIDXpFp-Y)

**Matt Dolan Endorsed by Ohio 's Largest Newspaper As Moreno Continues to Dodge Media Requests**

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
This weekend, Republican U.S. Senate candidate Matt Dolan earned the endorsement of **The Cleveland Plain Dealer** , Ohio's largest newspaper. In their endorsement, the editorial board described Dolan as "one of the most respected Republicans at the Statehouse, who has been trusted repeatedly by GOP leadership with helping to quarterback the state's politically fraught two-year budget process, would unquestionably be Sherrod Brown's biggest threat."

**The Cleveland Plain Dealer and Dayton Daily News** , on the same day, announced to readers in Ohio that Bernie Moreno continued to declined news media interviews. In recent weeks, Moreno has routinely ignored questions about his past legal troubles, wage lawsuits and the action he took to shred documents a court ordered him to maintain for the benefit of his employees.

[](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=ac283e5b96934cce84e41537e6b986ba&_e=nPT4KNBkAgYBmkQ78snMzJfzsVIFMrN2Z4GyRXgb40yY6xEkuJozP0AmgDdk6IVGix2aVjE1lUFAOp3FKab31379tac67N1otsh8Urx9mA3H3NQtnFLKPJqB8PUMLaSNCvq55Zm9VP4nLwOKJkYnUTnWF68scxvfmG4mU3ikJh3Ml6acDZpc_zbZWZuevAKbOPG0277XxKeJ88OvHl2hFfodcBvShA53S2Xo_0JaQjSCzHsyrMZmnEWIs3QESezq9ZNpBVrRNSp5ukiyvxyUtOIW4Z_tMLgSVF0Ze9Tg08343tL71qaxkOg_cnUgnq9s)
**Matt Dolan for U.S. Senate in the Republican primary: endorsement editorial**

February 18, 2024

The Editorial Board
A [**trio of Ohio Republicans is competing for their party 's nomination**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=ac283e5b96934cce84e41537e6b986ba&_e=nPT4KNBkAgYBmkQ78snMzJfzsVIFMrN2Z4GyRXgb40yY6xEkuJozP0AmgDdk6IVGix2aVjE1lUFAOp3FKab31379tac67N1otsh8Urx9mA3H3NQtnFLKPJqB8PUMLaSNQh2Xp1Gsr4ykfIZ_SBQmmvyIWZHIuvXGxHbj3Te6wJ3wnHtk_RtsFW9W-ipnmijGI42F2UQv2Jf8Q8TEOGCrwNrjNdMkv0bah-lYJEqSuCD_hOypgew0HX0kjHfWJUNOCjE49MNb3U6SZOXj8jUolybNUZQJPisAw-qiHMiIggGZ4RmhcKz8rBPiEb9fkdbB) to challenge three-term incumbent Democratic Sen. Sherrod Brown, of Cleveland, for a U.S. Senate term that will begin in January. Brown was first elected in 2006, then re-elected in 2012 and 2018.

The three GOP contenders for Brown's Senate seat are:

* State Sen. Matt Dolan, 59, of Chagrin Falls, chair of the Ohio Senate's Finance Committee, which helps craft Ohio's state budgets.

* Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose, 44, of Upper Arlington, the state's chief elections officer and a former state senator.

* Westlake entrepreneur Bernie Moreno, in his mid-50s, a former automobile dealer who is endorsed by the presumptive GOP presidential nominee, Donald J. Trump.

LaRose declined to participate in The Plain Dealer/cleveland.com endorsement interview; Moreno's campaign declined to abide by longstanding ground rules for the endorsement interview, so Moreno didn't participate, either.

No matter. Dolan, one of the most respected Republicans at the Statehouse, who has been trusted repeatedly by GOP leadership with helping to quarterback the state's politically fraught two-year budget process, would unquestionably be Sherrod Brown's biggest threat. As Dolan himself notes, he would credibly challenge Brown, who lives in Cleveland, in the state's heavily Democratic Northeast, where Dolan also lives and polls well.

But beyond that, Dolan is no Trump sycophant. He would represent Ohio with diligence and care, mindful of constituents' needs -- just as he has during his dozen years in the legislature, serving in the Ohio House from 2005 to 2010, where he also chaired its budget-writing Finance Committees, and in the Ohio Senate since 2017. And in 2010, Dolan was a candidate in the first election for the new Cuyahoga County executive.

In 2022, Dolan ran for a GOP U.S. Senate nomination that was instead won by Cincinnati Republican J.D. Vance, who went on to win the Senate seat. In that 2022 GOP senatorial primary contest, upended by Trump's last-minute endorsement of Vance, Dolan ran third, carrying Cuyahoga, Geauga and Franklin counties.

Constitutionally, the Senate has a major role in foreign affairs. And one of the most pressing issues facing the United States is [**how to secure its border with Mexico.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=ac283e5b96934cce84e41537e6b986ba&_e=nPT4KNBkAgYBmkQ78snMzJfzsVIFMrN2Z4GyRXgb40yY6xEkuJozP0AmgDdk6IVGix2aVjE1lUFAOp3FKab31379tac67N1otsh8Urx9mA3H3NQtnFLKPJqB8PUMLaSNQh2Xp1Gsr4ykfIZ_SBQmmvyIWZHIuvXGxHbj3Te6wJ1_Q7P7VOFtcRSNuyOw3S-bFqZ16W-rt47HCexHr9tw1cwBDRh0a3k4BCljAO0agMALnxi0U8enQSq7C444mf8ir4uJQfuJj1jSxxypa3nSjsSgDGdZ_0wl93AQ0HyW1XEQOfphEnEkgY4XVeD0Bu4v)

Dolan said of the border, "we have a patient that's bleeding ... and we have to stop the bleeding before we start talking about reconstructive surgery." Dolan argues for closing the U.S.-Mexico border to any new asylum-seekers until the process, funding and approach can be fixed. And he needled Brown and other Democrats for what he sees as an attempt to downplay the border crisis.

As for the Middle East, "I think Israel has the absolute right to defend itself against ... a terrorist organization backed by Iran," he said.

And on the Russian-Ukrainian War, Dolan argued for helping Ukraine stand up to Russia. "I don't want [U.S.] boots on the ground in Ukraine, but you know where else I don't want boots on the ground? I don't want American boots in Poland and the Baltics, in Western Europe and perhaps in the Asia/Pacific [region] ... if we appease Putin, which, unfortunately, there's some in my party that want to do," Dolan said.

On abortion, Dolan said he has consistently supported what he believes many Ohioans support -- commonsense abortion restrictions with exceptions in cases of incest or rape, or to save the life of the mother.

Ohio Republicans can't say they lack for candidates for the right to challenge Brown, but in Matt Dolan they have an exceptional contender whose maturity, and budget-crafting experience clearly qualify him for higher office.

Dolan would likely approach the issues the Senate wrestles with in a constructive and thoughtful manner, without grandstanding or bluster. And his experience and knowledge of the challenges that Greater Cleveland faces would be a plus for this region in Washington.

Ohio's Republican voters should nominate Matt Dolan as their candidate for the U.S. Senate in the March 19 primary. Early voting begins Feb. 21.

For more information on Matt Dolan's campaign for U.S. Senate, visit [**_www.dolanforohio.com._**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=ac283e5b96934cce84e41537e6b986ba&_e=nPT4KNBkAgYBmkQ78snMzJfzsVIFMrN2Z4GyRXgb40yY6xEkuJozP0AmgDdk6IVGix2aVjE1lUFAOp3FKab31379tac67N1otsh8Urx9mA3H3NQtnFLKPJqB8PUMLaSNQh2Xp1Gsr4ykfIZ_SBQmmvyIWZHIuvXGxHbj3Te6wJ3aIFkJP_9bM2IxDA0FGrIfW1-gl-WA2bBf0_CvzRT9bNv10fBC4ZkrdTeQ5MI6V9tBELgC1p2QW7FIib0FYxCQPKryiKZF0CyEKE6PlMDU5BNQTdzcNC4PFYXaJz46EFnLwpQQp20T8Tio9ohhaBF2)

Westlake entrepreneur Bernie Moreno, in his mid-50s, a former automobile dealer who is endorsed by the presumptive GOP presidential nominee, Donald J. Trump. LaRose declined to participate in The Plain Dealer/cleveland.com endorsement interview; Moreno's campaign declined to abide by longstanding ground rules for the endorsement interview, so Moreno didn't participate, either. No matter. Dolan, one of the most respected Republicans at the Statehouse, who has been trusted repeatedly by GOP leadership with helping to quarterback the state's politically fraught two-year budget process, would unquestionably be Sherrod Brown's biggest threat. As Dolan himself notes, he would credibly challenge Brown, who lives in Cleveland, in the state's heavily Democratic Northeast, where Dolan also lives and polls well. But beyond that, Dolan is no Trump sycophant. He would represent Ohio with diligence and care, mindful of constituents' needs -- just as he has during his dozen years in the legislature, serving in the Ohio House from 2005 to 2010, where he also chaired its budget-writing Finance Committees, and in the Ohio Senate since 2017. And in 2010, Dolan was a candidate in the first election for the new Cuyahoga County executive. In 2022, Dolan ran for a GOP U.S. Senate nomination that was instead won by Cincinnati Republican J.D. Vance, who went on to win the Senate seat. In that 2022 GOP senatorial primary contest, upended by Trump's last-minute endorsement of Vance, Dolan ran third, carrying Cuyahoga, Geauga and Franklin counties. Constitutionally, the Senate has a major role in foreign affairs. And one of the most pressing issues facing the United States is Dolan said of the border, "we have a patient that's bleeding ... and we have to stop the bleeding before we start talking about reconstructive surgery." Dolan argues for closing the U.S.-Mexico border to any new asylum-seekers until the process, funding and approach can be fixed. And he needled Brown and other Democrats for what he sees as an attempt to downplay the border crisis. As for the Middle East, "I think Israel has the absolute right to defend itself against ... a terrorist organization backed by Iran," he said. And on the Russian-Ukrainian War, Dolan argued for helping Ukraine stand up to Russia. "I don't want [U.S.] boots on the ground in Ukraine, but you know where else I don't want boots on the ground? I don't want American boots in Poland and the Baltics, in Western Europe and perhaps in the Asia/Pacific [region] ... if we appease Putin, which, unfortunately, there's some in my party that want to do," Dolan said. On abortion, Dolan said he has consistently supported what he believes many Ohioans support -- commonsense abortion restrictions with exceptions in cases of incest or rape, or to save the life of the mother. Ohio Republicans can't say they lack for candidates for the right to challenge Brown, but in Matt Dolan they have an exceptional contender whose maturity, and budget-crafting experience clearly qualify him for higher office. Dolan would likely approach the issues the Senate wrestles with in a constructive and thoughtful manner, without grandstanding or bluster. And his experience and knowledge of the challenges that Greater Cleveland faces would be a plus for this region in Washington. Ohio's Republican voters should nominate Matt Dolan as their candidate for the U.S. Senate in the March 19 primary. Early voting begins Feb. 21. For more information on Matt Dolan's campaign for U.S. Senate, visit _\- Dolan HQ ** | PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1344300.643.1.90280c59fe11e8300931c08367410891 )

Friend,,

For the second time this week, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, and shouting at the top of their lungs.

They claim to be protesting Israel’s actions in Gaza, _but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me_.

\*\*
I won’t be intimidated by these lefty malcontents and their liberal paymasters- but I need your help to stand strong and fight back. Will you chip in right now to let me and my family know you’re with us? >>

https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1344300.644.1.99f9d7bc4484f487043035dc2315b744 ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1344300.645.1.c9e7e4dc730b67e71c8bcb458887f5fa )
\*\*

Sadly, this is now common in American politics thanks to the far-left non-profits that fund political agitators seemingly everywhere on every issue- we see protesters blocking traffic, interrupting campus speeches, screaming hatred on the streets, and even attempting to vandalize artwork in museums. _Now they’ve come to my home... _

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Avdiivka
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
Derek:
Over the weekend, Avdiivka fell to Russian forces. Brave Ukrainians fought and died defending the city for months. They were forced to withdraw because they ran out of ammunition.
It’s the latest development in a conflict where our allies have stepped up to defend Ukraine and their fight for democracy, while America’s commitment has fallen short.
And the responsibility for the loss of Avdiivka, the fallen Ukrainian fighters, the advance of Putin’s forces all rest on Donald Trump, Mike Johnson, and the rest of the GOP.
They are Putin’s puppets, and they are playing their part perfectly.
It’s why we released our latest video, “Appeasement”, last week. And it’s why we won’t rest until every American knows that Trump and the GOP would lead us to the end of democracy, to war, and to American lives lost.
**[If you have a minute, watch “Appeasement” and make a donation to help us get this in front of the people who need to see it.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-appeasement.vDZ25l&refcode=em240220-1-30&t=1&akid=24916%2E3013755%2EKMijub)**
| [WATCH HERE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-appeasement.vDZ25l&refcode=em240220-1-30&t=2&akid=24916%2E3013755%2EKMijub)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Leftwing Protesters Outside My House
body:
( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1392779.651.1.d92bd6dc720477aa88d562f29d523834 )

Friend,

For the second time this week, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, and shouting at the top of their lungs.
